authors_text: Sara Adkins,Pedro Sarmento,Mathieu Barthet
title: LooperGP: A Loopable Sequence Model for Live Coding Performance using GuitarPro Tablature
title_zh: LooperGP：使用 GuitarPro Tablature 进行现场编码表演的可循环序列模型
comment: The Version of Record of this contribution is published in Proceedings of EvoMUSART: International Conference on Computational Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design (Part of EvoStar) 2023
comments: The Version of Record of this contribution is published in Proceedings of EvoMUSART: International Conference on Computational Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design (Part of EvoStar) 2023
abstract: Despite their impressive offline results, deep learning models for symbolic music generation are not widely used in live performances due to a deficit of musically meaningful control parameters and a lack of structured musical form in their outputs. To address these issues we introduce LooperGP, a method for steering a Transformer-XL model towards generating loopable musical phrases of a specified number of bars and time signature, enabling a tool for live coding performances. We show that by training LooperGP on a dataset of 93,681 musical loops extracted from the DadaGP dataset, we are able to steer its generative output towards generating 3x as many loopable phrases as our baseline. In a subjective listening test conducted by 31 participants, LooperGP loops achieved positive median ratings in originality, musical coherence and loop smoothness, demonstrating its potential as a performance tool.
summary: Despite their impressive offline results, deep learning models for symbolic music generation are not widely used in live performances due to a deficit of musically meaningful control parameters and a lack of structured musical form in their outputs. To address these issues we introduce LooperGP, a method for steering a Transformer-XL model towards generating loopable musical phrases of a specified number of bars and time signature, enabling a tool for live coding performances. We show that by training LooperGP on a dataset of 93,681 musical loops extracted from the DadaGP dataset, we are able to steer its generative output towards generating 3x as many loopable phrases as our baseline. In a subjective listening test conducted by 31 participants, LooperGP loops achieved positive median ratings in originality, musical coherence and loop smoothness, demonstrating its potential as a performance tool.
abstract_zh: 尽管离线结果令人印象深刻，但由于缺乏音乐上有意义的控制参数以及输出中缺乏结构化的音乐形式，用于符号音乐生成的深度学习模型并未广泛应用于现场表演。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 LooperGP，这是一种用于引导 Transformer-XL 模型生成指定数量的小节和拍号的可循环音乐短语的方法，从而成为现场编码表演的工具。我们表明，通过在从 DadaGP 数据集中提取的 93,681 个音乐循环的数据集上训练 LooperGP，我们能够引导其生成输出生成比基线多 3 倍的可循环短语。在 31 名参与者进行的主观听力测试中，LooperGP 循环在原创性、音乐连贯性和循环平滑度方面取得了积极的中值评分，展示了其作为演奏工具的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LooperGP模型，通过训练Transformer-XL生成可循环的音乐短语，用于实时编码表演。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习音乐生成模型缺乏音乐意义的控制参数和结构化形式，难以应用于实时表演。
AI.method: 基于Transformer-XL架构，使用包含93,681个音乐循环的DadaGP数据集训练模型，通过指定小节数和拍号生成可循环乐句。
AI.result: 生成的循环乐句数量是基线的3倍，31名参与者的主观测试显示其在原创性、音乐连贯性和循环流畅性方面获得积极评价。
AI.conclusion: LooperGP有效解决了实时编码表演中结构化音乐生成的难题，展现出作为表演工具的潜力。

authors_text: Yuma Koizumi,Heiga Zen,Shigeki Karita,Yifan Ding,Kohei Yatabe,Nobuyuki Morioka,Yu Zhang,Wei Han,Ankur Bapna,Michiel Bacchiani
title: Miipher: A Robust Speech Restoration Model Integrating Self-Supervised Speech and Text Representations
title_zh: Miipher：集成自监督语音和文本表示的鲁棒语音恢复模型
abstract: Speech restoration (SR) is a task of converting degraded speech signals into high-quality ones. In this study, we propose a robust SR model called Miipher, and apply Miipher to a new SR application: increasing the amount of high-quality training data for speech generation by converting speech samples collected from the Web to studio-quality. To make our SR model robust against various degradation, we use (i) a speech representation extracted from w2v-BERT for the input feature, and (ii) a text representation extracted from transcripts via PnG-BERT as a linguistic conditioning feature. Experiments show that Miipher (i) is robust against various audio degradation and (ii) enable us to train a high-quality text-to-speech (TTS) model from restored speech samples collected from the Web. Audio samples are available at our demo page: google.github.io/df-conformer/miipher/
summary: Speech restoration (SR) is a task of converting degraded speech signals into high-quality ones. In this study, we propose a robust SR model called Miipher, and apply Miipher to a new SR application: increasing the amount of high-quality training data for speech generation by converting speech samples collected from the Web to studio-quality. To make our SR model robust against various degradation, we use (i) a speech representation extracted from w2v-BERT for the input feature, and (ii) a text representation extracted from transcripts via PnG-BERT as a linguistic conditioning feature. Experiments show that Miipher (i) is robust against various audio degradation and (ii) enable us to train a high-quality text-to-speech (TTS) model from restored speech samples collected from the Web. Audio samples are available at our demo page: google.github.io/df-conformer/miipher/
abstract_zh: 语音恢复（SR）是将降级的语音信号转换为高质量的语音信号的任务。在本研究中，我们提出了一个名为 Miipher 的鲁棒 SR 模型，并将 Miipher 应用于新的 SR 应用：通过将从 Web 收集的语音样本转换为工作室质量来增加用于语音生成的高质量训练数据量。为了使我们的 SR 模型对各种退化具有鲁棒性，我们使用（i）从 w2v-BERT 中提取的语音表示作为输入特征，以及（ii）通过 PnG-BERT 从转录本中提取的文本表示作为语言条件特征。实验表明，Miipher (i) 对各种音频降级具有鲁棒性，并且 (ii) 使我们能够利用从网络收集的恢复语音样本来训练高质量的文本转语音 (TTS) 模型。我们的演示页面提供了音频示例：google.github.io/df-conformer/miipher/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Miipher的鲁棒语音修复模型，通过整合自监督语音和文本表示，将网络收集的语音样本转换为工作室质量的高质量语音，以增强语音生成的训练数据。
AI.motivation: 现有语音修复模型对多种退化情况鲁棒性不足，且缺乏利用文本信息辅助修复的方案，限制了高质量语音数据的获取与语音生成模型的训练。
AI.method: 采用w2v-BERT提取语音特征，结合PnG-BERT从转录文本中提取语言条件特征，通过双通道表示融合提升模型对音频退化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明Miipher能有效应对多种音频退化，且基于修复后的网络语音数据训练的TTS模型达到高质量水平，音频示例已开源演示。
AI.conclusion: 整合语音与文本自监督表示显著提升语音修复效果，为从网络数据中生成高质量语音训练集提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Miipher的鲁棒语音修复模型，通过整合自监督语音和文本表示，将网络收集的语音样本转换为工作室质量的高质量语音，以增强语音生成的训练数据。
ai_content.motivation: 现有语音修复模型对多种退化情况鲁棒性不足，且缺乏利用文本信息辅助修复的方案，限制了高质量语音数据的获取与语音生成模型的训练。
ai_content.method: 采用w2v-BERT提取语音特征，结合PnG-BERT从转录文本中提取语言条件特征，通过双通道表示融合提升模型对音频退化的鲁棒性。
ai_content.result: 实验表明Miipher能有效应对多种音频退化，且基于修复后的网络语音数据训练的TTS模型达到高质量水平，音频示例已开源演示。
ai_content.conclusion: 整合语音与文本自监督表示显著提升语音修复效果，为从网络数据中生成高质量语音训练集提供了可行方案。

search_text: Miipher: A Robust Speech Restoration Model Integrating Self-Supervised Speech and Text Representations Miipher：集成自监督语音和文本表示的鲁棒语音恢复模型 Speech restoration (SR) is a task of converting degraded speech signals into high-quality ones. In this study, we propose a robust SR model called Miipher, and apply Miipher to a new SR application: increasing the amount of high-quality training data for speech generation by converting speech samples collected from the Web to studio-quality. To make our SR model robust against various degradation, we use (i) a speech representation extracted from w2v-BERT for the input feature, and (ii) a text representation extracted from transcripts via PnG-BERT as a linguistic conditioning feature. Experiments show that Miipher (i) is robust against various audio degradation and (ii) enable us to train a high-quality text-to-speech (TTS) model from restored speech samples collected from the Web. Audio samples are available at our demo page: google.github.io/df-conformer/miipher/ 语音恢复（SR）是将降级的语音信号转换为高质量的语音信号的任务。在本研究中，我们提出了一个名为 Miipher 的鲁棒 SR 模型，并将 Miipher 应用于新的 SR 应用：通过将从 Web 收集的语音样本转换为工作室质量来增加用于语音生成的高质量训练数据量。为了使我们的 SR 模型对各种退化具有鲁棒性，我们使用（i）从 w2v-BERT 中提取的语音表示作为输入特征，以及（ii）通过 PnG-BERT 从转录本中提取的文本表示作为语言条件特征。实验表明，Miipher (i) 对各种音频降级具有鲁棒性，并且 (ii) 使我们能够利用从网络收集的恢复语音样本来训练高质量的文本转语音 (TTS) 模型。我们的演示页面提供了音频示例：google.github.io/df-conformer/miipher/ 本文提出了一种名为Miipher的鲁棒语音修复模型，通过整合自监督语音和文本表示，将网络收集的语音样本转换为工作室质量的高质量语音，以增强语音生成的训练数据。 Yuma Koizumi,Heiga Zen,Shigeki Karita,Yifan Ding,Kohei Yatabe,Nobuyuki Morioka,Yu Zhang,Wei Han,Ankur Bapna,Michiel Bacchiani cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Noor E Karishma Shaik,Bryce Widdicombe,Dechuan Sun,Sam E John,Dongryeol Ryu,Ampalavanapillai Nirmalathas,Ranjith R Unnithan
title: Longwave infrared multispectral image sensor system using aluminum-germanium plasmonic filter arrays
title_zh: 使用铝-锗等离子体滤波器阵列的长波红外多光谱图像传感器系统
abstract: A multispectral camera records image data in various wavelengths across the electromagnetic spectrum to acquire additional information that a conventional camera fails to capture. With the advent of high-resolution image sensors and colour filter technologies, multispectral imagers in the visible wavelengths have become popular with increasing commercial viability in the last decade. However, multispectral imaging in longwave infrared (LWIR: 8 to 14 microns) is still an emerging area due to the limited availability of optical materials, filter technologies, and high-resolution sensors. Images from LWIR multispectral cameras can capture emission spectra of objects to extract additional information that a human eye fails to capture and thus have important applications in precision agriculture, forestry, medicine, and object identification. In this work, we experimentally demonstrate an LWIR multispectral image sensor with three wavelength bands using optical elements made of an aluminum-based plasmonic filter array sandwiched in germanium. To realize the multispectral sensor, the filter arrays are then integrated into a 3D printed wheel stacked on a low-resolution monochrome thermal sensor. Our prototype device is calibrated using a blackbody and its thermal output has been enhanced with computer vision methods. By applying a state-of-the-art deep learning method, we have also reconstructed multispectral images to a better spatial resolution. Scientifically, our work demonstrates a versatile spectral thermography technique for detecting target signatures in the LWIR range and other advanced spectral analyses.

With the advent of high-resolution image sensors and colour filter technologies, multispectral imagers in the visible wavelengths have become popular with increasing commercial viability in the last decade. However, multispectral imaging in longwave infrared (LWIR: 8 to 14 microns) is still an emerging area due to the limited availability of optical materials, filter technologies, and high-resolution sensors. Images from LWIR multispectral cameras can capture emission spectra of objects to extract additional information that a human eye fails to capture and thus have important applications in precision agriculture, forestry, medicine, and object identification. In this work, we experimentally demonstrate an LWIR multispectral image sensor with three wavelength bands using optical elements made of an aluminum-based plasmonic filter array sandwiched in germanium. To realize the multispectral sensor, the filter arrays are then integrated into a 3D printed wheel stacked on a low-resolution monochrome thermal sensor. Our prototype device is calibrated using a blackbody and its thermal output has been enhanced with computer vision methods. By applying a state-of-the-art deep learning method, we have also reconstructed multispectral images to a better spatial resolution. Scientifically, our work demonstrates a versatile spectral thermography technique for detecting target signatures in the LWIR range and other advanced spectral analyses.
abstract_zh: 多光谱相机记录电磁频谱中各种波长的图像数据，以获取传统相机无法捕获的附加信息。随着高分辨率图像传感器和彩色滤光片技术的出现，可见波长的多光谱成像仪在过去十年中变得流行，商业可行性不断增强。然而，由于光学材料、滤光片技术和高分辨率传感器的可用性有限，长波红外（LWIR：8 至 14 微米）的多光谱成像仍然是一个新兴领域。长波红外多光谱相机的图像可以捕获物体的发射光谱，以提取人眼无法捕获的附加信息，因此在精准农业、林业、医学和物体识别方面具有重要应用。在这项工作中，我们通过实验演示了具有三个波长带的长波红外多光谱图像传感器，该传感器使用由夹在锗中的铝基等离子体滤波器阵列制成的光学元件。为了实现多光谱传感器，滤波器阵列被集成到堆叠在低分辨率单色热传感器上的 3D 打印轮中。我们的原型设备使用黑体进行校准，并通过计算机视觉方法增强了其热输出。通过应用最先进的深度学习方法，我们还以更好的空间分辨率重建了多光谱图像。从科学角度来说，我们的工作展示了一种多功能光谱热成像技术，用于检测长波红外范围内的目标特征和其他先进的光谱分析。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于铝-锗等离子体滤光阵列的长波红外多光谱图像传感器系统，实现三个波段的多光谱成像。
AI.motivation: 长波红外多光谱成像因光学材料、滤光技术和高分辨率传感器的限制尚未成熟，但其在农业、医学等领域的潜在应用价值显著。
AI.method: 采用铝基等离子体滤光阵列嵌入锗材料中，结合3D打印轮盘与低分辨率热传感器集成系统，并通过黑体校准及深度学习算法提升图像分辨率。
AI.result: 成功构建原型设备，通过计算机视觉方法增强热输出，并利用深度学习重建出更高空间分辨率的多光谱图像。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为长波红外目标特征检测和高级光谱分析提供了灵活的多光谱热成像解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 开发一种基于铝-锗等离子体滤光阵列的长波红外多光谱图像传感器系统，实现三个波段的多光谱成像。

authors_text: Tao Wang,Mengyuan Liu,Hong Liu,Wenhao Li,Miaoju Ban,Tuanyu Guo,Yidi Li
title: Feature Completion Transformer for Occluded Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于被遮挡人员重新识别的特征完成变压器
comment: Published on IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)
comments: Published on IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM)
abstract: Occluded person re-identification (Re-ID) is a challenging problem due to the destruction of occluders. Most existing methods focus on visible human body parts through some prior information. However, when complementary occlusions occur, features in occluded regions can interfere with matching, which affects performance severely. In this paper, different from most previous works that discard the occluded region, we propose a Feature Completion Transformer (FCFormer) to implicitly complement the semantic information of occluded parts in the feature space. Specifically, Occlusion Instance Augmentation (OIA) is proposed to simulates real and diverse occlusion situations on the holistic image. These augmented images not only enrich the amount of occlusion samples in the training set, but also form pairs with the holistic images. Subsequently, a dual-stream architecture with a shared encoder is proposed to learn paired discriminative features from pairs of inputs. Without additional semantic information, an occluded-holistic feature sample-label pair can be automatically created. Then, Feature Completion Decoder (FCD) is designed to complement the features of occluded regions by using learnable tokens to aggregate possible information from self-generated occluded features. Finally, we propose the Cross Hard Triplet (CHT) loss to further bridge the gap between complementing features and extracting features under the same ID. In addition, Feature Completion Consistency (FC$^2$) loss is introduced to help the generated completion feature distribution to be closer to the real holistic feature distribution. Extensive experiments over five challenging datasets demonstrate that the proposed FCFormer achieves superior performance and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by significant margins on occluded datasets.
summary: Occluded person re-identification (Re-ID) is a challenging problem due to the destruction of occluders. Most existing methods focus on visible human body parts through some prior information. However, when complementary occlusions occur, features in occluded regions can interfere with matching, which affects performance severely. In this paper, different from most previous works that discard the occluded region, we propose a Feature Completion Transformer (FCFormer) to implicitly complement the semantic information of occluded parts in the feature space. Specifically, Occlusion Instance Augmentation (OIA) is proposed to simulates real and diverse occlusion situations on the holistic image. These augmented images not only enrich the amount of occlusion samples in the training set, but also form pairs with the holistic images. Subsequently, a dual-stream architecture with a shared encoder is proposed to learn paired discriminative features from pairs of inputs. Without additional semantic information, an occluded-holistic feature sample-label pair can be automatically created. Then, Feature Completion Decoder (FCD) is designed to complement the features of occluded regions by using learnable tokens to aggregate possible information from self-generated occluded features. Finally, we propose the Cross Hard Triplet (CHT) loss to further bridge the gap between complementing features and extracting features under the same ID. In addition, Feature Completion Consistency (FC$^2$) loss is introduced to help the generated completion feature distribution to be closer to the real holistic feature distribution. Extensive experiments over five challenging datasets demonstrate that the proposed FCFormer achieves superior performance and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by significant margins on occluded datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于遮挡物的破坏，被遮挡人重新识别（Re-ID）是一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数现有方法通过一些先验信息关注可见的人体部位。然而，当发生互补遮挡时，遮挡区域中的特征可能会干扰匹配，从而严重影响性能。在本文中，与大多数先前丢弃遮挡区域的工作不同，我们提出了一种特征完成变换器（FCFormer）来隐式补充特征空间中遮挡部分的语义信息。具体来说，遮挡实例增强（OIA）被提出来模拟整体图像上真实且多样化的遮挡情况。这些增强图像不仅丰富了训练集中遮挡样本的数量，而且与整体图像形成配对。随后，提出了具有共享编码器的双流架构，以从输入对中学习成对的判别特征。无需额外的语义信息，就可以自动创建遮挡整体特征样本标签对。然后，特征完成解码器（FCD）被设计为通过使用可学习的标记从自生成的遮挡特征中聚合可能的信息来补充遮挡区域的特征。最后，我们提出了 Cross Hard Triplet (CHT) 损失，以进一步弥合同一 ID 下补充特征和提取特征之间的差距。此外，还引入了特征完成一致性（FC$^2$）损失，以帮助生成的完成特征分布更接近真实的整体特征分布。对五个具有挑战性的数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的 FCFormer 实现了卓越的性能，并且在遮挡数据集上明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FCFormer的特征补全变换器，用于解决遮挡行人重识别中的遮挡区域特征干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过丢弃遮挡区域或利用可见部分进行行人重识别，但互补遮挡会导致特征干扰，影响性能。本文旨在通过补全遮挡区域的语义信息提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出Occlusion Instance Augmentation生成多样化遮挡样本，设计双流架构与共享编码器学习配对特征，并通过Feature Completion Decoder利用可学习token补全遮挡区域特征，结合CHT损失与FC²损失优化模型。
AI.result: 在五个具有挑战性的数据集上，FCFormer显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其在遮挡场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征空间补全而非直接丢弃遮挡区域，FCFormer有效缓解了遮挡对行人重识别的干扰，为后续研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Feature Completion Transformer for Occluded Person Re-identification 用于被遮挡人员重新识别的特征完成变压器 Occluded person re-identification (Re-ID) is a challenging problem due to the destruction of occluders. Most existing methods focus on visible human body parts through some prior information. However, when complementary occlusions occur, features in occluded regions can interfere with matching, which affects performance severely. In this paper, different from most previous works that discard the occluded region, we propose a Feature Completion Transformer (FCFormer) to implicitly complement the semantic information of occluded parts in the feature space. Specifically, Occlusion Instance Augmentation (OIA) is proposed to simulates real and diverse occlusion situations on the holistic image. These augmented images not only enrich the amount of occlusion samples in the training set, but also form pairs with the holistic images. Subsequently, a dual-stream architecture with a shared encoder is proposed to learn paired discriminative features from pairs of inputs. Without additional semantic information, an occluded-holistic feature sample-label pair can be automatically created. Then, Feature Completion Decoder (FCD) is designed to complement the features of occluded regions by using learnable tokens to aggregate possible information from self-generated occluded features. Finally, we propose the Cross Hard Triplet (CHT) loss to further bridge the gap between complementing features and extracting features under the same ID. In addition, Feature Completion Consistency (FC$^2$) loss is introduced to help the generated completion feature distribution to be closer to the real holistic feature distribution. Extensive experiments over five challenging datasets demonstrate that the proposed FCFormer achieves superior performance and outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by significant margins on occluded datasets. 由于遮挡物的破坏，被遮挡人重新识别（Re-ID）是一个具有挑战性的问题。大多数现有方法通过一些先验信息关注可见的人体部位。然而，当发生互补遮挡时，遮挡区域中的特征可能会干扰匹配，从而严重影响性能。在本文中，与大多数先前丢弃遮挡区域的工作不同，我们提出了一种特征完成变换器（FCFormer）来隐式补充特征空间中遮挡部分的语义信息。具体来说，遮挡实例增强（OIA）被提出来模拟整体图像上真实且多样化的遮挡情况。这些增强图像不仅丰富了训练集中遮挡样本的数量，而且与整体图像形成配对。随后，提出了具有共享编码器的双流架构，以从输入对中学习成对的判别特征。无需额外的语义信息，就可以自动创建遮挡整体特征样本标签对。然后，特征完成解码器（FCD）被设计为通过使用可学习的标记从自生成的遮挡特征中聚合可能的信息来补充遮挡区域的特征。最后，我们提出了 Cross Hard Triplet (CHT) 损失，以进一步弥合同一 ID 下补充特征和提取特征之间的差距。此外，还引入了特征完成一致性（FC$^2$）损失，以帮助生成的完成特征分布更接近真实的整体特征分布。对五个具有挑战性的数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出的 FCFormer 实现了卓越的性能，并且在遮挡数据集上明显优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种名为FCFormer的特征补全变换器，用于解决遮挡行人重识别中的遮挡区域特征干扰问题。 Tao Wang,Mengyuan Liu,Hong Liu,Wenhao Li,Miaoju Ban,Tuanyu Guo,Yidi Li cs.CV

authors_text: Nicholas Conlon,Nisar R. Ahmed,Daniel Szafir
title: Dynamic Competency Self-Assessment for Autonomous Agents
title_zh: 自主代理的动态能力自我评估
comment: Accepted to the HRI 2023 workshop on Variable Autonomy for human-robot Teaming (VAT-HRI)
comments: Accepted to the HRI 2023 workshop on Variable Autonomy for human-robot Teaming (VAT-HRI)
abstract: As autonomous robots are deployed in increasingly complex environments, platform degradation, environmental uncertainties, and deviations from validated operation conditions can make it difficult for human partners to understand robot capabilities and limitations. The ability for a robot to self-assess its competency in dynamic and uncertain environments will be a crucial next step in successful human-robot teaming. This work presents and evaluates an Event-Triggered Generalized Outcome Assessment (ET-GOA) algorithm for autonomous agents to dynamically assess task confidence during execution. The algorithm uses a fast online statistical test of the agent's observations and its model predictions to decide when competency assessment is needed. We provide experimental results using ET-GOA to generate competency reports during a simulated delivery task and suggest future research directions for self-assessing agents.
summary: As autonomous robots are deployed in increasingly complex environments, platform degradation, environmental uncertainties, and deviations from validated operation conditions can make it difficult for human partners to understand robot capabilities and limitations. The ability for a robot to self-assess its competency in dynamic and uncertain environments will be a crucial next step in successful human-robot teaming. This work presents and evaluates an Event-Triggered Generalized Outcome Assessment (ET-GOA) algorithm for autonomous agents to dynamically assess task confidence during execution. The algorithm uses a fast online statistical test of the agent's observations and its model predictions to decide when competency assessment is needed. We provide experimental results using ET-GOA to generate competency reports during a simulated delivery task and suggest future research directions for self-assessing agents.
abstract_zh: 随着自主机器人部署在日益复杂的环境中，平台退化、环境不确定性以及与经过验证的操作条件的偏差可能使人类合作伙伴难以了解机器人的功能和局限性。机器人在动态和不确定的环境中自我评估其能力的能力将是成功的人机协作的关键下一步。这项工作提出并评估了事件触发的广义结果评估（ET-GOA）算法，供自主代理在执行过程中动态评估任务置信度。该算法使用代理观察及其模型预测的快速在线统计测试来决定何时需要进行能力评估。我们提供使用 ET-GOA 在模拟交付任务期间生成能力报告的实验结果，并为自我评估代理的未来研究方向提出建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种事件触发的广义结果评估算法（ET-GOA），用于自主代理在动态不确定环境中动态评估任务能力。
AI.motivation: 随着自主机器人部署在复杂环境中，平台退化和环境不确定性导致人类难以理解机器人能力，亟需机器人具备动态自我评估能力以提升人机协作效果。
AI.method: 通过快速在线统计测试比较代理的观测数据与模型预测，触发事件机制决定何时进行能力评估，生成动态任务置信度报告。
AI.result: 在模拟配送任务中验证了ET-GOA算法的有效性，展示了其生成能力评估报告的能力，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: ET-GOA为自主代理动态自我评估提供了可行方法，未来需进一步探索其在复杂场景中的适应性与可靠性。

authors_text: James Brotchie,Wenchao Li,Andrew D. Greentree,Allison Kealy
title: RIOT: Recursive Inertial Odometry Transformer for Localisation from Low-Cost IMU Measurements
title_zh: RIOT：递归惯性里程计变压器，用于通过低成本 IMU 测量进行定位
abstract: Inertial localisation is an important technique as it enables ego-motion estimation in conditions where external observers are unavailable. However, low-cost inertial sensors are inherently corrupted by bias and noise, which lead to unbound errors, making straight integration for position intractable. Traditional mathematical approaches are reliant on prior system knowledge, geometric theories and are constrained by predefined dynamics. Recent advances in deep learning, that benefit from ever-increasing volumes of data and computational power, allow for data driven solutions that offer more comprehensive understanding. Existing deep inertial odometry solutions rely on estimating the latent states, such as velocity, or are dependant on fixed sensor positions and periodic motion patterns. In this work we propose taking the traditional state estimation recursive methodology and applying it in the deep learning domain. Our approach, which incorporates the true position priors in the training process, is trained on inertial measurements and ground truth displacement data, allowing recursion and to learn both motion characteristics and systemic error bias and drift. We present two end-to-end frameworks for pose invariant deep inertial odometry that utilise self-attention to capture both spatial features and long-range dependencies in inertial data. We evaluate our approaches against a custom 2-layer Gated Recurrent Unit, trained in the same manner on the same data, and tested each approach on a number of different users, devices and activities. Each network had a sequence length weighted relative trajectory error mean $\leq0.4594$m, highlighting the effectiveness of our learning process used in the development of the models.
summary: Inertial localisation is an important technique as it enables ego-motion estimation in conditions where external observers are unavailable. However, low-cost inertial sensors are inherently corrupted by bias and noise, which lead to unbound errors, making straight integration for position intractable. Traditional mathematical approaches are reliant on prior system knowledge, geometric theories and are constrained by predefined dynamics. Recent advances in deep learning, that benefit from ever-increasing volumes of data and computational power, allow for data driven solutions that offer more comprehensive understanding. Existing deep inertial odometry solutions rely on estimating the latent states, such as velocity, or are dependant on fixed sensor positions and periodic motion patterns. In this work we propose taking the traditional state estimation recursive methodology and applying it in the deep learning domain. Our approach, which incorporates the true position priors in the training process, is trained on inertial measurements and ground truth displacement data, allowing recursion and to learn both motion characteristics and systemic error bias and drift. We present two end-to-end frameworks for pose invariant deep inertial odometry that utilise self-attention to capture both spatial features and long-range dependencies in inertial data. We evaluate our approaches against a custom 2-layer Gated Recurrent Unit, trained in the same manner on the same data, and tested each approach on a number of different users, devices and activities. Each network had a sequence length weighted relative trajectory error mean $\leq0.4594$m, highlighting the effectiveness of our learning process used in the development of the models.
abstract_zh: 惯性定位是一项重要的技术，因为它可以在外部观察者不可用的情况下进行自我运动估计。然而，低成本惯性传感器本质上会受到偏差和噪声的影响，从而导致无限的误差，使得位置的直接积分变得棘手。传统的数学方法依赖于先验的系统知识、几何理论，并受到预定义动力学的约束。深度学习的最新进展受益于不断增长的数据量和计算能力，允许数据驱动的解决方案提供更全面的理解。现有的深度惯性里程计解决方案依赖于估计潜在状态，例如速度，或者依赖于固定的传感器位置和周期性运动模式。在这项工作中，我们建议采用传统的状态估计递归方法并将其应用于深度学习领域。我们的方法在训练过程中结合了真实位置先验，并根据惯性测量和地面真实位移数据进行训练，允许递归并学习运动特征以及系统误差偏差和漂移。我们提出了两个用于姿势不变深度惯性里程计的端到端框架，它们利用自注意力来捕获惯性数据中的空间特征和远程依赖性。我们针对定制的 2 层门控循环单元评估我们的方法，以相同的方式对相同的数据进行训练，并在许多不同的用户、设备和活动上测试每种方法。每个网络都有一个序列长度加权相对轨迹误差平均值 $\leq0.4594$m，突出了我们在模型开发中使用的学习过程的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的递归惯性里程计变换器（RIOT），用于解决低成本IMU测量中的定位问题。
AI.motivation: 低成本惯性测量单元（IMU）因存在偏差和噪声导致定位误差累积，传统方法依赖先验知识且受限于预定义动态模型，难以有效处理复杂场景。
AI.method: 将传统递归状态估计方法与深度学习结合，利用自注意力机制捕捉惯性数据的空间特征和长距离依赖关系，通过引入真实位置先验训练模型，同时学习运动特征和系统误差漂移。
AI.result: 在多用户、多设备和多活动场景下，模型的加权相对轨迹误差均值≤0.4594米，优于同条件下训练的2层门控循环单元（GRU）模型。
AI.conclusion: RIOT框架通过递归深度学习有效解决了低成本IMU的误差问题，为数据驱动的惯性定位提供了新方法，验证了结合递归结构与自注意力机制的有效性。

ai_content_json.method: 将传统递归状态估计方法与深度学习结合，利用自注意力机制捕捉惯性数据的空间特征和长距离依赖关系，通过引入真实位置先验训练模型，同时学习运动特征和系统误差漂移。
ai_content_json.result: 在多用户、多设备和多活动场景下，模型的加权相对轨迹误差均值≤0.4594米，优于同条件下训练的2层门控循环单元（GRU）模型。
ai_content_json.conclusion: RIOT框架通过递归深度学习有效解决了低成本IMU的误差问题，为数据驱动的惯性定位提供了新方法，验证了结合递归结构与自注意力机制的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的递归惯性里程计变换器（RIOT），用于解决低成本IMU测量中的定位问题。
motivation: 低成本惯性测量单元（IMU）因存在偏差和噪声导致定位误差累积，传统方法依赖先验知识且受限于预定义动态模型，难以有效处理复杂场景。
method: 将传统递归状态估计方法与深度学习结合，利用自注意力机制捕捉惯性数据的空间特征和长距离依赖关系，通过引入真实位置先验训练模型，同时学习运动特征和系统误差漂移。
result: 在多用户、多设备和多活动场景下，模型的加权相对轨迹误差均值≤0.4594米，优于同条件下训练的2层门控循环单元（GRU）模型。
conclusion: RIOT框架通过递归深度学习有效解决了低成本IMU的误差问题，为数据驱动的惯性定位提供了新方法，验证了结合递归结构与自注意力机制的有效性。
search_text: RIOT: Recursive Inertial Odometry Transformer for Localisation from Low-Cost IMU Measurements RIOT：递归惯性里程计变压器，用于通过低成本 IMU 测量进行定位 Inertial localisation is an important technique as it enables ego-motion estimation in conditions where external observers are unavailable. However, low-cost inertial sensors are inherently corrupted by bias and noise, which lead to unbound errors, making straight integration for position intractable. Traditional mathematical approaches are reliant on prior system knowledge, geometric theories and are constrained by predefined dynamics. Recent advances in deep learning, that benefit from ever-increasing volumes of data and computational power, allow for data driven solutions that offer more comprehensive understanding. Existing deep inertial odometry solutions rely on estimating the latent states, such as velocity, or are dependant on fixed sensor positions and periodic motion patterns. In this work we propose taking the traditional state estimation recursive methodology and applying it in the deep learning domain. Our approach, which incorporates the true position priors in the training process, is trained on inertial measurements and ground truth displacement data, allowing recursion and to learn both motion characteristics and systemic error bias and drift. We present two end-to-end frameworks for pose invariant deep inertial odometry that utilise self-attention to capture both spatial features and long-range dependencies in inertial data. We evaluate our approaches against a custom 2-layer Gated Recurrent Unit, trained in the same manner on the same data, and tested each approach on a number of different users, devices and activities. Each network had a sequence length weighted relative trajectory error mean $\leq0.4594$m, highlighting the effectiveness of our learning process used in the development of the models. 惯性定位是一项重要的技术，因为它可以在外部观察者不可用的情况下进行自我运动估计。然而，低成本惯性传感器本质上会受到偏差和噪声的影响，从而导致无限的误差，使得位置的直接积分变得棘手。传统的数学方法依赖于先验的系统知识、几何理论，并受到预定义动力学的约束。深度学习的最新进展受益于不断增长的数据量和计算能力，允许数据驱动的解决方案提供更全面的理解。现有的深度惯性里程计解决方案依赖于估计潜在状态，例如速度，或者依赖于固定的传感器位置和周期性运动模式。在这项工作中，我们建议采用传统的状态估计递归方法并将其应用于深度学习领域。我们的方法在训练过程中结合了真实位置先验，并根据惯性测量和地面真实位移数据进行训练，允许递归并学习运动特征以及系统误差偏差和漂移。我们提出了两个用于姿势不变深度惯性里程计的端到端框架，它们利用自注意力来捕获惯性数据中的空间特征和远程依赖性。我们针对定制的 2 层门控循环单元评估我们的方法，以相同的方式对相同的数据进行训练，并在许多不同的用户、设备和活动上测试每种方法。每个网络都有一个序列长度加权相对轨迹误差平均值 $\leq0.4594$m，突出了我们在模型开发中使用的学习过程的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的递归惯性里程计变换器（RIOT），用于解决低成本IMU测量中的定位问题。 James Brotchie,Wenchao Li,Andrew D. Greentree,Allison Kealy cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SP

authors_text: Jun Rekimoto
title: WESPER: Zero-shot and Realtime Whisper to Normal Voice Conversion for Whisper-based Speech Interactions
title_zh: WESPER：基于耳语的语音交互的零样本和实时耳语到正常语音转换
abstract: Recognizing whispered speech and converting it to normal speech creates many possibilities for speech interaction. Because the sound pressure of whispered speech is significantly lower than that of normal speech, it can be used as a semi-silent speech interaction in public places without being audible to others. Converting whispers to normal speech also improves the speech quality for people with speech or hearing impairments. However, conventional speech conversion techniques do not provide sufficient conversion quality or require speaker-dependent datasets consisting of pairs of whispered and normal speech utterances. To address these problems, we propose WESPER, a zero-shot, real-time whisper-to-normal speech conversion mechanism based on self-supervised learning. WESPER consists of a speech-to-unit (STU) encoder, which generates hidden speech units common to both whispered and normal speech, and a unit-to-speech (UTS) decoder, which reconstructs speech from the encoded speech units. Unlike the existing methods, this conversion is user-independent and does not require a paired dataset for whispered and normal speech. The UTS decoder can reconstruct speech in any target speaker's voice from speech units, and it requires only an unlabeled target speaker's speech data. We confirmed that the quality of the speech converted from a whisper was improved while preserving its natural prosody. Additionally, we confirmed the effectiveness of the proposed approach to perform speech reconstruction for people with speech or hearing disabilities. (project page: http://lab.rekimoto.org/projects/wesper )

Because the sound pressure of whispered speech is significantly lower than that of normal speech, it can be used as a semi-silent speech interaction in public places without being audible to others. However, conventional speech conversion techniques do not provide sufficient conversion quality or require speaker-dependent datasets consisting of pairs of whispered and normal speech utterances. To address these problems, we propose WESPER, a zero-shot, real-time whisper-to-normal speech conversion mechanism based on self-supervised learning. WESPER consists of a speech-to-unit (STU) encoder, which generates hidden speech units common to both whispered and normal speech, and a unit-to-speech (UTS) decoder, which reconstructs speech from the encoded speech units. Unlike the existing methods, this conversion is user-independent and does not require a paired dataset for whispered and normal speech. The UTS decoder can reconstruct speech in any target speaker's voice from speech units, and it requires only an unlabeled target speaker's speech data. We confirmed that the quality of the speech converted from a whisper was improved while preserving its natural prosody. Additionally, we confirmed the effectiveness of the proposed approach to perform speech reconstruction for people with speech or hearing disabilities. (project page: http://lab.rekimoto.org/projects/wesper )
abstract_zh: 识别耳语并将其转换为正常语音为语音交互创造了许多可能性。由于低声讲话的声压明显低于正常讲话，因此可以作为公共场所的半无声语音交互，而不会被其他人听到。将耳语转换为正常语音还可以提高有言语或听力障碍的人的语音质量。然而，传统的语音转换技术不能提供足够的转换质量，或者需要由低语和正常语音对组成的依赖于说话者的数据集。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了WESPER，一种基于自监督学习的零样本、实时耳语到正常语音转换机制。 WESPER 由一个语音到单元 (STU) 编码器和一个单元到语音 (UTS) 解码器组成，前者生成耳语和正常语音所共有的隐藏语音单元，后者从编码的语音单元重建语音。与现有方法不同，这种转换是独立于用户的，并且不需要用于耳语和正常语音的配对数据集。 UTS解码器可以从语音单元重构任何目标说话人的语音，并且只需要未标记的目标说话人的语音数据。我们确认，从耳语转换而来的语音质量得到了提高，同时保留了其自然韵律。此外，我们还证实了所提出的方法对言语或听力障碍人士进行言语重建的有效性。 （项目页面：http://lab.rekimoto.org/projects/wesper）

AI.tldr: 本文提出WESPER，一种无需配对数据即可实时将耳语转换为正常语音的零样本语音转换方法。
AI.motivation: 耳语语音因音量低可实现半静音交互，但传统转换技术质量不足或依赖特定说话人数据，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 基于自监督学习，WESPER包含语音到单元(STU)编码器和单元到语音(UTS)解码器，通过生成共通语音单元并重建目标说话人语音实现转换。
AI.result: 实验验证了转换后语音质量提升且保持自然韵律，同时证实了该方法对言语或听力障碍者的有效性。
AI.conclusion: WESPER提供了无需配对数据的用户无关语音转换方案，为隐私交互和辅助技术应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Brendan Tidd
title: Learning Visuo-Motor Behaviours for Robot Locomotion Over Difficult Terrain
title_zh: 学习机器人在困难地形上运动的视觉运动行为
abstract: As mobile robots become useful performing everyday tasks in complex real-world environments, they must be able to traverse a range of difficult terrain types such as stairs, stepping stones, gaps, jumps and narrow passages. This work investigated traversing these types of environments with a bipedal robot (simulation experiments), and a tracked robot (real world). Developing a traditional monolithic controller for traversing all terrain types is challenging, and for large physical robots realistic test facilities are required and safety must be ensured. An alternative is a suite of simple behaviour controllers that can be composed to achieve complex tasks. This work efficiently trained complex behaviours to enable mobile robots to traverse difficult terrain. By minimising retraining as new behaviours became available, robots were able to traverse increasingly complex terrain sets, leading toward the development of scalable behaviour libraries.
summary: As mobile robots become useful performing everyday tasks in complex real-world environments, they must be able to traverse a range of difficult terrain types such as stairs, stepping stones, gaps, jumps and narrow passages. This work investigated traversing these types of environments with a bipedal robot (simulation experiments), and a tracked robot (real world). Developing a traditional monolithic controller for traversing all terrain types is challenging, and for large physical robots realistic test facilities are required and safety must be ensured. An alternative is a suite of simple behaviour controllers that can be composed to achieve complex tasks. This work efficiently trained complex behaviours to enable mobile robots to traverse difficult terrain. By minimising retraining as new behaviours became available, robots were able to traverse increasingly complex terrain sets, leading toward the development of scalable behaviour libraries.
abstract_zh: 随着移动机器人在复杂的现实环境中执行日常任务变得有用，它们必须能够穿越一系列困难的地形类型，例如楼梯、踏脚石、间隙、跳跃和狭窄的通道。这项工作研究了使用双足机器人（模拟实验）和履带式机器人（现实世界）穿越这些类型的环境。开发用于穿越所有地形类型的传统单片控制器具有挑战性，对于大型物理机器人，需要真实的测试设施，并且必须确保安全。另一种选择是一组简单的行为控制器，可以组合它们来实现复杂的任务。这项工作有效地训练了复杂的行为，使移动机器人能够穿越困难的地形。随着新行为的出现，通过最小化重新训练，机器人能够穿越日益复杂的地形集，从而导致可扩展行为库的开发。

AI.tldr: 训练机器人穿越复杂地形的视觉运动行为
AI.motivation: 传统单一控制器难以适应多种复杂地形，且大型机器人需要安全测试设施，需开发可组合的简单行为控制器
AI.method: 通过仿真和现实实验，高效训练复杂行为，减少重新训练，逐步提升地形复杂度
AI.result: 机器人成功穿越多种复杂地形，逐步构建可扩展的行为库
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升机器人适应复杂地形的能力，为构建可扩展行为库奠定基础

An alternative is a suite of simple behaviour controllers that can be composed to achieve complex tasks. This work efficiently trained complex behaviours to enable mobile robots to traverse difficult terrain. By minimising retraining as new behaviours became available, robots were able to traverse increasingly complex terrain sets, leading toward the development of scalable behaviour libraries. 随着移动机器人在复杂的现实环境中执行日常任务变得有用，它们必须能够穿越一系列困难的地形类型，例如楼梯、踏脚石、间隙、跳跃和狭窄的通道。这项工作研究了使用双足机器人（模拟实验）和履带式机器人（现实世界）穿越这些类型的环境。开发用于穿越所有地形类型的传统单片控制器具有挑战性，对于大型物理机器人，需要真实的测试设施，并且必须确保安全。另一种选择是一组简单的行为控制器，可以组合它们来实现复杂的任务。这项工作有效地训练了复杂的行为，使移动机器人能够穿越困难的地形。随着新行为的出现，通过最小化重新训练，机器人能够穿越日益复杂的地形集，从而导致可扩展行为库的开发。 训练机器人穿越复杂地形的视觉运动行为 Brendan Tidd cs.RO

authors_text: Weiqiao Han,Ashkan Jasour,Brian Williams
title: Real-Time Tube-Based Non-Gaussian Risk Bounded Motion Planning for Stochastic Nonlinear Systems in Uncertain Environments via Motion Primitives
title_zh: 通过运动基元对不确定环境中的随机非线性系统进行实时基于管的非高斯风险有界运动规划
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
comments: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
abstract: We consider the motion planning problem for stochastic nonlinear systems in uncertain environments. More precisely, in this problem the robot has stochastic nonlinear dynamics and uncertain initial locations, and the environment contains multiple dynamic uncertain obstacles. Obstacles can be of arbitrary shape, can deform, and can move. All uncertainties do not necessarily have Gaussian distribution. This general setting has been considered and solved in [1]. In addition to the assumptions above, in this paper, we consider long-term tasks, where the planning method in [1] would fail, as the uncertainty of the system states grows too large over a long time horizon. Unlike [1], we present a real-time online motion planning algorithm. We build discrete-time motion primitives and their corresponding continuous-time tubes offline, so that almost all system states of each motion primitive are guaranteed to stay inside the corresponding tube. We convert probabilistic safety constraints into a set of deterministic constraints called risk contours. During online execution, we verify the safety of the tubes against deterministic risk contours using sum-of-squares (SOS) programming. The provided SOS-based method verifies the safety of the tube in the presence of uncertain obstacles without the need for uncertainty samples and time discretization in real-time. By bounding the probability the system states staying inside the tube and bounding the probability of the tube colliding with obstacles, our approach guarantees bounded probability of system states colliding with obstacles. We demonstrate our approach on several long-term robotics tasks.

More precisely, in this problem the robot has stochastic nonlinear dynamics and uncertain initial locations, and the environment contains multiple dynamic uncertain obstacles. Obstacles can be of arbitrary shape, can deform, and can move. All uncertainties do not necessarily have Gaussian distribution. This general setting has been considered and solved in [1]. In addition to the assumptions above, in this paper, we consider long-term tasks, where the planning method in [1] would fail, as the uncertainty of the system states grows too large over a long time horizon. Unlike [1], we present a real-time online motion planning algorithm. We build discrete-time motion primitives and their corresponding continuous-time tubes offline, so that almost all system states of each motion primitive are guaranteed to stay inside the corresponding tube. We convert probabilistic safety constraints into a set of deterministic constraints called risk contours. During online execution, we verify the safety of the tubes against deterministic risk contours using sum-of-squares (SOS) programming. The provided SOS-based method verifies the safety of the tube in the presence of uncertain obstacles without the need for uncertainty samples and time discretization in real-time. By bounding the probability the system states staying inside the tube and bounding the probability of the tube colliding with obstacles, our approach guarantees bounded probability of system states colliding with obstacles. We demonstrate our approach on several long-term robotics tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑不确定环境中随机非线性系统的运动规划问题。更准确地说，在这个问题中，机器人具有随机非线性动力学和不确定的初始位置，并且环境包含多个动态不确定障碍物。障碍物可以是任意形状、可以变形并且可以移动。所有的不确定性不一定服从高斯分布。这种一般设置已在[1]中考虑并解决。除了上述假设之外，在本文中，我们还考虑了长期任务，其中[1]中的规划方法将失败，因为系统状态的不确定性在很长一段时间内变得太大。与[1]不同，我们提出了一种实时在线运动规划算法。我们离线构建离散时间运动基元及其相应的连续时间管，从而保证每个运动基元的几乎所有系统状态都保留在相应的管内。我们将概率安全约束转换为一组称为风险轮廓的确定性约束。在在线执行过程中，我们使用平方和 (SOS) 编程根据确定性风险轮廓验证管道的安全性。所提供的基于 SOS 的方法可在存在不确定障碍物的情况下验证管道的安全性，无需不确定性样本和实时时间离散化。通过限制系统状态停留在管内的概率以及限制管与障碍物碰撞的概率，我们的方法保证了系统状态与障碍物碰撞的有界概率。我们在几个长期机器人任务上展示了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于在不确定环境中对具有非高斯风险的随机非线性系统进行实时运动规划的方法。
AI.motivation: 在不确定环境中，传统的运动规划方法难以处理长期任务，因为系统状态的不确定性会随时间增长，导致规划失败。
AI.method: 作者构建了离线的离散时间运动原语及其对应的连续时间管状结构，并通过将概率安全约束转换为确定性约束（风险轮廓）来验证管状结构的安全性，使用SOS编程在实时执行过程中验证。
AI.result: 该方法在多个长期机器人任务中得到了验证，能够保证系统状态与障碍物碰撞的概率有界。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效解决了长期任务中随机非线性系统的运动规划问题，并且在实时性方面具有优势。

authors_text: Weiqiao Han,Ashkan Jasour,Brian Williams
title: Non-Gaussian Uncertainty Minimization Based Control of Stochastic Nonlinear Robotic Systems
title_zh: 基于非高斯不确定性最小化的随机非线性机器人系统控制
comment: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
comments: International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
abstract: In this paper, we consider the closed-loop control problem of nonlinear robotic systems in the presence of probabilistic uncertainties and disturbances. More precisely, we design a state feedback controller that minimizes deviations of the states of the system from the nominal state trajectories due to uncertainties and disturbances. Existing approaches to address the control problem of probabilistic systems are limited to particular classes of uncertainties and systems such as Gaussian uncertainties and processes and linearized systems. We present an approach that deals with nonlinear dynamics models and arbitrary known probabilistic uncertainties. We formulate the controller design problem as an optimization problem in terms of statistics of the probability distributions including moments and characteristic functions. In particular, in the provided optimization problem, we use moments and characteristic functions to propagate uncertainties throughout the nonlinear motion model of robotic systems. In order to reduce the tracking deviations, we minimize the uncertainty of the probabilistic states around the nominal trajectory by minimizing the trace and the determinant of the covariance matrix of the probabilistic states. To obtain the state feedback gains, we solve deterministic optimization problems in terms of moments, characteristic functions, and state feedback gains using off-the-shelf interior-point optimization solvers. To illustrate the performance of the proposed method, we compare our method with existing probabilistic control methods.
summary: In this paper, we consider the closed-loop control problem of nonlinear robotic systems in the presence of probabilistic uncertainties and disturbances. More precisely, we design a state feedback controller that minimizes deviations of the states of the system from the nominal state trajectories due to uncertainties and disturbances. Existing approaches to address the control problem of probabilistic systems are limited to particular classes of uncertainties and systems such as Gaussian uncertainties and processes and linearized systems. We present an approach that deals with nonlinear dynamics models and arbitrary known probabilistic uncertainties. We formulate the controller design problem as an optimization problem in terms of statistics of the probability distributions including moments and characteristic functions. In particular, in the provided optimization problem, we use moments and characteristic functions to propagate uncertainties throughout the nonlinear motion model of robotic systems. In order to reduce the tracking deviations, we minimize the uncertainty of the probabilistic states around the nominal trajectory by minimizing the trace and the determinant of the covariance matrix of the probabilistic states. To obtain the state feedback gains, we solve deterministic optimization problems in terms of moments, characteristic functions, and state feedback gains using off-the-shelf interior-point optimization solvers. To illustrate the performance of the proposed method, we compare our method with existing probabilistic control methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑存在概率不确定性和干扰的情况下非线性机器人系统的闭环控制问题。更准确地说，我们设计了一个状态反馈控制器，可以最大限度地减少由于不确定性和干扰而导致的系统状态与标称状态轨迹的偏差。解决概率系统控制问题的现有方法仅限于特定类别的不确定性和系统，例如高斯不确定性和过程以及线性化系统。我们提出了一种处理非线性动力学模型和任意已知概率不确定性的方法。我们根据包括矩和特征函数在内的概率分布统计将控制器设计问题表述为优化问题。特别是，在提供的优化问题中，我们使用矩和特征函数在整个机器人系统的非线性运动模型中传播不确定性。为了减少跟踪偏差，我们通过最小化概率状态的迹和协方差矩阵的行列式来最小化标称轨迹周围的概率状态的不确定性。为了获得状态反馈增益，我们使用现成的内点优化求解器解决了矩、特征函数和状态反馈增益方面的确定性优化问题。为了说明所提出方法的性能，我们将我们的方法与现有的概率控制方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非高斯不确定性最小化的闭环控制方法，用于处理具有概率不确定性和干扰的非线性机器人系统，旨在通过状态反馈控制器减少系统状态偏离预期轨迹的偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅适用于高斯不确定性或线性化系统，难以处理非线性动力学模型和任意已知的概率不确定性，因此需要一种更通用的控制策略。
AI.method: 将控制器设计转化为概率分布统计量（如矩和特征函数）的优化问题，通过最小化概率状态协方差矩阵的迹和行列式来降低不确定性，并利用现成的内点法优化求解器计算状态反馈增益。
AI.result: 通过与现有概率控制方法的对比实验，验证了所提方法在减少跟踪偏差和处理非高斯不确定性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为非线性机器人系统在非高斯不确定性下的控制提供了新的优化框架，具有更广泛的适用性和鲁棒性。

In order to reduce the tracking deviations, we minimize the uncertainty of the probabilistic states around the nominal trajectory by minimizing the trace and the determinant of the covariance matrix of the probabilistic states. To obtain the state feedback gains, we solve deterministic optimization problems in terms of moments, characteristic functions, and state feedback gains using off-the-shelf interior-point optimization solvers. To illustrate the performance of the proposed method, we compare our method with existing probabilistic control methods. 在本文中，我们考虑存在概率不确定性和干扰的情况下非线性机器人系统的闭环控制问题。更准确地说，我们设计了一个状态反馈控制器，可以最大限度地减少由于不确定性和干扰而导致的系统状态与标称状态轨迹的偏差。解决概率系统控制问题的现有方法仅限于特定类别的不确定性和系统，例如高斯不确定性和过程以及线性化系统。我们提出了一种处理非线性动力学模型和任意已知概率不确定性的方法。我们根据包括矩和特征函数在内的概率分布统计将控制器设计问题表述为优化问题。特别是，在提供的优化问题中，我们使用矩和特征函数在整个机器人系统的非线性运动模型中传播不确定性。为了减少跟踪偏差，我们通过最小化概率状态的迹和协方差矩阵的行列式来最小化标称轨迹周围的概率状态的不确定性。为了获得状态反馈增益，我们使用现成的内点优化求解器解决了矩、特征函数和状态反馈增益方面的确定性优化问题。为了说明所提出方法的性能，我们将我们的方法与现有的概率控制方法进行比较。 本文提出了一种基于非高斯不确定性最小化的闭环控制方法，用于处理具有概率不确定性和干扰的非线性机器人系统，旨在通过状态反馈控制器减少系统状态偏离预期轨迹的偏差。 Weiqiao Han,Ashkan Jasour,Brian Williams cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Ardalan Tajbakhsh,Lorenz T. Biegler,Aaron M. Johnson
title: Conflict-Based Model Predictive Control for Scalable Multi-Robot Motion Planning
title_zh: 用于可扩展多机器人运动规划的基于冲突的模型预测控制
abstract: This paper presents a scalable multi-robot motion planning algorithm called Conflict-Based Model Predictive Control (CB-MPC). Inspired by Conflict-Based Search (CBS), the planner leverages a similar high-level conflict tree to efficiently resolve robot-robot conflicts in the continuous space, while reasoning about each agent's kinematic and dynamic constraints and actuation limits using MPC as the low-level planner. We show that tracking high-level multi-robot plans with a vanilla MPC controller is insufficient, and results in unexpected collisions in tight navigation scenarios. Compared to other variations of multi-robot MPC like joint, prioritized, and distributed, we demonstrate that CB-MPC improves the executability and success rate, allows for closer robot-robot interactions, and reduces the computational cost significantly without compromising the solution quality across a variety of environments. Furthermore, we show that CB-MPC combined with a high-level path planner can effectively substitute computationally expensive full-horizon multi-robot kinodynamic planners.
summary: This paper presents a scalable multi-robot motion planning algorithm called Conflict-Based Model Predictive Control (CB-MPC). Inspired by Conflict-Based Search (CBS), the planner leverages a similar high-level conflict tree to efficiently resolve robot-robot conflicts in the continuous space, while reasoning about each agent's kinematic and dynamic constraints and actuation limits using MPC as the low-level planner. We show that tracking high-level multi-robot plans with a vanilla MPC controller is insufficient, and results in unexpected collisions in tight navigation scenarios. Compared to other variations of multi-robot MPC like joint, prioritized, and distributed, we demonstrate that CB-MPC improves the executability and success rate, allows for closer robot-robot interactions, and reduces the computational cost significantly without compromising the solution quality across a variety of environments. Furthermore, we show that CB-MPC combined with a high-level path planner can effectively substitute computationally expensive full-horizon multi-robot kinodynamic planners.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种可扩展的多机器人运动规划算法，称为基于冲突的模型预测控制（CB-MPC）。受基于冲突的搜索（CBS）的启发，规划器利用类似的高级冲突树来有效解决连续空间中的机器人与机器人冲突，同时使用 MPC 作为低级规划器来推理每个智能体的运动学和动态约束以及驱动限制。我们表明，使用普通 MPC 控制器跟踪高级多机器人计划是不够的，并且会在严格的导航场景中导致意外碰撞。与多机器人 MPC 的其他变体（如联合、优先和分布式）相比，我们证明 CB-MPC 提高了可执行性和成功率，允许更紧密的机器人与机器人交互，并显着降低计算成本，而不会影响各种环境中的解决方案质量。此外，我们表明 CB-MPC 与高级路径规划器相结合可以有效地替代计算成本昂贵的全视野多机器人运动动力学规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的多机器人运动规划算法CB-MPC，结合冲突树和模型预测控制解决机器人间冲突。
AI.motivation: 传统多机器人MPC方法在复杂环境中存在碰撞风险高、计算成本大的问题，需更高效的冲突解决机制。
AI.method: 基于冲突搜索（CBS）构建高层冲突树解决机器人间冲突，结合MPC处理动力学约束，替代传统联合或优先级规划方法。
AI.result: CB-MPC在多种环境中显著提升任务成功率，允许更紧密的机器人交互，同时降低计算成本且不牺牲解的质量。
AI.conclusion: CB-MPC通过分层规划有效替代了计算密集型的全时域规划器，为多机器人系统提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Théophile Champion,Marek Grześ,Lisa Bonheme,Howard Bowman
title: Deconstructing deep active inference
title_zh: 解构深度主动推理
abstract: Active inference is a theory of perception, learning and decision making, which can be applied to neuroscience, robotics, and machine learning. Recently, reasearch has been taking place to scale up this framework using Monte-Carlo tree search and deep learning. The goal of this activity is to solve more complicated tasks using deep active inference. First, we review the existing literature, then, we progresively build a deep active inference agent. For two agents, we have experimented with five definitions of the expected free energy and three different action selection strategies. According to our experiments, the models able to solve the dSprites environment are the ones that maximise rewards. Finally, we compare the similarity of the representation learned by the layers of various agents using centered kernel alignment. Importantly, the agent maximising reward and the agent minimising expected free energy learn very similar representations except for the last layer of the critic network (reflecting the difference in learning objective), and the variance layers of the transition and encoder networks. We found that the reward maximising agent is a lot more certain than the agent minimising expected free energy. This is because the agent minimising expected free energy always picks the action down, and does not gather enough data for the other actions. In contrast, the agent maximising reward, keeps on selecting the actions left and right, enabling it to successfully solve the task. The only difference between those two agents is the epistemic value, which aims to make the outputs of the transition and encoder networks as close as possible. Thus, the agent minimising expected free energy picks a single action (down), and becomes an expert at predicting the future when selecting this action. This makes the KL divergence between the output of the transition and encoder networks small.
summary: Active inference is a theory of perception, learning and decision making, which can be applied to neuroscience, robotics, and machine learning. Recently, reasearch has been taking place to scale up this framework using Monte-Carlo tree search and deep learning. The goal of this activity is to solve more complicated tasks using deep active inference. First, we review the existing literature, then, we progresively build a deep active inference agent. For two agents, we have experimented with five definitions of the expected free energy and three different action selection strategies. According to our experiments, the models able to solve the dSprites environment are the ones that maximise rewards. Finally, we compare the similarity of the representation learned by the layers of various agents using centered kernel alignment. Importantly, the agent maximising reward and the agent minimising expected free energy learn very similar representations except for the last layer of the critic network (reflecting the difference in learning objective), and the variance layers of the transition and encoder networks. We found that the reward maximising agent is a lot more certain than the agent minimising expected free energy. This is because the agent minimising expected free energy always picks the action down, and does not gather enough data for the other actions. In contrast, the agent maximising reward, keeps on selecting the actions left and right, enabling it to successfully solve the task. The only difference between those two agents is the epistemic value, which aims to make the outputs of the transition and encoder networks as close as possible. Thus, the agent minimising expected free energy picks a single action (down), and becomes an expert at predicting the future when selecting this action. This makes the KL divergence between the output of the transition and encoder networks small.
abstract_zh: 主动推理是一种感知、学习和决策的理论，可应用于神经科学、机器人和机器学习。最近，研究人员一直在使用蒙特卡罗树搜索和深度学习来扩展该框架。此活动的目标是使用深度主动推理解决更复杂的任务。首先，我们回顾现有文献，然后，我们逐步构建一个深度主动推理代理。对于两个智能体，我们尝试了五种预期自由能的定义和三种不同的动作选择策略。根据我们的实验，能够解决 dSprites 环境的模型是能够最大化奖励的模型。最后，我们使用中心核对齐来比较各个代理层学习到的表示的相似性。重要的是，除了批评网络的最后一层（反映学习目标的差异）以及转换和编码器网络的方差层之外，最大化奖励的代理和最小化预期自由能的代理学习非常相似的表示。我们发现奖励最大化的智能体比最小化预期自由能的智能体更有确定性。这是因为最小化预期自由能的代理总是会选择该动作，并且不会为其他动作收集足够的数据。相反，代理最大化奖励，不断选择左右动作，使其能够成功解决任务。这两个代理之间的唯一区别是认知值，其目的是使转换网络和编码器网络的输出尽可能接近。因此，最小化预期自由能的智能体会选择单个动作（向下），并在选择该动作时成为预测未来的专家。这使得转换网络和编码器网络的输出之间的 KL 散度很小。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过深度主动推理框架解决复杂任务，并比较不同策略下的模型表现。
AI.motivation: 主动推理理论在神经科学、机器人和机器学习中具有广泛应用，但需通过深度学习和蒙特卡洛树搜索扩展其规模以应对更复杂任务。
AI.method: 构建深度主动推理智能体，实验对比五种预期自由能定义和三种动作选择策略，利用中心核对齐分析表征相似性。
AI.result: 最大化奖励的智能体在dSprites环境中表现更优，且其表征与最小化预期自由能的智能体相似，但批评网络最后一层及方差层存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 智能体行为差异源于认知价值目标，最小化预期自由能的智能体因固定动作选择导致表征不确定性，而最大化奖励的智能体通过多样化动作探索获得更优解。

This makes the KL divergence between the output of the transition and encoder networks small. 主动推理是一种感知、学习和决策的理论，可应用于神经科学、机器人和机器学习。最近，研究人员一直在使用蒙特卡罗树搜索和深度学习来扩展该框架。此活动的目标是使用深度主动推理解决更复杂的任务。首先，我们回顾现有文献，然后，我们逐步构建一个深度主动推理代理。对于两个智能体，我们尝试了五种预期自由能的定义和三种不同的动作选择策略。根据我们的实验，能够解决 dSprites 环境的模型是能够最大化奖励的模型。最后，我们使用中心核对齐来比较各个代理层学习到的表示的相似性。重要的是，除了批评网络的最后一层（反映学习目标的差异）以及转换和编码器网络的方差层之外，最大化奖励的代理和最小化预期自由能的代理学习非常相似的表示。我们发现奖励最大化的智能体比最小化预期自由能的智能体更有确定性。这是因为最小化预期自由能的代理总是会选择该动作，并且不会为其他动作收集足够的数据。相反，代理最大化奖励，不断选择左右动作，使其能够成功解决任务。这两个代理之间的唯一区别是认知值，其目的是使转换网络和编码器网络的输出尽可能接近。因此，最小化预期自由能的智能体会选择单个动作（向下），并在选择该动作时成为预测未来的专家。这使得转换网络和编码器网络的输出之间的 KL 散度很小。 本文旨在通过深度主动推理框架解决复杂任务，并比较不同策略下的模型表现。 Théophile Champion,Marek Grześ,Lisa Bonheme,Howard Bowman cs.AI

authors_text: Zachary Huemann,Xin Tie,Junjie Hu,Tyler J. Bradshaw
title: ConTEXTual Net: A Multimodal Vision-Language Model for Segmentation of Pneumothorax
title_zh: ConTEXTual Net：用于气胸分割的多模态视觉语言模型
abstract: Radiology narrative reports often describe characteristics of a patient's disease, including its location, size, and shape. Motivated by the recent success of multimodal learning, we hypothesized that this descriptive text could guide medical image analysis algorithms. We proposed a novel vision-language model, ConTEXTual Net, for the task of pneumothorax segmentation on chest radiographs. ConTEXTual Net utilizes language features extracted from corresponding free-form radiology reports using a pre-trained language model. Cross-attention modules are designed to combine the intermediate output of each vision encoder layer and the text embeddings generated by the language model. ConTEXTual Net was trained on the CANDID-PTX dataset consisting of 3,196 positive cases of pneumothorax with segmentation annotations from 6 different physicians as well as clinical radiology reports. Using cross-validation, ConTEXTual Net achieved a Dice score of 0.716$\pm$0.016, which was similar to the degree of inter-reader variability (0.712$\pm$0.044) computed on a subset of the data. It outperformed both vision-only models (ResNet50 U-Net: 0.677$\pm$0.015 and GLoRIA: 0.686$\pm$0.014) and a competing vision-language model (LAVT: 0.706$\pm$0.009). Ablation studies confirmed that it was the text information that led to the performance gains. Additionally, we show that certain augmentation methods degraded ConTEXTual Net's segmentation performance by breaking the image-text concordance. We also evaluated the effects of using different language models and activation functions in the cross-attention module, highlighting the efficacy of our chosen architectural design.

Motivated by the recent success of multimodal learning, we hypothesized that this descriptive text could guide medical image analysis algorithms. We proposed a novel vision-language model, ConTEXTual Net, for the task of pneumothorax segmentation on chest radiographs. ConTEXTual Net utilizes language features extracted from corresponding free-form radiology reports using a pre-trained language model. Cross-attention modules are designed to combine the intermediate output of each vision encoder layer and the text embeddings generated by the language model. ConTEXTual Net was trained on the CANDID-PTX dataset consisting of 3,196 positive cases of pneumothorax with segmentation annotations from 6 different physicians as well as clinical radiology reports. Using cross-validation, ConTEXTual Net achieved a Dice score of 0.716$\pm$0.016, which was similar to the degree of inter-reader variability (0.712$\pm$0.044) computed on a subset of the data. It outperformed both vision-only models (ResNet50 U-Net: 0.677$\pm$0.015 and GLoRIA: 0.686$\pm$0.014) and a competing vision-language model (LAVT: 0.706$\pm$0.009). Ablation studies confirmed that it was the text information that led to the performance gains. Additionally, we show that certain augmentation methods degraded ConTEXTual Net's segmentation performance by breaking the image-text concordance. We also evaluated the effects of using different language models and activation functions in the cross-attention module, highlighting the efficacy of our chosen architectural design.
abstract_zh: 放射学叙述报告通常描述患者疾病的特征，包括其位置、大小和形状。受多模态学习最近成功的推动，我们假设这种描述性文本可以指导医学图像分析算法。我们提出了一种新颖的视觉语言模型 ConTEXTual Net，用于胸片气胸分割的任务。 ConTEXTual Net 利用预先训练的语言模型从相应的自由格式放射学报告中提取的语言特征。交叉注意力模块旨在结合每个视觉编码器层的中间输出和语言模型生成的文本嵌入。 ConTEXTual Net 在 CANDID-PTX 数据集上进行训练，该数据集包含 3,196 个气胸阳性病例，以及来自 6 位不同医生的分段注释以及临床放射学报告。使用交叉验证，ConTEXTual Net 获得了 0.716$\pm$0.016 的 Dice 分数，这与根据数据子集计算的读者间变异程度 (0.712$\pm$0.044) 相似。它的性能优于纯视觉模型（ResNet50 U-Net：0.677$\pm$0.015 和 GLoRIA：0.686$\pm$0.014）和竞争视觉语言模型（LAVT：0.706$\pm$0.009）。消融研究证实，正是文本信息带来了性能提升。此外，我们还发现某些增强方法会破坏图像-文本一致性，从而降低了 ConTEXTual Net 的分割性能。我们还评估了在交叉注意模块中使用不同语言模型和激活函数的效果，突出了我们选择的架构设计的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态视觉-语言模型ConTEXTual Net，用于胸部X光片中气胸的分割任务。
AI.motivation: 受多模态学习成功启发，作者认为放射科报告中的描述性文本可为医学图像分析提供指导，从而提升分割性能。
AI.method: 利用预训练语言模型提取放射报告文本特征，通过跨注意力模块融合视觉编码器各层输出与文本嵌入，结合CANDID-PTX数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: ConTEXTual Net在Dice分数上达到0.716±0.016，优于纯视觉模型和竞争性视觉-语言模型，且文本信息是性能提升的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 整合文本与图像信息能有效提升医学图像分割性能，所设计的跨注意力架构及文本特征融合方法具有显著优势。

authors_text: Anushri Dixit,David D. Fan,Kyohei Otsu,Sharmita Dey,Ali-Akbar Agha-Mohammadi,Joel W. Burdick
title: STEP: Stochastic Traversability Evaluation and Planning for Risk-Aware Off-road Navigation; Results from the DARPA Subterranean Challenge
title_zh: STEP：风险意识越野导航的随机可通行性评估和规划； DARPA 地下挑战赛的结果
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.02828
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.02828
abstract: Although autonomy has gained widespread usage in structured and controlled environments, robotic autonomy in unknown and off-road terrain remains a difficult problem. Extreme, off-road, and unstructured environments such as undeveloped wilderness, caves, rubble, and other post-disaster sites pose unique and challenging problems for autonomous navigation. Based on our participation in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, we propose an approach to improve autonomous traversal of robots in subterranean environments that are perceptually degraded and completely unknown through a traversability and planning framework called STEP (Stochastic Traversability Evaluation and Planning). We present 1) rapid uncertainty-aware mapping and traversability evaluation, 2) tail risk assessment using the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR), 3) efficient risk and constraint-aware kinodynamic motion planning using sequential quadratic programming-based (SQP) model predictive control (MPC), 4) fast recovery behaviors to account for unexpected scenarios that may cause failure, and 5) risk-based gait adaptation for quadrupedal robots. We illustrate and validate extensive results from our experiments on wheeled and legged robotic platforms in field studies at the Valentine Cave, CA (cave environment), Kentucky Underground, KY (mine environment), and Louisville Mega Cavern, KY (final competition site for the DARPA Subterranean Challenge with tunnel, urban, and cave environments).
summary: Although autonomy has gained widespread usage in structured and controlled environments, robotic autonomy in unknown and off-road terrain remains a difficult problem. Extreme, off-road, and unstructured environments such as undeveloped wilderness, caves, rubble, and other post-disaster sites pose unique and challenging problems for autonomous navigation. Based on our participation in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, we propose an approach to improve autonomous traversal of robots in subterranean environments that are perceptually degraded and completely unknown through a traversability and planning framework called STEP (Stochastic Traversability Evaluation and Planning). We present 1) rapid uncertainty-aware mapping and traversability evaluation, 2) tail risk assessment using the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR), 3) efficient risk and constraint-aware kinodynamic motion planning using sequential quadratic programming-based (SQP) model predictive control (MPC), 4) fast recovery behaviors to account for unexpected scenarios that may cause failure, and 5) risk-based gait adaptation for quadrupedal robots. We illustrate and validate extensive results from our experiments on wheeled and legged robotic platforms in field studies at the Valentine Cave, CA (cave environment), Kentucky Underground, KY (mine environment), and Louisville Mega Cavern, KY (final competition site for the DARPA Subterranean Challenge with tunnel, urban, and cave environments).
abstract_zh: 尽管自主性已在结构化和受控环境中得到广泛应用，但在未知和越野地形中的机器人自主性仍然是一个难题。极端、越野和非结构化环境，例如未开发的荒野、洞穴、瓦砾和其他灾后地点，给自主导航带来了独特且具有挑战性的问题。基于我们参与 DARPA 地下挑战赛的经验，我们提出了一种方法，通过名为 STEP（随机可穿越性评估和规划）的可穿越性和规划框架来改善机器人在感知退化且完全未知的地下环境中的自主穿越。我们提出了 1) 快速的不确定性感知映射和可遍历性评估，2) 使用条件风险值 (CVaR) 进行尾部风险评估，3) 使用基于顺序二次规划 (SQP) 模型预测控制 (MPC) 的高效风险和约束感知动动力学运动规划，4) 快速恢复行为，以考虑可能导致失败的意外情况，以及 5) 四足机器人基于风险的步态适应。我们展示并验证了在加利福尼亚州瓦伦丁洞穴（洞穴环境）、肯塔基州肯塔基地下城（矿井环境）和肯塔基州路易斯维尔巨型洞穴（DARPA 地下挑战最终竞赛场地，隧道、城市和洞穴环境）现场研究中轮式和腿式机器人平台实验的广泛结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STEP框架，旨在通过不确定性感知映射、风险评估与规划方法，提升机器人在未知地下环境中的自主导航能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自主导航技术难以应对地下洞穴、废墟等感知退化且完全未知的极端环境，需开发风险感知的路径规划方法以提高机器人在复杂地形中的安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: STEP框架包含五部分：1) 不确定性感知的快速地图构建与可穿越性评估；2) 基于条件风险价值（CVaR）的尾部风险评估；3) 结合SQP的约束感知运动规划；4) 面向突发情况的快速恢复机制；5) 基于风险的四足机器人步态自适应调整。
AI.result: 在加州Valentine洞穴、肯塔基州矿洞及路易斯维尔地下洞穴等真实场景中，STEP框架在轮式与腿式机器人平台上验证了其有效性，成功通过DARPA地下挑战赛。
AI.conclusion: STEP框架通过整合风险评估与动态规划方法，显著提升了机器人在复杂地下环境中的自主导航能力，为灾难救援等场景提供了可行的技术方案。

method: STEP框架包含五部分：1) 不确定性感知的快速地图构建与可穿越性评估；2) 基于条件风险价值（CVaR）的尾部风险评估；3) 结合SQP的约束感知运动规划；4) 面向突发情况的快速恢复机制；5) 基于风险的四足机器人步态自适应调整。
result: 在加州Valentine洞穴、肯塔基州矿洞及路易斯维尔地下洞穴等真实场景中，STEP框架在轮式与腿式机器人平台上验证了其有效性，成功通过DARPA地下挑战赛。
conclusion: STEP框架通过整合风险评估与动态规划方法，显著提升了机器人在复杂地下环境中的自主导航能力，为灾难救援等场景提供了可行的技术方案。
search_text: STEP: Stochastic Traversability Evaluation and Planning for Risk-Aware Off-road Navigation; Results from the DARPA Subterranean Challenge STEP：风险意识越野导航的随机可通行性评估和规划； DARPA 地下挑战赛的结果 Although autonomy has gained widespread usage in structured and controlled environments, robotic autonomy in unknown and off-road terrain remains a difficult problem. Extreme, off-road, and unstructured environments such as undeveloped wilderness, caves, rubble, and other post-disaster sites pose unique and challenging problems for autonomous navigation. Based on our participation in the DARPA Subterranean Challenge, we propose an approach to improve autonomous traversal of robots in subterranean environments that are perceptually degraded and completely unknown through a traversability and planning framework called STEP (Stochastic Traversability Evaluation and Planning). We present 1) rapid uncertainty-aware mapping and traversability evaluation, 2) tail risk assessment using the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR), 3) efficient risk and constraint-aware kinodynamic motion planning using sequential quadratic programming-based (SQP) model predictive control (MPC), 4) fast recovery behaviors to account for unexpected scenarios that may cause failure, and 5) risk-based gait adaptation for quadrupedal robots. We illustrate and validate extensive results from our experiments on wheeled and legged robotic platforms in field studies at the Valentine Cave, CA (cave environment), Kentucky Underground, KY (mine environment), and Louisville Mega Cavern, KY (final competition site for the DARPA Subterranean Challenge with tunnel, urban, and cave environments). 尽管自主性已在结构化和受控环境中得到广泛应用，但在未知和越野地形中的机器人自主性仍然是一个难题。极端、越野和非结构化环境，例如未开发的荒野、洞穴、瓦砾和其他灾后地点，给自主导航带来了独特且具有挑战性的问题。基于我们参与 DARPA 地下挑战赛的经验，我们提出了一种方法，通过名为 STEP（随机可穿越性评估和规划）的可穿越性和规划框架来改善机器人在感知退化且完全未知的地下环境中的自主穿越。我们提出了 1) 快速的不确定性感知映射和可遍历性评估，2) 使用条件风险值 (CVaR) 进行尾部风险评估，3) 使用基于顺序二次规划 (SQP) 模型预测控制 (MPC) 的高效风险和约束感知动动力学运动规划，4) 快速恢复行为，以考虑可能导致失败的意外情况，以及 5) 四足机器人基于风险的步态适应。我们展示并验证了在加利福尼亚州瓦伦丁洞穴（洞穴环境）、肯塔基州肯塔基地下城（矿井环境）和肯塔基州路易斯维尔巨型洞穴（DARPA 地下挑战最终竞赛场地，隧道、城市和洞穴环境）现场研究中轮式和腿式机器人平台实验的广泛结果。 本文提出STEP框架，旨在通过不确定性感知映射、风险评估与规划方法，提升机器人在未知地下环境中的自主导航能力。 Anushri Dixit,David D. Fan,Kyohei Otsu,Sharmita Dey,Ali-Akbar Agha-Mohammadi,Joel W. Burdick cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Cheng Jiang,Xinhai Hou,Akhil Kondepudi,Asadur Chowdury,Christian W. Freudiger,Daniel A. Orringer,Honglak Lee,Todd C. Hollon
title: Hierarchical discriminative learning improves visual representations of biomedical microscopy
title_zh: 分层判别学习改善了生物医学显微镜的视觉表示
abstract: Learning high-quality, self-supervised, visual representations is essential to advance the role of computer vision in biomedical microscopy and clinical medicine. Previous work has focused on self-supervised representation learning (SSL) methods developed for instance discrimination and applied them directly to image patches, or fields-of-view, sampled from gigapixel whole-slide images (WSIs) used for cancer diagnosis. However, this strategy is limited because it (1) assumes patches from the same patient are independent, (2) neglects the patient-slide-patch hierarchy of clinical biomedical microscopy, and (3) requires strong data augmentations that can degrade downstream performance. Importantly, sampled patches from WSIs of a patient's tumor are a diverse set of image examples that capture the same underlying cancer diagnosis. This motivated HiDisc, a data-driven method that leverages the inherent patient-slide-patch hierarchy of clinical biomedical microscopy to define a hierarchical discriminative learning task that implicitly learns features of the underlying diagnosis. HiDisc uses a self-supervised contrastive learning framework in which positive patch pairs are defined based on a common ancestry in the data hierarchy, and a unified patch, slide, and patient discriminative learning objective is used for visual SSL. We benchmark HiDisc visual representations on two vision tasks using two biomedical microscopy datasets, and demonstrate that (1) HiDisc pretraining outperforms current state-of-the-art self-supervised pretraining methods for cancer diagnosis and genetic mutation prediction, and (2) HiDisc learns high-quality visual representations using natural patch diversity without strong data augmentations.
summary: Learning high-quality, self-supervised, visual representations is essential to advance the role of computer vision in biomedical microscopy and clinical medicine. Previous work has focused on self-supervised representation learning (SSL) methods developed for instance discrimination and applied them directly to image patches, or fields-of-view, sampled from gigapixel whole-slide images (WSIs) used for cancer diagnosis. However, this strategy is limited because it (1) assumes patches from the same patient are independent, (2) neglects the patient-slide-patch hierarchy of clinical biomedical microscopy, and (3) requires strong data augmentations that can degrade downstream performance. Importantly, sampled patches from WSIs of a patient's tumor are a diverse set of image examples that capture the same underlying cancer diagnosis. This motivated HiDisc, a data-driven method that leverages the inherent patient-slide-patch hierarchy of clinical biomedical microscopy to define a hierarchical discriminative learning task that implicitly learns features of the underlying diagnosis. HiDisc uses a self-supervised contrastive learning framework in which positive patch pairs are defined based on a common ancestry in the data hierarchy, and a unified patch, slide, and patient discriminative learning objective is used for visual SSL. We benchmark HiDisc visual representations on two vision tasks using two biomedical microscopy datasets, and demonstrate that (1) HiDisc pretraining outperforms current state-of-the-art self-supervised pretraining methods for cancer diagnosis and genetic mutation prediction, and (2) HiDisc learns high-quality visual representations using natural patch diversity without strong data augmentations.
abstract_zh: 学习高质量、自我监督的视觉表示对于提升计算机视觉在生物医学显微镜和临床医学中的作用至关重要。之前的工作重点是为区分等而开发的自监督表示学习（SSL）方法，并将其直接应用于从用于癌症诊断的十亿像素全幻灯片图像（WSI）中采样的图像块或视野。然而，这种策略是有限的，因为它（1）假设来自同一患者的补丁是独立的，（2）忽略了临床生物医学显微镜的患者-幻灯片-补丁层次结构，以及（3）需要强大的数据增强，这可能会降低下游性能。重要的是，从患者肿瘤的 WSI 中采样的斑块是一组不同的图像示例，它们捕获了相同的潜在癌症诊断。这激发了 HiDisc，一种数据驱动的方法，利用临床生物医学显微镜固有的患者幻灯片层次结构来定义分层判别学习任务，隐式学习潜在诊断的特征。 HiDisc 使用自监督对比学习框架，其中基于数据层次结构中的共同祖先定义正补丁对，并且将统一的补丁、幻灯片和患者区分学习目标用于视觉 SSL。我们使用两个生物医学显微镜数据集在两个视觉任务上对 HiDisc 视觉表示进行基准测试，并证明（1）HiDisc 预训练优于当前最先进的用于癌症诊断和基因突变预测的自监督预训练方法，以及（2）HiDisc 使用自然块多样性学习高质量的视觉表示，而无需强大的数据增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于层次判别学习的方法HiDisc，用于改进生物医学显微镜图像的视觉表示。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在处理生物医学显微镜图像时存在三个局限：假设同一患者图像块独立、忽略患者-切片-图像块的层次结构、依赖可能损害下游任务的强数据增强。
AI.method: HiDisc通过构建患者-切片-图像块的层次结构，定义基于共同祖先的正样本对，在统一框架下实现跨层次的判别学习，无需强数据增强。
AI.result: 在两个生物医学数据集的两个视觉任务中，HiDisc预训练模型在癌症诊断和基因突变预测上均优于现有最先进方法，且能利用自然图像块多样性提升表示质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘生物医学显微镜图像的层次结构，HiDisc有效提升了视觉表示性能，为临床诊断提供了更优的自监督学习框架。

authors_text: Achin Jain,Gurumurthy Swaminathan,Paolo Favaro,Hao Yang,Avinash Ravichandran,Hrayr Harutyunyan,Alessandro Achille,Onkar Dabeer,Bernt Schiele,Ashwin Swaminathan,Stefano Soatto
title: A Meta-Learning Approach to Predicting Performance and Data Requirements
title_zh: 预测性能和数据需求的元学习方法
abstract: We propose an approach to estimate the number of samples required for a model to reach a target performance. We find that the power law, the de facto principle to estimate model performance, leads to large error when using a small dataset (e.g., 5 samples per class) for extrapolation. This is because the log-performance error against the log-dataset size follows a nonlinear progression in the few-shot regime followed by a linear progression in the high-shot regime. We introduce a novel piecewise power law (PPL) that handles the two data regimes differently. To estimate the parameters of the PPL, we introduce a random forest regressor trained via meta learning that generalizes across classification/detection tasks, ResNet/ViT based architectures, and random/pre-trained initializations. The PPL improves the performance estimation on average by 37% across 16 classification and 33% across 10 detection datasets, compared to the power law. We further extend the PPL to provide a confidence bound and use it to limit the prediction horizon that reduces over-estimation of data by 76% on classification and 91% on detection datasets.
summary: We propose an approach to estimate the number of samples required for a model to reach a target performance. We find that the power law, the de facto principle to estimate model performance, leads to large error when using a small dataset (e.g., 5 samples per class) for extrapolation. This is because the log-performance error against the log-dataset size follows a nonlinear progression in the few-shot regime followed by a linear progression in the high-shot regime. We introduce a novel piecewise power law (PPL) that handles the two data regimes differently. To estimate the parameters of the PPL, we introduce a random forest regressor trained via meta learning that generalizes across classification/detection tasks, ResNet/ViT based architectures, and random/pre-trained initializations. The PPL improves the performance estimation on average by 37% across 16 classification and 33% across 10 detection datasets, compared to the power law. We further extend the PPL to provide a confidence bound and use it to limit the prediction horizon that reduces over-estimation of data by 76% on classification and 91% on detection datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法来估计模型达到目标性能所需的样本数量。我们发现，幂律（估计模型性能的事实上的原理）在使用小数据集（例如，每类 5 个样本）进行外推时会导致较大误差。这是因为对数数据集大小的对数性能误差在少样本情况下遵循非线性进展，然后在高样本情况下遵循线性进展。我们引入了一种新颖的分段幂律（PPL），它以不同的方式处理两种数据机制。为了估计 PPL 的参数，我们引入了通过元学习训练的随机森林回归器，该回归器可以泛化分类/检测任务、基于 ResNet/ViT 的架构以及随机/预训练的初始化。与幂律相比，PPL 将 16 个分类的性能估计平均提高了 37%，将 10 个检测数据集的性能估计平均提高了 33%。我们进一步扩展 PPL 以提供置信区间，并使用它来限制预测范围，从而将分类数据的高估减少 76%，在检测数据集上减少 91%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的分段幂定律（PPL）方法，用于更准确地预测模型性能和数据需求，改进传统幂定律在小数据集上的误差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统幂定律在小样本场景下预测模型性能时存在较大误差，因数据量与性能的对数关系在低样本量时呈非线性，高样本量时呈线性，需分段处理。
AI.method: 引入分段幂定律（PPL）区分低样本量和高样本量两种数据场景，并通过元学习训练的随机森林回归器估计参数，进一步扩展置信区间以限制预测范围。
AI.result: 在16个分类和10个检测数据集上，PPL方法分别提升性能估计37%和33%，并减少数据需求高估76%（分类）和91%（检测）。
AI.conclusion: PPL方法通过分段建模和元学习显著提升性能预测准确性，结合置信区间有效降低数据需求的高估风险。
