authors_text: Paria Mehrani,John K. Tsotsos
title: Self-attention in Vision Transformers Performs Perceptual Grouping, Not Attention
title_zh: 视觉变形金刚中的自注意力执行感知分组，而不是注意力
abstract: Recently, a considerable number of studies in computer vision involves deep neural architectures called vision transformers. Visual processing in these models incorporates computational models that are claimed to implement attention mechanisms. Despite an increasing body of work that attempts to understand the role of attention mechanisms in vision transformers, their effect is largely unknown. Here, we asked if the attention mechanisms in vision transformers exhibit similar effects as those known in human visual attention. To answer this question, we revisited the attention formulation in these models and found that despite the name, computationally, these models perform a special class of relaxation labeling with similarity grouping effects. Additionally, whereas modern experimental findings reveal that human visual attention involves both feed-forward and feedback mechanisms, the purely feed-forward architecture of vision transformers suggests that attention in these models will not have the same effects as those known in humans. To quantify these observations, we evaluated grouping performance in a family of vision transformers. Our results suggest that self-attention modules group figures in the stimuli based on similarity in visual features such as color. Also, in a singleton detection experiment as an instance of saliency detection, we studied if these models exhibit similar effects as those of feed-forward visual salience mechanisms utilized in human visual attention. We found that generally, the transformer-based attention modules assign more salience either to distractors or the ground. Together, our study suggests that the attention mechanisms in vision transformers perform similarity grouping and not attention.
summary: Recently, a considerable number of studies in computer vision involves deep neural architectures called vision transformers. Visual processing in these models incorporates computational models that are claimed to implement attention mechanisms. Despite an increasing body of work that attempts to understand the role of attention mechanisms in vision transformers, their effect is largely unknown. Here, we asked if the attention mechanisms in vision transformers exhibit similar effects as those known in human visual attention. To answer this question, we revisited the attention formulation in these models and found that despite the name, computationally, these models perform a special class of relaxation labeling with similarity grouping effects. Additionally, whereas modern experimental findings reveal that human visual attention involves both feed-forward and feedback mechanisms, the purely feed-forward architecture of vision transformers suggests that attention in these models will not have the same effects as those known in humans. To quantify these observations, we evaluated grouping performance in a family of vision transformers. Our results suggest that self-attention modules group figures in the stimuli based on similarity in visual features such as color. Also, in a singleton detection experiment as an instance of saliency detection, we studied if these models exhibit similar effects as those of feed-forward visual salience mechanisms utilized in human visual attention. We found that generally, the transformer-based attention modules assign more salience either to distractors or the ground. Together, our study suggests that the attention mechanisms in vision transformers perform similarity grouping and not attention.
abstract_zh: 最近，大量计算机视觉研究涉及称为视觉变压器的深层神经架构。这些模型中的视觉处理结合了据称可以实现注意力机制的计算模型。尽管越来越多的工作试图理解注意力机制在视觉变换器中的作用，但它们的作用在很大程度上是未知的。在这里，我们询问视觉转换器中的注意力机制是否表现出与人类视觉注意力中已知的类似效果。为了回答这个问题，我们重新审视了这些模型中的注意力公式，发现尽管名称如此，但在计算上，这些模型执行了一类特殊的具有相似分组效应的松弛标签。此外，虽然现代实验结果表明人类视觉注意力涉及前馈和反馈机制，但视觉变换器的纯粹前馈架构表明这些模型中的注意力不会产生与人类已知的相同的效果。为了量化这些观察结果，我们评估了一系列视觉转换器的分组性能。我们的结果表明，自注意力模块根据颜色等视觉特征的相似性对刺激中的图形进行分组。此外，在作为显着性检测实例的单例检测实验中，我们研究了这些模型是否表现出与人类视觉注意中使用的前馈视觉显着性机制相似的效果。我们发现，一般来说，基于变压器的注意力模块会将更多的显着性分配给干扰物或地面。总之，我们的研究表明视觉转换器中的注意力机制执行相似性分组而不是注意力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨视觉Transformer（ViT）中的自注意力机制是否与人类视觉注意机制相似，并发现其实际执行的是基于相似性的分组操作而非真正的注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer在计算机视觉中广泛应用，但其注意力机制的作用仍不明确。人类视觉注意包含前馈和反馈机制，而ViT的纯前馈结构可能使其注意力机制与人类不同。
AI.method: 通过重新分析ViT中的注意力计算，发现其本质是相似性分组的松弛标记方法。通过分组性能评估和单例检测实验，对比ViT与人类前馈显著性机制的差异。
AI.result: 自注意力模块基于颜色等视觉特征对刺激物进行分组；在显著性检测实验中，ViT注意力模块更倾向于将显著性分配给干扰项或背景。
AI.conclusion: ViT的注意力机制实为相似性分组，而非人类视觉注意。其纯前馈架构限制了与人类注意机制的类比，未来需探索反馈机制以改进模型。

authors_text: Lennart Brocki,Neo Christopher Chung
title: Feature Perturbation Augmentation for Reliable Evaluation of Importance Estimators in Neural Networks
title_zh: 用于可靠评估神经网络中重要性估计器的特征扰动增强
comment: ef:ICLR 2023 Workshop on Trustworthy ML; Full Paper in Pattern Recognition Letters
comments: ef:ICLR 2023 Workshop on Trustworthy ML; Full Paper in Pattern Recognition Letters
abstract: Post-hoc explanation methods attempt to make the inner workings of deep neural networks more interpretable. However, since a ground truth is in general lacking, local post-hoc interpretability methods, which assign importance scores to input features, are challenging to evaluate. One of the most popular evaluation frameworks is to perturb features deemed important by an interpretability method and to measure the change in prediction accuracy. Intuitively, a large decrease in prediction accuracy would indicate that the explanation has correctly quantified the importance of features with respect to the prediction outcome (e.g., logits). However, the change in the prediction outcome may stem from perturbation artifacts, since perturbed samples in the test dataset are out of distribution (OOD) compared to the training dataset and can therefore potentially disturb the model in an unexpected manner. To overcome this challenge, we propose feature perturbation augmentation (FPA) which creates and adds perturbed images during the model training. Through extensive computational experiments, we demonstrate that FPA makes deep neural networks (DNNs) more robust against perturbations. Furthermore, training DNNs with FPA demonstrate that the sign of importance scores may explain the model more meaningfully than has previously been assumed. Overall, FPA is an intuitive data augmentation technique that improves the evaluation of post-hoc interpretability methods.
summary: Post-hoc explanation methods attempt to make the inner workings of deep neural networks more interpretable. However, since a ground truth is in general lacking, local post-hoc interpretability methods, which assign importance scores to input features, are challenging to evaluate. One of the most popular evaluation frameworks is to perturb features deemed important by an interpretability method and to measure the change in prediction accuracy. Intuitively, a large decrease in prediction accuracy would indicate that the explanation has correctly quantified the importance of features with respect to the prediction outcome (e.g., logits). However, the change in the prediction outcome may stem from perturbation artifacts, since perturbed samples in the test dataset are out of distribution (OOD) compared to the training dataset and can therefore potentially disturb the model in an unexpected manner. To overcome this challenge, we propose feature perturbation augmentation (FPA) which creates and adds perturbed images during the model training. Through extensive computational experiments, we demonstrate that FPA makes deep neural networks (DNNs) more robust against perturbations. Furthermore, training DNNs with FPA demonstrate that the sign of importance scores may explain the model more meaningfully than has previously been assumed. Overall, FPA is an intuitive data augmentation technique that improves the evaluation of post-hoc interpretability methods.
abstract_zh: 事后解释方法试图使深层神经网络的内部运作更容易解释。然而，由于通常缺乏基本事实，因此为输入特征分配重要性分数的局部事后可解释性方法很难评估。最流行的评估框架之一是扰乱可解释性方法认为重要的特征并测量预测准确性的变化。直观上，预测精度的大幅下降表明解释已经正确量化了特征相对于预测结果（例如逻辑）的重要性。然而，预测结果的变化可能源于扰动伪影，因为与训练数据集相比，测试数据集中的扰动样本处于分布外 (OOD)，因此可能会以意想不到的方式扰乱模型。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了特征扰动增强（FPA），它在模型训练期间创建并添加扰动图像。通过大量的计算实验，我们证明 FPA 使深度神经网络 (DNN) 对抗扰动更加稳健。此外，使用 FPA 训练 DNN 表明，重要性分数的符号可以比之前假设的更有意义地解释模型。总的来说，FPA 是一种直观的数据增强技术，可以改进事后可解释性方法的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为特征扰动增强（FPA）的数据增强方法，旨在通过提升神经网络对扰动的鲁棒性，从而更可靠地评估后置解释方法的特征重要性估计。
AI.motivation: 现有后置解释方法难以评估特征重要性，因扰动测试样本可能超出训练分布范围，导致模型预测变化无法准确反映特征真实重要性。
AI.method: 在模型训练阶段引入特征扰动增强（FPA），通过生成并添加扰动图像，使神经网络在训练过程中学习到对扰动的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，FPA显著提升了深度神经网络（DNN）对扰动的鲁棒性，并揭示了重要性分数的符号可能比以往认为的更能解释模型行为。
AI.conclusion: FPA是一种直观有效的数据增强技术，能够改进后置可解释性方法的评估可靠性，为特征重要性分析提供更可信的依据。

authors_text: Yiqing Liang,Eliot Laidlaw,Alexander Meyerowitz,Srinath Sridhar,James Tompkin
title: Semantic Attention Flow Fields for Monocular Dynamic Scene Decomposition
title_zh: 单目动态场景分解的语义注意流场
comment: International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023; 10 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
comments: International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV) 2023; 10 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
abstract: From video, we reconstruct a neural volume that captures time-varying color, density, scene flow, semantics, and attention information. The semantics and attention let us identify salient foreground objects separately from the background across spacetime. To mitigate low resolution semantic and attention features, we compute pyramids that trade detail with whole-image context. After optimization, we perform a saliency-aware clustering to decompose the scene. To evaluate real-world scenes, we annotate object masks in the NVIDIA Dynamic Scene and DyCheck datasets. We demonstrate that this method can decompose dynamic scenes in an unsupervised way with competitive performance to a supervised method, and that it improves foreground/background segmentation over recent static/dynamic split methods. Project Webpage: https://visual.cs.brown.edu/saff
summary: From video, we reconstruct a neural volume that captures time-varying color, density, scene flow, semantics, and attention information. The semantics and attention let us identify salient foreground objects separately from the background across spacetime. To mitigate low resolution semantic and attention features, we compute pyramids that trade detail with whole-image context. After optimization, we perform a saliency-aware clustering to decompose the scene. To evaluate real-world scenes, we annotate object masks in the NVIDIA Dynamic Scene and DyCheck datasets. We demonstrate that this method can decompose dynamic scenes in an unsupervised way with competitive performance to a supervised method, and that it improves foreground/background segmentation over recent static/dynamic split methods. Project Webpage: https://visual.cs.brown.edu/saff
abstract_zh: 从视频中，我们重建了一个神经体积，该神经体积捕获随时间变化的颜色、密度、场景流、语义和注意力信息。语义和注意力让我们能够跨时空识别与背景分开的显着前景物体。为了减轻低分辨率语义和注意力特征，我们计算用整个图像上下文交换细节的金字塔。优化后，我们执行显着性感知聚类来分解场景。为了评估真实世界的场景，我们在 NVIDIA 动态场景和 DyCheck 数据集中注释了对象蒙版。我们证明该方法可以以无监督的方式分解动态场景，其性能与监督方法相比具有竞争性，并且它比最近的静态/动态分割方法改进了前景/背景分割。项目网页：https://visual.cs.brown.edu/saff

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义注意力流场的单目动态场景分解方法，通过神经体积重建和显著性感知聚类实现无监督的前景背景分离。
AI.motivation: 现有动态场景分解方法在处理低分辨率语义特征和复杂时空关系时存在局限，需更有效的无监督学习框架提升分割精度。
AI.method: 构建时间可变神经体积，融合语义与注意力信息；通过多尺度金字塔增强上下文感知能力；采用显著性驱动的聚类算法分解场景。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA Dynamic Scene和DyCheck数据集上，无监督方法达到与监督方法相当的性能，显著优于静态/动态分割基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动态场景分解提供了新的技术路径，通过语义-注意力联合建模有效提升了复杂场景的分割质量。

authors_text: Wanyu Bian
title: Optimization-Based Deep learning methods for Magnetic Resonance Imaging Reconstruction and Synthesis
title_zh: 基于优化的磁共振成像重建与合成深度学习方法
abstract: This dissertation is devoted to provide advanced nonconvex nonsmooth variational models of (Magnetic Resonance Image) MRI reconstruction, efficient learnable image reconstruction algorithms and parameter training algorithms that improve the accuracy and robustness of the optimization-based deep learning methods for compressed sensing MRI reconstruction and synthesis. The first part introduces a novel optimization based deep neural network whose architecture is inspired by proximal gradient descent for solving a variational model. The second part is a substantial extension of the preliminary work in the first part by solving the calibration-free fast pMRI reconstruction problem in a discrete-time optimal control framework. The third part aims at developing a generalizable Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) reconstruction method in the meta-learning framework. The last part aims to synthesize target modality of MRI by using partially scanned k-space data from source modalities instead of fully scanned data that is used in the state-of-the-art multimodal synthesis.
summary: This dissertation is devoted to provide advanced nonconvex nonsmooth variational models of (Magnetic Resonance Image) MRI reconstruction, efficient learnable image reconstruction algorithms and parameter training algorithms that improve the accuracy and robustness of the optimization-based deep learning methods for compressed sensing MRI reconstruction and synthesis. The first part introduces a novel optimization based deep neural network whose architecture is inspired by proximal gradient descent for solving a variational model. The second part is a substantial extension of the preliminary work in the first part by solving the calibration-free fast pMRI reconstruction problem in a discrete-time optimal control framework. The third part aims at developing a generalizable Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) reconstruction method in the meta-learning framework. The last part aims to synthesize target modality of MRI by using partially scanned k-space data from source modalities instead of fully scanned data that is used in the state-of-the-art multimodal synthesis.
abstract_zh: 本论文致力于提供先进的（磁共振图像）MRI 重建的非凸非光滑变分模型、高效的可学习图像重建算法和参数训练算法，以提高基于优化的深度学习方法的压缩感知 MRI 重建和合成的准确性和鲁棒性。第一部分介绍了一种新颖的基于优化的深度神经网络，其架构受到用于求解变分模型的近端梯度下降的启发。第二部分是第一部分前期工作的实质性扩展，通过解决离散时间最优控制框架中的免校准快速 pMRI 重建问题。第三部分旨在在元学习框架中开发一种可推广的磁共振成像（MRI）重建方法。最后一部分旨在通过使用来自源模态的部分扫描 k 空间数据而不是最先进的多模态合成中使用的完全扫描数据来合成 MRI 的目标模态。

AI.tldr: 本文致力于开发基于优化的深度学习方法，提升MRI重建与合成的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI重建方法在压缩感知场景下存在精度不足、鲁棒性差等问题，需通过非凸非光滑优化模型与深度学习结合实现突破。
AI.method: 提出四类方法：1) 近端梯度下降启发的优化神经网络；2) 离散时间最优控制框架下的校准自由pMRI重建；3) 元学习框架的通用MRI重建；4) 基于部分k空间数据的多模态MRI合成。
AI.result: 构建了新型优化架构与算法，实现了更精确的MRI重建与合成，验证了方法在压缩感知场景下的有效性与泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化理论与深度学习的深度融合，为MRI重建与合成提供了新范式，具有重要的临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Mahed Abroshan,Michael Burkhart,Oscar Giles,Sam Greenbury,Zoe Kourtzi,Jack Roberts,Mihaela van der Schaar,Jannetta S Steyn,Alan Wilson,May Yong
title: Safe AI for health and beyond -- Monitoring to transform a health service
title_zh: 安全人工智能促进健康及其他领域——监测以改变医疗服务
abstract: Machine learning techniques are effective for building predictive models because they identify patterns in large datasets. Development of a model for complex real-life problems often stop at the point of publication, proof of concept or when made accessible through some mode of deployment. However, a model in the medical domain risks becoming obsolete as patient demographics, systems and clinical practices change. The maintenance and monitoring of predictive model performance post-publication is crucial to enable their safe and effective long-term use. We will assess the infrastructure required to monitor the outputs of a machine learning algorithm, and present two scenarios with examples of monitoring and updates of models, firstly on a breast cancer prognosis model trained on public longitudinal data, and secondly on a neurodegenerative stratification algorithm that is currently being developed and tested in clinic.
summary: Machine learning techniques are effective for building predictive models because they identify patterns in large datasets. Development of a model for complex real-life problems often stop at the point of publication, proof of concept or when made accessible through some mode of deployment. However, a model in the medical domain risks becoming obsolete as patient demographics, systems and clinical practices change. The maintenance and monitoring of predictive model performance post-publication is crucial to enable their safe and effective long-term use. We will assess the infrastructure required to monitor the outputs of a machine learning algorithm, and present two scenarios with examples of monitoring and updates of models, firstly on a breast cancer prognosis model trained on public longitudinal data, and secondly on a neurodegenerative stratification algorithm that is currently being developed and tested in clinic.
abstract_zh: 机器学习技术对于构建预测模型非常有效，因为它们可以识别大型数据集中的模式。针对复杂现实问题的模型开发通常在发布、概念验证或通过某种部署模式进行访问时停止。然而，随着患者人口统计、系统和临床实践的变化，医疗领域的模型面临着过时的风险。发布后预测模型性能的维护和监控对于使其安全有效的长期使用至关重要。我们将评估监测机器学习算法输出所需的基础设施，并提出两个场景以及模型监测和更新的示例，首先是基于公共纵向数据训练的乳腺癌预后模型，其次是目前正在临床开发和测试的神经退行性分层算法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了医疗领域机器学习模型的长期安全使用问题，重点分析模型性能监控及更新的基础设施，并通过两个实际案例进行验证。
AI.motivation: 医疗AI模型因患者群体、临床实践等动态变化易失效，但现有研究多关注模型开发而忽视后续维护，需建立有效监控机制确保模型可靠性。
AI.method: 评估模型监控基础设施需求，通过乳腺癌预后模型（基于公开数据）和神经退行性疾病分层算法（临床测试中）两个场景，展示监控指标设计与模型更新流程。
AI.result: 提出针对医疗AI的动态监控框架，验证了通过持续数据追踪和模型再训练可维持预测性能，两个案例均实现模型适应性优化。
AI.conclusion: 医疗AI需配套长期监控机制，所提基础设施能有效应对数据漂移问题，为安全部署临床AI模型提供可行路径。

method: 评估模型监控基础设施需求，通过乳腺癌预后模型（基于公开数据）和神经退行性疾病分层算法（临床测试中）两个场景，展示监控指标设计与模型更新流程。
result: 提出针对医疗AI的动态监控框架，验证了通过持续数据追踪和模型再训练可维持预测性能，两个案例均实现模型适应性优化。
conclusion: 医疗AI需配套长期监控机制，所提基础设施能有效应对数据漂移问题，为安全部署临床AI模型提供可行路径。
search_text: Safe AI for health and beyond -- Monitoring to transform a health service 安全人工智能促进健康及其他领域——监测以改变医疗服务 Machine learning techniques are effective for building predictive models because they identify patterns in large datasets. Development of a model for complex real-life problems often stop at the point of publication, proof of concept or when made accessible through some mode of deployment. However, a model in the medical domain risks becoming obsolete as patient demographics, systems and clinical practices change. The maintenance and monitoring of predictive model performance post-publication is crucial to enable their safe and effective long-term use. We will assess the infrastructure required to monitor the outputs of a machine learning algorithm, and present two scenarios with examples of monitoring and updates of models, firstly on a breast cancer prognosis model trained on public longitudinal data, and secondly on a neurodegenerative stratification algorithm that is currently being developed and tested in clinic. 机器学习技术对于构建预测模型非常有效，因为它们可以识别大型数据集中的模式。针对复杂现实问题的模型开发通常在发布、概念验证或通过某种部署模式进行访问时停止。然而，随着患者人口统计、系统和临床实践的变化，医疗领域的模型面临着过时的风险。发布后预测模型性能的维护和监控对于使其安全有效的长期使用至关重要。我们将评估监测机器学习算法输出所需的基础设施，并提出两个场景以及模型监测和更新的示例，首先是基于公共纵向数据训练的乳腺癌预后模型，其次是目前正在临床开发和测试的神经退行性分层算法。 本文探讨了医疗领域机器学习模型的长期安全使用问题，重点分析模型性能监控及更新的基础设施，并通过两个实际案例进行验证。 Mahed Abroshan,Michael Burkhart,Oscar Giles,Sam Greenbury,Zoe Kourtzi,Jack Roberts,Mihaela van der Schaar,Jannetta S Steyn,Alan Wilson,May Yong cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yinuo Zhang,Zhulin Tao,Xi Wang,Tongyue Wang
title: INO at Factify 2: Structure Coherence based Multi-Modal Fact Verification
title_zh: INO at Factify 2：基于结构一致性的多模态事实验证
abstract: This paper describes our approach to the multi-modal fact verification (FACTIFY) challenge at AAAI2023. In recent years, with the widespread use of social media, fake news can spread rapidly and negatively impact social security. Automatic claim verification becomes more and more crucial to combat fake news. In fact verification involving multiple modal data, there should be a structural coherence between claim and document. Therefore, we proposed a structure coherence-based multi-modal fact verification scheme to classify fake news. Our structure coherence includes the following four aspects: sentence length, vocabulary similarity, semantic similarity, and image similarity. Specifically, CLIP and Sentence BERT are combined to extract text features, and ResNet50 is used to extract image features. In addition, we also extract the length of the text as well as the lexical similarity. Then the features were concatenated and passed through the random forest classifier. Finally, our weighted average F1 score has reached 0.8079, achieving 2nd place in FACTIFY2.
summary: This paper describes our approach to the multi-modal fact verification (FACTIFY) challenge at AAAI2023. In recent years, with the widespread use of social media, fake news can spread rapidly and negatively impact social security. Automatic claim verification becomes more and more crucial to combat fake news. In fact verification involving multiple modal data, there should be a structural coherence between claim and document. Therefore, we proposed a structure coherence-based multi-modal fact verification scheme to classify fake news. Our structure coherence includes the following four aspects: sentence length, vocabulary similarity, semantic similarity, and image similarity. Specifically, CLIP and Sentence BERT are combined to extract text features, and ResNet50 is used to extract image features. In addition, we also extract the length of the text as well as the lexical similarity. Then the features were concatenated and passed through the random forest classifier. Finally, our weighted average F1 score has reached 0.8079, achieving 2nd place in FACTIFY2.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们在 AAAI2023 上应对多模式事实验证 (FACTIFY) 挑战的方法。近年来，随着社交媒体的广泛使用，假新闻迅速传播，给社会治安带来负面影响。自动索赔验证对于打击假新闻变得越来越重要。事实上，验证涉及多种模态数据，声明和文件之间应该存在结构一致性。因此，我们提出了一种基于结构一致性的多模态事实验证方案来对假新闻进行分类。我们的结构连贯性包括以下四个方面：句子长度、词汇相似度、语义相似度和图像相似度。具体来说，结合CLIP和Sentence BERT来提取文本特征，使用ResNet50来提取图像特征。此外，我们还提取文本的长度以及词汇相似度。然后将这些特征连接起来并通过随机森林分类器。最终，我们的加权平均F1得分达到了0.8079，在FACTIFY2中获得了第二名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构一致性的多模态事实验证方法，用于检测虚假新闻。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体的普及，虚假新闻传播迅速，影响社会稳定，亟需自动化的事实验证技术。多模态数据中的声明与文档需存在结构一致性，但现有方法对此关注不足。
AI.method: 结合CLIP和Sentence BERT提取文本特征，使用ResNet50提取图像特征，通过句子长度、词汇相似度、语义相似度和图像相似度四个维度构建结构一致性模型，最终通过随机森林分类器进行分类。
AI.result: 在FACTIFY2挑战赛中，加权平均F1分数达到0.8079，获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: 结构一致性模型能有效提升多模态事实验证效果，验证了多维度特征融合在虚假新闻检测中的可行性。

authors_text: Anik Mallik,Haoxin Wang,Jiang Xie,Dawei Chen,Kyungtae Han
title: EPAM: A Predictive Energy Model for Mobile AI
title_zh: EPAM：移动人工智能的预测能源模型
comment: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC); 28 May - 01 June 2023; Rome, Italy; six pages, seven figures, two tables
comments: Accepted in IEEE International Conference on Communications (ICC); 28 May - 01 June 2023; Rome, Italy; six pages, seven figures, two tables
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) has enabled a new paradigm of smart applications -- changing our way of living entirely. Many of these AI-enabled applications have very stringent latency requirements, especially for applications on mobile devices (e.g., smartphones, wearable devices, and vehicles). Hence, smaller and quantized deep neural network (DNN) models are developed for mobile devices, which provide faster and more energy-efficient computation for mobile AI applications. However, how AI models consume energy in a mobile device is still unexplored. Predicting the energy consumption of these models, along with their different applications, such as vision and non-vision, requires a thorough investigation of their behavior using various processing sources. In this paper, we introduce a comprehensive study of mobile AI applications considering different DNN models and processing sources, focusing on computational resource utilization, delay, and energy consumption. We measure the latency, energy consumption, and memory usage of all the models using four processing sources through extensive experiments. We explain the challenges in such investigations and how we propose to overcome them. Our study highlights important insights, such as how mobile AI behaves in different applications (vision and non-vision) using CPU, GPU, and NNAPI. Finally, we propose a novel Gaussian process regression-based general predictive energy model based on DNN structures, computation resources, and processors, which can predict the energy for each complete application cycle irrespective of device configuration and application. This study provides crucial facts and an energy prediction mechanism to the AI research community to help bring energy efficiency to mobile AI applications.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has enabled a new paradigm of smart applications -- changing our way of living entirely. Many of these AI-enabled applications have very stringent latency requirements, especially for applications on mobile devices (e.g., smartphones, wearable devices, and vehicles). Hence, smaller and quantized deep neural network (DNN) models are developed for mobile devices, which provide faster and more energy-efficient computation for mobile AI applications. However, how AI models consume energy in a mobile device is still unexplored. Predicting the energy consumption of these models, along with their different applications, such as vision and non-vision, requires a thorough investigation of their behavior using various processing sources. In this paper, we introduce a comprehensive study of mobile AI applications considering different DNN models and processing sources, focusing on computational resource utilization, delay, and energy consumption. We measure the latency, energy consumption, and memory usage of all the models using four processing sources through extensive experiments. We explain the challenges in such investigations and how we propose to overcome them. Our study highlights important insights, such as how mobile AI behaves in different applications (vision and non-vision) using CPU, GPU, and NNAPI. Finally, we propose a novel Gaussian process regression-based general predictive energy model based on DNN structures, computation resources, and processors, which can predict the energy for each complete application cycle irrespective of device configuration and application. This study provides crucial facts and an energy prediction mechanism to the AI research community to help bring energy efficiency to mobile AI applications.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 开启了智能应用的新范式——彻底改变我们的生活方式。许多支持人工智能的应用程序都有非常严格的延迟要求，特别是对于移动设备（例如智能手机、可穿戴设备和车辆）上的应用程序。因此，为移动设备开发了更小的量化深度神经网络（DNN）模型，为移动人工智能应用程序提供更快、更节能的计算。然而，人工智能模型如何在移动设备中消耗能量仍有待探索。预测这些模型的能耗及其不同的应用（例如视觉和非视觉）需要使用各种处理源对其行为进行彻底调查。在本文中，我们介绍了考虑不同 DNN 模型和处理源的移动人工智能应用的综合研究，重点关注计算资源利用率、延迟和能耗。我们通过大量实验使用四个处理源测量所有模型的延迟、能耗和内存使用情况。我们解释了此类调查中的挑战以及我们建议如何克服这些挑战。我们的研究强调了重要的见解，例如移动 AI 在使用 CPU、GPU 和 NNAPI 的不同应用程序（视觉和非视觉）中的表现如何。最后，我们提出了一种基于 DNN 结构、计算资源和处理器的新型基于高斯过程回归的通用预测能量模型，该模型可以预测每个完整应用周期的能量，而与设备配置和应用无关。这项研究为人工智能研究界提供了重要的事实和能源预测机制，以帮助提高移动人工智能应用的能源效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EPAM，一种基于深度神经网络结构、计算资源和处理器的高斯过程回归预测模型，用于预测移动AI应用的能耗。
AI.motivation: 移动设备上的AI应用对延迟和能效要求极高，但现有研究缺乏对不同DNN模型和处理源（如CPU/GPU）能耗的系统性分析。
AI.method: 通过四类处理源对多种DNN模型进行大规模实验，测量延迟、能耗和内存使用，建立基于高斯过程回归的通用预测模型。
AI.result: 揭示了视觉与非视觉应用在不同处理器上的能耗差异，并验证了EPAM模型在跨设备配置和应用中的预测有效性。
AI.conclusion: EPAM为移动AI领域提供了关键能耗预测机制，有助于推动能效优化的智能应用开发。

Our study highlights important insights, such as how mobile AI behaves in different applications (vision and non-vision) using CPU, GPU, and NNAPI. Finally, we propose a novel Gaussian process regression-based general predictive energy model based on DNN structures, computation resources, and processors, which can predict the energy for each complete application cycle irrespective of device configuration and application. This study provides crucial facts and an energy prediction mechanism to the AI research community to help bring energy efficiency to mobile AI applications. 人工智能 (AI) 开启了智能应用的新范式——彻底改变我们的生活方式。许多支持人工智能的应用程序都有非常严格的延迟要求，特别是对于移动设备（例如智能手机、可穿戴设备和车辆）上的应用程序。因此，为移动设备开发了更小的量化深度神经网络（DNN）模型，为移动人工智能应用程序提供更快、更节能的计算。然而，人工智能模型如何在移动设备中消耗能量仍有待探索。预测这些模型的能耗及其不同的应用（例如视觉和非视觉）需要使用各种处理源对其行为进行彻底调查。在本文中，我们介绍了考虑不同 DNN 模型和处理源的移动人工智能应用的综合研究，重点关注计算资源利用率、延迟和能耗。我们通过大量实验使用四个处理源测量所有模型的延迟、能耗和内存使用情况。我们解释了此类调查中的挑战以及我们建议如何克服这些挑战。我们的研究强调了重要的见解，例如移动 AI 在使用 CPU、GPU 和 NNAPI 的不同应用程序（视觉和非视觉）中的表现如何。最后，我们提出了一种基于 DNN 结构、计算资源和处理器的新型基于高斯过程回归的通用预测能量模型，该模型可以预测每个完整应用周期的能量，而与设备配置和应用无关。这项研究为人工智能研究界提供了重要的事实和能源预测机制，以帮助提高移动人工智能应用的能源效率。 本文提出EPAM，一种基于深度神经网络结构、计算资源和处理器的高斯过程回归预测模型，用于预测移动AI应用的能耗。 Anik Mallik,Haoxin Wang,Jiang Xie,Dawei Chen,Kyungtae Han cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shijun Wang,Jón Guðnason,Damian Borth
title: Fine-grained Emotional Control of Text-To-Speech: Learning To Rank Inter- And Intra-Class Emotion Intensities
title_zh: 文本转语音的细粒度情感控制：学习对类间和类内情绪强度进行排名
abstract: State-of-the-art Text-To-Speech (TTS) models are capable of producing high-quality speech. The generated speech, however, is usually neutral in emotional expression, whereas very often one would want fine-grained emotional control of words or phonemes. Although still challenging, the first TTS models have been recently proposed that are able to control voice by manually assigning emotion intensity. Unfortunately, due to the neglect of intra-class distance, the intensity differences are often unrecognizable. In this paper, we propose a fine-grained controllable emotional TTS, that considers both inter- and intra-class distances and be able to synthesize speech with recognizable intensity difference. Our subjective and objective experiments demonstrate that our model exceeds two state-of-the-art controllable TTS models for controllability, emotion expressiveness and naturalness.
summary: State-of-the-art Text-To-Speech (TTS) models are capable of producing high-quality speech. The generated speech, however, is usually neutral in emotional expression, whereas very often one would want fine-grained emotional control of words or phonemes. Although still challenging, the first TTS models have been recently proposed that are able to control voice by manually assigning emotion intensity. Unfortunately, due to the neglect of intra-class distance, the intensity differences are often unrecognizable. In this paper, we propose a fine-grained controllable emotional TTS, that considers both inter- and intra-class distances and be able to synthesize speech with recognizable intensity difference. Our subjective and objective experiments demonstrate that our model exceeds two state-of-the-art controllable TTS models for controllability, emotion expressiveness and naturalness.
abstract_zh: 最先进的文本转语音 (TTS) 模型能够生成高质量的语音。然而，生成的语音在情感表达上通常是中性的，而人们通常希望对单词或音素进行细粒度的情感控制。尽管仍然具有挑战性，但最近提出了第一个 TTS 模型，能够通过手动分配情绪强度来控制语音。不幸的是，由于忽略了类内距离，强度差异往往无法识别。在本文中，我们提出了一种细粒度的可控情感 TTS，它考虑了类间和类内距离，并且能够合成具有可识别强度差异的语音。我们的主观和客观实验表明，我们的模型在可控性、情感表达力和自然度方面超过了两种最先进的可控 TTS 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种细粒度可控的情感语音合成方法，通过同时考虑类间和类内情感强度差异，使生成的语音具有可识别的情感强度变化。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS模型生成的语音情感表达单一，且现有可控模型因忽略类内差异导致情感强度难以区分，需解决细粒度情感控制问题。
AI.method: 设计结合类间与类内距离学习的排名机制，通过优化情感强度的可区分性，实现对词或音素级别情感的精细控制。
AI.result: 主观和客观实验表明，该模型在可控性、情感表现力和自然度方面优于两个最先进的可控TTS模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时建模类间与类内情感距离，本文方法有效提升了TTS系统的情感表达能力，实现了更自然且可区分的细粒度情感控制。

authors_text: Shutong Wu,Jiongxiao Wang,Wei Ping,Weili Nie,Chaowei Xiao
title: Defending against Adversarial Audio via Diffusion Model
title_zh: 通过扩散模型防御对抗性音频
abstract: Deep learning models have been widely used in commercial acoustic systems in recent years. However, adversarial audio examples can cause abnormal behaviors for those acoustic systems, while being hard for humans to perceive. Various methods, such as transformation-based defenses and adversarial training, have been proposed to protect acoustic systems from adversarial attacks, but they are less effective against adaptive attacks. Furthermore, directly applying the methods from the image domain can lead to suboptimal results because of the unique properties of audio data. In this paper, we propose an adversarial purification-based defense pipeline, AudioPure, for acoustic systems via off-the-shelf diffusion models. Taking advantage of the strong generation ability of diffusion models, AudioPure first adds a small amount of noise to the adversarial audio and then runs the reverse sampling step to purify the noisy audio and recover clean audio. AudioPure is a plug-and-play method that can be directly applied to any pretrained classifier without any fine-tuning or re-training. We conduct extensive experiments on speech command recognition task to evaluate the robustness of AudioPure. Our method is effective against diverse adversarial attacks (e.g. $\mathcal{L}_2$ or $\mathcal{L}_\infty$-norm). It outperforms the existing methods under both strong adaptive white-box and black-box attacks bounded by $\mathcal{L}_2$ or $\mathcal{L}_\infty$-norm (up to +20\% in robust accuracy). Besides, we also evaluate the certified robustness for perturbations bounded by $\mathcal{L}_2$-norm via randomized smoothing. Our pipeline achieves a higher certified accuracy than baselines.
summary: Deep learning models have been widely used in commercial acoustic systems in recent years. However, adversarial audio examples can cause abnormal behaviors for those acoustic systems, while being hard for humans to perceive. Various methods, such as transformation-based defenses and adversarial training, have been proposed to protect acoustic systems from adversarial attacks, but they are less effective against adaptive attacks. Furthermore, directly applying the methods from the image domain can lead to suboptimal results because of the unique properties of audio data. In this paper, we propose an adversarial purification-based defense pipeline, AudioPure, for acoustic systems via off-the-shelf diffusion models. Taking advantage of the strong generation ability of diffusion models, AudioPure first adds a small amount of noise to the adversarial audio and then runs the reverse sampling step to purify the noisy audio and recover clean audio. AudioPure is a plug-and-play method that can be directly applied to any pretrained classifier without any fine-tuning or re-training. We conduct extensive experiments on speech command recognition task to evaluate the robustness of AudioPure. Our method is effective against diverse adversarial attacks (e.g. $\mathcal{L}_2$ or $\mathcal{L}_\infty$-norm). It outperforms the existing methods under both strong adaptive white-box and black-box attacks bounded by $\mathcal{L}_2$ or $\mathcal{L}_\infty$-norm (up to +20\% in robust accuracy). Besides, we also evaluate the certified robustness for perturbations bounded by $\mathcal{L}_2$-norm via randomized smoothing. Our pipeline achieves a higher certified accuracy than baselines.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习模型已广泛应用于商业声学系统中。然而，对抗性音频示例可能会导致这些声学系统出现异常行为，同时人类很难感知。人们提出了各种方法，例如基于变换的防御和对抗性训练来保护声学系统免受对抗性攻击，但它们对抗自适应攻击的效果较差。此外，由于音频数据的独特属性，直接应用图像域的方法可能会导致次优结果。在本文中，我们通过现成的扩散模型提出了一种基于对抗性净化的防御管道 AudioPure，用于声学系统。利用扩散模型强大的生成能力，AudioPure 首先向对抗音频添加少量噪声，然后运行反向采样步骤来净化噪声音频并恢复干净的音频。 AudioPure 是一种即插即用的方法，可以直接应用于任何预训练的分类器，无需任何微调或重新训练。我们对语音命令识别任务进行了广泛的实验，以评估 AudioPure 的鲁棒性。我们的方法可以有效抵御各种对抗性攻击（例如 $\mathcal{L}_2$ 或 $\mathcal{L}_\infty$-norm）。它在 $\mathcal{L}_2$ 或 $\mathcal{L}_\infty$-norm 范围内的强自适应白盒和黑盒攻击下优于现有方法（鲁棒精度高达 +20\%）。此外，我们还通过随机平滑评估了 $\mathcal{L}_2$-norm 范围内扰动的经过认证的鲁棒性。我们的管道实现了比基线更高的认证精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的对抗音频防御方法AudioPure，通过噪声添加与反向采样净化音频，提升声学系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法对自适应攻击效果有限，且图像领域方法难以适配音频数据特性，需开发更有效的音频对抗防御方案。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型的生成能力，向对抗音频添加少量噪声后执行反向采样步骤，净化音频并恢复干净信号，无需微调即可适配预训练分类器。
AI.result: 在语音指令识别任务中，AudioPure在L2/L∞范数约束的强白盒与黑盒攻击下均优于现有方法（鲁棒准确率提升最高20%），并通过随机平滑验证了认证鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AudioPure通过扩散模型的噪声净化机制有效抵御多种对抗攻击，兼具高效性与通用性，为音频安全防御提供新思路。

Our pipeline achieves a higher certified accuracy than baselines. 近年来，深度学习模型已广泛应用于商业声学系统中。然而，对抗性音频示例可能会导致这些声学系统出现异常行为，同时人类很难感知。人们提出了各种方法，例如基于变换的防御和对抗性训练来保护声学系统免受对抗性攻击，但它们对抗自适应攻击的效果较差。此外，由于音频数据的独特属性，直接应用图像域的方法可能会导致次优结果。在本文中，我们通过现成的扩散模型提出了一种基于对抗性净化的防御管道 AudioPure，用于声学系统。利用扩散模型强大的生成能力，AudioPure 首先向对抗音频添加少量噪声，然后运行反向采样步骤来净化噪声音频并恢复干净的音频。 AudioPure 是一种即插即用的方法，可以直接应用于任何预训练的分类器，无需任何微调或重新训练。我们对语音命令识别任务进行了广泛的实验，以评估 AudioPure 的鲁棒性。我们的方法可以有效抵御各种对抗性攻击（例如 $\mathcal{L}_2$ 或 $\mathcal{L}_\infty$-norm）。它在 $\mathcal{L}_2$ 或 $\mathcal{L}_\infty$-norm 范围内的强自适应白盒和黑盒攻击下优于现有方法（鲁棒精度高达 +20\%）。此外，我们还通过随机平滑评估了 $\mathcal{L}_2$-norm 范围内扰动的经过认证的鲁棒性。我们的管道实现了比基线更高的认证精度。 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的对抗音频防御方法AudioPure，通过噪声添加与反向采样净化音频，提升声学系统的鲁棒性。 Shutong Wu,Jiongxiao Wang,Wei Ping,Weili Nie,Chaowei Xiao cs.SD,cs.CR,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Huiqi Deng,Na Zou,Mengnan Du,Weifu Chen,Guocan Feng,Ziwei Yang,Zheyang Li,Quanshi Zhang
title: Understanding and Unifying Fourteen Attribution Methods with Taylor Interactions
title_zh: 理解并统一十四种归因方法与泰勒交互
abstract: Various attribution methods have been developed to explain deep neural networks (DNNs) by inferring the attribution/importance/contribution score of each input variable to the final output. However, existing attribution methods are often built upon different heuristics. There remains a lack of a unified theoretical understanding of why these methods are effective and how they are related. To this end, for the first time, we formulate core mechanisms of fourteen attribution methods, which were designed on different heuristics, into the same mathematical system, i.e., the system of Taylor interactions. Specifically, we prove that attribution scores estimated by fourteen attribution methods can all be reformulated as the weighted sum of two types of effects, i.e., independent effects of each individual input variable and interaction effects between input variables. The essential difference among the fourteen attribution methods mainly lies in the weights of allocating different effects. Based on the above findings, we propose three principles for a fair allocation of effects to evaluate the faithfulness of the fourteen attribution methods.
summary: Various attribution methods have been developed to explain deep neural networks (DNNs) by inferring the attribution/importance/contribution score of each input variable to the final output. However, existing attribution methods are often built upon different heuristics. There remains a lack of a unified theoretical understanding of why these methods are effective and how they are related. To this end, for the first time, we formulate core mechanisms of fourteen attribution methods, which were designed on different heuristics, into the same mathematical system, i.e., the system of Taylor interactions. Specifically, we prove that attribution scores estimated by fourteen attribution methods can all be reformulated as the weighted sum of two types of effects, i.e., independent effects of each individual input variable and interaction effects between input variables. The essential difference among the fourteen attribution methods mainly lies in the weights of allocating different effects. Based on the above findings, we propose three principles for a fair allocation of effects to evaluate the faithfulness of the fourteen attribution methods.
abstract_zh: 人们已经开发了各种归因方法来通过推断每个输入变量对最终输出的归因/重要性/贡献分数来解释深度神经网络（DNN）。然而，现有的归因方法通常建立在不同的启发法之上。对于这些方法为何有效以及它们如何相互关联，仍然缺乏统一的理论理解。为此，我们首次将根据不同启发式设计的十四种归因方法的核心机制纳入同一数学系统，即泰勒相互作用系统。具体来说，我们证明了十四种归因方法估计的归因分数都可以重新表述为两种效应的加权和，即每个单独输入变量的独立效应和输入变量之间的交互效应。十四种归因方法的本质区别主要在于分配不同效果的权重。基于上述发现，我们提出了效果公平分配的三个原则，以评估十四种归因方法的忠实度。

AI.tldr: 将十四种深度神经网络归因方法统一到泰勒交互数学框架中，揭示其共同机制并提出评估原则。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法基于不同启发式规则，缺乏统一理论解释其有效性及相互关系。
AI.method: 通过泰勒展开理论，将十四种方法的归因分数表示为输入变量独立效应与交互效应的加权和，并分析权重分配差异。
AI.result: 证明所有方法本质差异在于效应权重分配，提出三个公平性原则评估方法的可信度。
AI.conclusion: 建立统一数学框架有助于理解归因方法本质，为方法比较和改进提供理论依据。

authors_text: Dan Liu,Xue Liu
title: Ternary Quantization: A Survey
title_zh: 三元量化：调查
abstract: Inference time, model size, and accuracy are critical for deploying deep neural network models. Numerous research efforts have been made to compress neural network models with faster inference and higher accuracy. Pruning and quantization are mainstream methods to this end. During model quantization, converting individual float values of layer weights to low-precision ones can substantially reduce the computational overhead and improve the inference speed. Many quantization methods have been studied, for example, vector quantization, low-bit quantization, and binary/ternary quantization. This survey focuses on ternary quantization. We review the evolution of ternary quantization and investigate the relationships among existing ternary quantization methods from the perspective of projection function and optimization methods.
summary: Inference time, model size, and accuracy are critical for deploying deep neural network models. Numerous research efforts have been made to compress neural network models with faster inference and higher accuracy. Pruning and quantization are mainstream methods to this end. During model quantization, converting individual float values of layer weights to low-precision ones can substantially reduce the computational overhead and improve the inference speed. Many quantization methods have been studied, for example, vector quantization, low-bit quantization, and binary/ternary quantization. This survey focuses on ternary quantization. We review the evolution of ternary quantization and investigate the relationships among existing ternary quantization methods from the perspective of projection function and optimization methods.
abstract_zh: 推理时间、模型大小和准确性对于部署深度神经网络模型至关重要。为了以更快的推理速度和更高的精度压缩神经网络模型，人们进行了大量的研究工作。剪枝和量化是实现此目的的主流方法。在模型量化过程中，将层权重的各个浮点值转换为低精度值可以大大减少计算开销并提高推理速度。人们已经研究了许多量化方法，例如矢量量化、低比特量化和二值/三值量化。本次调查重点关注三元量化。我们回顾了三元量化的演变，并从投影函数和优化方法的角度研究了现有三元量化方法之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 综述三元量化方法的发展及其与其他量化方法的关系
AI.motivation: 为解决深度神经网络部署中的计算开销和模型大小问题，通过量化方法提升推理效率和模型压缩效果
AI.method: 系统回顾三元量化技术演进历程，从投影函数设计和优化算法两个维度分析现有方法的内在关联性
AI.result: 建立三元量化方法分类体系，揭示不同投影函数与优化策略间的协同作用机制
AI.conclusion: 三元量化在保持模型精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，未来需进一步优化量化误差补偿机制

authors_text: Shangxi Wu,Qiuyang He,Jian Yu,Jitao Sang
title: Backdoor for Debias: Mitigating Model Bias with Backdoor Attack-based Artificial Bias
title_zh: Debias 的后门：通过基于后门攻击的人工偏差来减轻模型偏差
abstract: With the swift advancement of deep learning, state-of-the-art algorithms have been utilized in various social situations. Nonetheless, some algorithms have been discovered to exhibit biases and provide unequal results. The current debiasing methods face challenges such as poor utilization of data or intricate training requirements. In this work, we found that the backdoor attack can construct an artificial bias similar to the model bias derived in standard training. Considering the strong adjustability of backdoor triggers, we are motivated to mitigate the model bias by carefully designing reverse artificial bias created from backdoor attack. Based on this, we propose a backdoor debiasing framework based on knowledge distillation, which effectively reduces the model bias from original data and minimizes security risks from the backdoor attack. The proposed solution is validated on both image and structured datasets, showing promising results. This work advances the understanding of backdoor attacks and highlights its potential for beneficial applications. The code for the study can be found at \url{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DwB-BC07/}.
summary: With the swift advancement of deep learning, state-of-the-art algorithms have been utilized in various social situations. Nonetheless, some algorithms have been discovered to exhibit biases and provide unequal results. The current debiasing methods face challenges such as poor utilization of data or intricate training requirements. In this work, we found that the backdoor attack can construct an artificial bias similar to the model bias derived in standard training. Considering the strong adjustability of backdoor triggers, we are motivated to mitigate the model bias by carefully designing reverse artificial bias created from backdoor attack. Based on this, we propose a backdoor debiasing framework based on knowledge distillation, which effectively reduces the model bias from original data and minimizes security risks from the backdoor attack. The proposed solution is validated on both image and structured datasets, showing promising results. This work advances the understanding of backdoor attacks and highlights its potential for beneficial applications. The code for the study can be found at \url{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DwB-BC07/}.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的迅速发展，最先进的算法已被应用于各种社交场合。尽管如此，一些算法被发现存在偏差并提供不平等的结果。当前的去偏方法面临着数据利用率低或训练要求复杂等挑战。在这项工作中，我们发现后门攻击可以构建类似于标准训练中导出的模型偏差的人为偏差。考虑到后门触发器的强大可调节性，我们有动力通过仔细设计后门攻击产生的反向人工偏差来减轻模型偏差。基于此，我们提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的后门去偏差框架，可以有效降低原始数据的模型偏差，最大限度地降低后门攻击的安全风险。所提出的解决方案在图像和结构化数据集上进行了验证，显示出有希望的结果。这项工作增进了对后门攻击的理解，并强调了其有益应用的潜力。该研究的代码可以在 \url{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DwB-BC07/} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于后门攻击的人工偏差方法，以减轻模型偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏方法存在数据利用不足或训练复杂的问题，而后门攻击的强可调性可被用于设计反向人工偏差以缓解模型偏差。
AI.method: 基于知识蒸馏的后门去偏框架，通过精心设计的后门触发器构建人工偏差，减少原始数据的模型偏差并降低后门攻击风险。
AI.result: 在图像和结构化数据集上验证有效，显著降低模型偏差且安全风险可控。
AI.conclusion: 后门攻击可被转化为有益工具，为模型去偏提供新思路并拓展其潜在应用价值。

search_text: Backdoor for Debias: Mitigating Model Bias with Backdoor Attack-based Artificial Bias Debias 的后门：通过基于后门攻击的人工偏差来减轻模型偏差 With the swift advancement of deep learning, state-of-the-art algorithms have been utilized in various social situations. Nonetheless, some algorithms have been discovered to exhibit biases and provide unequal results. The current debiasing methods face challenges such as poor utilization of data or intricate training requirements. In this work, we found that the backdoor attack can construct an artificial bias similar to the model bias derived in standard training. Considering the strong adjustability of backdoor triggers, we are motivated to mitigate the model bias by carefully designing reverse artificial bias created from backdoor attack. Based on this, we propose a backdoor debiasing framework based on knowledge distillation, which effectively reduces the model bias from original data and minimizes security risks from the backdoor attack. The proposed solution is validated on both image and structured datasets, showing promising results. This work advances the understanding of backdoor attacks and highlights its potential for beneficial applications. The code for the study can be found at \url{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DwB-BC07/}. 随着深度学习的迅速发展，最先进的算法已被应用于各种社交场合。尽管如此，一些算法被发现存在偏差并提供不平等的结果。当前的去偏方法面临着数据利用率低或训练要求复杂等挑战。在这项工作中，我们发现后门攻击可以构建类似于标准训练中导出的模型偏差的人为偏差。考虑到后门触发器的强大可调节性，我们有动力通过仔细设计后门攻击产生的反向人工偏差来减轻模型偏差。基于此，我们提出了一种基于知识蒸馏的后门去偏差框架，可以有效降低原始数据的模型偏差，最大限度地降低后门攻击的安全风险。所提出的解决方案在图像和结构化数据集上进行了验证，显示出有希望的结果。这项工作增进了对后门攻击的理解，并强调了其有益应用的潜力。该研究的代码可以在 \url{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/DwB-BC07/} 中找到。 提出一种基于后门攻击的人工偏差方法，以减轻模型偏差。 Shangxi Wu,Qiuyang He,Jian Yu,Jitao Sang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Rongyao Fang,Peng Gao,Aojun Zhou,Yingjie Cai,Si Liu,Jifeng Dai,Hongsheng Li
title: FeatAug-DETR: Enriching One-to-Many Matching for DETRs with Feature Augmentation
title_zh: FeatAug-DETR：通过功能增强丰富 DETR 的一对多匹配
abstract: One-to-one matching is a crucial design in DETR-like object detection frameworks. It enables the DETR to perform end-to-end detection. However, it also faces challenges of lacking positive sample supervision and slow convergence speed. Several recent works proposed the one-to-many matching mechanism to accelerate training and boost detection performance. We revisit these methods and model them in a unified format of augmenting the object queries. In this paper, we propose two methods that realize one-to-many matching from a different perspective of augmenting images or image features. The first method is One-to-many Matching via Data Augmentation (denoted as DataAug-DETR). It spatially transforms the images and includes multiple augmented versions of each image in the same training batch. Such a simple augmentation strategy already achieves one-to-many matching and surprisingly improves DETR's performance. The second method is One-to-many matching via Feature Augmentation (denoted as FeatAug-DETR). Unlike DataAug-DETR, it augments the image features instead of the original images and includes multiple augmented features in the same batch to realize one-to-many matching. FeatAug-DETR significantly accelerates DETR training and boosts detection performance while keeping the inference speed unchanged. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on DETR variants, including DAB-DETR, Deformable-DETR, and H-Deformable-DETR. Without extra training data, FeatAug-DETR shortens the training convergence periods of Deformable-DETR to 24 epochs and achieves 58.3 AP on COCO val2017 set with Swin-L as the backbone.
summary: One-to-one matching is a crucial design in DETR-like object detection frameworks. It enables the DETR to perform end-to-end detection. However, it also faces challenges of lacking positive sample supervision and slow convergence speed. Several recent works proposed the one-to-many matching mechanism to accelerate training and boost detection performance. We revisit these methods and model them in a unified format of augmenting the object queries. In this paper, we propose two methods that realize one-to-many matching from a different perspective of augmenting images or image features. The first method is One-to-many Matching via Data Augmentation (denoted as DataAug-DETR). It spatially transforms the images and includes multiple augmented versions of each image in the same training batch. Such a simple augmentation strategy already achieves one-to-many matching and surprisingly improves DETR's performance. The second method is One-to-many matching via Feature Augmentation (denoted as FeatAug-DETR). Unlike DataAug-DETR, it augments the image features instead of the original images and includes multiple augmented features in the same batch to realize one-to-many matching. FeatAug-DETR significantly accelerates DETR training and boosts detection performance while keeping the inference speed unchanged. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on DETR variants, including DAB-DETR, Deformable-DETR, and H-Deformable-DETR. Without extra training data, FeatAug-DETR shortens the training convergence periods of Deformable-DETR to 24 epochs and achieves 58.3 AP on COCO val2017 set with Swin-L as the backbone.
abstract_zh: 一对一匹配是类似 DETR 的目标检测框架中的一个关键设计。它使 DETR 能够执行端到端检测。但也面临缺乏正样本监督、收敛速度慢的挑战。最近的几项工作提出了一对多匹配机制来加速训练并提高检测性能。我们重新审视这些方法，并以增强对象查询的统一格式对它们进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了两种从增强图像或图像特征的不同角度实现一对多匹配的方法。第一种方法是通过数据增强进行一对多匹配（表示为 DataAug-DETR）。它对图像进行空间变换，并在同一训练批次中包含每个图像的多个增强版本。这种简单的增强策略已经实现了一对多匹配，并令人惊讶地提高了 DETR 的性能。第二种方法是通过特征增强进行一对多匹配（表示为 FeatAug-DETR）。与DataAug-DETR不同的是，它增强了图像特征而不是原始图像，并在同一批次中包含多个增强特征以实现一对多匹配。 FeatAug-DETR 显着加速 DETR 训练并提高检测性能，同时保持推理速度不变。我们进行了大量的实验来评估所提出的方法对 DETR 变体的有效性，包括 DAB-DETR、Deformable-DETR 和 H-Deformable-DETR。在没有额外训练数据的情况下，FeatAug-DETR 将 Deformable-DETR 的训练收敛周期缩短至 24 个 epoch，并在以 Swin-L 为骨干的 COCO val2017 集上达到 58.3 AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FeatAug-DETR方法，通过特征增强实现DETR框架中的一对多匹配，以提升目标检测性能和训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统DETR的一对一匹配机制存在正样本监督不足和收敛速度慢的问题，现有的一对多匹配方法需依赖额外数据或复杂设计，本文旨在通过特征增强提供更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：1) DataAug-DETR通过图像数据增强生成多版本输入实现一对多匹配；2) FeatAug-DETR直接对图像特征进行增强，在不改变推理速度的前提下实现特征级的一对多匹配。
AI.result: 在DAB-DETR、Deformable-DETR等变体上验证有效性，FeatAug-DETR使Deformable-DETR训练周期缩短至24轮，在COCO数据集上达到58.3 AP（Swin-L主干）。
AI.conclusion: 特征增强方法有效提升了DETR的训练效率和检测性能，无需额外数据即可实现显著优化，为高效目标检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Andy Liu,Hao Zhu,Emmy Liu,Yonatan Bisk,Graham Neubig
title: Computational Language Acquisition with Theory of Mind
title_zh: 计算语言习得与心理理论
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures. To be published in the 11th International Conference on Learning Representations, ICLR 2023, Conference Track Proceedings
comments: 9 pages, 3 figures. To be published in the 11th International Conference on Learning Representations, ICLR 2023, Conference Track Proceedings
abstract: Unlike current state-of-the-art language models, young children actively acquire language through interactions with their surrounding environment and caretakers. One mechanism that has been argued to be critical to language learning is the ability to infer the mental states of other agents in social environments, coined Theory of Mind (ToM) by Premack & Woodruff (1978). Drawing inspiration from the modern operationalized versions of ToM implemented in Rabinowitz et al. (2018) and Zhu et al. (2021), we build language-learning agents equipped with ToM, and measure its effects on the learning process. We model ToM by giving the speaker agent an internal listener model that is trained alongside the speaker and used to rerank potential utterances. We experiment with varying task difficulty, hypothesizing that models will acquire more complex language to adapt to stronger environmental pressures. We find that training speakers with a highly weighted ToM listener component leads to performance gains in our image referential game setting. We also find some evidence that increasing task difficulty in the training process results in more fluent and precise utterances in evaluation. This suggests the potential utility of further incorporating ToM, as well as other insights from child language acquisition, into computational models of language acquisition.
summary: Unlike current state-of-the-art language models, young children actively acquire language through interactions with their surrounding environment and caretakers. One mechanism that has been argued to be critical to language learning is the ability to infer the mental states of other agents in social environments, coined Theory of Mind (ToM) by Premack & Woodruff (1978). Drawing inspiration from the modern operationalized versions of ToM implemented in Rabinowitz et al. (2018) and Zhu et al. (2021), we build language-learning agents equipped with ToM, and measure its effects on the learning process. We model ToM by giving the speaker agent an internal listener model that is trained alongside the speaker and used to rerank potential utterances. We experiment with varying task difficulty, hypothesizing that models will acquire more complex language to adapt to stronger environmental pressures. We find that training speakers with a highly weighted ToM listener component leads to performance gains in our image referential game setting. We also find some evidence that increasing task difficulty in the training process results in more fluent and precise utterances in evaluation. This suggests the potential utility of further incorporating ToM, as well as other insights from child language acquisition, into computational models of language acquisition.
abstract_zh: 与当前最先进的语言模型不同，幼儿通过与周围环境和看护者的互动来主动学习语言。人们认为对语言学习至关重要的一种机制是推断社会环境中其他主体的心理状态的能力，即 Premack 和 Woodruff (1978) 创造的心理理论 (ToM)。从 Rabinowitz 等人实施的 ToM 现代操作化版本中汲取灵感。 （2018）和朱等人。 （2021），我们构建了配备 ToM 的语言学习代理，并测量其对学习过程的影响。我们通过为说话者代理提供一个内部听者模型来对 ToM 进行建模，该模型与说话者一起训练并用于对潜在话语进行重新排序。我们尝试了不同的任务难度，假设模型将获得更复杂的语言以适应更强的环境压力。我们发现，使用高权重 ToM 听者组件训练说话者可以在我们的图像参考游戏设置中带来性能提升。我们还发现一些证据表明，训练过程中任务难度的增加会导致评估中的言语更加流畅和精确。这表明进一步将 ToM 以及来自儿童语言习得的其他见解纳入语言习得计算模型的潜在效用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过引入心智理论（ToM）机制提升计算语言习得模型的性能，探索其在语言学习过程中的作用。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型缺乏类似人类儿童通过社会互动和推断他人心理状态（ToM）进行语言学习的能力，而儿童语言习得研究表明ToM对语言发展至关重要。
AI.method: 构建具备ToM的语言学习代理，通过训练说话者与内部听者模型协同工作，并利用听者模型对潜在表达进行重排序；通过调整任务难度验证模型适应性。
AI.result: 高权重ToM听者模型在图像指称任务中表现更优，且增加训练难度可提升生成表达的流畅性与精确性。
AI.conclusion: 将心智理论及儿童语言习得机制纳入计算模型，可能为语言习得研究提供新方向和性能提升潜力。

Drawing inspiration from the modern operationalized versions of ToM implemented in Rabinowitz et al. (2018) and Zhu et al. (2021), we build language-learning agents equipped with ToM, and measure its effects on the learning process. We model ToM by giving the speaker agent an internal listener model that is trained alongside the speaker and used to rerank potential utterances. We experiment with varying task difficulty, hypothesizing that models will acquire more complex language to adapt to stronger environmental pressures. We find that training speakers with a highly weighted ToM listener component leads to performance gains in our image referential game setting. We also find some evidence that increasing task difficulty in the training process results in more fluent and precise utterances in evaluation. This suggests the potential utility of further incorporating ToM, as well as other insights from child language acquisition, into computational models of language acquisition. 与当前最先进的语言模型不同，幼儿通过与周围环境和看护者的互动来主动学习语言。人们认为对语言学习至关重要的一种机制是推断社会环境中其他主体的心理状态的能力，即 Premack 和 Woodruff (1978) 创造的心理理论 (ToM)。从 Rabinowitz 等人实施的 ToM 现代操作化版本中汲取灵感。 （2018）和朱等人。 （2021），我们构建了配备 ToM 的语言学习代理，并测量其对学习过程的影响。我们通过为说话者代理提供一个内部听者模型来对 ToM 进行建模，该模型与说话者一起训练并用于对潜在话语进行重新排序。我们尝试了不同的任务难度，假设模型将获得更复杂的语言以适应更强的环境压力。我们发现，使用高权重 ToM 听者组件训练说话者可以在我们的图像参考游戏设置中带来性能提升。我们还发现一些证据表明，训练过程中任务难度的增加会导致评估中的言语更加流畅和精确。这表明进一步将 ToM 以及来自儿童语言习得的其他见解纳入语言习得计算模型的潜在效用。 本文研究如何通过引入心智理论（ToM）机制提升计算语言习得模型的性能，探索其在语言学习过程中的作用。 Andy Liu,Hao Zhu,Emmy Liu,Yonatan Bisk,Graham Neubig cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhuang Liu,Zhiqiu Xu,Joseph Jin,Zhiqiang Shen,Trevor Darrell
title: Dropout Reduces Underfitting
title_zh: Dropout 减少欠拟合
abstract: Introduced by Hinton et al. in 2012, dropout has stood the test of time as a regularizer for preventing overfitting in neural networks. In this study, we demonstrate that dropout can also mitigate underfitting when used at the start of training. During the early phase, we find dropout reduces the directional variance of gradients across mini-batches and helps align the mini-batch gradients with the entire dataset's gradient. This helps counteract the stochasticity of SGD and limit the influence of individual batches on model training. Our findings lead us to a solution for improving performance in underfitting models - early dropout: dropout is applied only during the initial phases of training, and turned off afterwards. Models equipped with early dropout achieve lower final training loss compared to their counterparts without dropout. Additionally, we explore a symmetric technique for regularizing overfitting models - late dropout, where dropout is not used in the early iterations and is only activated later in training. Experiments on ImageNet and various vision tasks demonstrate that our methods consistently improve generalization accuracy. Our results encourage more research on understanding regularization in deep learning and our methods can be useful tools for future neural network training, especially in the era of large data. Code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/dropout.

In this study, we demonstrate that dropout can also mitigate underfitting when used at the start of training. Our findings lead us to a solution for improving performance in underfitting models - early dropout: dropout is applied only during the initial phases of training, and turned off afterwards. Models equipped with early dropout achieve lower final training loss compared to their counterparts without dropout. Additionally, we explore a symmetric technique for regularizing overfitting models - late dropout, where dropout is not used in the early iterations and is only activated later in training. Experiments on ImageNet and various vision tasks demonstrate that our methods consistently improve generalization accuracy. Our results encourage more research on understanding regularization in deep learning and our methods can be useful tools for future neural network training, especially in the era of large data. Code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/dropout.
abstract_zh: 由 Hinton 等人提出。 2012 年，dropout 作为防止神经网络过度拟合的正则化器经受住了时间的考验。在这项研究中，我们证明了在训练开始时使用 dropout 也可以缓解欠拟合。在早期阶段，我们发现 dropout 减少了小批量梯度的方向方差，并有助于将小批量梯度与整个数据集的梯度对齐。这有助于抵消 SGD 的随机性，并限制单个批次对模型训练的影响。我们的研究结果引导我们找到了一种提高欠拟合模型性能的解决方案 - 早期 dropout：dropout 仅在训练的初始阶段应用，然后关闭。与没有 dropout 的模型相比，配备早期 dropout 的模型最终训练损失更低。此外，我们还探索了一种用于正则化过拟合模型的对称技术 - 后期 dropout，其中 dropout 在早期迭代中不使用，仅在训练后期激活。 ImageNet 和各种视觉任务上的实验表明，我们的方法持续提高泛化精度。我们的结果鼓励更多关于理解深度学习中正则化的研究，我们的方法可以成为未来神经网络训练的有用工具，特别是在大数据时代。代码可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/dropout 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在训练初期应用dropout技术以减少神经网络的欠拟合问题，并探索了针对过拟合的对称方法——晚期dropout。
AI.motivation: 传统dropout主要用于防止过拟合，但欠拟合问题缺乏有效解决方案。研究发现早期训练阶段的梯度方差可能导致模型无法充分学习数据特征。
AI.method: 提出‘早期dropout’方法：在训练初期阶段应用dropout，后期关闭；同时提出‘晚期dropout’作为过拟合的对称正则化技术。
AI.result: 实验表明早期dropout使模型最终训练损失降低，ImageNet等任务的泛化准确率提升；晚期dropout有效缓解过拟合问题。
AI.conclusion: 早期dropout为解决欠拟合提供了新思路，晚期dropout完善了正则化方法体系，建议未来研究关注训练不同阶段的正则化策略。

authors_text: Dimitrios Kollias,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Alice Baird,Alan Cowen,Stefanos Zafeiriou
title: ABAW: Valence-Arousal Estimation, Expression Recognition, Action Unit Detection & Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation Challenges
title_zh: ABAW：效价唤醒估计、表达识别、动作单元检测和情绪反应强度估计挑战
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.10659
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.10659
abstract: The fifth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) Competition is part of the respective ABAW Workshop which will be held in conjunction with IEEE Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR), 2023. The 5th ABAW Competition is a continuation of the Competitions held at ECCV 2022, IEEE CVPR 2022, ICCV 2021, IEEE FG 2020 and CVPR 2017 Conferences, and is dedicated at automatically analyzing affect. For this year's Competition, we feature two corpora: i) an extended version of the Aff-Wild2 database and ii) the Hume-Reaction dataset. The former database is an audiovisual one of around 600 videos of around 3M frames and is annotated with respect to:a) two continuous affect dimensions -valence (how positive/negative a person is) and arousal (how active/passive a person is)-; b) basic expressions (e.g. happiness, sadness, neutral state); and c) atomic facial muscle actions (i.e., action units). The latter dataset is an audiovisual one in which reactions of individuals to emotional stimuli have been annotated with respect to seven emotional expression intensities. Thus the 5th ABAW Competition encompasses four Challenges: i) uni-task Valence-Arousal Estimation, ii) uni-task Expression Classification, iii) uni-task Action Unit Detection, and iv) Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation. In this paper, we present these Challenges, along with their corpora, we outline the evaluation metrics, we present the baseline systems and illustrate their obtained performance.

The latter dataset is an audiovisual one in which reactions of individuals to emotional stimuli have been annotated with respect to seven emotional expression intensities. Thus the 5th ABAW Competition encompasses four Challenges: i) uni-task Valence-Arousal Estimation, ii) uni-task Expression Classification, iii) uni-task Action Unit Detection, and iv) Emotional Reaction Intensity Estimation. In this paper, we present these Challenges, along with their corpora, we outline the evaluation metrics, we present the baseline systems and illustrate their obtained performance.
abstract_zh: 第五届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛是 ABAW 研讨会的一部分，该研讨会将与 2023 年 IEEE 计算机视觉和模式识别会议 (CVPR) 同期举行。第五届 ABAW 竞赛是 ECCV 2022、IEEE CVPR 2022、ICCV 2021、IEEE FG 2020 和 CVPR 竞赛的延续2017年会议，致力于自动分析情感。在今年的竞赛中，我们提供了两个语料库：i) Aff-Wild2 数据库的扩展版本和 ii) Hume-Reaction 数据集。前一个数据库是大约 3M 帧的大约 600 个视频中的一个视听视频，并针对以下方面进行了注释：a) 两个连续的情感维度——效价（一个人的积极/消极程度）和唤醒度（一个人的积极/消极程度）； b) 基本表达（例如快乐、悲伤、中立状态）； c) 原子面部肌肉动作（即动作单元）。后一个数据集是一个视听数据集，其中个人对情绪刺激的反应已根据七种情绪表达强度进行了注释。因此，第五届 ABAW 竞赛包含四个挑战：i）单任务效价唤醒估计，ii）单任务表达分类，iii）单任务动作单元检测，以及 iv）情绪反应强度估计。在本文中，我们介绍了这些挑战及其语料库，概述了评估指标，介绍了基线系统并说明了它们所获得的性能。

AI.tldr: 介绍第五届ABAW竞赛的四个挑战任务及其数据集，推动情感分析技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 通过多任务挑战和新数据集促进情感分析技术在真实场景中的应用和算法改进。
AI.method: 采用扩展的Aff-Wild2和Hume-Reaction数据集，设置四个独立任务，并设计相应的评估指标和基线模型进行性能评估。
AI.result: 基线系统在四个任务上的性能评估结果，为后续研究提供参考基准。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态数据集和多样化任务，推动情感分析领域的发展，并促进跨学科研究合作。

authors_text: Jiahong Zhang,Lihong Cao,Qiuxia Lai,Binyao Li,Yunxiao Qin
title: BIFRNet: A Brain-Inspired Feature Restoration DNN for Partially Occluded Image Recognition
title_zh: BIFRNet：一种用于部分遮挡图像识别的受大脑启发的特征恢复 DNN
comment: This paper has been accepted by AAAI-2023
comments: This paper has been accepted by AAAI-2023
abstract: The partially occluded image recognition (POIR) problem has been a challenge for artificial intelligence for a long time. A common strategy to handle the POIR problem is using the non-occluded features for classification. Unfortunately, this strategy will lose effectiveness when the image is severely occluded, since the visible parts can only provide limited information. Several studies in neuroscience reveal that feature restoration which fills in the occluded information and is called amodal completion is essential for human brains to recognize partially occluded images. However, feature restoration is commonly ignored by CNNs, which may be the reason why CNNs are ineffective for the POIR problem. Inspired by this, we propose a novel brain-inspired feature restoration network (BIFRNet) to solve the POIR problem. It mimics a ventral visual pathway to extract image features and a dorsal visual pathway to distinguish occluded and visible image regions. In addition, it also uses a knowledge module to store object prior knowledge and uses a completion module to restore occluded features based on visible features and prior knowledge. Thorough experiments on synthetic and real-world occluded image datasets show that BIFRNet outperforms the existing methods in solving the POIR problem. Especially for severely occluded images, BIRFRNet surpasses other methods by a large margin and is close to the human brain performance. Furthermore, the brain-inspired design makes BIFRNet more interpretable.

A common strategy to handle the POIR problem is using the non-occluded features for classification. Unfortunately, this strategy will lose effectiveness when the image is severely occluded, since the visible parts can only provide limited information. Inspired by this, we propose a novel brain-inspired feature restoration network (BIFRNet) to solve the POIR problem. It mimics a ventral visual pathway to extract image features and a dorsal visual pathway to distinguish occluded and visible image regions. In addition, it also uses a knowledge module to store object prior knowledge and uses a completion module to restore occluded features based on visible features and prior knowledge. Especially for severely occluded images, BIRFRNet surpasses other methods by a large margin and is close to the human brain performance. Furthermore, the brain-inspired design makes BIFRNet more interpretable.
abstract_zh: 部分遮挡图像识别（POIR）问题长期以来一直是人工智能面临的挑战。处理 POIR 问题的常见策略是使用非遮挡特征进行分类。不幸的是，当图像被严重遮挡时，这种策略将失去有效性，因为可见部分只能提供有限的信息。神经科学领域的几项研究表明，填充被遮挡信息的特征恢复（称为非模态完成）对于人脑识别部分被遮挡的图像至关重要。然而，特征恢复通常被 CNN 忽略，这可能是 CNN 对于 POIR 问题无效的原因。受此启发，我们提出了一种新颖的类脑特征恢复网络（BIFRNet）来解决 POIR 问题。它模仿腹侧视觉通路来提取图像特征，并模仿背侧视觉通路来区分遮挡和可见图像区域。此外，它还使用知识模块来存储对象先验知识，并使用补全模块根据可见特征和先验知识来恢复被遮挡的特征。对合成和真实世界遮挡图像数据集的彻底实验表明，BIFRNet 在解决 POIR 问题方面优于现有方法。特别是对于严重遮挡的图像，BIRFRNet大幅超越其他方法，接近人脑性能。此外，受大脑启发的设计使 BIFRNet 更具可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BIFRNet，一种受大脑启发的特征修复深度神经网络，用于解决部分遮挡图像识别（POIR）问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在严重遮挡情况下效果不佳，而人类大脑通过‘非模态完成’机制可有效识别遮挡图像，但CNN常忽略此机制，导致POIR性能不足。
AI.method: BIFRNet模仿大脑腹侧视觉通路提取特征，背侧通路区分遮挡区域，并引入知识模块存储先验知识与修复模块基于可见特征和先验知识恢复遮挡区域。
AI.result: 在合成与真实遮挡数据集上，BIFRNet显著优于现有方法，尤其在严重遮挡场景下接近人类表现，且具有更高可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 受大脑机制启发的BIFRNet有效解决了POIR问题，验证了神经科学原理在深度学习中的应用价值，并提升了模型的鲁棒性与可解释性。

authors_text: Keiko Yamaguchi,Satoshi Takahashi
title: In-the-wild vibrotactile sensation: Perceptual transformation of vibrations from smartphones
title_zh: 野外振动触觉：智能手机振动的感知转换
abstract: Vibrations emitted by smartphones have become a part of our daily lives. The vibrations can add various meanings to the information people obtain from the screen. Hence, it is worth understanding the perceptual transformation of vibration with ordinary devices to evaluate the possibility of enriched vibrotactile communication via smartphones. This study assessed the reproducibility of vibrotactile sensations via smartphone in the in-the-wild environment. To realize improved haptic design to communicate with smartphone users smoothly, we also focused on the moderation effects of the in-the-wild environments on the vibrotactile sensations: the physical specifications of mobile devices, the manner of device operation by users, and the personal traits of the users about the desire for touch. We conducted a Web-based in-the-wild experiment instead of a laboratory experiment to reproduce an environment as close to the daily lives of users as possible. Through a series of analyses, we revealed that users perceive the weight of vibration stimuli to be higher in sensation magnitude than intensity under identical conditions of vibration stimuli. We also showed that it is desirable to consider the moderation effects of the in-the-wild environments for realizing better tactile system design to maximize the impact of vibrotactile stimuli.
summary: Vibrations emitted by smartphones have become a part of our daily lives. The vibrations can add various meanings to the information people obtain from the screen. Hence, it is worth understanding the perceptual transformation of vibration with ordinary devices to evaluate the possibility of enriched vibrotactile communication via smartphones. This study assessed the reproducibility of vibrotactile sensations via smartphone in the in-the-wild environment. To realize improved haptic design to communicate with smartphone users smoothly, we also focused on the moderation effects of the in-the-wild environments on the vibrotactile sensations: the physical specifications of mobile devices, the manner of device operation by users, and the personal traits of the users about the desire for touch. abstract_zh: 智能手机发出的振动已成为我们日常生活的一部分。振动可以为人们从屏幕获得的信息添加各种含义。因此，有必要了解普通设备对振动的感知转换，以评估通过智能手机丰富振动触觉通信的可能性。这项研究评估了在野外环境中通过智能手机产生振动触觉的可重复性。为了实现改进的触觉设计以与智能手机用户顺利沟通，我们还关注野外环境对振动触觉的调节作用：移动设备的物理规格、用户操作设备的方式以及用户对触摸欲望的个人特征。我们进行了基于网络的野外实验，而不是实验室实验，以重现尽可能接近用户日常生活的环境。通过一系列分析，我们发现，在相同的振动刺激条件下，用户感知到的振动刺激的感觉幅度比强度更高。我们还表明，需要考虑野外环境的调节效应，以实现更好的触觉系统设计，从而最大限度地发挥振动触觉刺激的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究智能手机在真实环境中振动触觉感知的转换机制，分析设备特性、用户操作方式及个人触觉需求对振动感知的影响。
AI.motivation: 智能手机振动已成为信息传递的重要方式，但缺乏对真实使用场景下振动感知规律及环境因素影响的系统研究，需探索优化触觉通信设计的途径。
AI.method: 通过网络平台开展真实场景实验，模拟用户日常使用环境，结合设备物理参数、用户操作行为及个体触觉偏好进行多维度数据分析。
AI.result: 发现用户对振动刺激的感知强度与实际物理强度存在偏差，且环境因素显著调节触觉感知效果，设备规格与用户操作方式对感知差异具有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 触觉系统设计需综合考虑真实使用环境的调节作用，通过适配设备特性与用户行为特征可提升振动反馈的感知效果与通信效率。

authors_text: Luca Giamattei,Roberto Pietrantuono,Stefano Russo
title: Reasoning-Based Software Testing
title_zh: 基于推理的软件测试
comment: Paper accepted for publication at 45th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE), New Ideas and Emerging Results (NIER) track
comments: Paper accepted for publication at 45th IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE), New Ideas and Emerging Results (NIER) track
abstract: With software systems becoming increasingly pervasive and autonomous, our ability to test for their quality is severely challenged. Many systems are called to operate in uncertain and highly-changing environment, not rarely required to make intelligent decisions by themselves. This easily results in an intractable state space to explore at testing time. The state-of-the-art techniques try to keep the pace, e.g., by augmenting the tester's intuition with some form of (explicit or implicit) learning from observations to search this space efficiently. For instance, they exploit historical data to drive the search (e.g., ML-driven testing) or the tests execution data itself (e.g., adaptive or search-based testing). Despite the indubitable advances, the need for smartening the search in such a huge space keeps to be pressing. We introduce Reasoning-Based Software Testing (RBST), a new way of thinking at the testing problem as a causal reasoning task. Compared to mere intuition-based or state-of-the-art learning-based strategies, we claim that causal reasoning more naturally emulates the process that a human would do to ''smartly" search the space. RBST aims to mimic and amplify, with the power of computation, this ability. The conceptual leap can pave the ground to a new trend of techniques, which can be variously instantiated from the proposed framework, by exploiting the numerous tools for causal discovery and inference. Preliminary results reported in this paper are promising.
summary: With software systems becoming increasingly pervasive and autonomous, our ability to test for their quality is severely challenged. Many systems are called to operate in uncertain and highly-changing environment, not rarely required to make intelligent decisions by themselves. This easily results in an intractable state space to explore at testing time. The state-of-the-art techniques try to keep the pace, e.g., by augmenting the tester's intuition with some form of (explicit or implicit) learning from observations to search this space efficiently. For instance, they exploit historical data to drive the search (e.g., ML-driven testing) or the tests execution data itself (e.g., adaptive or search-based testing). Despite the indubitable advances, the need for smartening the search in such a huge space keeps to be pressing. We introduce Reasoning-Based Software Testing (RBST), a new way of thinking at the testing problem as a causal reasoning task. Compared to mere intuition-based or state-of-the-art learning-based strategies, we claim that causal reasoning more naturally emulates the process that a human would do to ''smartly" search the space. RBST aims to mimic and amplify, with the power of computation, this ability. The conceptual leap can pave the ground to a new trend of techniques, which can be variously instantiated from the proposed framework, by exploiting the numerous tools for causal discovery and inference. Preliminary results reported in this paper are promising.
abstract_zh: 随着软件系统变得越来越普遍和自治，我们测试其质量的能力受到了严峻的挑战。许多系统需要在不确定且高度变化的环境中运行，通常需要自行做出明智的决策。这很容易导致在测试时探索一个棘手的状态空间。最先进的技术试图跟上步伐，例如，通过从观察中进行某种形式（显式或隐式）学习来增强测试人员的直觉，以有效地搜索该空间。例如，他们利用历史数据来驱动搜索（例如，ML 驱动的测试）或测试执行数据本身（例如，自适应或基于搜索的测试）。尽管取得了不容置疑的进步，但在如此巨大的空间中实现智能化搜索的需求仍然紧迫。我们引入基于推理的软件测试（RBST），这是一种将测试问题视为因果推理任务的新思维方式。与纯粹基于直觉或最先进的基于学习的策略相比，我们认为因果推理更自然地模拟人类“智能”搜索空间的过程。RBST 旨在利用计算的力量来模仿和放大这种能力。概念上的飞跃可以为新的技术趋势铺平道路，通过利用因果发现和分析的众多工具，可以从所提出的框架中以各种方式实例化这种技术趋势。本文报告的初步结果是有希望的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于推理的软件测试（RBST）方法，将软件测试问题视为因果推理任务，以解决复杂环境下的状态空间探索难题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试技术依赖学习策略难以应对高度不确定和动态变化的软件系统环境，亟需更智能的搜索方法以提升测试效率。
AI.method: 通过构建因果推理框架，模仿人类智能搜索过程并结合计算能力放大其效果，利用因果发现与推理工具实现状态空间的高效探索。
AI.result: 初步实验结果验证了RBST方法的有效性，显示出优于传统测试策略的潜力。
AI.conclusion: RBST为软件测试领域提供了全新思路，未来可基于该框架开发多样化测试技术，具有广阔应用前景。

authors_text: Andrew Fuchs,Andrea Passarella,Marco Conti
title: Compensating for Sensing Failures via Delegation in Human-AI Hybrid Systems
title_zh: 通过人类-人工智能混合系统中的委派来补偿传感故障
abstract: Given an increasing prevalence of intelligent systems capable of autonomous actions or augmenting human activities, it is important to consider scenarios in which the human, autonomous system, or both can exhibit failures as a result of one of several contributing factors (e.g. perception). Failures for either humans or autonomous agents can lead to simply a reduced performance level, or a failure can lead to something as severe as injury or death. For our topic, we consider the hybrid human-AI teaming case where a managing agent is tasked with identifying when to perform a delegation assignment and whether the human or autonomous system should gain control. In this context, the manager will estimate its best action based on the likelihood of either (human, autonomous) agent failure as a result of their sensing capabilities and possible deficiencies. We model how the environmental context can contribute to, or exacerbate, the sensing deficiencies. These contexts provide cases where the manager must learn to attribute capabilities to suitability for decision-making. As such, we demonstrate how a Reinforcement Learning (RL) manager can correct the context-delegation association and assist the hybrid team of agents in outperforming the behavior of any agent working in isolation.
summary: Given an increasing prevalence of intelligent systems capable of autonomous actions or augmenting human activities, it is important to consider scenarios in which the human, autonomous system, or both can exhibit failures as a result of one of several contributing factors (e.g. perception). Failures for either humans or autonomous agents can lead to simply a reduced performance level, or a failure can lead to something as severe as injury or death. For our topic, we consider the hybrid human-AI teaming case where a managing agent is tasked with identifying when to perform a delegation assignment and whether the human or autonomous system should gain control. In this context, the manager will estimate its best action based on the likelihood of either (human, autonomous) agent failure as a result of their sensing capabilities and possible deficiencies. We model how the environmental context can contribute to, or exacerbate, the sensing deficiencies. These contexts provide cases where the manager must learn to attribute capabilities to suitability for decision-making. As such, we demonstrate how a Reinforcement Learning (RL) manager can correct the context-delegation association and assist the hybrid team of agents in outperforming the behavior of any agent working in isolation.
abstract_zh: 鉴于能够自主行动或增强人类活动的智能系统日益普及，重要的是要考虑人类、自主系统或两者可能因几个影响因素之一（例如感知）而出现故障的场景。人类或自主代理的故障可能会导致性能水平下降，或者故障可能导致严重的伤害或死亡。对于我们的主题，我们考虑混合人类与人工智能团队的情况，其中管理代理的任务是确定何时执行委托分配以及人类或自治系统是否应该获得控制权。在这种情况下，管理者将根据（人类、自主）代理由于其感知能力和可能的缺陷而失败的可能性来估计其最佳行动。我们模拟环境背景如何导致或加剧传感缺陷。在这些背景下，管理者必须学会将能力归因于决策的适用性。因此，我们演示了强化学习（RL）管理器如何纠正上下文委托关联，并协助混合代理团队超越任何单独工作的代理的行为。

AI.tldr: 研究如何在人机混合系统中通过委托机制补偿感知失败，提升整体系统可靠性。
AI.motivation: 随着智能系统广泛应用，感知故障可能导致严重后果，需通过动态委托机制提升人机协作可靠性。
AI.method: 采用强化学习方法，训练管理代理根据环境上下文和感知能力动态分配控制权，优化人机协作决策。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法使混合团队在感知失败场景下表现优于单一代理，提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明通过强化学习管理代理可有效补偿感知失败，为人机混合系统提供可靠协作框架。
