authors_text: Antonio Guerriero,Roberto Pietrantuono,Stefano Russo
title: Iterative Assessment and Improvement of DNN Operational Accuracy
title_zh: DNN 运算精度的迭代评估和改进
comment: Paper accepted at 45th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE'23 NIER), May 2023
comments: Paper accepted at 45th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE'23 NIER), May 2023
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNN) are nowadays largely adopted in many application domains thanks to their human-like, or even superhuman, performance in specific tasks. However, due to unpredictable/unconsidered operating conditions, unexpected failures show up on field, making the performance of a DNN in operation very different from the one estimated prior to release. In the life cycle of DNN systems, the assessment of accuracy is typically addressed in two ways: offline, via sampling of operational inputs, or online, via pseudo-oracles. The former is considered more expensive due to the need for manual labeling of the sampled inputs. The latter is automatic but less accurate. We believe that emerging iterative industrial-strength life cycle models for Machine Learning systems, like MLOps, offer the possibility to leverage inputs observed in operation not only to provide faithful estimates of a DNN accuracy, but also to improve it through remodeling/retraining actions. We propose DAIC (DNN Assessment and Improvement Cycle), an approach which combines ''low-cost'' online pseudo-oracles and ''high-cost'' offline sampling techniques to estimate and improve the operational accuracy of a DNN in the iterations of its life cycle. Preliminary results show the benefits of combining the two approaches and integrating them in the DNN life cycle.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNN) are nowadays largely adopted in many application domains thanks to their human-like, or even superhuman, performance in specific tasks. However, due to unpredictable/unconsidered operating conditions, unexpected failures show up on field, making the performance of a DNN in operation very different from the one estimated prior to release. In the life cycle of DNN systems, the assessment of accuracy is typically addressed in two ways: offline, via sampling of operational inputs, or online, via pseudo-oracles. The former is considered more expensive due to the need for manual labeling of the sampled inputs. The latter is automatic but less accurate. We believe that emerging iterative industrial-strength life cycle models for Machine Learning systems, like MLOps, offer the possibility to leverage inputs observed in operation not only to provide faithful estimates of a DNN accuracy, but also to improve it through remodeling/retraining actions. We propose DAIC (DNN Assessment and Improvement Cycle), an approach which combines ''low-cost'' online pseudo-oracles and ''high-cost'' offline sampling techniques to estimate and improve the operational accuracy of a DNN in the iterations of its life cycle. Preliminary results show the benefits of combining the two approaches and integrating them in the DNN life cycle.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）如今在许多应用领域得到广泛采用，这得益于它们在特定任务中具有类人甚至超人的性能。然而，由于不可预测/未考虑的操作条件，现场会出现意外故障，使得 DNN 的运行性能与发布前估计的性能有很大差异。在 DNN 系统的生命周期中，准确性评估通常通过两种方式进行：离线（通过操作输入采样）或在线（通过伪预言机）。由于需要对采样输入进行手动标记，前者被认为更昂贵。后者是自动的，但不太准确。我们相信，机器学习系统的新兴迭代工业强度生命周期模型（例如 MLOps）提供了利用在操作中观察到的输入的可能性，不仅可以提供对 DNN 准确性的忠实估计，还可以通过重构/再训练操作来改进它。我们提出了 DAIC（DNN 评估和改进周期），这是一种结合“低成本”在线伪预言机和“高成本”离线采样技术的方法，用于估计和提高 DNN 在其生命周期迭代中的操作准确性。初步结果显示了结合这两种方法并将其集成到 DNN 生命周期中的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合在线伪 oracle 和离线采样技术的迭代方法 DAIC，用于评估和提升深度神经网络（DNN）在实际运行中的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有 DNN 准确性评估方法（离线采样和在线伪 oracle）存在成本高或精度低的问题，而工业级机器学习系统生命周期模型（如 MLOps）为结合两者提供了新思路。
AI.method: DAIC 方法通过迭代循环整合低成本的在线伪 oracle 和高成本的离线采样技术，在 DNN 生命周期中持续评估并优化其运行准确性。
AI.result: 初步实验表明，结合两种方法的 DAIC 能有效提升 DNN 在实际场景中的准确性估计与改进效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过将在线与离线方法集成到 DNN 生命周期中，DAIC 为实际应用中动态优化模型性能提供了可行方案。

search_text: Iterative Assessment and Improvement of DNN Operational Accuracy DNN 运算精度的迭代评估和改进 Deep Neural Networks (DNN) are nowadays largely adopted in many application domains thanks to their human-like, or even superhuman, performance in specific tasks. However, due to unpredictable/unconsidered operating conditions, unexpected failures show up on field, making the performance of a DNN in operation very different from the one estimated prior to release. In the life cycle of DNN systems, the assessment of accuracy is typically addressed in two ways: offline, via sampling of operational inputs, or online, via pseudo-oracles. The former is considered more expensive due to the need for manual labeling of the sampled inputs. The latter is automatic but less accurate. We believe that emerging iterative industrial-strength life cycle models for Machine Learning systems, like MLOps, offer the possibility to leverage inputs observed in operation not only to provide faithful estimates of a DNN accuracy, but also to improve it through remodeling/retraining actions. We propose DAIC (DNN Assessment and Improvement Cycle), an approach which combines ''low-cost'' online pseudo-oracles and ''high-cost'' offline sampling techniques to estimate and improve the operational accuracy of a DNN in the iterations of its life cycle. Preliminary results show the benefits of combining the two approaches and integrating them in the DNN life cycle. 深度神经网络（DNN）如今在许多应用领域得到广泛采用，这得益于它们在特定任务中具有类人甚至超人的性能。然而，由于不可预测/未考虑的操作条件，现场会出现意外故障，使得 DNN 的运行性能与发布前估计的性能有很大差异。在 DNN 系统的生命周期中，准确性评估通常通过两种方式进行：离线（通过操作输入采样）或在线（通过伪预言机）。由于需要对采样输入进行手动标记，前者被认为更昂贵。后者是自动的，但不太准确。我们相信，机器学习系统的新兴迭代工业强度生命周期模型（例如 MLOps）提供了利用在操作中观察到的输入的可能性，不仅可以提供对 DNN 准确性的忠实估计，还可以通过重构/再训练操作来改进它。我们提出了 DAIC（DNN 评估和改进周期），这是一种结合“低成本”在线伪预言机和“高成本”离线采样技术的方法，用于估计和提高 DNN 在其生命周期迭代中的操作准确性。初步结果显示了结合这两种方法并将其集成到 DNN 生命周期中的好处。 本文提出了一种结合在线伪 oracle 和离线采样技术的迭代方法 DAIC，用于评估和提升深度神经网络（DNN）在实际运行中的准确性。 Antonio Guerriero,Roberto Pietrantuono,Stefano Russo cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.SE

authors_text: Erqun Dong,Sheroze Sheriffdeen,Shichao Yang,Jing Dong,Renzo De Nardi,Carl Ren,Xiao-Wen Chang,Xue Liu,Zijian Wang
title: Robust, High-Precision GNSS Carrier-Phase Positioning with Visual-Inertial Fusion
title_zh: 具有视觉惯性融合功能的稳健、高精度 GNSS 载波相位定位
abstract: Robust, high-precision global localization is fundamental to a wide range of outdoor robotics applications. Conventional fusion methods use low-accuracy pseudorange based GNSS measurements ($>>5m$ errors) and can only yield a coarse registration to the global earth-centered-earth-fixed (ECEF) frame. In this paper, we leverage high-precision GNSS carrier-phase positioning and aid it with local visual-inertial odometry (VIO) tracking using an extended Kalman filter (EKF) framework that better resolves the integer ambiguity concerned with GNSS carrier-phase. %to achieve centimeter-level accuracy in the ECEF frame. We also propose an algorithm for accurate GNSS-antenna-to-IMU extrinsics calibration to accurately align VIO to the ECEF frame. Together, our system achieves robust global positioning demonstrated by real-world hardware experiments in severely occluded urban canyons, and outperforms the state-of-the-art RTKLIB by a significant margin in terms of integer ambiguity solution fix rate and positioning RMSE accuracy.
summary: Robust, high-precision global localization is fundamental to a wide range of outdoor robotics applications. Conventional fusion methods use low-accuracy pseudorange based GNSS measurements ($>>5m$ errors) and can only yield a coarse registration to the global earth-centered-earth-fixed (ECEF) frame. In this paper, we leverage high-precision GNSS carrier-phase positioning and aid it with local visual-inertial odometry (VIO) tracking using an extended Kalman filter (EKF) framework that better resolves the integer ambiguity concerned with GNSS carrier-phase. %to achieve centimeter-level accuracy in the ECEF frame. We also propose an algorithm for accurate GNSS-antenna-to-IMU extrinsics calibration to accurately align VIO to the ECEF frame. Together, our system achieves robust global positioning demonstrated by real-world hardware experiments in severely occluded urban canyons, and outperforms the state-of-the-art RTKLIB by a significant margin in terms of integer ambiguity solution fix rate and positioning RMSE accuracy.
abstract_zh: 强大、高精度的全球定位是各种户外机器人应用的基础。传统的融合方法使用基于 GNSS 测量的低精度伪距（$>>5m$ 误差），并且只能对全球地心地固定 (ECEF) 框架进行粗略配准。在本文中，我们利用高精度 GNSS 载波相位定位，并使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器 (EKF) 框架辅助其进行局部视觉惯性里程计 (VIO) 跟踪，更好地解决与 GNSS 载波相位相关的整数模糊度。 %在 ECEF 框架中实现厘米级精度。我们还提出了一种精确的 GNSS 天线到 IMU 外部校准算法，以准确地将 VIO 与 ECEF 框架对齐。总之，我们的系统在严重遮挡的城市峡谷中进行了现实世界的硬件实验，证明了我们的系统实现了强大的全球定位，并且在整数模糊度解决方案修复率和定位 RMSE 精度方面明显优于最先进的 RTKLIB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合高精度GNSS载波相位定位与视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的融合方法，以实现鲁棒的全球高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 传统GNSS伪距定位精度低（误差>>5米），仅能实现粗略的全球坐标系（ECEF）对齐，难以满足户外机器人对高精度定位的需求。
AI.method: 基于扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）框架，融合高精度GNSS载波相位测量与局部VIO跟踪，解决载波相位整周模糊度问题，并提出GNSS天线与IMU外参标定算法以实现VIO与ECEF坐标系的精确对齐。
AI.result: 在严重遮挡的城市峡谷环境中，系统实现了厘米级ECEF定位精度，整周模糊度解算成功率和定位RMSE均优于现有RTKLIB方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过载波相位与视觉惯性信息的协同优化及外参标定，本文提出的方法有效提升了GNSS在复杂环境下的全球高精度定位鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Tesshu Hanaka,Hirotaka Ono,Kosuke Sugiyama
title: Solving Distance-constrained Labeling Problems for Small Diameter Graphs via TSP
title_zh: 通过 TSP 解决小直径图的距离约束标记问题
abstract: In this paper, we give a simple polynomial-time reduction of {L(p)-Labeling} on graphs with a small diameter to {Metric (Path) TSP}, which enables us to use numerous results on {(Metric) TSP}. On the practical side, we can utilize various high-performance heuristics for TSP, such as Concordo and LKH, to solve our problem. On the theoretical side, we can see that the problem for any p under this framework is 1.5-approximable, and it can be solved by the Held-Karp algorithm in O(2^n n^2) time, where n is the number of vertices, and so on.
summary: In this paper, we give a simple polynomial-time reduction of {L(p)-Labeling} on graphs with a small diameter to {Metric (Path) TSP}, which enables us to use numerous results on {(Metric) TSP}. On the practical side, we can utilize various high-performance heuristics for TSP, such as Concordo and LKH, to solve our problem. On the theoretical side, we can see that the problem for any p under this framework is 1.5-approximable, and it can be solved by the Held-Karp algorithm in O(2^n n^2) time, where n is the number of vertices, and so on.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们给出了小直径图上的 {L(p)-Labeling} 到 {Metric (Path) TSP} 的简单多项式时间约简，这使我们能够在 {(Metric) TSP} 上使用大量结果。在实际方面，我们可以利用 TSP 的各种高性能启发式方法（例如 Concordo 和 LKH）来解决我们的问题。从理论上讲，我们可以看到，该框架下任意p的问题都是1.5近似的，并且可以通过Held-Karp算法在O(2^n n^2)时间内解决，其中n是顶点数，依此类推。

AI.tldr: 本文将小直径图的L(p)-Labeling问题归约为度量TSP问题，从而利用TSP的算法和理论结果。
AI.motivation: 现有L(p)-Labeling问题在小直径图上的求解方法缺乏高效算法和理论保证，需借助TSP领域的成熟成果。
AI.method: 通过多项式时间归约将L(p)-Labeling转化为度量（路径）TSP问题，结合TSP的启发式算法与理论分析。
AI.result: 实际应用中可使用Concorde/LKH等高效TSP算法；理论证明问题具有1.5近似比，Held-Karp算法时间复杂度为O(2^n n²)。
AI.conclusion: 该归约方法为小直径图的L(p)-Labeling问题提供了兼具实践效率与理论保证的新解决方案。

search_text: Solving Distance-constrained Labeling Problems for Small Diameter Graphs via TSP 通过 TSP 解决小直径图的距离约束标记问题 In this paper, we give a simple polynomial-time reduction of {L(p)-Labeling} on graphs with a small diameter to {Metric (Path) TSP}, which enables us to use numerous results on {(Metric) TSP}. On the practical side, we can utilize various high-performance heuristics for TSP, such as Concordo and LKH, to solve our problem. On the theoretical side, we can see that the problem for any p under this framework is 1.5-approximable, and it can be solved by the Held-Karp algorithm in O(2^n n^2) time, where n is the number of vertices, and so on. 在本文中，我们给出了小直径图上的 {L(p)-Labeling} 到 {Metric (Path) TSP} 的简单多项式时间约简，这使我们能够在 {(Metric) TSP} 上使用大量结果。在实际方面，我们可以利用 TSP 的各种高性能启发式方法（例如 Concordo 和 LKH）来解决我们的问题。从理论上讲，我们可以看到，该框架下任意p的问题都是1.5近似的，并且可以通过Held-Karp算法在O(2^n n^2)时间内解决，其中n是顶点数，依此类推。 本文将小直径图的L(p)-Labeling问题归约为度量TSP问题，从而利用TSP的算法和理论结果。 Tesshu Hanaka,Hirotaka Ono,Kosuke Sugiyama cs.DS

authors_text: Shuang Zheng,Jiawei Zhang,Weifeng Zhang
title: High-throughput optical neural networks based on temporal computing
title_zh: 基于时间计算的高通量光学神经网络
abstract: An emerging generative artificial intelligence (AI) based on neural networks starts to grow in popularity with a revolutionizing capability of creating new and original content. As giant generative models with millions to billions of parameters are developed, trained and maintained, a massive and energy-efficient computing power is highly required. However, conventional digital computers are struggling to keep up with the pace of the generative model improvements. In this paper, we propose and demonstrate high-throughput optical neural networks based on temporal computing. The core weighted summation operation is realized with the use of high-speed electro-optic modulation and low-speed balanced photodetection. The input data and weight are encoded in a time sequence separately and loaded on an optical signal via two electro-optic modulators sequentially. By precisely controlling the synchronization time of the data and weight loading, the matrix multiplication is performed. Followed by a balanced photodetector, the summation is conducted, thanks to the electron accumulation of the inherent electronic integrator circuit of the low-speed photodetector. Thus, the linear weighted summation operation is implemented based on temporal computing in the optical domain. With the proposed optical linear weighted summation, a fully-connected neural network and convolutional neural network are realized. Thanks to the high-speed feature of temporal computing, a high data throughput of the optical neural network is experimentally demonstrated, and the weighting coefficients can be specified on demand, which enables a strong programmability of the optical neural network. By leveraging wavelength multiplexing technology, a scalable optical neural network could be created with a massive computing power and strong reconfigurability, which holds great potential for future giant AI applications.

abstract_zh: 基于神经网络的新兴生成人工智能 (AI) 以其创造新的原创内容的革命性能力开始越来越受欢迎。随着具有数百万至数十亿参数的巨型生成模型的开发、训练和维护，非常需要大规模且节能的计算能力。然而，传统的数字计算机正在努力跟上生成模型改进的步伐。在本文中，我们提出并演示了基于时间计算的高通量光学神经网络。核心加权求和运算是利用高速电光调制和低速平衡光电检测实现的。输入数据和权重分别按时间顺序进行编码，并通过两个电光调制器依次加载到光信号上。通过精确控制数据和权重加载的同步时间，进行矩阵乘法。随后是平衡光电探测器，通过低速光电探测器固有的电子积分电路的电子积累来进行求和。这样，基于光域的时间计算实现了线性加权求和运算。通过提出的光学线性加权求和，实现了全连接神经网络和卷积神经网络。得益于时间计算的高速特性，实验证明了光神经网络的高数据吞吐量，并且可以按需指定权重系数，这使得光神经网络具有很强的可编程性。通过利用波长复用技术，可以创建一个可扩展的光学神经网络，具有强大的计算能力和强大的可重构性，这对于未来的巨型人工智能应用具有巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间计算的高吞吐量光学神经网络，以解决传统数字计算机在处理大规模生成模型时的计算瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI模型参数规模的扩大，传统数字计算机在计算效率和能耗方面难以满足需求，亟需新型高效计算架构。
AI.method: 通过高速电光调制与低速平衡光电探测技术，在时序域实现权重求和运算，利用波长复用技术构建可扩展的光学神经网络。
AI.result: 实验验证了光学神经网络的高数据吞吐能力，实现了全连接网络和卷积网络，具备按需编程和强可重构性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未来大规模AI应用提供了高算力、低功耗的光学计算新方案，具有重要应用前景。

authors_text: Kijung Lee,Mian Wang
title: Uses and Gratifications of Alternative Social Media: Why do people use Mastodon?
title_zh: 另类社交媒体的使用和满足感：人们为什么使用 Mastodon？
abstract: The primary purpose of this investigation is to answer the research questions; 1) What are users' motivations for joining Mastodon?; 2) What are users' gratifications for using Mastodon?; and 3) What are the primary reasons that the users continue to use Mastodon? We analyzed the collected data from the perspective of the Uses and Gratifications Theory. A questionnaire was designed to measure the opinions of Mastodon users from 15 different Mastodon instances. We examined 47 items through exploratory factor analysis using principal components extraction with Varimax with Kaiser Normalization. The results extracted 7 factors of gratification sought (expectation) and 7 factors of gratification obtained. We discovered that the primary reason that the users join and use Mastodon is the ease of controlling and sheltering users' information from data mining. The findings of the gratification sought structure are similar to findings of the gratification obtained structure, and the comparison between the two groups of data suggests that users are satisfied with the ongoing use of Mastodon.
summary: The primary purpose of this investigation is to answer the research questions; 1) What are users' motivations for joining Mastodon?; 2) What are users' gratifications for using Mastodon?; and 3) What are the primary reasons that the users continue to use Mastodon? We analyzed the collected data from the perspective of the Uses and Gratifications Theory. A questionnaire was designed to measure the opinions of Mastodon users from 15 different Mastodon instances. We examined 47 items through exploratory factor analysis using principal components extraction with Varimax with Kaiser Normalization. The results extracted 7 factors of gratification sought (expectation) and 7 factors of gratification obtained. We discovered that the primary reason that the users join and use Mastodon is the ease of controlling and sheltering users' information from data mining. The findings of the gratification sought structure are similar to findings of the gratification obtained structure, and the comparison between the two groups of data suggests that users are satisfied with the ongoing use of Mastodon.
abstract_zh: 本次调查的主要目的是回答研究问题； 1）用户加入Mastodon的动机是什么？； 2）用户使用Mastodon的满意度是什么？； 3) 用户继续使用 Mastodon 的主要原因是什么？我们从使用和满足理论的角度分析了收集到的数据。设计了一份调查问卷来衡量来自 15 个不同 Mastodon 实例的 Mastodon 用户的意见。我们通过探索性因子分析检查了 47 个项目，使用 Varimax 和 Kaiser 标准化进行主成分提取。结果提取了7个寻求（期望）满足的因素和7个获得满足的因素。我们发现，用户加入并使用 Mastodon 的主要原因是易于控制和保护用户信息免遭数据挖掘。寻求满足感结构的结果与获得满足感结构的结果相似，两组数据之间的比较表明用户对 Mastodon 的持续使用感到满意。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过使用与满足理论，探讨用户加入、使用并持续使用Mastodon平台的动机及满足感。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在揭示用户选择Mastodon这一替代性社交媒体的核心原因，特别是其隐私保护特性是否满足用户需求。
AI.method: 通过设计问卷调查15个Mastodon实例的用户，采用探索性因子分析法（主成分提取+Varimax旋转）对47项指标进行统计分析。
AI.result: 发现用户主要因信息控制权和数据隐私保护而使用Mastodon，期望满足与实际获得的7项满足感因子高度一致，表明用户对平台满意度较高。
AI.conclusion: Mastodon通过提供隐私保护和信息自主权满足了用户核心需求，是其用户留存率较高的关键原因。

authors_text: Liren Jin,Xieyuanli Chen,Julius Rückin,Marija Popović
title: NeU-NBV: Next Best View Planning Using Uncertainty Estimation in Image-Based Neural Rendering
title_zh: NeU-NBV：在基于图像的神经渲染中使用不确定性估计进行下一个最佳视图规划
comment: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Robotics and Intelligent Systems (IROS) 2023
comments: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Robotics and Intelligent Systems (IROS) 2023
abstract: Autonomous robotic tasks require actively perceiving the environment to achieve application-specific goals. In this paper, we address the problem of positioning an RGB camera to collect the most informative images to represent an unknown scene, given a limited measurement budget. We propose a novel mapless planning framework to iteratively plan the next best camera view based on collected image measurements. A key aspect of our approach is a new technique for uncertainty estimation in image-based neural rendering, which guides measurement acquisition at the most uncertain view among view candidates, thus maximising the information value during data collection. By incrementally adding new measurements into our image collection, our approach efficiently explores an unknown scene in a mapless manner. We show that our uncertainty estimation is generalisable and valuable for view planning in unknown scenes. Our planning experiments using synthetic and real-world data verify that our uncertainty-guided approach finds informative images leading to more accurate scene representations when compared against baselines.
summary: Autonomous robotic tasks require actively perceiving the environment to achieve application-specific goals. A key aspect of our approach is a new technique for uncertainty estimation in image-based neural rendering, which guides measurement acquisition at the most uncertain view among view candidates, thus maximising the information value during data collection. By incrementally adding new measurements into our image collection, our approach efficiently explores an unknown scene in a mapless manner. We show that our uncertainty estimation is generalisable and valuable for view planning in unknown scenes. Our planning experiments using synthetic and real-world data verify that our uncertainty-guided approach finds informative images leading to more accurate scene representations when compared against baselines.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人任务需要主动感知环境才能实现特定于应用的目标。在本文中，我们解决了在测量预算有限的情况下定位 RGB 相机以收集信息最多的图像来表示未知场景的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的无地图规划框架，可以根据收集的图像测量结果迭代规划下一个最佳摄像机视图。我们方法的一个关键方面是基于图像的神经渲染中的不确定性估计新技术，它指导在候选视图中最不确定的视图进行测量采集，从而在数据收集过程中最大化信息价值。通过逐步将新的测量结果添加到我们的图像集合中，我们的方法以无地图的方式有效地探索未知场景。我们表明，我们的不确定性估计对于未知场景中的视图规划具有普适性和价值。我们使用合成数据和真实世界数据进行的规划实验验证了我们的不确定性引导方法可以找到信息丰富的图像，与基线相比可以实现更准确的场景表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需地图的下一最佳视角规划框架，通过不确定性估计在图像神经渲染中主动感知未知场景。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人任务需在有限测量预算下主动感知环境，现有方法或依赖地图或无法有效利用不确定性指导数据采集。
AI.method: 基于图像神经渲染的不确定性估计技术，迭代规划最不确定视角进行测量，增量更新图像集合以探索未知场景。
AI.result: 合成与真实数据实验表明，该方法相比基线能获取更具信息量的图像，生成更精确的场景表示。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性引导的视角规划方法在未知场景中具有通用性与有效性，为无地图环境感知提供新思路。

search_text: NeU-NBV: Next Best View Planning Using Uncertainty Estimation in Image-Based Neural Rendering NeU-NBV：在基于图像的神经渲染中使用不确定性估计进行下一个最佳视图规划 Autonomous robotic tasks require actively perceiving the environment to achieve application-specific goals. In this paper, we address the problem of positioning an RGB camera to collect the most informative images to represent an unknown scene, given a limited measurement budget. We propose a novel mapless planning framework to iteratively plan the next best camera view based on collected image measurements. A key aspect of our approach is a new technique for uncertainty estimation in image-based neural rendering, which guides measurement acquisition at the most uncertain view among view candidates, thus maximising the information value during data collection. By incrementally adding new measurements into our image collection, our approach efficiently explores an unknown scene in a mapless manner. We show that our uncertainty estimation is generalisable and valuable for view planning in unknown scenes. Our planning experiments using synthetic and real-world data verify that our uncertainty-guided approach finds informative images leading to more accurate scene representations when compared against baselines. 自主机器人任务需要主动感知环境才能实现特定于应用的目标。在本文中，我们解决了在测量预算有限的情况下定位 RGB 相机以收集信息最多的图像来表示未知场景的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的无地图规划框架，可以根据收集的图像测量结果迭代规划下一个最佳摄像机视图。我们方法的一个关键方面是基于图像的神经渲染中的不确定性估计新技术，它指导在候选视图中最不确定的视图进行测量采集，从而在数据收集过程中最大化信息价值。通过逐步将新的测量结果添加到我们的图像集合中，我们的方法以无地图的方式有效地探索未知场景。我们表明，我们的不确定性估计对于未知场景中的视图规划具有普适性和价值。我们使用合成数据和真实世界数据进行的规划实验验证了我们的不确定性引导方法可以找到信息丰富的图像，与基线相比可以实现更准确的场景表示。 本文提出一种无需地图的下一最佳视角规划框架，通过不确定性估计在图像神经渲染中主动感知未知场景。 Liren Jin,Xieyuanli Chen,Julius Rückin,Marija Popović cs.RO

authors_text: Shota Harada,Ryoma Bise,Kengo Araki,Akihiko Yoshizawa,Kazuhiro Terada,Mariyo Kurata,Naoki Nakajima,Hiroyuki Abe,Tetsuo Ushiku,Seiichi Uchida
title: Cluster-Guided Semi-Supervised Domain Adaptation for Imbalanced Medical Image Classification
title_zh: 用于不平衡医学图像分类的集群引导半监督域适应
abstract: Semi-supervised domain adaptation is a technique to build a classifier for a target domain by modifying a classifier in another (source) domain using many unlabeled samples and a small number of labeled samples from the target domain. In this paper, we develop a semi-supervised domain adaptation method, which has robustness to class-imbalanced situations, which are common in medical image classification tasks. For robustness, we propose a weakly-supervised clustering pipeline to obtain high-purity clusters and utilize the clusters in representation learning for domain adaptation. The proposed method showed state-of-the-art performance in the experiment using severely class-imbalanced pathological image patches.
summary: Semi-supervised domain adaptation is a technique to build a classifier for a target domain by modifying a classifier in another (source) domain using many unlabeled samples and a small number of labeled samples from the target domain. In this paper, we develop a semi-supervised domain adaptation method, which has robustness to class-imbalanced situations, which are common in medical image classification tasks. For robustness, we propose a weakly-supervised clustering pipeline to obtain high-purity clusters and utilize the clusters in representation learning for domain adaptation. The proposed method showed state-of-the-art performance in the experiment using severely class-imbalanced pathological image patches.
abstract_zh: 半监督域适应是一种通过使用来自目标域的许多未标记样本和少量标记样本修改另一个（源）域中的分类器来构建目标域分类器的技术。在本文中，我们开发了一种半监督域适应方法，该方法对医学图像分类任务中常见的类不平衡情况具有鲁棒性。为了鲁棒性，我们提出了一种弱监督的聚类管道来获得高纯度的聚类，并在表示学习中利用这些聚类来进行领域适应。所提出的方法在使用严重类别不平衡的病理图像块的实验中显示出最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种聚类引导的半监督领域自适应方法，用于解决医学图像分类中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分类任务中类别不平衡现象普遍，传统领域自适应方法对此类问题的鲁棒性不足，导致分类性能下降。
AI.method: 设计弱监督聚类流程生成高纯度聚类，并利用聚类结果指导表示学习，增强领域自适应过程中的类别平衡能力。
AI.result: 在严重类别不平衡的病理图像块数据集上，该方法达到最先进的分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 聚类引导的半监督领域自适应方法能有效提升医学图像分类在类别不平衡场景下的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Meng Zhang,Qinghao Hu,Peng Sun,Yonggang Wen,Tianwei Zhang
title: Boosting Distributed Full-graph GNN Training with Asynchronous One-bit Communication
title_zh: 通过异步一位通信促进分布式全图 GNN 训练
abstract: Training Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) on large graphs is challenging due to the conflict between the high memory demand and limited GPU memory. Recently, distributed full-graph GNN training has been widely adopted to tackle this problem. However, the substantial inter-GPU communication overhead can cause severe throughput degradation. Existing communication compression techniques mainly focus on traditional DNN training, whose bottleneck lies in synchronizing gradients and parameters. We find they do not work well in distributed GNN training as the barrier is the layer-wise communication of features during the forward pass & feature gradients during the backward pass. To this end, we propose an efficient distributed GNN training framework Sylvie, which employs one-bit quantization technique in GNNs and further pipelines the curtailed communication with computation to enormously shrink the overhead while maintaining the model quality. In detail, Sylvie provides a lightweight Low-bit Module to quantize the sent data and dequantize the received data back to full precision values in each layer. Additionally, we propose a Bounded Staleness Adaptor to control the introduced staleness to achieve further performance enhancement. We conduct theoretical convergence analysis and extensive experiments on various models & datasets to demonstrate Sylvie can considerably boost the training throughput by up to 28.1x.
summary: Training Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) on large graphs is challenging due to the conflict between the high memory demand and limited GPU memory. Recently, distributed full-graph GNN training has been widely adopted to tackle this problem. However, the substantial inter-GPU communication overhead can cause severe throughput degradation. Existing communication compression techniques mainly focus on traditional DNN training, whose bottleneck lies in synchronizing gradients and parameters. We find they do not work well in distributed GNN training as the barrier is the layer-wise communication of features during the forward pass & feature gradients during the backward pass. To this end, we propose an efficient distributed GNN training framework Sylvie, which employs one-bit quantization technique in GNNs and further pipelines the curtailed communication with computation to enormously shrink the overhead while maintaining the model quality. In detail, Sylvie provides a lightweight Low-bit Module to quantize the sent data and dequantize the received data back to full precision values in each layer. Additionally, we propose a Bounded Staleness Adaptor to control the introduced staleness to achieve further performance enhancement. We conduct theoretical convergence analysis and extensive experiments on various models & datasets to demonstrate Sylvie can considerably boost the training throughput by up to 28.1x.
abstract_zh: 由于高内存需求和有限的 GPU 内存之间的冲突，在大型图上训练图神经网络 (GNN) 具有挑战性。最近，分布式全图 GNN 训练已被广泛采用来解决这个问题。然而，大量的 GPU 间通信开销可能会导致吞吐量严重下降。现有的通信压缩技术主要集中在传统的DNN训练上，其瓶颈在于梯度和参数的同步。我们发现它们在分布式 GNN 训练中效果不佳，因为障碍是前向传递过程中特征的分层通信和后向传递过程中的特征梯度。为此，我们提出了一种高效的分布式 GNN 训练框架 Sylvie，它在 GNN 中采用一位量化技术，并进一步将减少的通信与计算进行管道化，以在保持模型质量的同时极大地缩减开销。具体来说，Sylvie 提供了一个轻量级低位模块来量化发送的数据并将接收的数据反量化回每层的全精度值。此外，我们提出了一个 Bounded Staleness Adapter 来控制引入的陈旧性，以实现进一步的性能增强。我们对各种模型和数据集进行了理论收敛分析和广泛的实验，以证明 Sylvie 可以将训练吞吐量显着提高高达 28.1 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sylvie的分布式图神经网络（GNN）训练框架，通过异步一位通信技术解决大规模图训练中的通信开销问题。
AI.motivation: 分布式全图GNN训练面临高内存需求与GPU内存限制的冲突，且现有通信压缩技术无法有效应对GNN前向和反向传播中的层间特征通信瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计轻量级低比特模块实现特征数据一位量化与反量化，并引入有界陈旧度适配器控制异步通信中的数据陈旧度，通过计算与通信流水线优化降低开销。
AI.result: 在多个模型和数据集上的实验表明，Sylvie将训练吞吐量提升最高达28.1倍，同时保持模型质量。
AI.conclusion: Sylvie通过异步一位通信和计算流水线优化，有效解决了分布式GNN训练的通信瓶颈问题，显著提升了训练效率。

In detail, Sylvie provides a lightweight Low-bit Module to quantize the sent data and dequantize the received data back to full precision values in each layer. Additionally, we propose a Bounded Staleness Adaptor to control the introduced staleness to achieve further performance enhancement. We conduct theoretical convergence analysis and extensive experiments on various models & datasets to demonstrate Sylvie can considerably boost the training throughput by up to 28.1x. 由于高内存需求和有限的 GPU 内存之间的冲突，在大型图上训练图神经网络 (GNN) 具有挑战性。最近，分布式全图 GNN 训练已被广泛采用来解决这个问题。然而，大量的 GPU 间通信开销可能会导致吞吐量严重下降。现有的通信压缩技术主要集中在传统的DNN训练上，其瓶颈在于梯度和参数的同步。我们发现它们在分布式 GNN 训练中效果不佳，因为障碍是前向传递过程中特征的分层通信和后向传递过程中的特征梯度。为此，我们提出了一种高效的分布式 GNN 训练框架 Sylvie，它在 GNN 中采用一位量化技术，并进一步将减少的通信与计算进行管道化，以在保持模型质量的同时极大地缩减开销。具体来说，Sylvie 提供了一个轻量级低位模块来量化发送的数据并将接收的数据反量化回每层的全精度值。此外，我们提出了一个 Bounded Staleness Adapter 来控制引入的陈旧性，以实现进一步的性能增强。我们对各种模型和数据集进行了理论收敛分析和广泛的实验，以证明 Sylvie 可以将训练吞吐量显着提高高达 28.1 倍。 本文提出了一种名为Sylvie的分布式图神经网络（GNN）训练框架，通过异步一位通信技术解决大规模图训练中的通信开销问题。 Meng Zhang,Qinghao Hu,Peng Sun,Yonggang Wen,Tianwei Zhang cs.DC,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zicheng Wang,Zhen Zhao,Xiaoxia Xing,Dong Xu,Xiangyu Kong,Luping Zhou
title: Conflict-Based Cross-View Consistency for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 基于冲突的半监督语义分割的跨视图一致性
abstract: Semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSS) has recently gained increasing research interest as it can reduce the requirement for large-scale fully-annotated training data. The current methods often suffer from the confirmation bias from the pseudo-labelling process, which can be alleviated by the co-training framework. The current co-training-based SSS methods rely on hand-crafted perturbations to prevent the different sub-nets from collapsing into each other, but these artificial perturbations cannot lead to the optimal solution. In this work, we propose a new conflict-based cross-view consistency (CCVC) method based on a two-branch co-training framework which aims at enforcing the two sub-nets to learn informative features from irrelevant views. In particular, we first propose a new cross-view consistency (CVC) strategy that encourages the two sub-nets to learn distinct features from the same input by introducing a feature discrepancy loss, while these distinct features are expected to generate consistent prediction scores of the input. The CVC strategy helps to prevent the two sub-nets from stepping into the collapse. In addition, we further propose a conflict-based pseudo-labelling (CPL) method to guarantee the model will learn more useful information from conflicting predictions, which will lead to a stable training process. We validate our new CCVC approach on the SSS benchmark datasets where our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/xiaoyao3302/CCVC.
summary: Semi-supervised semantic segmentation (SSS) has recently gained increasing research interest as it can reduce the requirement for large-scale fully-annotated training data. The current methods often suffer from the confirmation bias from the pseudo-labelling process, which can be alleviated by the co-training framework. The current co-training-based SSS methods rely on hand-crafted perturbations to prevent the different sub-nets from collapsing into each other, but these artificial perturbations cannot lead to the optimal solution. In this work, we propose a new conflict-based cross-view consistency (CCVC) method based on a two-branch co-training framework which aims at enforcing the two sub-nets to learn informative features from irrelevant views. In particular, we first propose a new cross-view consistency (CVC) strategy that encourages the two sub-nets to learn distinct features from the same input by introducing a feature discrepancy loss, while these distinct features are expected to generate consistent prediction scores of the input. The CVC strategy helps to prevent the two sub-nets from stepping into the collapse. In addition, we further propose a conflict-based pseudo-labelling (CPL) method to guarantee the model will learn more useful information from conflicting predictions, which will lead to a stable training process. We validate our new CCVC approach on the SSS benchmark datasets where our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/xiaoyao3302/CCVC.
abstract_zh: 半监督语义分割（SSS）最近引起了越来越多的研究兴趣，因为它可以减少对大规模全注释训练数据的需求。当前的方法经常受到伪标记过程中的确认偏差的影响，这可以通过协同训练框架来缓解。当前基于协同训练的SSS方法依靠手工制作的扰动来防止不同子网相互崩溃，但这些人为扰动无法得出最佳解决方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于两分支协同训练框架的新的基于冲突的跨视图一致性（CCVC）方法，旨在强制两个子网从不相关的视图中学习信息特征。特别是，我们首先提出了一种新的跨视图一致性（CVC）策略，该策略鼓励两个子网通过引入特征差异损失从同一输入中学习不同的特征，而这些不同的特征预计会生成一致的输入预测分数。 CVC策略有助于防止两个子网陷入崩溃。此外，我们还提出了一种基于冲突的伪标签（CPL）方法，以保证模型从冲突的预测中学习更多有用的信息，从而实现稳定的训练过程。我们在 SSS 基准数据集上验证了我们的新 CCVC 方法，我们的方法实现了新的最先进的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/xiaoyao3302/CCV​​C 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于冲突的跨视图一致性方法（CCVC），用于半监督语义分割，以减少对大规模标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督语义分割方法因伪标签过程的确认偏差和人工扰动不足，导致子网络易崩溃，难以达到最优解。
AI.method: 设计两分支共训练框架，引入跨视图一致性策略（CVC）通过特征差异损失使子网络学习不同特征，同时保持预测一致性；并提出冲突伪标签（CPL）方法利用冲突预测提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在半监督语义分割基准数据集上达到新状态-of-the-art性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CCVC通过跨视图一致性与冲突伪标签有效缓解确认偏差，提升半监督语义分割的模型鲁棒性与性能。

authors_text: Miguel Monteiro,Fabio De Sousa Ribeiro,Nick Pawlowski,Daniel C. Castro,Ben Glocker
title: Measuring axiomatic soundness of counterfactual image models
title_zh: 测量反事实图像模型的公理可靠性
comment: Counterfactual inference, Generative Models, Computer Vision, Published in ICLR 2023
comments: Counterfactual inference, Generative Models, Computer Vision, Published in ICLR 2023
abstract: We present a general framework for evaluating image counterfactuals. The power and flexibility of deep generative models make them valuable tools for learning mechanisms in structural causal models. However, their flexibility makes counterfactual identifiability impossible in the general case. Motivated by these issues, we revisit Pearl's axiomatic definition of counterfactuals to determine the necessary constraints of any counterfactual inference model: composition, reversibility, and effectiveness. We frame counterfactuals as functions of an input variable, its parents, and counterfactual parents and use the axiomatic constraints to restrict the set of functions that could represent the counterfactual, thus deriving distance metrics between the approximate and ideal functions. We demonstrate how these metrics can be used to compare and choose between different approximate counterfactual inference models and to provide insight into a model's shortcomings and trade-offs.
summary: We present a general framework for evaluating image counterfactuals. The power and flexibility of deep generative models make them valuable tools for learning mechanisms in structural causal models. However, their flexibility makes counterfactual identifiability impossible in the general case. Motivated by these issues, we revisit Pearl's axiomatic definition of counterfactuals to determine the necessary constraints of any counterfactual inference model: composition, reversibility, and effectiveness. We frame counterfactuals as functions of an input variable, its parents, and counterfactual parents and use the axiomatic constraints to restrict the set of functions that could represent the counterfactual, thus deriving distance metrics between the approximate and ideal functions. We demonstrate how these metrics can be used to compare and choose between different approximate counterfactual inference models and to provide insight into a model's shortcomings and trade-offs.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了评估图像反事实的通用框架。深度生成模型的强大功能和灵活性使其成为结构因果模型中学习机制的宝贵工具。然而，它们的灵活性使得在一般情况下不可能进行反事实识别。受这些问题的推动，我们重新审视 Pearl 对反事实的公理化定义，以确定任何反事实推理模型的必要约束：组成、可逆性和有效性。我们将反事实构建为输入变量、其父项和反事实父项的函数，并使用公理约束来限制可以表示反事实的函数集，从而导出近似函数和理想函数之间的距离度量。我们演示了如何使用这些指标在不同的近似反事实推理模型之间进行比较和选择，并深入了解模型的缺点和权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个通用框架，用于评估图像反事实模型的公理正确性，通过定义约束条件和距离度量来分析模型性能。
AI.motivation: 深度生成模型的灵活性导致反事实可识别性在一般情况下不可行，需通过公理约束明确模型必要条件以进行有效评估。
AI.method: 基于Pearl的反事实公理（组合性、可逆性、有效性），将反事实表示为输入变量及其父节点的函数，并推导近似函数与理想函数间的距离度量。
AI.result: 提出可量化评估反事实模型的方法，用于比较不同模型并分析其局限性与权衡。
AI.conclusion: 为反事实图像模型提供了理论评估框架，有助于理解模型缺陷并指导改进方向。

authors_text: Pratinav Seth,Akshat Bhandari,Kumud Lakara
title: Analyzing Effects of Fake Training Data on the Performance of Deep Learning Systems
title_zh: 分析虚假训练数据对深度学习系统性能的影响
abstract: Deep learning models frequently suffer from various problems such as class imbalance and lack of robustness to distribution shift. It is often difficult to find data suitable for training beyond the available benchmarks. This is especially the case for computer vision models. However, with the advent of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), it is now possible to generate high-quality synthetic data. This synthetic data can be used to alleviate some of the challenges faced by deep learning models. In this work we present a detailed analysis of the effect of training computer vision models using different proportions of synthetic data along with real (organic) data. We analyze the effect that various quantities of synthetic data, when mixed with original data, can have on a model's robustness to out-of-distribution data and the general quality of predictions.
summary: Deep learning models frequently suffer from various problems such as class imbalance and lack of robustness to distribution shift. It is often difficult to find data suitable for training beyond the available benchmarks. This is especially the case for computer vision models. However, with the advent of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), it is now possible to generate high-quality synthetic data. This synthetic data can be used to alleviate some of the challenges faced by deep learning models. In this work we present a detailed analysis of the effect of training computer vision models using different proportions of synthetic data along with real (organic) data. We analyze the effect that various quantities of synthetic data, when mixed with original data, can have on a model's robustness to out-of-distribution data and the general quality of predictions.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型经常遇到各种问题，例如类别不平衡和对分布变化缺乏鲁棒性。通常很难找到超出可用基准的适合训练的数据。对于计算机视觉模型尤其如此。然而，随着生成对抗网络（GAN）的出现，现在可以生成高质量的合成数据。这些合成数据可用于缓解深度学习模型面临的一些挑战。在这项工作中，我们详细分析了使用不同比例的合成数据和真实（有机）数据训练计算机视觉模型的效果。我们分析了不同数量的合成数据与原始数据混合时对模型对分布外数据的鲁棒性和预测总体质量的影响。

AI.tldr: 分析虚假训练数据对深度学习系统性能的影响，特别是计算机视觉模型在混合真实数据与合成数据时的表现。
AI.motivation: 真实数据获取困难且分布偏移问题严重，而生成对抗网络（GAN）生成的合成数据可能提供补充，但其效果尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过混合不同比例的合成数据与真实数据训练计算机视觉模型，评估模型在分布外数据上的鲁棒性及预测质量。
AI.result: 合成数据比例影响模型性能，适量混合可提升鲁棒性，但过量合成数据可能导致预测质量下降。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据可作为真实数据的有效补充，但需平衡比例以避免性能劣化，未来需探索更优的数据混合策略。

search_text: Analyzing Effects of Fake Training Data on the Performance of Deep Learning Systems 分析虚假训练数据对深度学习系统性能的影响 Deep learning models frequently suffer from various problems such as class imbalance and lack of robustness to distribution shift. It is often difficult to find data suitable for training beyond the available benchmarks. This is especially the case for computer vision models. However, with the advent of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), it is now possible to generate high-quality synthetic data. This synthetic data can be used to alleviate some of the challenges faced by deep learning models. In this work we present a detailed analysis of the effect of training computer vision models using different proportions of synthetic data along with real (organic) data. We analyze the effect that various quantities of synthetic data, when mixed with original data, can have on a model's robustness to out-of-distribution data and the general quality of predictions. 深度学习模型经常遇到各种问题，例如类别不平衡和对分布变化缺乏鲁棒性。通常很难找到超出可用基准的适合训练的数据。对于计算机视觉模型尤其如此。然而，随着生成对抗网络（GAN）的出现，现在可以生成高质量的合成数据。这些合成数据可用于缓解深度学习模型面临的一些挑战。在这项工作中，我们详细分析了使用不同比例的合成数据和真实（有机）数据训练计算机视觉模型的效果。我们分析了不同数量的合成数据与原始数据混合时对模型对分布外数据的鲁棒性和预测总体质量的影响。 分析虚假训练数据对深度学习系统性能的影响，特别是计算机视觉模型在混合真实数据与合成数据时的表现。 Pratinav Seth,Akshat Bhandari,Kumud Lakara cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Lixiang Ru,Heliang Zheng,Yibing Zhan,Bo Du
title: Token Contrast for Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 弱监督语义分割的标记对比
abstract: Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) using image-level labels typically utilizes Class Activation Map (CAM) to generate the pseudo labels. Limited by the local structure perception of CNN, CAM usually cannot identify the integral object regions. Though the recent Vision Transformer (ViT) can remedy this flaw, we observe it also brings the over-smoothing issue, \ie, the final patch tokens incline to be uniform. In this work, we propose Token Contrast (ToCo) to address this issue and further explore the virtue of ViT for WSSS. Firstly, motivated by the observation that intermediate layers in ViT can still retain semantic diversity, we designed a Patch Token Contrast module (PTC). PTC supervises the final patch tokens with the pseudo token relations derived from intermediate layers, allowing them to align the semantic regions and thus yield more accurate CAM. Secondly, to further differentiate the low-confidence regions in CAM, we devised a Class Token Contrast module (CTC) inspired by the fact that class tokens in ViT can capture high-level semantics. CTC facilitates the representation consistency between uncertain local regions and global objects by contrasting their class tokens. Experiments on the PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets show the proposed ToCo can remarkably surpass other single-stage competitors and achieve comparable performance with state-of-the-art multi-stage methods. Code is available at https://github.com/rulixiang/ToCo.
summary: Weakly-Supervised Semantic Segmentation (WSSS) using image-level labels typically utilizes Class Activation Map (CAM) to generate the pseudo labels. Limited by the local structure perception of CNN, CAM usually cannot identify the integral object regions. Though the recent Vision Transformer (ViT) can remedy this flaw, we observe it also brings the over-smoothing issue, \ie, the final patch tokens incline to be uniform. In this work, we propose Token Contrast (ToCo) to address this issue and further explore the virtue of ViT for WSSS. Firstly, motivated by the observation that intermediate layers in ViT can still retain semantic diversity, we designed a Patch Token Contrast module (PTC). PTC supervises the final patch tokens with the pseudo token relations derived from intermediate layers, allowing them to align the semantic regions and thus yield more accurate CAM. Secondly, to further differentiate the low-confidence regions in CAM, we devised a Class Token Contrast module (CTC) inspired by the fact that class tokens in ViT can capture high-level semantics. CTC facilitates the representation consistency between uncertain local regions and global objects by contrasting their class tokens. Experiments on the PASCAL VOC and MS COCO datasets show the proposed ToCo can remarkably surpass other single-stage competitors and achieve comparable performance with state-of-the-art multi-stage methods. Code is available at https://github.com/rulixiang/ToCo.
abstract_zh: 使用图像级标签的弱监督语义分割（WSSS）通常利用类激活图（CAM）来生成伪标签。受CNN局部结构感知的限制，CAM通常无法识别完整的物体区域。虽然最近的 Vision Transformer (ViT) 可以弥补这个缺陷，但我们观察到它也带来了过度平滑的问题，即最终的补丁令牌倾向于统一。在这项工作中，我们提出令牌对比（ToCo）来解决这个问题，并进一步探索 ViT 对于 WSSS 的优点。首先，由于观察到 ViT 中的中间层仍然可以保留语义多样性，我们设计了一个 Patch Token Contrast 模块（PTC）。 PTC 使用从中间层派生的伪令牌关系来监督最终的补丁令牌，使它们能够对齐语义区域，从而产生更准确的 CAM。其次，为了进一步区分 CAM 中的低置信度区域，受 ViT 中的类标记可以捕获高级语义这一事实的启发，我们设计了类标记对比模块（CTC）。 CTC 通过对比类标记来促进不确定局部区域和全局对象之间的表示一致性。 PASCAL VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 ToCo 可以显着超越其他单阶段竞争对手，并与最先进的多阶段方法实现可比的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/rulixiang/ToCo 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉Transformer（ViT）的弱监督语义分割方法ToCo，通过改进类激活图（CAM）生成伪标签以解决现有方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN生成的CAM因局部结构感知能力不足而难以识别完整目标区域，而ViT虽能改善此问题却存在最终token过度平滑的问题，需设计新方法提升分割精度。
AI.method: 提出两个对比模块：1）Patch Token Contrast（PTC）利用中间层语义多样性约束最终token，对齐语义区域；2）Class Token Contrast（CTC）通过对比类token增强不确定区域与全局目标的表示一致性。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MS COCO数据集上，ToCo显著超越单阶段方法，性能接近最先进的多阶段方法。
AI.conclusion: ToCo有效缓解ViT的过度平滑问题，充分挖掘了ViT在弱监督语义分割中的潜力。

authors_text: Neil Shah,Saiteja Kosgi,Vishal Tambrahalli,Neha Sahipjohn,Niranjan Pedanekar,Vineet Gandhi
title: ParrotTTS: Text-to-Speech synthesis by exploiting self-supervised representations
title_zh: ParrotTTS：利用自我监督表示进行文本到语音合成
abstract: We present ParrotTTS, a modularized text-to-speech synthesis model leveraging disentangled self-supervised speech representations. It can train a multi-speaker variant effectively using transcripts from a single speaker. ParrotTTS adapts to a new language in low resource setup and generalizes to languages not seen while training the self-supervised backbone. Moreover, without training on bilingual or parallel examples, ParrotTTS can transfer voices across languages while preserving the speaker specific characteristics, e.g., synthesizing fluent Hindi speech using a French speaker's voice and accent. We present extensive results in monolingual and multi-lingual scenarios. ParrotTTS outperforms state-of-the-art multi-lingual TTS models using only a fraction of paired data as latter.
summary: We present ParrotTTS, a modularized text-to-speech synthesis model leveraging disentangled self-supervised speech representations. It can train a multi-speaker variant effectively using transcripts from a single speaker. ParrotTTS adapts to a new language in low resource setup and generalizes to languages not seen while training the self-supervised backbone. Moreover, without training on bilingual or parallel examples, ParrotTTS can transfer voices across languages while preserving the speaker specific characteristics, e.g., synthesizing fluent Hindi speech using a French speaker's voice and accent. We present extensive results in monolingual and multi-lingual scenarios. ParrotTTS outperforms state-of-the-art multi-lingual TTS models using only a fraction of paired data as latter.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 ParrotTTS，这是一种模块化的文本到语音合成模型，利用解开的自我监督语音表示。它可以使用单个说话人的转录内容有效地训练多说话人变体。 ParrotTTS 在低资源设置中适应新语言，并泛化到训练自监督骨干网时未见过的语言。此外，无需对双语或并行示例进行训练，ParrotTTS 就可以跨语言传输语音，同时保留说话者的特定特征，例如，使用法语说话者的声音和口音合成流利的印地语语音。我们在单语言和多语言场景中展示了广泛的结果。 ParrotTTS 的性能优于最先进的多语言 TTS 模型，后者仅使用一小部分配对数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ParrotTTS，一种利用解耦自监督语音表示的模块化文本到语音合成模型，能够使用单说话人转录本训练多说话人变体，并在低资源环境下适应新语言及跨语言语音转换。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS模型通常依赖大量平行数据且难以跨语言泛化，而ParrotTTS旨在通过自监督表示降低数据需求，实现多语言支持及跨语言语音迁移。
AI.method: 基于解耦自监督语音表示构建模块化框架，利用单说话人数据训练多说话人模型，并通过自监督主干网络的泛化能力实现低资源语言适应及无平行数据的跨语言语音合成。
AI.result: 在单语和多语场景下均优于现有最先进的多语TTS模型，仅需少量配对数据即可实现跨语言语音合成（如用法语语音合成印地语语音）。
AI.conclusion: ParrotTTS通过自监督表示有效解决了多语言TTS的数据瓶颈问题，为低资源语言和跨语言语音合成提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 基于解耦自监督语音表示构建模块化框架，利用单说话人数据训练多说话人模型，并通过自监督主干网络的泛化能力实现低资源语言适应及无平行数据的跨语言语音合成。
ai_content_json.result: 在单语和多语场景下均优于现有最先进的多语TTS模型，仅需少量配对数据即可实现跨语言语音合成（如用法语语音合成印地语语音）。
ai_content_json.conclusion: ParrotTTS通过自监督表示有效解决了多语言TTS的数据瓶颈问题，为低资源语言和跨语言语音合成提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: ParrotTTS: Text-to-Speech synthesis by exploiting self-supervised representations ParrotTTS：利用自我监督表示进行文本到语音合成 We present ParrotTTS, a modularized text-to-speech synthesis model leveraging disentangled self-supervised speech representations. It can train a multi-speaker variant effectively using transcripts from a single speaker. ParrotTTS adapts to a new language in low resource setup and generalizes to languages not seen while training the self-supervised backbone. Moreover, without training on bilingual or parallel examples, ParrotTTS can transfer voices across languages while preserving the speaker specific characteristics, e.g., synthesizing fluent Hindi speech using a French speaker's voice and accent. We present extensive results in monolingual and multi-lingual scenarios. ParrotTTS outperforms state-of-the-art multi-lingual TTS models using only a fraction of paired data as latter. 我们提出了 ParrotTTS，这是一种模块化的文本到语音合成模型，利用解开的自我监督语音表示。它可以使用单个说话人的转录内容有效地训练多说话人变体。 ParrotTTS 在低资源设置中适应新语言，并泛化到训练自监督骨干网时未见过的语言。此外，无需对双语或并行示例进行训练，ParrotTTS 就可以跨语言传输语音，同时保留说话者的特定特征，例如，使用法语说话者的声音和口音合成流利的印地语语音。我们在单语言和多语言场景中展示了广泛的结果。 ParrotTTS 的性能优于最先进的多语言 TTS 模型，后者仅使用一小部分配对数据。 本文提出ParrotTTS，一种利用解耦自监督语音表示的模块化文本到语音合成模型，能够使用单说话人转录本训练多说话人变体，并在低资源环境下适应新语言及跨语言语音转换。 Neil Shah,Saiteja Kosgi,Vishal Tambrahalli,Neha Sahipjohn,Niranjan Pedanekar,Vineet Gandhi cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Carlos Mendes,Tatiane Nogueira Rios
title: Explainable Artificial Intelligence and Cybersecurity: A Systematic Literature Review
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能和网络安全：系统文献综述
abstract: Cybersecurity vendors consistently apply AI (Artificial Intelligence) to their solutions and many cybersecurity domains can benefit from AI technology. However, black-box AI techniques present some difficulties in comprehension and adoption by its operators, given that their decisions are not always humanly understandable (as is usually the case with deep neural networks, for example). Since it aims to make the operation of AI algorithms more interpretable for its users and developers, XAI (eXplainable Artificial Intelligence) can be used to address this issue. Through a systematic literature review, this work seeks to investigate the current research scenario on XAI applied to cybersecurity, aiming to discover which XAI techniques have been applied in cybersecurity, and which areas of cybersecurity have already benefited from this technology.
summary: Cybersecurity vendors consistently apply AI (Artificial Intelligence) to their solutions and many cybersecurity domains can benefit from AI technology. However, black-box AI techniques present some difficulties in comprehension and adoption by its operators, given that their decisions are not always humanly understandable (as is usually the case with deep neural networks, for example). Since it aims to make the operation of AI algorithms more interpretable for its users and developers, XAI (eXplainable Artificial Intelligence) can be used to address this issue. Through a systematic literature review, this work seeks to investigate the current research scenario on XAI applied to cybersecurity, aiming to discover which XAI techniques have been applied in cybersecurity, and which areas of cybersecurity have already benefited from this technology.
abstract_zh: 网络安全供应商始终将人工智能（AI）应用到他们的解决方案中，许多网络安全领域都可以从人工智能技术中受益。然而，黑盒人工智能技术在操作员的理解和采用方面存在一些困难，因为它们的决策并不总是人类可以理解的（例如，深度神经网络通常就是这种情况）。由于它的目标是让人工智能算法的操作对其用户和开发人员来说更容易解释，因此 XAI（可解释人工智能）可以用来解决这个问题。通过系统的文献回顾，本文旨在调查当前XAI应用于网络安全的研究场景，旨在发现哪些XAI技术已应用于网络安全，以及网络安全的哪些领域已经受益于该技术。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统文献综述分析可解释人工智能（XAI）在网络安全领域的应用现状
AI.motivation: 传统AI在网络安全中存在可解释性不足的问题，影响其应用，因此需要XAI来提升透明度和可信度
AI.method: 采用系统文献综述方法，分析现有XAI在网络安全领域的研究应用
AI.result: 发现多种XAI技术被应用于网络安全，如入侵检测、威胁检测等，提升了系统的可解释性和决策透明度
AI.conclusion: XAI能有效提升网络安全系统的可解释性，但需进一步探索其在不同场景下的应用和挑战

authors_text: Zachary Huemann,Changhee Lee,Junjie Hu,Steve Y. Cho,Tyler Bradshaw
title: Domain-adapted large language models for classifying nuclear medicine reports
title_zh: 用于核医学报告分类的领域适应大语言模型
abstract: With the growing use of transformer-based language models in medicine, it is unclear how well these models generalize to nuclear medicine which has domain-specific vocabulary and unique reporting styles. In this study, we evaluated the value of domain adaptation in nuclear medicine by adapting language models for the purpose of 5-point Deauville score prediction based on clinical 18F-fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) PET/CT reports. We retrospectively retrieved 4542 text reports and 1664 images for FDG PET/CT lymphoma exams from 2008-2018 in our clinical imaging database. Deauville scores were removed from the reports and then the remaining text in the reports was used as the model input. Multiple general-purpose transformer language models were used to classify the reports into Deauville scores 1-5. We then adapted the models to the nuclear medicine domain using masked language modeling and assessed its impact on classification performance. The language models were compared against vision models, a multimodal vision language model, and a nuclear medicine physician with seven-fold Monte Carlo cross validation, reported are the mean and standard deviations. Domain adaption improved all language models. For example, BERT improved from 61.3% five-class accuracy to 65.7% following domain adaptation. The best performing model (domain-adapted RoBERTa) achieved a five-class accuracy of 77.4%, which was better than the physician's performance (66%), the best vision model's performance (48.1), and was similar to the multimodal model's performance (77.2). Domain adaptation improved the performance of large language models in interpreting nuclear medicine text reports.
summary: With the growing use of transformer-based language models in medicine, it is unclear how well these models generalize to nuclear medicine which has domain-specific vocabulary and unique reporting styles. In this study, we evaluated the value of domain adaptation in nuclear medicine by adapting language models for the purpose of 5-point Deauville score prediction based on clinical 18F-fluorodeoxyglucose (FDG) PET/CT reports. We retrospectively retrieved 4542 text reports and 1664 images for FDG PET/CT lymphoma exams from 2008-2018 in our clinical imaging database. Deauville scores were removed from the reports and then the remaining text in the reports was used as the model input. Multiple general-purpose transformer language models were used to classify the reports into Deauville scores 1-5. We then adapted the models to the nuclear medicine domain using masked language modeling and assessed its impact on classification performance. The language models were compared against vision models, a multimodal vision language model, and a nuclear medicine physician with seven-fold Monte Carlo cross validation, reported are the mean and standard deviations. Domain adaption improved all language models. For example, BERT improved from 61.3% five-class accuracy to 65.7% following domain adaptation. The best performing model (domain-adapted RoBERTa) achieved a five-class accuracy of 77.4%, which was better than the physician's performance (66%), the best vision model's performance (48.1), and was similar to the multimodal model's performance (77.2). Domain adaptation improved the performance of large language models in interpreting nuclear medicine text reports.
abstract_zh: 随着基于变压器的语言模型在医学中的使用越来越多，目前尚不清楚这些模型如何推广到具有特定领域词汇和独特报告风格的核医学。在本研究中，我们通过调整语言模型来评估核医学领域适应的价值，以便根据临床 18F-氟脱氧葡萄糖 (FDG) PET/CT 报告进行 5 分 Deauville 评分预测。我们在临床影像数据库中回顾性检索了 2008 年至 2018 年 FDG PET/CT 淋巴瘤检查的 4542 篇文本报告和 1664 幅图像。从报告中删除 Deauville 分数，然后将报告中的剩余文本用作模型输入。使用多种通用 Transformer 语言模型将报告分类为 Deauville 分数 1-5。然后，我们使用掩蔽语言模型将模型调整到核医学领域，并评估其对分类性能的影响。将语言模型与视觉模型、多模态视觉语言模型以及核医学医师进行七倍蒙特卡罗交叉验证进行比较，报告的是平均值和标准差。领域适应改进了所有语言模型。例如，BERT 在域适应后从 61.3% 的五级准确率提高到 65.7%。表现最好的模型（领域适应的 RoBERTa）达到了 77.4% 的五级准确率，优于医生的表现（66%）、最佳视觉模型的表现（48.1），并且与多模态模型的表现（77.2）相似。领域适应提高了大型语言模型在解释核医学文本报告方面的性能。

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了领域适应技术在核医学报告分类中的应用，旨在通过调整大型语言模型来预测FDG PET/CT淋巴瘤检查的5分Deauville评分。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的语言模型在医学领域广泛应用，但其在核医学领域（具有专业术语和独特报告风格）的泛化能力尚不明确，需验证领域适应的有效性。
AI.method: 从临床数据库获取4542份文本报告和1664张影像，移除Deauville评分后使用多类通用语言模型（如BERT）进行分类，并通过掩码语言建模进行领域适应。与视觉模型、多模态模型及核医学医师性能对比，采用七折交叉验证评估效果。
AI.result: 领域适应使所有语言模型性能提升，如BERT五分类准确率从61.3%提升至65.7%。领域适应的RoBERTa模型达到77.4%，优于医师（66%）和最佳视觉模型（48.1%），与多模态模型（77.2%）表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 领域适应显著提升了大型语言模型在核医学文本报告解释中的性能，表明该技术对专业医学文本分类具有重要价值。

Domain adaption improved all language models. For example, BERT improved from 61.3% five-class accuracy to 65.7% following domain adaptation. Domain adaptation improved the performance of large language models in interpreting nuclear medicine text reports. 随着基于变压器的语言模型在医学中的使用越来越多，目前尚不清楚这些模型如何推广到具有特定领域词汇和独特报告风格的核医学。在本研究中，我们通过调整语言模型来评估核医学领域适应的价值，以便根据临床 18F-氟脱氧葡萄糖 (FDG) PET/CT 报告进行 5 分 Deauville 评分预测。我们在临床影像数据库中回顾性检索了 2008 年至 2018 年 FDG PET/CT 淋巴瘤检查的 4542 篇文本报告和 1664 幅图像。从报告中删除 Deauville 分数，然后将报告中的剩余文本用作模型输入。使用多种通用 Transformer 语言模型将报告分类为 Deauville 分数 1-5。然后，我们使用掩蔽语言模型将模型调整到核医学领域，并评估其对分类性能的影响。将语言模型与视觉模型、多模态视觉语言模型以及核医学医师进行七倍蒙特卡罗交叉验证进行比较，报告的是平均值和标准差。领域适应改进了所有语言模型。例如，BERT 在域适应后从 61.3% 的五级准确率提高到 65.7%。表现最好的模型（领域适应的 RoBERTa）达到了 77.4% 的五级准确率，优于医生的表现（66%）、最佳视觉模型的表现（48.1），并且与多模态模型的表现（77.2）相似。领域适应提高了大型语言模型在解释核医学文本报告方面的性能。 本研究评估了领域适应技术在核医学报告分类中的应用，旨在通过调整大型语言模型来预测FDG PET/CT淋巴瘤检查的5分Deauville评分。 Zachary Huemann,Changhee Lee,Junjie Hu,Steve Y. Cho,Tyler Bradshaw cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xin Gu,Gautam Kamath,Zhiwei Steven Wu
title: Choosing Public Datasets for Private Machine Learning via Gradient Subspace Distance
title_zh: 通过梯度子空间距离选择用于私有机器学习的公共数据集
abstract: Differentially private stochastic gradient descent privatizes model training by injecting noise into each iteration, where the noise magnitude increases with the number of model parameters. Recent works suggest that we can reduce the noise by leveraging public data for private machine learning, by projecting gradients onto a subspace prescribed by the public data. However, given a choice of public datasets, it is not a priori clear which one may be most appropriate for the private task. We give an algorithm for selecting a public dataset by measuring a low-dimensional subspace distance between gradients of the public and private examples. We provide theoretical analysis demonstrating that the excess risk scales with this subspace distance. This distance is easy to compute and robust to modifications in the setting. Empirical evaluation shows that trained model accuracy is monotone in this distance.
summary: Differentially private stochastic gradient descent privatizes model training by injecting noise into each iteration, where the noise magnitude increases with the number of model parameters. Recent works suggest that we can reduce the noise by leveraging public data for private machine learning, by projecting gradients onto a subspace prescribed by the public data. However, given a choice of public datasets, it is not a priori clear which one may be most appropriate for the private task. We give an algorithm for selecting a public dataset by measuring a low-dimensional subspace distance between gradients of the public and private examples. We provide theoretical analysis demonstrating that the excess risk scales with this subspace distance. This distance is easy to compute and robust to modifications in the setting. Empirical evaluation shows that trained model accuracy is monotone in this distance.
abstract_zh: 差分私有随机梯度下降通过在每次迭代中注入噪声来私有化模型训练，其中噪声幅度随着模型参数数量的增加而增加。最近的工作表明，我们可以通过利用公共数据进行私人机器学习，将梯度投影到公共数据规定的子空间上来减少噪音。然而，考虑到公共数据集的选择，并不能先验地明确哪一个数据集最适合私人任务。我们给出了一种通过测量公共和私人示例梯度之间的低维子空间距离来选择公共数据集的算法。我们提供的理论分析表明，超额风险随该子空间距离而变化。这个距离很容易计算，并且对设置的修改具有鲁棒性。经验评估表明，训练后的模型精度在此距离内是单调的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过梯度子空间距离选择公共数据集的方法，以优化差分隐私下的机器学习模型训练。
AI.motivation: 在差分隐私训练中，使用公共数据可减少噪声但缺乏有效选择公共数据集的准则，需解决如何选择最适配数据集以提升模型性能的问题。
AI.method: 设计算法计算公共数据与私有数据梯度的低维子空间距离，基于该距离选择公共数据集，理论分析证明额外风险与距离相关。
AI.result: 实验表明模型准确率随子空间距离单调变化，验证了方法的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过量化子空间距离为公共数据集选择提供理论依据，有效减少隐私噪声并提升模型准确性。

authors_text: Gonzalo Martínez,Lauren Watson,Pedro Reviriego,José Alberto Hernández,Marc Juarez,Rik Sarkar
title: Combining Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) and the Internet: Heading towards Evolution or Degradation?
title_zh: 生成式人工智能 (AI) 与互联网的结合：走向进化还是退化？
abstract: In the span of a few months, generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools that can generate realistic images or text have taken the Internet by storm, making them one of the technologies with fastest adoption ever. Some of these generative AI tools such as DALL-E, MidJourney, or ChatGPT have gained wide public notoriety. Interestingly, these tools are possible because of the massive amount of data (text and images) available on the Internet. The tools are trained on massive data sets that are scraped from Internet sites. And now, these generative AI tools are creating massive amounts of new data that are being fed into the Internet. Therefore, future versions of generative AI tools will be trained with Internet data that is a mix of original and AI-generated data. As time goes on, a mixture of original data and data generated by different versions of AI tools will populate the Internet. This raises a few intriguing questions: how will future versions of generative AI tools behave when trained on a mixture of real and AI generated data? Will they evolve with the new data sets or degenerate? Will evolution introduce biases in subsequent generations of generative AI tools? In this document, we explore these questions and report some very initial simulation results using a simple image-generation AI tool. These results suggest that the quality of the generated images degrades as more AI-generated data is used for training thus suggesting that generative AI may degenerate. Although these results are preliminary and cannot be generalised without further study, they serve to illustrate the potential issues of the interaction between generative AI and the Internet.
summary: In the span of a few months, generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools that can generate realistic images or text have taken the Internet by storm, making them one of the technologies with fastest adoption ever. Some of these generative AI tools such as DALL-E, MidJourney, or ChatGPT have gained wide public notoriety. Interestingly, these tools are possible because of the massive amount of data (text and images) available on the Internet. The tools are trained on massive data sets that are scraped from Internet sites. And now, these generative AI tools are creating massive amounts of new data that are being fed into the Internet. Therefore, future versions of generative AI tools will be trained with Internet data that is a mix of original and AI-generated data. As time goes on, a mixture of original data and data generated by different versions of AI tools will populate the Internet. This raises a few intriguing questions: how will future versions of generative AI tools behave when trained on a mixture of real and AI generated data? Will they evolve with the new data sets or degenerate? Will evolution introduce biases in subsequent generations of generative AI tools? In this document, we explore these questions and report some very initial simulation results using a simple image-generation AI tool. These results suggest that the quality of the generated images degrades as more AI-generated data is used for training thus suggesting that generative AI may degenerate. Although these results are preliminary and cannot be generalised without further study, they serve to illustrate the potential issues of the interaction between generative AI and the Internet.
abstract_zh: 在几个月的时间里，能够生成逼真图像或文本的生成人工智能 (AI) 工具席卷了互联网，使其成为有史以来采用速度最快的技术之一。其中一些生成式人工智能工具（例如 DALL-E、MidJourney 或 ChatGPT）已经获得了广泛的公众声誉。有趣的是，这些工具之所以成为可能，是因为互联网上有大量数据（文本和图像）。这些工具是根据从互联网站点抓取的大量数据集进行训练的。现在，这些生成式人工智能工具正在创建大量新数据，并将其输入互联网。因此，未来版本的生成式人工智能工具将使用原始数据和人工智能生成数据混合的互联网数据进行训练。随着时间的推移，原始数据和不同版本的人工智能工具生成的数据的混合体将充斥互联网。这就提出了一些有趣的问题：未来版本的生成式人工智能工具在接受真实数据和人工智能生成数据的混合训练时将如何表现？它们会随着新的数据集而进化还是退化？进化是否会在后续几代生成式人工智能工具中引入偏差？在本文档中，我们探讨了这些问题，并使用简单的图像生成人工智能工具报告了一些非常初步的模拟结果。这些结果表明，随着更多人工智能生成的数据用于训练，生成图像的质量会下降，从而表明生成式人工智能可能会退化。尽管这些结果是初步的，未经进一步研究就无法推广，但它们说明了生成式人工智能与互联网之间交互的潜在问题。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨生成式人工智能（AI）与互联网数据交互的潜在影响，分析其未来可能朝向进化或退化方向发展。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI工具（如DALL-E、ChatGPT）依赖互联网数据训练，而其生成的内容又反向流入互联网，形成混合数据集。这种循环可能影响AI工具的未来发展轨迹，需评估其进化潜力或退化风险。
AI.method: 通过简单图像生成AI工具的初步模拟实验，训练数据中逐步增加AI生成内容的比例，观察模型表现变化。
AI.result: 实验显示，随着AI生成数据占比提升，生成图像质量呈现下降趋势，暗示生成式AI可能存在退化风险。
AI.conclusion: 初步结果提示生成式AI在混合数据训练下可能退化，但需更多研究验证结论的普适性，强调需关注AI与互联网数据交互的长期影响。

authors_text: Jordan Frery,Andrei Stoian,Roman Bredehoft,Luis Montero,Celia Kherfallah,Benoit Chevallier-Mames,Arthur Meyre
title: Privacy-Preserving Tree-Based Inference with TFHE
title_zh: 使用 TFHE 保护隐私的基于树的推理
abstract: Privacy enhancing technologies (PETs) have been proposed as a way to protect the privacy of data while still allowing for data analysis. In this work, we focus on Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE), a powerful tool that allows for arbitrary computations to be performed on encrypted data. FHE has received lots of attention in the past few years and has reached realistic execution times and correctness. More precisely, we explain in this paper how we apply FHE to tree-based models and get state-of-the-art solutions over encrypted tabular data. We show that our method is applicable to a wide range of tree-based models, including decision trees, random forests, and gradient boosted trees, and has been implemented within the Concrete-ML library, which is open-source at https://github.com/zama-ai/concrete-ml. With a selected set of use-cases, we demonstrate that our FHE version is very close to the unprotected version in terms of accuracy.
summary: Privacy enhancing technologies (PETs) have been proposed as a way to protect the privacy of data while still allowing for data analysis. In this work, we focus on Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE), a powerful tool that allows for arbitrary computations to be performed on encrypted data. FHE has received lots of attention in the past few years and has reached realistic execution times and correctness. More precisely, we explain in this paper how we apply FHE to tree-based models and get state-of-the-art solutions over encrypted tabular data. We show that our method is applicable to a wide range of tree-based models, including decision trees, random forests, and gradient boosted trees, and has been implemented within the Concrete-ML library, which is open-source at https://github.com/zama-ai/concrete-ml. With a selected set of use-cases, we demonstrate that our FHE version is very close to the unprotected version in terms of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 隐私增强技术（PET）已被提议作为保护数据隐私同时仍允许进行数据分析的一种方法。在这项工作中，我们重点关注完全同态加密（FHE），这是一个强大的工具，允许对加密数据执行任意计算。 FHE 在过去几年中受到了很多关注，并且已经达到了现实的执行时间和正确性。更准确地说，我们在本文中解释了如何将 FHE 应用于基于树的模型，并通过加密的表格数据获得最先进的解决方案。我们表明，我们的方法适用于各种基于树的模型，包括决策树、随机森林和梯度提升树，并且已在 Concrete-ML 库中实现，该库是开源的 https://github.com/zama-ai/concrete-ml。通过一组选定的用例，我们证明我们的 FHE 版本在准确性方面非常接近未受保护的版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全同态加密（FHE）的隐私保护树模型推理方法，适用于决策树、随机森林和梯度提升树等模型。
AI.motivation: 传统数据分析存在隐私泄露风险，而全同态加密（FHE）可在加密数据上执行计算，从而在保护隐私的同时实现数据利用。
AI.method: 采用TFHE方案将树模型转换为FHE兼容形式，并在开源库Concrete-ML中实现，通过加密数据进行模型推理。
AI.result: 在多个用例中验证，加密推理的准确率与未加密版本接近，证明方法的有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为隐私保护下的树模型推理提供了高效解决方案，具有在敏感数据场景中应用的潜力。

authors_text: Jesus Marco de Lucas
title: Implementing engrams from a machine learning perspective: matching for prediction
title_zh: 从机器学习的角度实现印迹：预测匹配
abstract: Despite evidence for the existence of engrams as memory support structures in our brains, there is no consensus framework in neuroscience as to what their physical implementation might be. Here we propose how we might design a computer system to implement engrams using neural networks, with the main aim of exploring new ideas using machine learning techniques, guided by challenges in neuroscience. Building on autoencoders, we propose latent neural spaces as indexes for storing and retrieving information in a compressed format. We consider this technique as a first step towards predictive learning: autoencoders are designed to compare reconstructed information with the original information received, providing a kind of predictive ability, which is an attractive evolutionary argument. We then consider how different states in latent neural spaces corresponding to different types of sensory input could be linked by synchronous activation, providing the basis for a sparse implementation of memory using concept neurons. Finally, we list some of the challenges and questions that link neuroscience and data science and that could have implications for both fields, and conclude that a more interdisciplinary approach is needed, as many scientists have already suggested.
summary: Despite evidence for the existence of engrams as memory support structures in our brains, there is no consensus framework in neuroscience as to what their physical implementation might be. Here we propose how we might design a computer system to implement engrams using neural networks, with the main aim of exploring new ideas using machine learning techniques, guided by challenges in neuroscience. Building on autoencoders, we propose latent neural spaces as indexes for storing and retrieving information in a compressed format. We consider this technique as a first step towards predictive learning: autoencoders are designed to compare reconstructed information with the original information received, providing a kind of predictive ability, which is an attractive evolutionary argument. We then consider how different states in latent neural spaces corresponding to different types of sensory input could be linked by synchronous activation, providing the basis for a sparse implementation of memory using concept neurons. Finally, we list some of the challenges and questions that link neuroscience and data science and that could have implications for both fields, and conclude that a more interdisciplinary approach is needed, as many scientists have already suggested.
abstract_zh: 尽管有证据表明印迹作为我们大脑中的记忆支持结构的存在，但神经科学中对于它们的物理实现方式还没有达成共识。在这里，我们提出如何设计一个计算机系统来使用神经网络实现印迹，主要目的是在神经科学挑战的指导下，使用机器学习技术探索新想法。在自动编码器的基础上，我们提出潜在神经空间作为以压缩格式存储和检索信息的索引。我们认为这种技术是迈向预测学习的第一步：自动编码器旨在将重建的信息与接收到的原始信息进行比较，提供一种预测能力，这是一个有吸引力的进化论点。然后，我们考虑如何通过同步激活来链接与不同类型的感觉输入相对应的潜在神经空间中的不同状态，为使用概念神经元的稀疏记忆实现提供基础。最后，我们列出了一些连接神经科学和数据科学的挑战和问题，这些挑战和问题可能对这两个领域产生影响，并得出结论，正如许多科学家已经建议的那样，需要采取更加跨学科的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文从机器学习角度提出利用神经网络设计计算机系统实现记忆痕迹（engrams），探索神经科学与数据科学的交叉问题。
AI.motivation: 神经科学界对记忆痕迹的物理实现机制缺乏共识，需借助机器学习方法探索新型计算模型以解决相关挑战。
AI.method: 基于自编码器构建潜在神经空间作为信息压缩存储索引，通过同步激活机制连接不同感觉输入状态，形成稀疏记忆模型。
AI.result: 提出潜在神经空间存储机制及同步激活连接方法，为预测学习提供理论基础，并列举了跨学科研究的关键问题。
AI.conclusion: 需加强神经科学与数据科学的跨学科协作，以推动记忆机制研究和机器学习技术的共同进步。

authors_text: Zhijie Shen,Wu Guo,Bin Gu
title: Language-Universal Adapter Learning with Knowledge Distillation for End-to-End Multilingual Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于端到端多语言语音识别的语言通用适配器学习和知识蒸馏
abstract: In this paper, we propose a language-universal adapter learning framework based on a pre-trained model for end-to-end multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR). For acoustic modeling, the wav2vec 2.0 pre-trained model is fine-tuned by inserting language-specific and language-universal adapters. An online knowledge distillation is then used to enable the language-universal adapters to learn both language-specific and universal features. The linguistic information confusion is also reduced by leveraging language identifiers (LIDs). With LIDs we perform a position-wise modification on the multi-head attention outputs. In the inference procedure, the language-specific adapters are removed while the language-universal adapters are kept activated. The proposed method improves the recognition accuracy and addresses the linear increase of the number of adapters' parameters with the number of languages in common multilingual ASR systems. Experiments on the BABEL dataset confirm the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Compared to the conventional multilingual model, a 3.3% absolute error rate reduction is achieved. The code is available at: https://github.com/shen9712/UniversalAdapterLearning.
summary: In this paper, we propose a language-universal adapter learning framework based on a pre-trained model for end-to-end multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR). For acoustic modeling, the wav2vec 2.0 pre-trained model is fine-tuned by inserting language-specific and language-universal adapters. An online knowledge distillation is then used to enable the language-universal adapters to learn both language-specific and universal features. The linguistic information confusion is also reduced by leveraging language identifiers (LIDs). With LIDs we perform a position-wise modification on the multi-head attention outputs. In the inference procedure, the language-specific adapters are removed while the language-universal adapters are kept activated. The proposed method improves the recognition accuracy and addresses the linear increase of the number of adapters' parameters with the number of languages in common multilingual ASR systems. Experiments on the BABEL dataset confirm the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Compared to the conventional multilingual model, a 3.3% absolute error rate reduction is achieved. The code is available at: https://github.com/shen9712/UniversalAdapterLearning.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于端到端多语言自动语音识别（ASR）预训练模型的语言通用适配器学习框架。对于声学建模，wav2vec 2.0 预训练模型通过插入特定语言和语言通用适配器进行微调。然后使用在线知识蒸馏来使语言通用适配器能够学习特定于语言和通用的功能。利用语言标识符 (LID) 也可以减少语言信息的混乱。使用 LID，我们对多头注意力输出进行位置修改。在推理过程中，特定于语言的适配器被删除，而通用语言的适配器保持激活状态。该方法提高了识别精度，并解决了常见多语言ASR系统中适配器参数数量随语言数量线性增加的问题。 BABEL 数据集上的实验证实了所提出框架的有效性。与传统的多语言模型相比，绝对错误率降低了3.3%。代码位于：https://github.com/shen9712/UniversalAdapterLearning。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练模型的多语言端到端语音识别语言通用适配器学习框架。
AI.motivation: 解决传统多语言ASR系统中语言适配器参数随语言数量线性增长的问题，同时提升识别准确率。
AI.method: 基于wav2vec 2.0预训练模型插入语言特定和通用适配器，通过在线知识蒸馏学习语言特异性与通用特征，并利用语言标识符（LIDs）优化多头注意力机制。
AI.result: 在BABEL数据集上实现3.3%的绝对错误率下降，验证了框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过适配器参数共享和知识蒸馏有效平衡了多语言模型的参数规模与识别性能。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练模型的多语言端到端语音识别语言通用适配器学习框架。
motivation: 解决传统多语言ASR系统中语言适配器参数随语言数量线性增长的问题，同时提升识别准确率。
method: 基于wav2vec 2.0预训练模型插入语言特定和通用适配器，通过在线知识蒸馏学习语言特异性与通用特征，并利用语言标识符（LIDs）优化多头注意力机制。
result: 在BABEL数据集上实现3.3%的绝对错误率下降，验证了框架有效性。
conclusion: 该方法通过适配器参数共享和知识蒸馏有效平衡了多语言模型的参数规模与识别性能。
search_text: Language-Universal Adapter Learning with Knowledge Distillation for End-to-End Multilingual Speech Recognition 用于端到端多语言语音识别的语言通用适配器学习和知识蒸馏 In this paper, we propose a language-universal adapter learning framework based on a pre-trained model for end-to-end multilingual automatic speech recognition (ASR). For acoustic modeling, the wav2vec 2.0 pre-trained model is fine-tuned by inserting language-specific and language-universal adapters. An online knowledge distillation is then used to enable the language-universal adapters to learn both language-specific and universal features. The linguistic information confusion is also reduced by leveraging language identifiers (LIDs). With LIDs we perform a position-wise modification on the multi-head attention outputs. In the inference procedure, the language-specific adapters are removed while the language-universal adapters are kept activated. The proposed method improves the recognition accuracy and addresses the linear increase of the number of adapters' parameters with the number of languages in common multilingual ASR systems. Experiments on the BABEL dataset confirm the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Compared to the conventional multilingual model, a 3.3% absolute error rate reduction is achieved. The code is available at: https://github.com/shen9712/UniversalAdapterLearning. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于端到端多语言自动语音识别（ASR）预训练模型的语言通用适配器学习框架。对于声学建模，wav2vec 2.0 预训练模型通过插入特定语言和语言通用适配器进行微调。然后使用在线知识蒸馏来使语言通用适配器能够学习特定于语言和通用的功能。利用语言标识符 (LID) 也可以减少语言信息的混乱。使用 LID，我们对多头注意力输出进行位置修改。在推理过程中，特定于语言的适配器被删除，而通用语言的适配器保持激活状态。该方法提高了识别精度，并解决了常见多语言ASR系统中适配器参数数量随语言数量线性增加的问题。 BABEL 数据集上的实验证实了所提出框架的有效性。与传统的多语言模型相比，绝对错误率降低了3.3%。代码位于：https://github.com/shen9712/UniversalAdapterLearning。 本文提出一种基于预训练模型的多语言端到端语音识别语言通用适配器学习框架。 Zhijie Shen,Wu Guo,Bin Gu cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Haocong Rao,Cyril Leung,Chunyan Miao
title: Can ChatGPT Assess Human Personalities? A General Evaluation Framework
title_zh: ChatGPT 可以评估人的性格吗？总体评估框架
comment: Accepted to EMNLP 2023. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/ChatGPT-MBTI
comments: Accepted to EMNLP 2023. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/ChatGPT-MBTI
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) especially ChatGPT have produced impressive results in various areas, but their potential human-like psychology is still largely unexplored. Existing works study the virtual personalities of LLMs but rarely explore the possibility of analyzing human personalities via LLMs. This paper presents a generic evaluation framework for LLMs to assess human personalities based on Myers Briggs Type Indicator (MBTI) tests. Specifically, we first devise unbiased prompts by randomly permuting options in MBTI questions and adopt the average testing result to encourage more impartial answer generation. Then, we propose to replace the subject in question statements to enable flexible queries and assessments on different subjects from LLMs. Finally, we re-formulate the question instructions in a manner of correctness evaluation to facilitate LLMs to generate clearer responses. The proposed framework enables LLMs to flexibly assess personalities of different groups of people. We further propose three evaluation metrics to measure the consistency, robustness, and fairness of assessment results from state-of-the-art LLMs including ChatGPT and GPT-4. Our experiments reveal ChatGPT's ability to assess human personalities, and the average results demonstrate that it can achieve more consistent and fairer assessments in spite of lower robustness against prompt biases compared with InstructGPT.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) especially ChatGPT have produced impressive results in various areas, but their potential human-like psychology is still largely unexplored. Existing works study the virtual personalities of LLMs but rarely explore the possibility of analyzing human personalities via LLMs. This paper presents a generic evaluation framework for LLMs to assess human personalities based on Myers Briggs Type Indicator (MBTI) tests. Specifically, we first devise unbiased prompts by randomly permuting options in MBTI questions and adopt the average testing result to encourage more impartial answer generation. Then, we propose to replace the subject in question statements to enable flexible queries and assessments on different subjects from LLMs. Finally, we re-formulate the question instructions in a manner of correctness evaluation to facilitate LLMs to generate clearer responses. The proposed framework enables LLMs to flexibly assess personalities of different groups of people. We further propose three evaluation metrics to measure the consistency, robustness, and fairness of assessment results from state-of-the-art LLMs including ChatGPT and GPT-4. Our experiments reveal ChatGPT's ability to assess human personalities, and the average results demonstrate that it can achieve more consistent and fairer assessments in spite of lower robustness against prompt biases compared with InstructGPT.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）尤其是 ChatGPT 在各个领域都取得了令人印象深刻的成果，但其潜在的类人心理仍然很大程度上未被开发。现有的工作研究法学硕士的虚拟人格，但很少探讨通过法学硕士分析人类人格的可能性。本文提出了一个供法学硕士基于迈尔斯·布里格斯类型指标（MBTI）测试评估人类性格的通用评估框架。具体来说，我们首先通过随机排列 MBTI 问题中的选项来设计无偏见的提示，并采用平均测试结果来鼓励更公正的答案生成。然后，我们建议替换问题陈述中的主题，以便能够对法学硕士的不同主题进行灵活的查询和评估。最后，我们以正确性评估的方式重新制定问题说明，以方便法学硕士做出更清晰的回答。拟议的框架使法学硕士能够灵活评估不同人群的性格。我们进一步提出了三个评估指标来衡量最先进的法学硕士（包括 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4）评估结果的一致性、稳健性和公平性。我们的实验揭示了 ChatGPT 评估人类性格的能力，平均结果表明，尽管与 InstructGPT 相比，它对即时偏差的鲁棒性较低，但可以实现更一致、更公平的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于MBTI测试的通用评估框架，使大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）能够评估人类性格。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究关注语言模型的虚拟人格，但很少探索利用语言模型分析人类性格的潜力，因此需要开发相关评估框架。
AI.method: 通过随机排列MBTI问题选项生成无偏见提示，替换问题主体以支持灵活评估，并重构指令以提升回答清晰度。提出一致性、鲁棒性和公平性三个评估指标进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明ChatGPT能有效评估人类性格，平均结果在一致性和公平性上优于InstructGPT，但对提示偏见的鲁棒性较低。
AI.conclusion: 该框架验证了ChatGPT评估人类性格的能力，为未来人格分析提供了可行方法，同时揭示了模型在提示敏感性方面的改进空间。
