search_text: Can ChatGPT Assess Human Personalities? A General Evaluation Framework ChatGPT 可以评估人的性格吗？总体评估框架 Large Language Models (LLMs) especially ChatGPT have produced impressive results in various areas, but their potential human-like psychology is still largely unexplored. Existing works study the virtual personalities of LLMs but rarely explore the possibility of analyzing human personalities via LLMs. This paper presents a generic evaluation framework for LLMs to assess human personalities based on Myers Briggs Type Indicator (MBTI) tests. Specifically, we first devise unbiased prompts by randomly permuting options in MBTI questions and adopt the average testing result to encourage more impartial answer generation. Then, we propose to replace the subject in question statements to enable flexible queries and assessments on different subjects from LLMs. Finally, we re-formulate the question instructions in a manner of correctness evaluation to facilitate LLMs to generate clearer responses. The proposed framework enables LLMs to flexibly assess personalities of different groups of people. We further propose three evaluation metrics to measure the consistency, robustness, and fairness of assessment results from state-of-the-art LLMs including ChatGPT and GPT-4. Our experiments reveal ChatGPT's ability to assess human personalities, and the average results demonstrate that it can achieve more consistent and fairer assessments in spite of lower robustness against prompt biases compared with InstructGPT. 大型语言模型（LLM）尤其是 ChatGPT 在各个领域都取得了令人印象深刻的成果，但其潜在的类人心理仍然很大程度上未被开发。现有的工作研究法学硕士的虚拟人格，但很少探讨通过法学硕士分析人类人格的可能性。本文提出了一个供法学硕士基于迈尔斯·布里格斯类型指标（MBTI）测试评估人类性格的通用评估框架。具体来说，我们首先通过随机排列 MBTI 问题中的选项来设计无偏见的提示，并采用平均测试结果来鼓励更公正的答案生成。然后，我们建议替换问题陈述中的主题，以便能够对法学硕士的不同主题进行灵活的查询和评估。最后，我们以正确性评估的方式重新制定问题说明，以方便法学硕士做出更清晰的回答。拟议的框架使法学硕士能够灵活评估不同人群的性格。我们进一步提出了三个评估指标来衡量最先进的法学硕士（包括 ChatGPT 和 GPT-4）评估结果的一致性、稳健性和公平性。我们的实验揭示了 ChatGPT 评估人类性格的能力，平均结果表明，尽管与 InstructGPT 相比，它对即时偏差的鲁棒性较低，但可以实现更一致、更公平的评估。 本文提出一种基于MBTI测试的通用评估框架，使大型语言模型（如ChatGPT）能够评估人类性格。 Haocong Rao,Cyril Leung,Chunyan Miao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Tianyue Wu,Fei Gao
title: Distributed Optimization in Sensor Network for Scalable Multi-Robot Relative State Estimation
title_zh: 用于可扩展多机器人相对状态估计的传感器网络分布式优化
comment: Extended technical report (14 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables)
comments: Extended technical report (14 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables)
abstract: Distance measurements demonstrate distinctive scalability when used for relative state estimation in large-scale multi-robot systems. Despite the attractiveness of distance measurements, multi-robot relative state estimation based on distance measurements raises a tricky optimization problem, especially in the context of large-scale systems. Motivated by this, we aim to develop specialized computational techniques that enable robust and efficient estimation when deploying distance measurements at scale. We first reveal the commonality between the estimation problem and the one that finds realization of a sensor network, from which we draw crucial lesson to inspire the proposed methods. However, solving the latter problem in large-scale (still) requires distributed optimization schemes with scalability natures, efficient computational procedures, and fast convergence rates. Towards this goal, we propose a complementary pair of distributed computational techniques with the classical block coordinate descent (BCD) algorithm as a unified backbone. In the first method, we treat Burer-Monteiro factorization as a rank-restricted heuristic for rank-constrained semidefinite programming (SDP), where a specialized BCD-type algorithm that analytically solve each block update subproblem is employed. Although this method enables robust and (extremely) fast recovery of estimates from initial guesses, it inevitably fails as the initialization becomes disorganized. We therefore propose the second method, derived from a convex formulation named anchored edge-based semidefinite programming} (ESDP), to complement it, at the expense of a certain loss of efficiency. This formulation is structurally decomposable so that BCD can be naturally employed, where each subproblem is convex and (again) solved exactly...
summary: Distance measurements demonstrate distinctive scalability when used for relative state estimation in large-scale multi-robot systems. Despite the attractiveness of distance measurements, multi-robot relative state estimation based on distance measurements raises a tricky optimization problem, especially in the context of large-scale systems. Motivated by this, we aim to develop specialized computational techniques that enable robust and efficient estimation when deploying distance measurements at scale. We first reveal the commonality between the estimation problem and the one that finds realization of a sensor network, from which we draw crucial lesson to inspire the proposed methods. However, solving the latter problem in large-scale (still) requires distributed optimization schemes with scalability natures, efficient computational procedures, and fast convergence rates. Towards this goal, we propose a complementary pair of distributed computational techniques with the classical block coordinate descent (BCD) algorithm as a unified backbone. In the first method, we treat Burer-Monteiro factorization as a rank-restricted heuristic for rank-constrained semidefinite programming (SDP), where a specialized BCD-type algorithm that analytically solve each block update subproblem is employed. Although this method enables robust and (extremely) fast recovery of estimates from initial guesses, it inevitably fails as the initialization becomes disorganized. We therefore propose the second method, derived from a convex formulation named anchored edge-based semidefinite programming} (ESDP), to complement it, at the expense of a certain loss of efficiency. This formulation is structurally decomposable so that BCD can be naturally employed, where each subproblem is convex and (again) solved exactly...
abstract_zh: 当用于大型多机器人系统中的相对状态估计时，距离测量表现出独特的可扩展性。尽管距离测量很有吸引力，但基于距离测量的多机器人相对状态估计提出了一个棘手的优化问题，特别是在大型系统的背景下。受此启发，我们的目标是开发专门的计算技术，以便在大规模部署距离测量时实现稳健且高效的估计。我们首先揭示了估计问题和传感器网络实现问题之间的共性，从中我们吸取了重要的教训来启发所提出的方法。然而，大规模（仍然）解决后一个问题需要具有可扩展性、高效计算过程和快速收敛速度的分布式优化方案。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一对互补的分布式计算技术，以经典的块坐标下降（BCD）算法作为统一的骨干。在第一种方法中，我们将 Burer-Monteiro 分解视为秩约束半定规划 (SDP) 的秩限制启发式，其中采用专门的 BCD 型算法来分析解决每个块更新子问题。尽管这种方法能够从初始猜测中稳健且（极）快速地恢复估计，但由于初始化变得混乱，它不可避免地会失败。因此，我们提出了第二种方法，该方法源自名为锚定边缘的半定规划（ESDP）的凸公式，以对其进行补充，但会损失一定的效率。这个公式在结构上是可分解的，因此可以自然地采用 BCD，其中每个子问题都是凸的并且（再次）精确地解决......

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发针对大规模多机器人系统的分布式优化技术，以实现基于距离测量的鲁棒且高效的相对状态估计。
AI.motivation: 距离测量在大规模多机器人系统中具有可扩展性优势，但基于距离测量的相对状态估计面临复杂的优化问题，尤其在大规模场景下需解决可扩展性、计算效率和收敛速度等挑战。
AI.method: 提出两种分布式计算技术：第一种基于Burer-Monteiro分解的秩约束半定规划（SDP）方法，采用改进的块坐标下降（BCD）算法；第二种为凸优化的锚定边基SDP（ESDP）方法，通过结构分解实现BCD的自然应用。
AI.result: 第一种方法在初始化良好时能快速恢复估计，但初始化混乱时失效；第二种方法通过凸形式弥补效率损失，两种方法共同构成互补方案。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的分布式优化方法为大规模多机器人系统的相对状态估计提供了可扩展且平衡效率与鲁棒性的解决方案。

motivation: 距离测量在大规模多机器人系统中具有可扩展性优势，但基于距离测量的相对状态估计面临复杂的优化问题，尤其在大规模场景下需解决可扩展性、计算效率和收敛速度等挑战。
method: 提出两种分布式计算技术：第一种基于Burer-Monteiro分解的秩约束半定规划（SDP）方法，采用改进的块坐标下降（BCD）算法；第二种为凸优化的锚定边基SDP（ESDP）方法，通过结构分解实现BCD的自然应用。
result: 第一种方法在初始化良好时能快速恢复估计，但初始化混乱时失效；第二种方法通过凸形式弥补效率损失，两种方法共同构成互补方案。
conclusion: 本文提出的分布式优化方法为大规模多机器人系统的相对状态估计提供了可扩展且平衡效率与鲁棒性的解决方案。
search_text: Distributed Optimization in Sensor Network for Scalable Multi-Robot Relative State Estimation 用于可扩展多机器人相对状态估计的传感器网络分布式优化 Distance measurements demonstrate distinctive scalability when used for relative state estimation in large-scale multi-robot systems. Despite the attractiveness of distance measurements, multi-robot relative state estimation based on distance measurements raises a tricky optimization problem, especially in the context of large-scale systems. Motivated by this, we aim to develop specialized computational techniques that enable robust and efficient estimation when deploying distance measurements at scale. We first reveal the commonality between the estimation problem and the one that finds realization of a sensor network, from which we draw crucial lesson to inspire the proposed methods. However, solving the latter problem in large-scale (still) requires distributed optimization schemes with scalability natures, efficient computational procedures, and fast convergence rates. Towards this goal, we propose a complementary pair of distributed computational techniques with the classical block coordinate descent (BCD) algorithm as a unified backbone. In the first method, we treat Burer-Monteiro factorization as a rank-restricted heuristic for rank-constrained semidefinite programming (SDP), where a specialized BCD-type algorithm that analytically solve each block update subproblem is employed. Although this method enables robust and (extremely) fast recovery of estimates from initial guesses, it inevitably fails as the initialization becomes disorganized. We therefore propose the second method, derived from a convex formulation named anchored edge-based semidefinite programming} (ESDP), to complement it, at the expense of a certain loss of efficiency. This formulation is structurally decomposable so that BCD can be naturally employed, where each subproblem is convex and (again) solved exactly... 当用于大型多机器人系统中的相对状态估计时，距离测量表现出独特的可扩展性。尽管距离测量很有吸引力，但基于距离测量的多机器人相对状态估计提出了一个棘手的优化问题，特别是在大型系统的背景下。受此启发，我们的目标是开发专门的计算技术，以便在大规模部署距离测量时实现稳健且高效的估计。我们首先揭示了估计问题和传感器网络实现问题之间的共性，从中我们吸取了重要的教训来启发所提出的方法。然而，大规模（仍然）解决后一个问题需要具有可扩展性、高效计算过程和快速收敛速度的分布式优化方案。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一对互补的分布式计算技术，以经典的块坐标下降（BCD）算法作为统一的骨干。在第一种方法中，我们将 Burer-Monteiro 分解视为秩约束半定规划 (SDP) 的秩限制启发式，其中采用专门的 BCD 型算法来分析解决每个块更新子问题。尽管这种方法能够从初始猜测中稳健且（极）快速地恢复估计，但由于初始化变得混乱，它不可避免地会失败。因此，我们提出了第二种方法，该方法源自名为锚定边缘的半定规划（ESDP）的凸公式，以对其进行补充，但会损失一定的效率。这个公式在结构上是可分解的，因此可以自然地采用 BCD，其中每个子问题都是凸的并且（再次）精确地解决...... 本文旨在开发针对大规模多机器人系统的分布式优化技术，以实现基于距离测量的鲁棒且高效的相对状态估计。 Tianyue Wu,Fei Gao cs.RO

authors_text: Jingjing Jiang,Nanning Zheng
title: MixPHM: Redundancy-Aware Parameter-Efficient Tuning for Low-Resource Visual Question Answering
title_zh: MixPHM：针对低资源视觉问答的冗余感知参数高效调整
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables. Accepted to CVPR 2023
comments: 13 pages, 6 figures, 9 tables. Accepted to CVPR 2023
abstract: Recently, finetuning pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has been a prevailing paradigm for achieving state-of-the-art performance in Visual Question Answering (VQA). However, as VLMs scale, finetuning full model parameters for a given task in low-resource settings becomes computationally expensive, storage inefficient, and prone to overfitting. Current parameter-efficient tuning methods dramatically reduce the number of tunable parameters, but there still exists a significant performance gap with full finetuning. In this paper, we propose MixPHM, a redundancy-aware parameter-efficient tuning method that outperforms full finetuning in low-resource VQA. Specifically, MixPHM is a lightweight module implemented by multiple PHM-experts in a mixture-of-experts manner. To reduce parameter redundancy, MixPHM reparameterizes expert weights in a low-rank subspace and shares part of the weights inside and across experts. Moreover, based on a quantitative redundancy analysis for adapters, we propose Redundancy Regularization to reduce task-irrelevant redundancy while promoting task-relevant correlation in MixPHM representations. Experiments conducted on VQA v2, GQA, and OK-VQA demonstrate that MixPHM outperforms state-of-the-art parameter-efficient methods and is the only one consistently surpassing full finetuning.
summary: Recently, finetuning pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has been a prevailing paradigm for achieving state-of-the-art performance in Visual Question Answering (VQA). However, as VLMs scale, finetuning full model parameters for a given task in low-resource settings becomes computationally expensive, storage inefficient, and prone to overfitting. Current parameter-efficient tuning methods dramatically reduce the number of tunable parameters, but there still exists a significant performance gap with full finetuning. In this paper, we propose MixPHM, a redundancy-aware parameter-efficient tuning method that outperforms full finetuning in low-resource VQA. Specifically, MixPHM is a lightweight module implemented by multiple PHM-experts in a mixture-of-experts manner. To reduce parameter redundancy, MixPHM reparameterizes expert weights in a low-rank subspace and shares part of the weights inside and across experts. Moreover, based on a quantitative redundancy analysis for adapters, we propose Redundancy Regularization to reduce task-irrelevant redundancy while promoting task-relevant correlation in MixPHM representations. Experiments conducted on VQA v2, GQA, and OK-VQA demonstrate that MixPHM outperforms state-of-the-art parameter-efficient methods and is the only one consistently surpassing full finetuning.
abstract_zh: 最近，微调预训练视觉语言模型 (VLM) 已成为在视觉问答 (VQA) 中实现最先进性能的流行范例。然而，随着 VLM 的扩展，在资源匮乏的情况下对给定任务的完整模型参数进行微调会变得计算成本高昂、存储效率低下，并且容易出现过度拟合。当前的参数高效调整方法极大地减少了可调整参数的数量，但与完全微调仍然存在显着的性能差距。在本文中，我们提出了 MixPHM，这是一种冗余感知的参数高效调整方法，在低资源 VQA 中优于完全微调。具体来说，MixPHM是一个由多个PHM专家以混合专家的方式实现的轻量级模块。为了减少参数冗余，MixPHM 在低秩子空间中重新参数化专家权重，并在专家内部和跨专家之间共享部分权重。此外，基于适配器的定量冗余分析，我们提出冗余正则化来减少与任务无关的冗余，同时促进 MixPHM 表示中与任务相关的相关性。在 VQA v2、GQA 和 OK-VQA 上进行的实验表明，MixPHM 的性能优于最先进的参数高效方法，并且是唯一一种始终超越完全微调的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixPHM方法，在低资源视觉问答任务中实现冗余感知的参数高效微调。
AI.motivation: 传统微调预训练视觉语言模型在低资源场景下计算成本高、存储效率低且易过拟合，现有参数高效方法仍存在性能差距。
AI.method: 设计混合PHM专家模块，通过低秩子空间重构专家权重并跨专家共享参数，结合冗余正则化减少任务无关冗余。
AI.result: 在VQA v2、GQA和OK-VQA数据集上超越现有参数高效方法，且是唯一持续优于全量微调的方法。
AI.conclusion: MixPHM通过冗余感知机制有效提升低资源视觉问答的参数效率与性能。

However, as VLMs scale, finetuning full model parameters for a given task in low-resource settings becomes computationally expensive, storage inefficient, and prone to overfitting. authors_text: Xiaoyu Shi,Zhaoyang Huang,Dasong Li,Manyuan Zhang,Ka Chun Cheung,Simon See,Hongwei Qin,Jifeng Dai,Hongsheng Li
title: FlowFormer++: Masked Cost Volume Autoencoding for Pretraining Optical Flow Estimation
title_zh: FlowFormer++：用于预训练光流估计的掩蔽成本量自动编码
abstract: FlowFormer introduces a transformer architecture into optical flow estimation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The core component of FlowFormer is the transformer-based cost-volume encoder. Inspired by the recent success of masked autoencoding (MAE) pretraining in unleashing transformers' capacity of encoding visual representation, we propose Masked Cost Volume Autoencoding (MCVA) to enhance FlowFormer by pretraining the cost-volume encoder with a novel MAE scheme. Firstly, we introduce a block-sharing masking strategy to prevent masked information leakage, as the cost maps of neighboring source pixels are highly correlated. Secondly, we propose a novel pre-text reconstruction task, which encourages the cost-volume encoder to aggregate long-range information and ensures pretraining-finetuning consistency. We also show how to modify the FlowFormer architecture to accommodate masks during pretraining. Pretrained with MCVA, FlowFormer++ ranks 1st among published methods on both Sintel and KITTI-2015 benchmarks. Specifically, FlowFormer++ achieves 1.07 and 1.94 average end-point error (AEPE) on the clean and final pass of Sintel benchmark, leading to 7.76\% and 7.18\% error reductions from FlowFormer. FlowFormer++ obtains 4.52 F1-all on the KITTI-2015 test set, improving FlowFormer by 0.16.
summary: FlowFormer introduces a transformer architecture into optical flow estimation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The core component of FlowFormer is the transformer-based cost-volume encoder. Inspired by the recent success of masked autoencoding (MAE) pretraining in unleashing transformers' capacity of encoding visual representation, we propose Masked Cost Volume Autoencoding (MCVA) to enhance FlowFormer by pretraining the cost-volume encoder with a novel MAE scheme. Firstly, we introduce a block-sharing masking strategy to prevent masked information leakage, as the cost maps of neighboring source pixels are highly correlated. Secondly, we propose a novel pre-text reconstruction task, which encourages the cost-volume encoder to aggregate long-range information and ensures pretraining-finetuning consistency. We also show how to modify the FlowFormer architecture to accommodate masks during pretraining. Pretrained with MCVA, FlowFormer++ ranks 1st among published methods on both Sintel and KITTI-2015 benchmarks. Specifically, FlowFormer++ achieves 1.07 and 1.94 average end-point error (AEPE) on the clean and final pass of Sintel benchmark, leading to 7.76\% and 7.18\% error reductions from FlowFormer. FlowFormer++ obtains 4.52 F1-all on the KITTI-2015 test set, improving FlowFormer by 0.16.
abstract_zh: FlowFormer 将变压器架构引入光流估计中，并实现了最先进的性能。 FlowFormer 的核心组件是基于 Transformer 的成本量编码器。受最近成功的屏蔽自动编码（MAE）预训练在释放 Transformer 编码视觉表示能力方面的启发，我们提出屏蔽成本卷自动编码（MCVA），通过使用新颖的 MAE 方案预训练成本卷编码器来增强 FlowFormer。首先，我们引入块共享掩蔽策略来防止掩蔽信息泄漏，因为相邻源像素的成本图高度相关。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的文本前重建任务，它鼓励成本量编码器聚合远程信息并确保预训练-微调的一致性。我们还展示了如何修改 FlowFormer 架构以在预训练期间适应掩模。 FlowFormer++ 经过 MCVA 预训练，在 Sintel 和 KITTI-2015 基准测试中已发布的方法中排名第一。具体而言，FlowFormer++ 在 Sintel 基准测试的干净通道和最终通道上分别实现了 1.07 和 1.94 的平均终点误差 (AEPE)，从而使 FlowFormer 的误差减少了 7.76\% 和 7.18\%。 FlowFormer++ 在 KITTI-2015 测试集上获得 4.52 F1-all，将 FlowFormer 提高了 0.16。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlowFormer++，通过引入Masked Cost Volume Autoencoding（MCVA）预训练方法，提升光流估计的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管FlowFormer在光流估计中表现优异，但其成本体积编码器的预训练方法仍有改进空间。受掩码自编码（MAE）在视觉表征中的成功启发，作者旨在通过新型预训练方案增强模型能力。
AI.method: 提出块共享掩码策略防止信息泄露，并设计预文本重建任务以促进长距离信息聚合。修改FlowFormer架构以适配预训练阶段的掩码处理，形成MCVA预训练框架。
AI.result: FlowFormer++在Sintel和KITTI-2015基准测试中均排名第一，清洁集和最终集的平均端点误差分别降低7.76%和7.18%，KITTI-2015的F1-all提升0.16。
AI.conclusion: MCVA预训练有效提升了成本体积编码器的表征能力，验证了掩码自编码在光流估计任务中的有效性。

search_text: FlowFormer++: Masked Cost Volume Autoencoding for Pretraining Optical Flow Estimation FlowFormer++：用于预训练光流估计的掩蔽成本量自动编码 FlowFormer introduces a transformer architecture into optical flow estimation and achieves state-of-the-art performance. The core component of FlowFormer is the transformer-based cost-volume encoder. Inspired by the recent success of masked autoencoding (MAE) pretraining in unleashing transformers' capacity of encoding visual representation, we propose Masked Cost Volume Autoencoding (MCVA) to enhance FlowFormer by pretraining the cost-volume encoder with a novel MAE scheme. Firstly, we introduce a block-sharing masking strategy to prevent masked information leakage, as the cost maps of neighboring source pixels are highly correlated. Secondly, we propose a novel pre-text reconstruction task, which encourages the cost-volume encoder to aggregate long-range information and ensures pretraining-finetuning consistency. We also show how to modify the FlowFormer architecture to accommodate masks during pretraining. Pretrained with MCVA, FlowFormer++ ranks 1st among published methods on both Sintel and KITTI-2015 benchmarks. Specifically, FlowFormer++ achieves 1.07 and 1.94 average end-point error (AEPE) on the clean and final pass of Sintel benchmark, leading to 7.76\% and 7.18\% error reductions from FlowFormer. FlowFormer++ obtains 4.52 F1-all on the KITTI-2015 test set, improving FlowFormer by 0.16. FlowFormer 将变压器架构引入光流估计中，并实现了最先进的性能。 FlowFormer 的核心组件是基于 Transformer 的成本量编码器。受最近成功的屏蔽自动编码（MAE）预训练在释放 Transformer 编码视觉表示能力方面的启发，我们提出屏蔽成本卷自动编码（MCVA），通过使用新颖的 MAE 方案预训练成本卷编码器来增强 FlowFormer。首先，我们引入块共享掩蔽策略来防止掩蔽信息泄漏，因为相邻源像素的成本图高度相关。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的文本前重建任务，它鼓励成本量编码器聚合远程信息并确保预训练-微调的一致性。我们还展示了如何修改 FlowFormer 架构以在预训练期间适应掩模。 FlowFormer++ 经过 MCVA 预训练，在 Sintel 和 KITTI-2015 基准测试中已发布的方法中排名第一。具体而言，FlowFormer++ 在 Sintel 基准测试的干净通道和最终通道上分别实现了 1.07 和 1.94 的平均终点误差 (AEPE)，从而使 FlowFormer 的误差减少了 7.76\% 和 7.18\%。 FlowFormer++ 在 KITTI-2015 测试集上获得 4.52 F1-all，将 FlowFormer 提高了 0.16。 本文提出FlowFormer++，通过引入Masked Cost Volume Autoencoding（MCVA）预训练方法，提升光流估计的性能。 Xiaoyu Shi,Zhaoyang Huang,Dasong Li,Manyuan Zhang,Ka Chun Cheung,Simon See,Hongwei Qin,Jifeng Dai,Hongsheng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Fang Li
title: Learning Person-specific Network Representation for Apparent Personality Traits Recognition
title_zh: 学习特定于人的网络表示以进行明显的人格特征识别
abstract: Recent studies show that apparent personality traits can be reflected from human facial behavior dynamics. However, most existing methods can only encode single-scale short-term facial behaviors in the latent features for personality recognition. In this paper, we propose to recognize apparent personality recognition approach which first trains a person-specific network for each subject, modelling multi-scale long-term person-specific behavior evolution of the subject. Consequently, we hypothesize that the weights of the network contain the person-specific facial behavior-related cues of the subject. Then, we propose to encode the weights of the person-specific network to a graph representation, as the personality representation for the subject, allowing them to be processed by standard Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) for personality traits recognition. The experimental results show that our novel network weights-based approach achieved superior performance than most traditional latent feature-based approaches, and has comparable performance to the state-of-the-art method. Importantly, the produced graph representations produce robust results when using different GNNs. This paper further validated that person-specific network's weights are correlated to the subject's personality.
summary: Recent studies show that apparent personality traits can be reflected from human facial behavior dynamics. However, most existing methods can only encode single-scale short-term facial behaviors in the latent features for personality recognition. In this paper, we propose to recognize apparent personality recognition approach which first trains a person-specific network for each subject, modelling multi-scale long-term person-specific behavior evolution of the subject. Consequently, we hypothesize that the weights of the network contain the person-specific facial behavior-related cues of the subject. Then, we propose to encode the weights of the person-specific network to a graph representation, as the personality representation for the subject, allowing them to be processed by standard Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) for personality traits recognition. The experimental results show that our novel network weights-based approach achieved superior performance than most traditional latent feature-based approaches, and has comparable performance to the state-of-the-art method. Importantly, the produced graph representations produce robust results when using different GNNs. This paper further validated that person-specific network's weights are correlated to the subject's personality.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，明显的人格特征可以从人类面部行为动态中反映出来。然而，大多数现有方法只能在潜在特征中编码单尺度短期面部行为以进行个性识别。在本文中，我们提出识别明显的个性识别方法，该方法首先为每个主题训练一个特定于个人的网络，模拟该主题的多尺度长期特定于个人的行为演化。因此，我们假设网络的权重包含主体的特定于人的面部行为相关线索。然后，我们建议将特定于人的网络的权重编码为图表示，作为主体的个性表示，允许它们由标准图神经网络（GNN）处理以进行个性特征识别。实验结果表明，我们新颖的基于网络权重的方法比大多数传统的基于潜在特征的方法实现了优越的性能，并且具有与最先进的方法相当的性能。重要的是，当使用不同的 GNN 时，生成的图表示会产生稳健的结果。本文进一步验证了特定于人的网络的权重与主体的个性相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于个人特定网络权重的图表示方法，用于识别显性人格特质。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能编码单尺度短期面部行为，难以捕捉长期多尺度的人脸行为演变规律。
AI.method: 为每个受试者训练个人特定网络，建模其长期多尺度行为演化，将网络权重编码为图表示并输入图神经网络进行人格识别。
AI.result: 该方法在传统特征方法上表现更优，与最先进方法性能相当，且图表示在不同GNN中具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 个人特定网络权重与人格特质相关，基于权重的图表示方法有效提升了人格识别性能。

authors_text: Mingze Ni,Zhensu Sun,Wei Liu
title: Frauds Bargain Attack: Generating Adversarial Text Samples via Word Manipulation Process
title_zh: 欺诈讨价还价攻击：通过文字处理过程生成对抗性文本样本
abstract: Recent research has revealed that natural language processing (NLP) models are vulnerable to adversarial examples. However, the current techniques for generating such examples rely on deterministic heuristic rules, which fail to produce optimal adversarial examples. In response, this study proposes a new method called the Fraud's Bargain Attack (FBA), which uses a randomization mechanism to expand the search space and produce high-quality adversarial examples with a higher probability of success. FBA uses the Metropolis-Hasting sampler, a type of Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampler, to improve the selection of adversarial examples from all candidates generated by a customized stochastic process called the Word Manipulation Process (WMP). The WMP method modifies individual words in a contextually-aware manner through insertion, removal, or substitution. Through extensive experiments, this study demonstrates that FBA outperforms other methods in terms of attack success rate, imperceptibility and sentence quality.
summary: Recent research has revealed that natural language processing (NLP) models are vulnerable to adversarial examples. However, the current techniques for generating such examples rely on deterministic heuristic rules, which fail to produce optimal adversarial examples. In response, this study proposes a new method called the Fraud's Bargain Attack (FBA), which uses a randomization mechanism to expand the search space and produce high-quality adversarial examples with a higher probability of success. FBA uses the Metropolis-Hasting sampler, a type of Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampler, to improve the selection of adversarial examples from all candidates generated by a customized stochastic process called the Word Manipulation Process (WMP). The WMP method modifies individual words in a contextually-aware manner through insertion, removal, or substitution. Through extensive experiments, this study demonstrates that FBA outperforms other methods in terms of attack success rate, imperceptibility and sentence quality.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，自然语言处理（NLP）模型很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。然而，当前生成此类示例的技术依赖于确定性启发式规则，而无法生成最佳的对抗性示例。对此，本研究提出了一种称为欺诈讨价还价攻击（FBA）的新方法，该方法使用随机化机制来扩展搜索空间并产生具有更高成功概率的高质量对抗样本。 FBA 使用 Metropolis-Hasting 采样器（一种马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗采样器）来改进从称为词处理过程 (WMP) 的定制随机过程生成的所有候选者中选择对抗性示例。 WMP 方法通过插入、删除或替换以上下文感知的方式修改单个单词。通过大量的实验，本研究证明 FBA 在攻击成功率、不可感知性和句子质量方面优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Frauds Bargain Attack（FBA）的新方法，通过词操作过程生成高质量的对抗性文本样本。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本生成技术依赖确定性启发式规则，难以生成最优对抗样本，需更有效的随机化方法。
AI.method: FBA结合随机化机制与Metropolis-Hasting采样器，通过定制的词操作过程（WMP）实现插入、删除或替换单词的上下文感知修改。
AI.result: 实验表明FBA在攻击成功率、文本不可感知性及句子质量方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FBA通过扩展搜索空间和优化采样策略，有效提升了对抗样本生成的质量与攻击效果。

authors_text: Kaiyu Guo,Brian Lovell
title: Domain-aware Triplet loss in Domain Generalization
title_zh: 域泛化中的域感知三元组损失
abstract: Despite much progress being made in the field of object recognition with the advances of deep learning, there are still several factors negatively affecting the performance of deep learning models. Domain shift is one of these factors and is caused by discrepancies in the distributions of the testing and training data. In this paper, we focus on the problem of compact feature clustering in domain generalization to help optimize the embedding space from multi-domain data. We design a domainaware triplet loss for domain generalization to help the model to not only cluster similar semantic features, but also to disperse features arising from the domain. Unlike previous methods focusing on distribution alignment, our algorithm is designed to disperse domain information in the embedding space. The basic idea is motivated based on the assumption that embedding features can be clustered based on domain information, which is mathematically and empirically supported in this paper. In addition, during our exploration of feature clustering in domain generalization, we note that factors affecting the convergence of metric learning loss in domain generalization are more important than the pre-defined domains. To solve this issue, we utilize two methods to normalize the embedding space, reducing the internal covariate shift of the embedding features. The ablation study demonstrates the effectiveness of our algorithm. Moreover, the experiments on the benchmark datasets, including PACS, VLCS and Office-Home, show that our method outperforms related methods focusing on domain discrepancy. In particular, our results on RegnetY-16 are significantly better than state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark datasets. Our code will be released at https://github.com/workerbcd/DCT
summary: Despite much progress being made in the field of object recognition with the advances of deep learning, there are still several factors negatively affecting the performance of deep learning models. Domain shift is one of these factors and is caused by discrepancies in the distributions of the testing and training data. In this paper, we focus on the problem of compact feature clustering in domain generalization to help optimize the embedding space from multi-domain data. We design a domainaware triplet loss for domain generalization to help the model to not only cluster similar semantic features, but also to disperse features arising from the domain. Unlike previous methods focusing on distribution alignment, our algorithm is designed to disperse domain information in the embedding space. The basic idea is motivated based on the assumption that embedding features can be clustered based on domain information, which is mathematically and empirically supported in this paper. In addition, during our exploration of feature clustering in domain generalization, we note that factors affecting the convergence of metric learning loss in domain generalization are more important than the pre-defined domains. To solve this issue, we utilize two methods to normalize the embedding space, reducing the internal covariate shift of the embedding features. The ablation study demonstrates the effectiveness of our algorithm. Moreover, the experiments on the benchmark datasets, including PACS, VLCS and Office-Home, show that our method outperforms related methods focusing on domain discrepancy. In particular, our results on RegnetY-16 are significantly better than state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark datasets. Our code will be released at https://github.com/workerbcd/DCT
abstract_zh: 尽管随着深度学习的进步，物体识别领域取得了很大进展，但仍然存在一些因素对深度学习模型的性能产生负面影响。域转移是这些因素之一，是由测试和训练数据的分布差异引起的。在本文中，我们关注域泛化中的紧凑特征聚类问题，以帮助优化多域数据的嵌入空间。我们设计了一个用于领域泛化的领域感知三元组损失，以帮助模型不仅聚类相似的语义特征，而且还分散来自领域的特征。与以前专注于分布对齐的方法不同，我们的算法旨在将域信息分散在嵌入空间中。基本思想是基于嵌入特征可以基于领域信息进行聚类的假设，该假设在本文中得到了数学和经验上的支持。此外，在我们探索领域泛化中的特征聚类过程中，我们注意到影响领域泛化中度量学习损失收敛的因素比预定义领域更重要。为了解决这个问题，我们利用两种方法对嵌入空间进行归一化，减少嵌入特征的内部协变量偏移。消融研究证明了我们算法的有效性。此外，在 PACS、VLCS 和 Office-Home 等基准数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法优于关注域差异的相关方法。特别是，我们在 RegnetY-16 上的结果明显优于基准数据集上最先进的方法。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/workerbcd/DCT 发布

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种领域感知的三元组损失函数，用于领域泛化中的特征聚类优化，以提升模型在不同领域数据上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法多关注分布对齐，但作者认为在嵌入空间中分散领域信息并聚类语义特征更为关键，且收敛因素比预定义领域更重要。
AI.method: 设计领域感知三元组损失，通过聚类语义特征并分散领域信息优化嵌入空间；结合两种归一化方法减少内部协变量偏移。
AI.result: 在PACS、VLCS和Office-Home数据集上优于现有方法，尤其在RegnetY-16模型上显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 领域感知三元组损失与归一化策略有效提升领域泛化能力，通过数学与实验验证了分散领域信息的合理性。

search_text: Domain-aware Triplet loss in Domain Generalization 域泛化中的域感知三元组损失 Despite much progress being made in the field of object recognition with the advances of deep learning, there are still several factors negatively affecting the performance of deep learning models. Domain shift is one of these factors and is caused by discrepancies in the distributions of the testing and training data. In this paper, we focus on the problem of compact feature clustering in domain generalization to help optimize the embedding space from multi-domain data. We design a domainaware triplet loss for domain generalization to help the model to not only cluster similar semantic features, but also to disperse features arising from the domain. Unlike previous methods focusing on distribution alignment, our algorithm is designed to disperse domain information in the embedding space. The basic idea is motivated based on the assumption that embedding features can be clustered based on domain information, which is mathematically and empirically supported in this paper. In addition, during our exploration of feature clustering in domain generalization, we note that factors affecting the convergence of metric learning loss in domain generalization are more important than the pre-defined domains. To solve this issue, we utilize two methods to normalize the embedding space, reducing the internal covariate shift of the embedding features. The ablation study demonstrates the effectiveness of our algorithm. Moreover, the experiments on the benchmark datasets, including PACS, VLCS and Office-Home, show that our method outperforms related methods focusing on domain discrepancy. In particular, our results on RegnetY-16 are significantly better than state-of-the-art methods on the benchmark datasets. Our code will be released at https://github.com/workerbcd/DCT 尽管随着深度学习的进步，物体识别领域取得了很大进展，但仍然存在一些因素对深度学习模型的性能产生负面影响。域转移是这些因素之一，是由测试和训练数据的分布差异引起的。在本文中，我们关注域泛化中的紧凑特征聚类问题，以帮助优化多域数据的嵌入空间。我们设计了一个用于领域泛化的领域感知三元组损失，以帮助模型不仅聚类相似的语义特征，而且还分散来自领域的特征。与以前专注于分布对齐的方法不同，我们的算法旨在将域信息分散在嵌入空间中。基本思想是基于嵌入特征可以基于领域信息进行聚类的假设，该假设在本文中得到了数学和经验上的支持。此外，在我们探索领域泛化中的特征聚类过程中，我们注意到影响领域泛化中度量学习损失收敛的因素比预定义领域更重要。为了解决这个问题，我们利用两种方法对嵌入空间进行归一化，减少嵌入特征的内部协变量偏移。消融研究证明了我们算法的有效性。此外，在 PACS、VLCS 和 Office-Home 等基准数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法优于关注域差异的相关方法。特别是，我们在 RegnetY-16 上的结果明显优于基准数据集上最先进的方法。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/workerbcd/DCT 发布 本文提出一种领域感知的三元组损失函数，用于领域泛化中的特征聚类优化，以提升模型在不同领域数据上的表现。 Kaiyu Guo,Brian Lovell cs.CV

authors_text: Emiliano De Cristofaro
title: Synthetic Data: Methods, Use Cases, and Risks
title_zh: 合成数据：方法、用例和风险
comment: To Appear in IEEE Security and Privacy Magazine
comments: To Appear in IEEE Security and Privacy Magazine
abstract: Sharing data can often enable compelling applications and analytics. However, more often than not, valuable datasets contain information of a sensitive nature, and thus, sharing them can endanger the privacy of users and organizations. A possible alternative gaining momentum in both the research community and industry is to share synthetic data instead. The idea is to release artificially generated datasets that resemble the actual data -- more precisely, having similar statistical properties. In this article, we provide a gentle introduction to synthetic data and discuss its use cases, the privacy challenges that are still unaddressed, and its inherent limitations as an effective privacy-enhancing technology.
summary: Sharing data can often enable compelling applications and analytics. However, more often than not, valuable datasets contain information of a sensitive nature, and thus, sharing them can endanger the privacy of users and organizations. A possible alternative gaining momentum in both the research community and industry is to share synthetic data instead. The idea is to release artificially generated datasets that resemble the actual data -- more precisely, having similar statistical properties. In this article, we provide a gentle introduction to synthetic data and discuss its use cases, the privacy challenges that are still unaddressed, and its inherent limitations as an effective privacy-enhancing technology.
abstract_zh: 共享数据通常可以实现引人注目的应用程序和分析。然而，有价值的数据集通常包含敏感信息，因此共享它们可能会危及用户和组织的隐私。在研究界和工业界获得动力的一种可能的替代方案是共享合成数据。这个想法是发布人工生成的与实际数据相似的数据集——更准确地说，具有相似的统计特性。在本文中，我们对合成数据进行了简要介绍，并讨论了其用例、尚未解决的隐私挑战以及其作为有效的隐私增强技术的固有局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了合成数据的方法、应用场景及风险，探讨其作为隐私保护技术的潜力与局限性。
AI.motivation: 真实数据共享存在隐私泄露风险，需寻找替代方案以实现数据利用与隐私保护的平衡。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与案例分析，系统梳理合成数据生成技术、典型应用及现存隐私挑战。
AI.result: 合成数据可模拟真实数据统计特性，但存在生成偏差、隐私泄露风险及应用场景限制等问题。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据是隐私增强技术的重要方向，但需进一步解决生成质量、隐私安全性及适用场景的优化问题。

authors_text: Cyril Zakka,Akash Chaurasia,Rohan Shad,Alex R. Dalal,Jennifer L. Kim,Michael Moor,Kevin Alexander,Euan Ashley,Jack Boyd,Kathleen Boyd,Karen Hirsch,Curt Langlotz,Joanna Nelson,William Hiesinger
title: Almanac: Retrieval-Augmented Language Models for Clinical Medicine
title_zh: 年鉴：临床医学检索增强语言模型
abstract: Large-language models have recently demonstrated impressive zero-shot capabilities in a variety of natural language tasks such as summarization, dialogue generation, and question-answering. Despite many promising applications in clinical medicine, adoption of these models in real-world settings has been largely limited by their tendency to generate incorrect and sometimes even toxic statements. In this study, we develop Almanac, a large language model framework augmented with retrieval capabilities for medical guideline and treatment recommendations. Performance on a novel dataset of clinical scenarios (n = 130) evaluated by a panel of 5 board-certified and resident physicians demonstrates significant increases in factuality (mean of 18% at p-value < 0.05) across all specialties, with improvements in completeness and safety. Our results demonstrate the potential for large language models to be effective tools in the clinical decision-making process, while also emphasizing the importance of careful testing and deployment to mitigate their shortcomings.
summary: Large-language models have recently demonstrated impressive zero-shot capabilities in a variety of natural language tasks such as summarization, dialogue generation, and question-answering. Despite many promising applications in clinical medicine, adoption of these models in real-world settings has been largely limited by their tendency to generate incorrect and sometimes even toxic statements. In this study, we develop Almanac, a large language model framework augmented with retrieval capabilities for medical guideline and treatment recommendations. Performance on a novel dataset of clinical scenarios (n = 130) evaluated by a panel of 5 board-certified and resident physicians demonstrates significant increases in factuality (mean of 18% at p-value < 0.05) across all specialties, with improvements in completeness and safety. Our results demonstrate the potential for large language models to be effective tools in the clinical decision-making process, while also emphasizing the importance of careful testing and deployment to mitigate their shortcomings.
abstract_zh: 大语言模型最近在各种自然语言任务（例如摘要、对话生成和问答）中展示了令人印象深刻的零样本能力。尽管在临床医学中有许多有前途的应用，但这些模型在现实世界中的采用在很大程度上受到它们产生不正确甚至有时甚至有毒陈述的倾向的限制。在这项研究中，我们开发了 Almanac，一个大型语言模型框架，增强了医疗指南和治疗建议的检索功能。由 5 名经过委员会认证的住院医生组成的小组评估的临床场景新数据集 (n = 130) 的表现表明，所有专业的真实性显着提高（p 值 < 0.05 时平均值为 18%），完整性和安全性也有所提高。我们的结果证明了大型语言模型作为临床决策过程中有效工具的潜力，同时也强调了仔细测试和部署以减轻其缺点的重要性。

AI.tldr: 开发结合检索能力的大型语言模型框架Almanac，用于提升临床医学中的指南和治疗建议的准确性与安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在临床医学应用中存在生成错误或有害内容的风险，需通过检索增强技术提高其准确性和安全性。
AI.method: 构建Almanac框架，整合检索技术以增强医疗指南和治疗建议的生成，并通过临床场景数据集进行多专家评估。
AI.result: 事实性提升18%（p<0.05），并在完整性和安全性方面有显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 证明大型语言模型在临床决策中的有效性，同时强调需谨慎测试以减少其不足。

Our results demonstrate the potential for large language models to be effective tools in the clinical decision-making process, while also emphasizing the importance of careful testing and deployment to mitigate their shortcomings. 大语言模型最近在各种自然语言任务（例如摘要、对话生成和问答）中展示了令人印象深刻的零样本能力。尽管在临床医学中有许多有前途的应用，但这些模型在现实世界中的采用在很大程度上受到它们产生不正确甚至有时甚至有毒陈述的倾向的限制。在这项研究中，我们开发了 Almanac，一个大型语言模型框架，增强了医疗指南和治疗建议的检索功能。由 5 名经过委员会认证的住院医生组成的小组评估的临床场景新数据集 (n = 130) 的表现表明，所有专业的真实性显着提高（p 值 < 0.05 时平均值为 18%），完整性和安全性也有所提高。我们的结果证明了大型语言模型作为临床决策过程中有效工具的潜力，同时也强调了仔细测试和部署以减轻其缺点的重要性。 开发结合检索能力的大型语言模型框架Almanac，用于提升临床医学中的指南和治疗建议的准确性与安全性。 Cyril Zakka,Akash Chaurasia,Rohan Shad,Alex R. Dalal,Jennifer L. Kim,Michael Moor,Kevin Alexander,Euan Ashley,Jack Boyd,Kathleen Boyd,Karen Hirsch,Curt Langlotz,Joanna Nelson,William Hiesinger cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Jinyan Liu,Jie Chen
title: A Coarse to Fine Framework for Object Detection in High Resolution Image
title_zh: 高分辨率图像中从粗到细的目标检测框架
abstract: Object detection is a fundamental problem in computer vision, aiming at locating and classifying objects in image. Although current devices can easily take very high-resolution images, current approaches of object detection seldom consider detecting tiny object or the large scale variance problem in high resolution images. In this paper, we introduce a simple yet efficient approach that improves accuracy of object detection especially for small objects and large scale variance scene while reducing the computational cost in high resolution image. Inspired by observing that overall detection accuracy is reduced if the image is properly down-sampled but the recall rate is not significantly reduced. Besides, small objects can be better detected by inputting high-resolution images even if using lightweight detector. We propose a cluster-based coarse-to-fine object detection framework to enhance the performance for detecting small objects while ensure the accuracy of large objects in high-resolution images. For the first stage, we perform coarse detection on the down-sampled image and center localization of small objects by lightweight detector on high-resolution image, and then obtains image chips based on cluster region generation method by coarse detection and center localization results, and further sends chips to the second stage detector for fine detection. Finally, we merge the coarse detection and fine detection results. Our approach can make good use of the sparsity of the objects and the information in high-resolution image, thereby making the detection more efficient. Experiment results show that our proposed approach achieves promising performance compared with other state-of-the-art detectors.
summary: Object detection is a fundamental problem in computer vision, aiming at locating and classifying objects in image. Although current devices can easily take very high-resolution images, current approaches of object detection seldom consider detecting tiny object or the large scale variance problem in high resolution images. In this paper, we introduce a simple yet efficient approach that improves accuracy of object detection especially for small objects and large scale variance scene while reducing the computational cost in high resolution image. Inspired by observing that overall detection accuracy is reduced if the image is properly down-sampled but the recall rate is not significantly reduced. Besides, small objects can be better detected by inputting high-resolution images even if using lightweight detector. We propose a cluster-based coarse-to-fine object detection framework to enhance the performance for detecting small objects while ensure the accuracy of large objects in high-resolution images. For the first stage, we perform coarse detection on the down-sampled image and center localization of small objects by lightweight detector on high-resolution image, and then obtains image chips based on cluster region generation method by coarse detection and center localization results, and further sends chips to the second stage detector for fine detection. Finally, we merge the coarse detection and fine detection results. Our approach can make good use of the sparsity of the objects and the information in high-resolution image, thereby making the detection more efficient. Experiment results show that our proposed approach achieves promising performance compared with other state-of-the-art detectors.
abstract_zh: 目标检测是计算机视觉中的一个基本问题，旨在对图像中的目标进行定位和分类。尽管当前的设备可以轻松拍摄非常高分辨率的图像，但当前的物体检测方法很少考虑检测高分辨率图像中的微小物体或大尺度方差问题。在本文中，我们介绍了一种简单而有效的方法，可以提高目标检测的准确性，特别是对于小目标和大尺度方差场景，同时降低高分辨率图像的计算成本。受到观察的启发，如果图像被适当下采样，整体检测精度会降低，但召回率不会显着降低。此外，即使使用轻型探测器，通过输入高分辨率图像也可以更好地检测小物体。我们提出了一种基于集群的从粗到细的目标检测框架，以增强检测小目标的性能，同时确保高分辨率图像中大目标的准确性。第一阶段，我们对下采样图像进行粗检测，并通过轻量级检测器对高分辨率图像进行小物体中心定位，然后根据粗检测和中心定位结果得到基于聚类区域生成方法的图像芯片，并将芯片发送到第二阶段检测器进行精细检测。最后，我们合并粗略检测和精细检测结果。我们的方法可以很好地利用目标的稀疏性和高分辨率图像中的信息，从而使检测更加有效。实验结果表明，与其他最先进的检测器相比，我们提出的方法实现了有希望的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种粗到细的框架，用于在高分辨率图像中提升小物体检测和大尺度变化场景下的目标检测精度，同时降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 当前目标检测方法在高分辨率图像中难以有效检测小物体且未充分考虑尺度变化问题，而高分辨率图像的计算成本较高。
AI.method: 采用两阶段检测策略：首先对降采样图像进行粗略检测，利用轻量级检测器定位小物体中心；通过聚类区域生成方法提取图像块送入第二阶段精细检测，最终融合粗略与精细检测结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持大物体检测精度的同时，相比其他先进检测器在小物体检测上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过结合高分辨率图像信息与稀疏性，有效平衡了检测效率与精度，适用于高分辨率场景下的目标检测任务。

authors_text: Stefanos-Iordanis Papadopoulos,Christos Koutlis,Symeon Papadopoulos,Panagiotis C. Petrantonakis
title: Synthetic Misinformers: Generating and Combating Multimodal Misinformation
title_zh: 合成误导者：生成和打击多模式错误信息
abstract: With the expansion of social media and the increasing dissemination of multimedia content, the spread of misinformation has become a major concern. This necessitates effective strategies for multimodal misinformation detection (MMD) that detect whether the combination of an image and its accompanying text could mislead or misinform. Due to the data-intensive nature of deep neural networks and the labor-intensive process of manual annotation, researchers have been exploring various methods for automatically generating synthetic multimodal misinformation - which we refer to as Synthetic Misinformers - in order to train MMD models. However, limited evaluation on real-world misinformation and a lack of comparisons with other Synthetic Misinformers makes difficult to assess progress in the field. To address this, we perform a comparative study on existing and new Synthetic Misinformers that involves (1) out-of-context (OOC) image-caption pairs, (2) cross-modal named entity inconsistency (NEI) as well as (3) hybrid approaches and we evaluate them against real-world misinformation; using the COSMOS benchmark. The comparative study showed that our proposed CLIP-based Named Entity Swapping can lead to MMD models that surpass other OOC and NEI Misinformers in terms of multimodal accuracy and that hybrid approaches can lead to even higher detection accuracy. Nevertheless, after alleviating information leakage from the COSMOS evaluation protocol, low Sensitivity scores indicate that the task is significantly more challenging than previous studies suggested. Finally, our findings showed that NEI-based Synthetic Misinformers tend to suffer from a unimodal bias, where text-only MMDs can outperform multimodal ones.
summary: With the expansion of social media and the increasing dissemination of multimedia content, the spread of misinformation has become a major concern. This necessitates effective strategies for multimodal misinformation detection (MMD) that detect whether the combination of an image and its accompanying text could mislead or misinform. Due to the data-intensive nature of deep neural networks and the labor-intensive process of manual annotation, researchers have been exploring various methods for automatically generating synthetic multimodal misinformation - which we refer to as Synthetic Misinformers - in order to train MMD models. However, limited evaluation on real-world misinformation and a lack of comparisons with other Synthetic Misinformers makes difficult to assess progress in the field. To address this, we perform a comparative study on existing and new Synthetic Misinformers that involves (1) out-of-context (OOC) image-caption pairs, (2) cross-modal named entity inconsistency (NEI) as well as (3) hybrid approaches and we evaluate them against real-world misinformation; using the COSMOS benchmark. The comparative study showed that our proposed CLIP-based Named Entity Swapping can lead to MMD models that surpass other OOC and NEI Misinformers in terms of multimodal accuracy and that hybrid approaches can lead to even higher detection accuracy. Nevertheless, after alleviating information leakage from the COSMOS evaluation protocol, low Sensitivity scores indicate that the task is significantly more challenging than previous studies suggested. Finally, our findings showed that NEI-based Synthetic Misinformers tend to suffer from a unimodal bias, where text-only MMDs can outperform multimodal ones.
abstract_zh: 随着社交媒体的扩张和多媒体内容传播的不断增加，错误信息的传播已成为一个主要问题。这就需要有效的多模态错误信息检测 (MMD) 策略来检测图像及其随附文本的组合是否可能误导或误导。由于深度神经网络的数据密集型性质和手动注释的劳动密集型过程，研究人员一直在探索各种自动生成合成多模态错误信息（我们称之为合成错误信息）的方法，以训练 MMD 模型。然而，对现实世界错误信息的评估有限，并且缺乏与其他合成错误信息者的比较，使得评估该领域的进展变得困难。为了解决这个问题，我们对现有的和新的合成误导者进行了比较研究，其中涉及（1）脱离上下文（OOC）图像标题对，（2）跨模式命名实体不一致（NEI）以及（3）混合方法，并根据现实世界的错误信息对其进行评估；使用 COSMOS 基准。比较研究表明，我们提出的基于 CLIP 的命名实体交换可以导致 MMD 模型在多模态精度方面超越其他 OOC 和 NEI 错误信息，并且混合方法可以带来更高的检测精度。然而，在减少 COSMOS 评估协议的信息泄漏后，低敏感度分数表明该任务比之前的研究建议更具挑战性。最后，我们的研究结果表明，基于 NEI 的综合误导者往往会遭受单峰偏差，其中纯文本 MMD 的表现可能优于多峰 MMD。

AI.tldr: 本文提出生成并对抗多模态虚假信息的方法，通过比较不同合成虚假信息生成策略在真实场景中的检测效果，优化多模态虚假信息检测模型。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中多媒体内容的虚假信息传播问题亟待解决，但现有检测模型因数据依赖性和标注成本高而受限，需探索自动化生成合成虚假信息以提升模型训练效率。
AI.method: 设计三种合成虚假信息生成方法（上下文不一致图像-文本对、跨模态实体不一致及混合策略），基于COSMOS基准进行对比实验，并引入CLIP模型改进实体替换方法。
AI.result: CLIP-based实体替换方法在多模态准确率上优于其他策略，混合方法检测精度更高；但修正信息泄露后灵敏度较低，表明任务难度被低估，NEI方法存在单模态偏差。
AI.conclusion: 合成虚假信息生成方法可有效提升检测模型性能，但需关注灵敏度瓶颈及多模态平衡问题，未来研究应结合更复杂的真实场景数据。

search_text: Synthetic Misinformers: Generating and Combating Multimodal Misinformation 合成误导者：生成和打击多模式错误信息 With the expansion of social media and the increasing dissemination of multimedia content, the spread of misinformation has become a major concern. This necessitates effective strategies for multimodal misinformation detection (MMD) that detect whether the combination of an image and its accompanying text could mislead or misinform. Due to the data-intensive nature of deep neural networks and the labor-intensive process of manual annotation, researchers have been exploring various methods for automatically generating synthetic multimodal misinformation - which we refer to as Synthetic Misinformers - in order to train MMD models. However, limited evaluation on real-world misinformation and a lack of comparisons with other Synthetic Misinformers makes difficult to assess progress in the field. To address this, we perform a comparative study on existing and new Synthetic Misinformers that involves (1) out-of-context (OOC) image-caption pairs, (2) cross-modal named entity inconsistency (NEI) as well as (3) hybrid approaches and we evaluate them against real-world misinformation; using the COSMOS benchmark. The comparative study showed that our proposed CLIP-based Named Entity Swapping can lead to MMD models that surpass other OOC and NEI Misinformers in terms of multimodal accuracy and that hybrid approaches can lead to even higher detection accuracy. Nevertheless, after alleviating information leakage from the COSMOS evaluation protocol, low Sensitivity scores indicate that the task is significantly more challenging than previous studies suggested. Finally, our findings showed that NEI-based Synthetic Misinformers tend to suffer from a unimodal bias, where text-only MMDs can outperform multimodal ones. 随着社交媒体的扩张和多媒体内容传播的不断增加，错误信息的传播已成为一个主要问题。这就需要有效的多模态错误信息检测 (MMD) 策略来检测图像及其随附文本的组合是否可能误导或误导。由于深度神经网络的数据密集型性质和手动注释的劳动密集型过程，研究人员一直在探索各种自动生成合成多模态错误信息（我们称之为合成错误信息）的方法，以训练 MMD 模型。然而，对现实世界错误信息的评估有限，并且缺乏与其他合成错误信息者的比较，使得评估该领域的进展变得困难。为了解决这个问题，我们对现有的和新的合成误导者进行了比较研究，其中涉及（1）脱离上下文（OOC）图像标题对，（2）跨模式命名实体不一致（NEI）以及（3）混合方法，并根据现实世界的错误信息对其进行评估；使用 COSMOS 基准。比较研究表明，我们提出的基于 CLIP 的命名实体交换可以导致 MMD 模型在多模态精度方面超越其他 OOC 和 NEI 错误信息，并且混合方法可以带来更高的检测精度。然而，在减少 COSMOS 评估协议的信息泄漏后，低敏感度分数表明该任务比之前的研究建议更具挑战性。最后，我们的研究结果表明，基于 NEI 的综合误导者往往会遭受单峰偏差，其中纯文本 MMD 的表现可能优于多峰 MMD。 本文提出生成并对抗多模态虚假信息的方法，通过比较不同合成虚假信息生成策略在真实场景中的检测效果，优化多模态虚假信息检测模型。 Stefanos-Iordanis Papadopoulos,Christos Koutlis,Symeon Papadopoulos,Panagiotis C. Petrantonakis cs.MM,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Yining Shi,Kun Jiang,Jiusi Li,Zelin Qian,Junze Wen,Mengmeng Yang,Ke Wang,Diange Yang
title: Grid-Centric Traffic Scenario Perception for Autonomous Driving: A Comprehensive Review
title_zh: 自动驾驶以网格为中心的交通场景感知：全面回顾
abstract: Grid-centric perception is a crucial field for mobile robot perception and navigation. Nonetheless, grid-centric perception is less prevalent than object-centric perception as autonomous vehicles need to accurately perceive highly dynamic, large-scale traffic scenarios and the complexity and computational costs of grid-centric perception are high. In recent years, the rapid development of deep learning techniques and hardware provides fresh insights into the evolution of grid-centric perception. The fundamental difference between grid-centric and object-centric pipeline lies in that grid-centric perception follows a geometry-first paradigm which is more robust to the open-world driving scenarios with endless long-tailed semantically-unknown obstacles. Recent researches demonstrate the great advantages of grid-centric perception, such as comprehensive fine-grained environmental representation, greater robustness to occlusion and irregular shaped objects, better ground estimation, and safer planning policies. There is also a growing trend that the capacity of occupancy networks are greatly expanded to 4D scene perception and prediction and latest techniques are highly related to new research topics such as 4D occupancy forecasting, generative AI and world models in the field of autonomous driving. Given the lack of current surveys for this rapidly expanding field, we present a hierarchically-structured review of grid-centric perception for autonomous vehicles. We organize previous and current knowledge of occupancy grid techniques along the main vein from 2D BEV grids to 3D occupancy to 4D occupancy forecasting. We additionally summarize label-efficient occupancy learning and the role of grid-centric perception in driving systems. Lastly, we present a summary of the current research trend and provide future outlooks.
summary: Grid-centric perception is a crucial field for mobile robot perception and navigation. Nonetheless, grid-centric perception is less prevalent than object-centric perception as autonomous vehicles need to accurately perceive highly dynamic, large-scale traffic scenarios and the complexity and computational costs of grid-centric perception are high. In recent years, the rapid development of deep learning techniques and hardware provides fresh insights into the evolution of grid-centric perception. The fundamental difference between grid-centric and object-centric pipeline lies in that grid-centric perception follows a geometry-first paradigm which is more robust to the open-world driving scenarios with endless long-tailed semantically-unknown obstacles. Recent researches demonstrate the great advantages of grid-centric perception, such as comprehensive fine-grained environmental representation, greater robustness to occlusion and irregular shaped objects, better ground estimation, and safer planning policies. There is also a growing trend that the capacity of occupancy networks are greatly expanded to 4D scene perception and prediction and latest techniques are highly related to new research topics such as 4D occupancy forecasting, generative AI and world models in the field of autonomous driving. Given the lack of current surveys for this rapidly expanding field, we present a hierarchically-structured review of grid-centric perception for autonomous vehicles. We organize previous and current knowledge of occupancy grid techniques along the main vein from 2D BEV grids to 3D occupancy to 4D occupancy forecasting. We additionally summarize label-efficient occupancy learning and the role of grid-centric perception in driving systems. Lastly, we present a summary of the current research trend and provide future outlooks.
abstract_zh: 以网格为中心的感知是移动机器人感知和导航的关键领域。尽管如此，以网格为中心的感知不如以对象为中心的感知普遍，因为自动驾驶车辆需要准确感知高度动态、大规模的交通场景，并且以网格为中心的感知的复杂性和计算成本很高。近年来，深度学习技术和硬件的快速发展为以网格为中心的感知的演变提供了新的见解。以网格为中心和以对象为中心的管道之间的根本区别在于，以网格为中心的感知遵循几何优先范式，该范式对于具有无尽长尾语义未知障碍的开放世界驾驶场景更加鲁棒。最近的研究证明了以网格为中心的感知的巨大优势，例如全面的细粒度环境表示、对遮挡和不规则形状物体的更强鲁棒性、更好的地面估计和更安全的规划策略。还有一个日益增长的趋势是，占用网络的容量大大扩展到4D场景感​​知和预测，最新技术与自动驾驶领域的4D占用预测、生成式人工智能和世界模型等新研究主题高度相关。鉴于目前缺乏对这个快速扩展领域的调查，我们对自动驾驶汽车以网格为中心的感知进行了分层结构的审查。我们沿着从 2D BEV 网格到 3D 占用再到 4D 占用预测的主线整理了以前和当前的占用网格技术知识。我们还总结了标签高效的占用学习以及以网格为中心的感知在驾驶系统中的作用。最后，我们总结了当前的研究趋势并提出了未来的展望。

AI.tldr: 本文对自动驾驶中的网格中心感知方法进行全面综述，梳理其从2D鸟瞰图到4D场景预测的发展脉络。
AI.motivation: 网格中心感知在动态复杂交通场景中具有更强鲁棒性，但因计算复杂度高而应用较少，亟需系统性总结最新进展。
AI.method: 采用分层结构综述方法，按2D BEV网格、3D占用网格、4D场景预测三个阶段梳理技术演进，并总结标签高效学习与系统应用。
AI.result: 系统总结了网格中心感知在环境表征、遮挡鲁棒性、地面估计等方面的优势，以及4D预测与生成式AI等前沿方向。
AI.conclusion: 网格中心感知是自动驾驶安全规划的重要方向，未来将向更高维时空预测和生成式世界模型发展。

authors_text: Jun Xue,Cunhang Fan,Jiangyan Yi,Chenglong Wang,Zhengqi Wen,Dan Zhang,Zhao Lv
title: Learning From Yourself: A Self-Distillation Method for Fake Speech Detection
title_zh: 向自己学习：一种用于虚假语音检测的自蒸馏方法
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel self-distillation method for fake speech detection (FSD), which can significantly improve the performance of FSD without increasing the model complexity. For FSD, some fine-grained information is very important, such as spectrogram defects, mute segments, and so on, which are often perceived by shallow networks. However, shallow networks have much noise, which can not capture this very well. To address this problem, we propose using the deepest network instruct shallow network for enhancing shallow networks. Specifically, the networks of FSD are divided into several segments, the deepest network being used as the teacher model, and all shallow networks become multiple student models by adding classifiers. Meanwhile, the distillation path between the deepest network feature and shallow network features is used to reduce the feature difference. A series of experimental results on the ASVspoof 2019 LA and PA datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed method, with significant improvements compared to the baseline.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel self-distillation method for fake speech detection (FSD), which can significantly improve the performance of FSD without increasing the model complexity. For FSD, some fine-grained information is very important, such as spectrogram defects, mute segments, and so on, which are often perceived by shallow networks. However, shallow networks have much noise, which can not capture this very well. To address this problem, we propose using the deepest network instruct shallow network for enhancing shallow networks. Specifically, the networks of FSD are divided into several segments, the deepest network being used as the teacher model, and all shallow networks become multiple student models by adding classifiers. Meanwhile, the distillation path between the deepest network feature and shallow network features is used to reduce the feature difference. A series of experimental results on the ASVspoof 2019 LA and PA datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed method, with significant improvements compared to the baseline.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于假语音检测（FSD）的新型自蒸馏方法，该方法可以在不增加模型复杂性的情况下显着提高 FSD 的性能。对于FSD来说，一些细粒度的信息非常重要，比如频谱图缺陷、静音段等，这些信息往往被浅层网络感知。然而，浅层网络有很多噪声，不能很好地捕捉到这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用最深的网络指导浅层网络来增强浅层网络。具体来说，FSD的网络被分为几段，最深的网络用作教师模型，所有浅层网络通过添加分类器成为多个学生模型。同时，利用最深层网络特征和浅层网络特征之间的蒸馏路径来减少特征差异。 ASVspoof 2019 LA 和 PA 数据集上的一系列实验结果表明了所提出方法的有效性，与基线相比有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自蒸馏方法用于虚假语音检测，通过深层网络指导浅层网络提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 浅层网络在捕捉虚假语音的细粒度特征（如频谱缺陷、静音段）时存在噪声干扰，而深层网络虽能捕捉这些特征但复杂度高，需在不增加模型复杂度的前提下提升性能。
AI.method: 将FSD网络划分为多段，以最深网络为教师模型，浅层网络添加分类器作为学生模型，通过蒸馏路径对齐深层与浅层特征以减少差异。
AI.result: 在ASVspoof 2019 LA和PA数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏方法能在不增加模型复杂度的情况下有效提升虚假语音检测性能。

search_text: Learning From Yourself: A Self-Distillation Method for Fake Speech Detection 向自己学习：一种用于虚假语音检测的自蒸馏方法 In this paper, we propose a novel self-distillation method for fake speech detection (FSD), which can significantly improve the performance of FSD without increasing the model complexity. For FSD, some fine-grained information is very important, such as spectrogram defects, mute segments, and so on, which are often perceived by shallow networks. However, shallow networks have much noise, which can not capture this very well. To address this problem, we propose using the deepest network instruct shallow network for enhancing shallow networks. Specifically, the networks of FSD are divided into several segments, the deepest network being used as the teacher model, and all shallow networks become multiple student models by adding classifiers. Meanwhile, the distillation path between the deepest network feature and shallow network features is used to reduce the feature difference. A series of experimental results on the ASVspoof 2019 LA and PA datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed method, with significant improvements compared to the baseline. 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于假语音检测（FSD）的新型自蒸馏方法，该方法可以在不增加模型复杂性的情况下显着提高 FSD 的性能。对于FSD来说，一些细粒度的信息非常重要，比如频谱图缺陷、静音段等，这些信息往往被浅层网络感知。然而，浅层网络有很多噪声，不能很好地捕捉到这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用最深的网络指导浅层网络来增强浅层网络。具体来说，FSD的网络被分为几段，最深的网络用作教师模型，所有浅层网络通过添加分类器成为多个学生模型。同时，利用最深层网络特征和浅层网络特征之间的蒸馏路径来减少特征差异。 ASVspoof 2019 LA 和 PA 数据集上的一系列实验结果表明了所提出方法的有效性，与基线相比有显着改进。 本文提出一种自蒸馏方法用于虚假语音检测，通过深层网络指导浅层网络提升检测性能。 Jun Xue,Cunhang Fan,Jiangyan Yi,Chenglong Wang,Zhengqi Wen,Dan Zhang,Zhao Lv cs.SD,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Chungeng Tian,Ning Hao,Fenghua He,Haodi Yao
title: Consistent Distributed Cooperative Localization: A Coordinate Transformation Approach
title_zh: 一致的分布式协作定位：一种坐标变换方法
abstract: This paper addresses the consistency issue of multi-robot distributed cooperative localization. We introduce a consistent distributed cooperative localization algorithm conducting state estimation in a transformed coordinate. The core idea involves a linear time-varying coordinated transformation to render the propagation Jacobian independent of the state and make it suitable for a distributed manner. This transformation is seamlessly integrated into a server-based distributed cooperative localization framework, in which each robot estimates its own state while the server maintains the cross-correlations. The transformation ensures the correct observability property of the entire framework. Moreover, the algorithm accommodates various types of robot-to-robot relative measurements, broadening its applicability. Through simulations and real-world dataset experiments, the proposed algorithm has demonstrated better performance in terms of both consistency and accuracy compared to existing algorithms.
summary: This paper addresses the consistency issue of multi-robot distributed cooperative localization. We introduce a consistent distributed cooperative localization algorithm conducting state estimation in a transformed coordinate. The core idea involves a linear time-varying coordinated transformation to render the propagation Jacobian independent of the state and make it suitable for a distributed manner. This transformation is seamlessly integrated into a server-based distributed cooperative localization framework, in which each robot estimates its own state while the server maintains the cross-correlations. The transformation ensures the correct observability property of the entire framework. Moreover, the algorithm accommodates various types of robot-to-robot relative measurements, broadening its applicability. Through simulations and real-world dataset experiments, the proposed algorithm has demonstrated better performance in terms of both consistency and accuracy compared to existing algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了多机器人分布式协作定位的一致性问题。我们引入了一种一致的分布式协作定位算法，在变换坐标中进行状态估计。其核心思想涉及线性时变协调变换，使传播雅可比行列式与状态无关，并使其适合分布式方式。这种转换无缝集成到基于服务器的分布式协作定位框架中，其中每个机器人估计自己的状态，同时服务器维护互相关性。该转换保证了整个框架的正确可观察性。此外，该算法适应各种类型的机器人之间的相对测量，扩大了其适用性。通过模拟和真实数据集实验，与现有算法相比，所提出的算法在一致性和准确性方面表现出更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于坐标变换的一致分布式协作定位算法，解决多机器人系统中的状态估计一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式协作定位算法在多机器人系统中存在一致性不足的问题，需提升定位准确性和可观测性。
AI.method: 通过线性时变坐标变换解耦状态传播雅可比矩阵，结合服务器端维护交叉相关的分布式框架，确保系统可观测性。
AI.result: 仿真与真实数据实验表明，该算法在一致性及定位精度上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效解决了多机器人分布式定位一致性问题，适用于多种相对测量场景，具备更高的可靠性和适用性。

authors_text: Zhen Cheng,Fei Zhu,Xu-Yao Zhang,Cheng-Lin Liu
title: Average of Pruning: Improving Performance and Stability of Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 平均剪枝：提高分布外检测的性能和稳定性
abstract: Detecting Out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs have been a critical issue for neural networks in the open world. However, the unstable behavior of OOD detection along the optimization trajectory during training has not been explored clearly. In this paper, we first find the performance of OOD detection suffers from overfitting and instability during training: 1) the performance could decrease when the training error is near zero, and 2) the performance would vary sharply in the final stage of training. Based on our findings, we propose Average of Pruning (AoP), consisting of model averaging and pruning, to mitigate the unstable behaviors. Specifically, model averaging can help achieve a stable performance by smoothing the landscape, and pruning is certified to eliminate the overfitting by eliminating redundant features. Comprehensive experiments on various datasets and architectures are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Detecting Out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs have been a critical issue for neural networks in the open world. However, the unstable behavior of OOD detection along the optimization trajectory during training has not been explored clearly. In this paper, we first find the performance of OOD detection suffers from overfitting and instability during training: 1) the performance could decrease when the training error is near zero, and 2) the performance would vary sharply in the final stage of training. Based on our findings, we propose Average of Pruning (AoP), consisting of model averaging and pruning, to mitigate the unstable behaviors. Specifically, model averaging can help achieve a stable performance by smoothing the landscape, and pruning is certified to eliminate the overfitting by eliminating redundant features. Comprehensive experiments on various datasets and architectures are conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 检测分布外（OOD）输入一直是开放世界中神经网络的一个关键问题。然而，训练过程中 OOD 检测沿优化轨迹的不稳定行为尚未得到明确探索。在本文中，我们首先发现OOD检测的性能在训练过程中存在过拟合和不稳定的问题：1）当训练误差接近于零时，性能可能会下降；2）在训练的最后阶段，性能会急剧变化。根据我们的发现，我们提出了平均剪枝（AoP），包括模型平均和剪枝，以减轻不稳定的行为。具体来说，模型平均可以通过平滑景观来帮助实现稳定的性能，并且修剪被证明可以通过消除冗余特征来消除过度拟合。对各种数据集和架构进行了综合实验来验证我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Average of Pruning（AoP）的方法，通过模型平均和剪枝技术提升分布外检测的性能与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法在训练过程中存在性能不稳定问题，表现为训练误差趋近于零时性能下降及训练后期性能剧烈波动。
AI.method: AoP方法结合模型平均（平滑损失景观）与剪枝（消除冗余特征）双重策略，缓解过拟合与训练不稳定现象。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和网络架构上验证了AoP的有效性，显著提升了分布外检测的稳定性与准确率。
AI.conclusion: AoP通过模型平均与剪枝协同作用，有效解决了分布外检测中的训练不稳定问题，为该领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Houssem Boulahbal,Adrian Voicila,Andrew Comport
title: STDepthFormer: Predicting Spatio-temporal Depth from Video with a Self-supervised Transformer Model
title_zh: STDepthFormer：使用自监督 Transformer 模型预测视频的时空深度
abstract: In this paper, a self-supervised model that simultaneously predicts a sequence of future frames from video-input with a novel spatial-temporal attention (ST) network is proposed. The ST transformer network allows constraining both temporal consistency across future frames whilst constraining consistency across spatial objects in the image at different scales. This was not the case in prior works for depth prediction, which focused on predicting a single frame as output. The proposed model leverages prior scene knowledge such as object shape and texture similar to single-image depth inference methods, whilst also constraining the motion and geometry from a sequence of input images. Apart from the transformer architecture, one of the main contributions with respect to prior works lies in the objective function that enforces spatio-temporal consistency across a sequence of output frames rather than a single output frame. As will be shown, this results in more accurate and robust depth sequence forecasting. The model achieves highly accurate depth forecasting results that outperform existing baselines on the KITTI benchmark. Extensive ablation studies were performed to assess the effectiveness of the proposed techniques. One remarkable result of the proposed model is that it is implicitly capable of forecasting the motion of objects in the scene, rather than requiring complex models involving multi-object detection, segmentation and tracking.
summary: In this paper, a self-supervised model that simultaneously predicts a sequence of future frames from video-input with a novel spatial-temporal attention (ST) network is proposed. The ST transformer network allows constraining both temporal consistency across future frames whilst constraining consistency across spatial objects in the image at different scales. This was not the case in prior works for depth prediction, which focused on predicting a single frame as output. The proposed model leverages prior scene knowledge such as object shape and texture similar to single-image depth inference methods, whilst also constraining the motion and geometry from a sequence of input images. Apart from the transformer architecture, one of the main contributions with respect to prior works lies in the objective function that enforces spatio-temporal consistency across a sequence of output frames rather than a single output frame. As will be shown, this results in more accurate and robust depth sequence forecasting. The model achieves highly accurate depth forecasting results that outperform existing baselines on the KITTI benchmark. Extensive ablation studies were performed to assess the effectiveness of the proposed techniques. One remarkable result of the proposed model is that it is implicitly capable of forecasting the motion of objects in the scene, rather than requiring complex models involving multi-object detection, segmentation and tracking.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，提出了一种自监督模型，该模型使用新颖的时空注意力（ST）网络同时预测视频输入中的未来帧序列。 ST 变换器网络允许约束未来帧之间的时间一致性，同时约束图像中不同尺度的空间对象之间的一致性。先前的深度预测工作并非如此，其重点是预测单个帧作为输出。所提出的模型利用先验场景知识，例如类似于单图像深度推断方法的对象形状和纹理，同时还约束输入图像序列的运动和几何形状。除了变压器架构之外，先前工作的主要贡献之一在于目标函数，该目标函数在输出帧序列而不是单个输出帧之间强制执行时空一致性。正如将要显示的，这导致更准确和稳健的深度序列预测。该模型实现了高度准确的深度预测结果，优于 KITTI 基准的现有基线。进行了广泛的消融研究以评估所提出技术的有效性。该模型的一个显着成果是它能够隐式预测场景中物体的运动，而不需要涉及多物体检测、分割和跟踪的复杂模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督的Transformer模型STDepthFormer，通过时空注意力网络从视频中预测时空深度序列。
AI.motivation: 现有深度预测方法仅预测单帧图像，未能考虑时空一致性，且依赖复杂的目标检测与跟踪模型进行运动预测。
AI.method: 设计时空注意力网络（ST Transformer）约束未来帧的时序与空间对象一致性，并提出新的目标函数强化序列输出的时空一致性。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中优于现有方法，且能隐式预测场景中物体运动，无需复杂的目标检测与跟踪模块。
AI.conclusion: STDepthFormer通过自监督学习实现了更准确鲁棒的深度序列预测，为视频理解提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content.method: 设计时空注意力网络（ST Transformer）约束未来帧的时序与空间对象一致性，并提出新的目标函数强化序列输出的时空一致性。

ai_content.conclusion: STDepthFormer通过自监督学习实现了更准确鲁棒的深度序列预测，为视频理解提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: STDepthFormer: Predicting Spatio-temporal Depth from Video with a Self-supervised Transformer Model STDepthFormer：使用自监督 Transformer 模型预测视频的时空深度 In this paper, a self-supervised model that simultaneously predicts a sequence of future frames from video-input with a novel spatial-temporal attention (ST) network is proposed. The ST transformer network allows constraining both temporal consistency across future frames whilst constraining consistency across spatial objects in the image at different scales. This was not the case in prior works for depth prediction, which focused on predicting a single frame as output. The proposed model leverages prior scene knowledge such as object shape and texture similar to single-image depth inference methods, whilst also constraining the motion and geometry from a sequence of input images. Apart from the transformer architecture, one of the main contributions with respect to prior works lies in the objective function that enforces spatio-temporal consistency across a sequence of output frames rather than a single output frame. As will be shown, this results in more accurate and robust depth sequence forecasting. The model achieves highly accurate depth forecasting results that outperform existing baselines on the KITTI benchmark. Extensive ablation studies were performed to assess the effectiveness of the proposed techniques. One remarkable result of the proposed model is that it is implicitly capable of forecasting the motion of objects in the scene, rather than requiring complex models involving multi-object detection, segmentation and tracking. 在本文中，提出了一种自监督模型，该模型使用新颖的时空注意力（ST）网络同时预测视频输入中的未来帧序列。 ST 变换器网络允许约束未来帧之间的时间一致性，同时约束图像中不同尺度的空间对象之间的一致性。先前的深度预测工作并非如此，其重点是预测单个帧作为输出。所提出的模型利用先验场景知识，例如类似于单图像深度推断方法的对象形状和纹理，同时还约束输入图像序列的运动和几何形状。除了变压器架构之外，先前工作的主要贡献之一在于目标函数，该目标函数在输出帧序列而不是单个输出帧之间强制执行时空一致性。正如将要显示的，这导致更准确和稳健的深度序列预测。该模型实现了高度准确的深度预测结果，优于 KITTI 基准的现有基线。进行了广泛的消融研究以评估所提出技术的有效性。该模型的一个显着成果是它能够隐式预测场景中物体的运动，而不需要涉及多物体检测、分割和跟踪的复杂模型。 本文提出一种自监督的Transformer模型STDepthFormer，通过时空注意力网络从视频中预测时空深度序列。 Houssem Boulahbal,Adrian Voicila,Andrew Comport cs.CV

authors_text: Andrianos Michail,Stefanos Konstantinou,Simon Clematide
title: UZH_CLyp at SemEval-2023 Task 9: Head-First Fine-Tuning and ChatGPT Data Generation for Cross-Lingual Learning in Tweet Intimacy Prediction
title_zh: UZH_CLyp 在 SemEval-2023 任务 9：推文亲密度预测中跨语言学习的 Head-First 微调和 ChatGPT 数据生成
abstract: This paper describes the submission of UZH_CLyp for the SemEval 2023 Task 9 "Multilingual Tweet Intimacy Analysis". We achieved second-best results in all 10 languages according to the official Pearson's correlation regression evaluation measure. Our cross-lingual transfer learning approach explores the benefits of using a Head-First Fine-Tuning method (HeFiT) that first updates only the regression head parameters and then also updates the pre-trained transformer encoder parameters at a reduced learning rate. Additionally, we study the impact of using a small set of automatically generated examples (in our case, from ChatGPT) for low-resource settings where no human-labeled data is available. Our study shows that HeFiT stabilizes training and consistently improves results for pre-trained models that lack domain adaptation to tweets. Our study also shows a noticeable performance increase in cross-lingual learning when synthetic data is used, confirming the usefulness of current text generation systems to improve zero-shot baseline results. Finally, we examine how possible inconsistencies in the annotated data contribute to cross-lingual interference issues.
summary: This paper describes the submission of UZH_CLyp for the SemEval 2023 Task 9 "Multilingual Tweet Intimacy Analysis". We achieved second-best results in all 10 languages according to the official Pearson's correlation regression evaluation measure. Our cross-lingual transfer learning approach explores the benefits of using a Head-First Fine-Tuning method (HeFiT) that first updates only the regression head parameters and then also updates the pre-trained transformer encoder parameters at a reduced learning rate. Additionally, we study the impact of using a small set of automatically generated examples (in our case, from ChatGPT) for low-resource settings where no human-labeled data is available. Our study shows that HeFiT stabilizes training and consistently improves results for pre-trained models that lack domain adaptation to tweets. Our study also shows a noticeable performance increase in cross-lingual learning when synthetic data is used, confirming the usefulness of current text generation systems to improve zero-shot baseline results. Finally, we examine how possible inconsistencies in the annotated data contribute to cross-lingual interference issues.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 UZH_CLyp 提交 SemEval 2023 任务 9“多语言推文亲密度分析”的情况。根据官方 Pearson 相关回归评估指标，我们在所有 10 种语言中取得了第二好的成绩。我们的跨语言迁移学习方法探索了使用 Head-First Fine-Tuning 方法 (HeFiT) 的好处，该方法首先仅更新回归头参数，然后以降低的学习率更新预训练的 Transformer 编码器参数。此外，我们还研究了使用一小组自动生成的示例（在我们的例子中，来自 ChatGPT）对没有人工标记数据的资源匮乏环境的影响。我们的研究表明，HeFiT 可以稳定训练，并持续改善缺乏对推文领域适应的预训练模型的结果。我们的研究还表明，使用合成数据时，跨语言学习的性能显着提高，证实了当前文本生成系统在改善零样本基线结果方面的有用性。最后，我们研究了注释数据中可能存在的不一致如何导致跨语言干扰问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨语言推文亲密程度预测方法，通过头优先微调（HeFiT）和ChatGPT生成的合成数据提升多语言模型性能。
AI.motivation: 针对低资源语言缺乏标注数据的问题，探索跨语言迁移学习的有效方法以提升推文亲密程度预测的零样本性能。
AI.method: 采用分阶段微调策略（先更新回归头再微调编码器），结合ChatGPT生成的合成数据增强低资源语言的训练效果。
AI.result: 在SemEval 2023任务9的10种语言中均取得第二名，验证了HeFiT对模型稳定性和跨语言迁移的有效性，合成数据显著提升零样本表现。
AI.conclusion: 头优先微调与合成数据生成有效提升跨语言推文分析性能，标注数据不一致是跨语言干扰的关键因素。

authors_text: Ye-Rin Jeoung,Joon-Young Yang,Jeong-Hwan Choi,Joon-Hyuk Chang
title: Improving Transformer-based End-to-End Speaker Diarization by Assigning Auxiliary Losses to Attention Heads
title_zh: 通过将辅助损耗分配给注意力头来改进基于变压器的端到端扬声器二值化
abstract: Transformer-based end-to-end neural speaker diarization (EEND) models utilize the multi-head self-attention (SA) mechanism to enable accurate speaker label prediction in overlapped speech regions. In this study, to enhance the training effectiveness of SA-EEND models, we propose the use of auxiliary losses for the SA heads of the transformer layers. Specifically, we assume that the attention weight matrices of an SA layer are redundant if their patterns are similar to those of the identity matrix. We then explicitly constrain such matrices to exhibit specific speaker activity patterns relevant to voice activity detection or overlapped speech detection tasks. Consequently, we expect the proposed auxiliary losses to guide the transformer layers to exhibit more diverse patterns in the attention weights, thereby reducing the assumed redundancies in the SA heads. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated using the simulated and CALLHOME datasets for two-speaker diarization tasks, reducing the diarization error rate of the conventional SA-EEND model by 32.58% and 17.11%, respectively.
summary: Transformer-based end-to-end neural speaker diarization (EEND) models utilize the multi-head self-attention (SA) mechanism to enable accurate speaker label prediction in overlapped speech regions. In this study, to enhance the training effectiveness of SA-EEND models, we propose the use of auxiliary losses for the SA heads of the transformer layers. Specifically, we assume that the attention weight matrices of an SA layer are redundant if their patterns are similar to those of the identity matrix. We then explicitly constrain such matrices to exhibit specific speaker activity patterns relevant to voice activity detection or overlapped speech detection tasks. Consequently, we expect the proposed auxiliary losses to guide the transformer layers to exhibit more diverse patterns in the attention weights, thereby reducing the assumed redundancies in the SA heads. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated using the simulated and CALLHOME datasets for two-speaker diarization tasks, reducing the diarization error rate of the conventional SA-EEND model by 32.58% and 17.11%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的端到端神经说话人二值化 (EEND) 模型利用多头自注意力 (SA) 机制来实现重叠语音区域中准确的说话人标签预测。在本研究中，为了提高 SA-EEND 模型的训练效果，我们建议对变压器层的 SA 头使用辅助损耗。具体来说，我们假设 SA 层的注意力权重矩阵是冗余的，如果它们的模式与单位矩阵的模式相似。然后，我们明确约束此类矩阵以展示与语音活动检测或重叠语音检测任务相关的特定说话者活动模式。因此，我们期望所提出的辅助损失能够引导变压器层在注意力权重中表现出更多样化的模式，从而减少 SA 头中假设的冗余。使用模拟数据集和 CALLHOME 数据集进行双说话人二值化任务证明了该方法的有效性，将传统 SA-EEND 模型的二值化错误率分别降低了 32.58% 和 17.11%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过为Transformer层的注意力头分配辅助损失，改进基于Transformer的端到端说话人分割模型（SA-EEND）的训练效果。
AI.motivation: 传统SA-EEND模型中，多头自注意力机制的权重矩阵可能存在冗余，导致模型在重叠语音区域的说话人标签预测不准确。
AI.method: 假设注意力权重矩阵与单位矩阵模式相似时存在冗余，通过引入辅助损失约束这些矩阵呈现与语音活动检测或重叠语音检测相关的特定模式，增强注意力权重的多样性。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集和CALLHOME数据集上，分别将传统SA-EEND模型的分割错误率降低了32.58%和17.11%。
AI.conclusion: 辅助损失有效减少了注意力头的冗余性，提升了模型在说话人分割任务中的性能。
