authors_text: Junho Kim,Byung-Kwan Lee,Yong Man Ro
title: Demystifying Causal Features on Adversarial Examples and Causal Inoculation for Robust Network by Adversarial Instrumental Variable Regression
title_zh: 通过对抗性工具变量回归揭秘对抗性例子的因果特征和稳健网络的因果接种
abstract: The origin of adversarial examples is still inexplicable in research fields, and it arouses arguments from various viewpoints, albeit comprehensive investigations. In this paper, we propose a way of delving into the unexpected vulnerability in adversarially trained networks from a causal perspective, namely adversarial instrumental variable (IV) regression. By deploying it, we estimate the causal relation of adversarial prediction under an unbiased environment dissociated from unknown confounders. Our approach aims to demystify inherent causal features on adversarial examples by leveraging a zero-sum optimization game between a casual feature estimator (i.e., hypothesis model) and worst-case counterfactuals (i.e., test function) disturbing to find causal features. Through extensive analyses, we demonstrate that the estimated causal features are highly related to the correct prediction for adversarial robustness, and the counterfactuals exhibit extreme features significantly deviating from the correct prediction. In addition, we present how to effectively inoculate CAusal FEatures (CAFE) into defense networks for improving adversarial robustness.
summary: The origin of adversarial examples is still inexplicable in research fields, and it arouses arguments from various viewpoints, albeit comprehensive investigations. In this paper, we propose a way of delving into the unexpected vulnerability in adversarially trained networks from a causal perspective, namely adversarial instrumental variable (IV) regression. By deploying it, we estimate the causal relation of adversarial prediction under an unbiased environment dissociated from unknown confounders. Our approach aims to demystify inherent causal features on adversarial examples by leveraging a zero-sum optimization game between a casual feature estimator (i.e., hypothesis model) and worst-case counterfactuals (i.e., test function) disturbing to find causal features. Through extensive analyses, we demonstrate that the estimated causal features are highly related to the correct prediction for adversarial robustness, and the counterfactuals exhibit extreme features significantly deviating from the correct prediction. In addition, we present how to effectively inoculate CAusal FEatures (CAFE) into defense networks for improving adversarial robustness.
abstract_zh: 对抗性例子的起源在研究领域仍然是一个令人费解的问题，尽管进行了全面的调查，但仍引起了不同观点的争论。在本文中，我们提出了一种从因果角度深入研究对抗性训练网络中意外脆弱性的方法，即对抗性工具变量（IV）回归。通过部署它，我们估计了在与未知混杂因素无关的无偏见环境下对抗性预测的因果关系。我们的方法旨在通过利用偶然特征估计器（即假设模型）和最坏情况反事实（即测试函数）之间的零和优化博弈来揭开对抗性示例的固有因果特征的神秘面纱，从而找到因果特征。通过广泛的分析，我们证明估计的因果特征与对抗鲁棒性的正确预测高度相关，并且反事实表现出明显偏离正确预测的极端特征。此外，我们还介绍了如何有效地将因果特征（CAFE）融入防御网络中，以提高对抗鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文从因果视角提出对抗性样本的因果特征分析方法，并通过因果接种（CAFE）提升神经网络的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗样本的成因尚未明确，现有方法难以解释模型脆弱性背后的因果机制，亟需从因果角度探索防御策略。
AI.method: 采用对抗性工具变量（IV）回归方法，通过零和博弈估计因果特征，并设计CAFE框架将因果特征注入防御网络。
AI.result: 实验证明估计的因果特征与正确预测强相关，对抗性反事实样本呈现显著偏离特征，CAFE有效提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 因果特征分析为理解对抗样本提供新视角，CAFE接种方法为构建鲁棒模型提供有效途径。

authors_text: Shuai Xiao,Le Guo,Zaifan Jiang,Lei Lv,Yuanbo Chen,Jun Zhu,Shuang Yang
title: Model-based Constrained MDP for Budget Allocation in Sequential Incentive Marketing
title_zh: 基于模型的序列激励营销预算分配约束MDP
comment: Published at CIKM '19: Proceedings of the 28th ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management
comments: Published at CIKM '19: Proceedings of the 28th ACM International Conference on Information and Knowledge Management
abstract: Sequential incentive marketing is an important approach for online businesses to acquire customers, increase loyalty and boost sales. How to effectively allocate the incentives so as to maximize the return (e.g., business objectives) under the budget constraint, however, is less studied in the literature. This problem is technically challenging due to the facts that 1) the allocation strategy has to be learned using historically logged data, which is counterfactual in nature, and 2) both the optimality and feasibility (i.e., that cost cannot exceed budget) needs to be assessed before being deployed to online systems. In this paper, we formulate the problem as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). To solve the CMDP problem with logged counterfactual data, we propose an efficient learning algorithm which combines bisection search and model-based planning. First, the CMDP is converted into its dual using Lagrangian relaxation, which is proved to be monotonic with respect to the dual variable. Furthermore, we show that the dual problem can be solved by policy learning, with the optimal dual variable being found efficiently via bisection search (i.e., by taking advantage of the monotonicity). Lastly, we show that model-based planing can be used to effectively accelerate the joint optimization process without retraining the policy for every dual variable. Empirical results on synthetic and real marketing datasets confirm the effectiveness of our methods.
summary: Sequential incentive marketing is an important approach for online businesses to acquire customers, increase loyalty and boost sales. How to effectively allocate the incentives so as to maximize the return (e.g., business objectives) under the budget constraint, however, is less studied in the literature. This problem is technically challenging due to the facts that 1) the allocation strategy has to be learned using historically logged data, which is counterfactual in nature, and 2) both the optimality and feasibility (i.e., that cost cannot exceed budget) needs to be assessed before being deployed to online systems. In this paper, we formulate the problem as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). To solve the CMDP problem with logged counterfactual data, we propose an efficient learning algorithm which combines bisection search and model-based planning. First, the CMDP is converted into its dual using Lagrangian relaxation, which is proved to be monotonic with respect to the dual variable. Furthermore, we show that the dual problem can be solved by policy learning, with the optimal dual variable being found efficiently via bisection search (i.e., by taking advantage of the monotonicity). Lastly, we show that model-based planing can be used to effectively accelerate the joint optimization process without retraining the policy for every dual variable. Empirical results on synthetic and real marketing datasets confirm the effectiveness of our methods.
abstract_zh: 序列激励营销是在线企业获取客户、提高忠诚度和促进销售的重要方法。然而，如何在预算约束下有效分配激励措施以实现回报（例如业务目标）最大化，文献中研究较少。这个问题在技术上具有挑战性，因为 1) 必须使用历史记录的数据来学习分配策略，这本质上是反事实的，2) 在部署到在线系统之前需要评估最优性和可行性（即成本不能超过预算）。在本文中，我们将问题表述为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）。为了解决记录反事实数据的 CMDP 问题，我们提出了一种结合二分搜索和基于模型的规划的有效学习算法。首先，使用拉格朗日松弛将CMDP转换为对偶变量，证明其相对于对偶变量是单调的。此外，我们表明对偶问题可以通过策略学习来解决，通过二分搜索（即利用单调性）有效地找到最佳对偶变量。最后，我们表明基于模型的规划可用于有效加速联合优化过程，而无需为每个双变量重新训练策略。合成和真实营销数据集的实证结果证实了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模型的约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）方法，解决在线营销中预算受限的激励分配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对如何在预算约束下有效分配激励以最大化收益关注不足，且需处理历史数据的反事实特性及策略可行性验证难题。
AI.method: 通过拉格朗日松弛将CMDP转化为对偶问题，结合二分法搜索最优对偶变量，并利用基于模型的规划加速联合优化过程。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实营销数据集上的实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法能高效解决预算约束下的激励分配问题，兼顾策略最优性与可行性。

authors_text: Jiayuan Zhuang,Zheng Qin,Hao Yu,Xucan Chen
title: Task-Specific Context Decoupling for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于目标检测的特定于任务的上下文解耦
abstract: Classification and localization are two main sub-tasks in object detection. Nonetheless, these two tasks have inconsistent preferences for feature context, i.e., localization expects more boundary-aware features to accurately regress the bounding box, while more semantic context is preferred for object classification. Exsiting methods usually leverage disentangled heads to learn different feature context for each task. However, the heads are still applied on the same input features, which leads to an imperfect balance between classifcation and localization. In this work, we propose a novel Task-Specific COntext DEcoupling (TSCODE) head which further disentangles the feature encoding for two tasks. For classification, we generate spatially-coarse but semantically-strong feature encoding. For localization, we provide high-resolution feature map containing more edge information to better regress object boundaries. TSCODE is plug-and-play and can be easily incorperated into existing detection pipelines. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method stably improves different detectors by over 1.0 AP with less computational cost. Our code and models will be publicly released.
summary: Classification and localization are two main sub-tasks in object detection. Nonetheless, these two tasks have inconsistent preferences for feature context, i.e., localization expects more boundary-aware features to accurately regress the bounding box, while more semantic context is preferred for object classification. Exsiting methods usually leverage disentangled heads to learn different feature context for each task. However, the heads are still applied on the same input features, which leads to an imperfect balance between classifcation and localization. In this work, we propose a novel Task-Specific COntext DEcoupling (TSCODE) head which further disentangles the feature encoding for two tasks. For classification, we generate spatially-coarse but semantically-strong feature encoding. For localization, we provide high-resolution feature map containing more edge information to better regress object boundaries. TSCODE is plug-and-play and can be easily incorperated into existing detection pipelines. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method stably improves different detectors by over 1.0 AP with less computational cost. Our code and models will be publicly released.
abstract_zh: 分类和定位是目标检测中的两个主要子任务。尽管如此，这两个任务对特征上下文的偏好不一致，即本地化期望更多的边界感知特征来准确地回归边界框，而更多的语义上下文更适合对象分类。现有的方法通常利用解缠结的头来学习每个任务的不同特征上下文。然而，头部仍然应用于相同的输入特征，这导致分类和定位之间的不完美平衡。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的特定于任务的上下文解耦（TSCODE）头，它进一步解开了两个任务的特征编码。对于分类，我们生成空间粗糙但语义强的特征编码。对于定位，我们提供包含更多边缘信息的高分辨率特征图，以更好地回归对象边界。 TSCODE 是即插即用的，可以轻松整合到现有的检测管道中。大量的实验表明，我们的方法可以以更少的计算成本稳定地将不同的检测器改进超过 1.0 AP。我们的代码和模型将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对目标检测中分类与定位任务特征上下文差异的解耦方法TSCODE。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法虽采用解耦头处理分类与定位任务，但因共享输入特征导致两类任务的特征偏好无法完全满足，影响检测性能平衡。
AI.method: 设计TSCODE头，为分类生成语义强但空间粗粒度的特征，为定位生成高分辨率且富含边缘信息的特征图，实现任务间特征编码的进一步解耦。
AI.result: 在多个检测器上稳定提升超过1.0 AP，且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: TSCODE通过任务特定特征解耦有效提升检测性能，且具有良好的兼容性与实用性。

authors_text: Daizong Liu,Pan Zhou
title: Jointly Visual- and Semantic-Aware Graph Memory Networks for Temporal Sentence Localization in Videos
title_zh: 用于视频中时间句子本地化的联合视觉和语义感知图存储网络
abstract: Temporal sentence localization in videos (TSLV) aims to retrieve the most interested segment in an untrimmed video according to a given sentence query. However, almost of existing TSLV approaches suffer from the same limitations: (1) They only focus on either frame-level or object-level visual representation learning and corresponding correlation reasoning, but fail to integrate them both; (2) They neglect to leverage the rich semantic contexts to further benefit the query reasoning. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel Hierarchical Visual- and Semantic-Aware Reasoning Network (HVSARN), which enables both visual- and semantic-aware query reasoning from object-level to frame-level. Specifically, we present a new graph memory mechanism to perform visual-semantic query reasoning: For visual reasoning, we design a visual graph memory to leverage visual information of video; For semantic reasoning, a semantic graph memory is also introduced to explicitly leverage semantic knowledge contained in the classes and attributes of video objects, and perform correlation reasoning in the semantic space. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our HVSARN achieves a new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Temporal sentence localization in videos (TSLV) aims to retrieve the most interested segment in an untrimmed video according to a given sentence query. However, almost of existing TSLV approaches suffer from the same limitations: (1) They only focus on either frame-level or object-level visual representation learning and corresponding correlation reasoning, but fail to integrate them both; (2) They neglect to leverage the rich semantic contexts to further benefit the query reasoning. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel Hierarchical Visual- and Semantic-Aware Reasoning Network (HVSARN), which enables both visual- and semantic-aware query reasoning from object-level to frame-level. Specifically, we present a new graph memory mechanism to perform visual-semantic query reasoning: For visual reasoning, we design a visual graph memory to leverage visual information of video; For semantic reasoning, a semantic graph memory is also introduced to explicitly leverage semantic knowledge contained in the classes and attributes of video objects, and perform correlation reasoning in the semantic space. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our HVSARN achieves a new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 视频中的时间句子定位（TSLV）旨在根据给定的句子查询检索未修剪视频中最感兴趣的片段。然而，现有的 TSLV 方法几乎都面临着同样的局限性：（1）它们只关注帧级或对象级视觉表示学习和相应的相关推理，但未能将两者整合起来； (2)他们忽视了利用丰富的语义上下文来进一步有利于查询推理。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的分层视觉和语义感知推理网络（HVSARN），它可以实现从对象级到帧级的视觉和语义感知查询推理。具体来说，我们提出了一种新的图内存机制来执行视觉语义查询推理：对于视觉推理，我们设计了一种视觉图内存来利用视频的视觉信息；对于语义推理，还引入了语义图存储器来显式地利用视频对象的类和属性中包含的语义知识，并在语义空间中执行相关推理。对三个数据集的实验表明，我们的 HVSARN 实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合视觉和语义信息的图记忆网络（HVSARN），用于在视频中定位与给定句子查询最相关的时序片段。
AI.motivation: 现有视频时序句子定位方法局限于单独的视觉表示或忽略丰富的语义上下文，导致查询推理能力不足。
AI.method: 设计分层视觉-语义感知推理网络，包含视觉图记忆（处理视频视觉信息）和语义图记忆（利用物体类别与属性进行语义空间关联推理）。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实验验证，HVSARN达到当时最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合视觉与语义双通道图记忆机制，有效提升了视频时序句子定位的准确性。

search_text: Jointly Visual- and Semantic-Aware Graph Memory Networks for Temporal Sentence Localization in Videos 用于视频中时间句子本地化的联合视觉和语义感知图存储网络 Temporal sentence localization in videos (TSLV) aims to retrieve the most interested segment in an untrimmed video according to a given sentence query. However, almost of existing TSLV approaches suffer from the same limitations: (1) They only focus on either frame-level or object-level visual representation learning and corresponding correlation reasoning, but fail to integrate them both; (2) They neglect to leverage the rich semantic contexts to further benefit the query reasoning. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel Hierarchical Visual- and Semantic-Aware Reasoning Network (HVSARN), which enables both visual- and semantic-aware query reasoning from object-level to frame-level. Specifically, we present a new graph memory mechanism to perform visual-semantic query reasoning: For visual reasoning, we design a visual graph memory to leverage visual information of video; For semantic reasoning, a semantic graph memory is also introduced to explicitly leverage semantic knowledge contained in the classes and attributes of video objects, and perform correlation reasoning in the semantic space. Experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our HVSARN achieves a new state-of-the-art performance. 视频中的时间句子定位（TSLV）旨在根据给定的句子查询检索未修剪视频中最感兴趣的片段。然而，现有的 TSLV 方法几乎都面临着同样的局限性：（1）它们只关注帧级或对象级视觉表示学习和相应的相关推理，但未能将两者整合起来； (2)他们忽视了利用丰富的语义上下文来进一步有利于查询推理。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的分层视觉和语义感知推理网络（HVSARN），它可以实现从对象级到帧级的视觉和语义感知查询推理。具体来说，我们提出了一种新的图内存机制来执行视觉语义查询推理：对于视觉推理，我们设计了一种视觉图内存来利用视频的视觉信息；对于语义推理，还引入了语义图存储器来显式地利用视频对象的类和属性中包含的语义知识，并在语义空间中执行相关推理。对三个数据集的实验表明，我们的 HVSARN 实现了新的最先进的性能。 该论文提出了一种结合视觉和语义信息的图记忆网络（HVSARN），用于在视频中定位与给定句子查询最相关的时序片段。 Daizong Liu,Pan Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Shuhang Zheng,Yixuan Li,Zhu Yu,Beinan Yu,Si-Yuan Cao,Minhang Wang,Jintao Xu,Rui Ai,Weihao Gu,Lun Luo,Hui-Liang Shen
title: I2P-Rec: Recognizing Images on Large-scale Point Cloud Maps through Bird's Eye View Projections
title_zh: I2P-Rec：通过鸟瞰投影识别大型点云地图上的图像
abstract: Place recognition is an important technique for autonomous cars to achieve full autonomy since it can provide an initial guess to online localization algorithms. Although current methods based on images or point clouds have achieved satisfactory performance, localizing the images on a large-scale point cloud map remains a fairly unexplored problem. This cross-modal matching task is challenging due to the difficulty in extracting consistent descriptors from images and point clouds. In this paper, we propose the I2P-Rec method to solve the problem by transforming the cross-modal data into the same modality. Specifically, we leverage on the recent success of depth estimation networks to recover point clouds from images. We then project the point clouds into Bird's Eye View (BEV) images. Using the BEV image as an intermediate representation, we extract global features with a Convolutional Neural Network followed by a NetVLAD layer to perform matching. The experimental results evaluated on the KITTI dataset show that, with only a small set of training data, I2P-Rec achieves recall rates at Top-1\% over 80\% and 90\%, when localizing monocular and stereo images on point cloud maps, respectively. We further evaluate I2P-Rec on a 1 km trajectory dataset collected by an autonomous logistics car and show that I2P-Rec can generalize well to previously unseen environments.
summary: Place recognition is an important technique for autonomous cars to achieve full autonomy since it can provide an initial guess to online localization algorithms. Although current methods based on images or point clouds have achieved satisfactory performance, localizing the images on a large-scale point cloud map remains a fairly unexplored problem. This cross-modal matching task is challenging due to the difficulty in extracting consistent descriptors from images and point clouds. In this paper, we propose the I2P-Rec method to solve the problem by transforming the cross-modal data into the same modality. Specifically, we leverage on the recent success of depth estimation networks to recover point clouds from images. We then project the point clouds into Bird's Eye View (BEV) images. Using the BEV image as an intermediate representation, we extract global features with a Convolutional Neural Network followed by a NetVLAD layer to perform matching. The experimental results evaluated on the KITTI dataset show that, with only a small set of training data, I2P-Rec achieves recall rates at Top-1\% over 80\% and 90\%, when localizing monocular and stereo images on point cloud maps, respectively. We further evaluate I2P-Rec on a 1 km trajectory dataset collected by an autonomous logistics car and show that I2P-Rec can generalize well to previously unseen environments.
abstract_zh: 地点识别是自动驾驶汽车实现完全自主的一项重要技术，因为它可以为在线定位算法提供初步猜测。尽管当前基于图像或点云的方法已经取得了令人满意的性能，但在大规模点云地图上定位图像仍然是一个尚未探索的问题。由于从图像和点云中提取一致的描述符很困难，这种跨模态匹配任务具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 I2P-Rec 方法，通过将跨模态数据转换为相同模态数据来解决该问题。具体来说，我们利用最近成功的深度估计网络从图像中恢复点云。然后，我们将点云投影到鸟瞰 (BEV) 图像中。使用 BEV 图像作为中间表示，我们使用卷积神经网络提取全局特征，然后使用 NetVLAD 层来执行匹配。在 KITTI 数据集上评估的实验结果表明，仅使用少量训练数据，I2P-Rec 在点云地图上定位单目和立体图像时分别实现了超过 80% 和 90% 的 Top-1% 召回率。我们在自动物流车收集的 1 公里轨迹数据集上进一步评估 I2P-Rec，并表明 I2P-Rec 可以很好地推广到以前未见过的环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出I2P-Rec方法，通过将图像和点云数据转换为鸟瞰图（BEV）表示，解决在大规模点云地图上进行图像定位的跨模态匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像或点云的方法难以在大规模点云地图上实现图像定位，跨模态数据的一致性描述符提取存在挑战，需探索新方法提升自主驾驶的定位能力。
AI.method: 利用深度估计网络从图像恢复点云，投影为BEV图像；通过CNN和NetVLAD层提取全局特征，实现跨模态匹配。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，仅用少量训练数据即可实现单目和立体图像在点云地图上的Top-1%召回率分别超过80%和90%，并在1公里物流车轨迹数据集上验证了方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: I2P-Rec通过BEV中间表示有效解决了跨模态匹配难题，在大规模点云地图图像定位任务中表现出色且具有良好的环境适应性。

authors_text: Puhua Jiang,Mingze Sun,Ruqi Huang
title: Neural Intrinsic Embedding for Non-rigid Point Cloud Matching
title_zh: 用于非刚性点云匹配的神经本质嵌入
abstract: As a primitive 3D data representation, point clouds are prevailing in 3D sensing, yet short of intrinsic structural information of the underlying objects. Such discrepancy poses great challenges on directly establishing correspondences between point clouds sampled from deformable shapes. In light of this, we propose Neural Intrinsic Embedding (NIE) to embed each vertex into a high-dimensional space in a way that respects the intrinsic structure. Based upon NIE, we further present a weakly-supervised learning framework for non-rigid point cloud registration. Unlike the prior works, we do not require expansive and sensitive off-line basis construction (e.g., eigen-decomposition of Laplacians), nor do we require ground-truth correspondence labels for supervision. We empirically show that our framework performs on par with or even better than the state-of-the-art baselines, which generally require more supervision and/or more structural geometric input.
summary: As a primitive 3D data representation, point clouds are prevailing in 3D sensing, yet short of intrinsic structural information of the underlying objects. Such discrepancy poses great challenges on directly establishing correspondences between point clouds sampled from deformable shapes. In light of this, we propose Neural Intrinsic Embedding (NIE) to embed each vertex into a high-dimensional space in a way that respects the intrinsic structure. Based upon NIE, we further present a weakly-supervised learning framework for non-rigid point cloud registration. Unlike the prior works, we do not require expansive and sensitive off-line basis construction (e.g., eigen-decomposition of Laplacians), nor do we require ground-truth correspondence labels for supervision. We empirically show that our framework performs on par with or even better than the state-of-the-art baselines, which generally require more supervision and/or more structural geometric input.
abstract_zh: 作为一种原始的 3D 数据表示，点云在 3D 传感中很流行，但缺乏底层物体的内在结构信息。这种差异对直接建立从可变形形状采样的点云之间的对应关系提出了巨大的挑战。鉴于此，我们提出神经内在嵌入（NIE），以尊重内在结构的方式将每个顶点嵌入到高维空间中。基于NIE，我们进一步提出了一种用于非刚性点云配准的弱监督学习框架。与之前的工作不同，我们不需要广泛且敏感的离线基础构建（例如拉普拉斯的特征分解），也不需要地面实况对应标签进行监督。我们的经验表明，我们的框架的性能与最先进的基线相当甚至更好，这通常需要更多的监督和/或更多的结构几何输入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Neural Intrinsic Embedding（NIE）的方法，用于解决非刚性点云匹配问题，通过嵌入点云的内在结构信息实现弱监督下的配准。
AI.motivation: 点云作为3D数据的基本表示形式，缺乏对目标内在结构的信息，导致直接建立变形形状点云间的对应关系存在挑战。传统方法依赖复杂的离线基础构造或需要大量监督信息。
AI.method: 提出NIE方法，将每个点嵌入到高维空间以保留内在结构，并构建弱监督学习框架，无需离线基构造或真实对应标签即可实现非刚性点云配准。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在无需更多监督或几何输入的情况下，性能与现有先进方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: NIE方法为非刚性点云匹配提供了高效且无需复杂预处理的解决方案，具有较高的实用价值。

Based upon NIE, we further present a weakly-supervised learning framework for non-rigid point cloud registration. We empirically show that our framework performs on par with or even better than the state-of-the-art baselines, which generally require more supervision and/or more structural geometric input. 作为一种原始的 3D 数据表示，点云在 3D 传感中很流行，但缺乏底层物体的内在结构信息。这种差异对直接建立从可变形形状采样的点云之间的对应关系提出了巨大的挑战。鉴于此，我们提出神经内在嵌入（NIE），以尊重内在结构的方式将每个顶点嵌入到高维空间中。基于NIE，我们进一步提出了一种用于非刚性点云配准的弱监督学习框架。与之前的工作不同，我们不需要广泛且敏感的离线基础构建（例如拉普拉斯的特征分解），也不需要地面实况对应标签进行监督。我们的经验表明，我们的框架的性能与最先进的基线相当甚至更好，这通常需要更多的监督和/或更多的结构几何输入。 本文提出一种名为Neural Intrinsic Embedding（NIE）的方法，用于解决非刚性点云匹配问题，通过嵌入点云的内在结构信息实现弱监督下的配准。 Puhua Jiang,Mingze Sun,Ruqi Huang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_json: et al. (2 additional authors not shown)
authors_text: Yu Zhang,Wei Han,James Qin,Yongqiang Wang,Ankur Bapna,Zhehuai Chen,Nanxin Chen,Bo Li,Vera Axelrod,Gary Wang,Zhong Meng,Ke Hu,Andrew Rosenberg,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Daniel S. Park,Parisa Haghani,Jason Riesa,Ginger Perng,Hagen Soltau,Trevor Strohman,Bhuvana Ramabhadran,Tara Sainath,Pedro Moreno,Chung-Cheng Chiu,Johan Schalkwyk, et al. (2 additional authors not shown)
title: Google USM: Scaling Automatic Speech Recognition Beyond 100 Languages
title_zh: Google USM：将自动语音识别扩展到 100 种以上语言
abstract: We introduce the Universal Speech Model (USM), a single large model that performs automatic speech recognition (ASR) across 100+ languages. This is achieved by pre-training the encoder of the model on a large unlabeled multilingual dataset of 12 million (M) hours spanning over 300 languages, and fine-tuning on a smaller labeled dataset. We use multilingual pre-training with random-projection quantization and speech-text modality matching to achieve state-of-the-art performance on downstream multilingual ASR and speech-to-text translation tasks. We also demonstrate that despite using a labeled training set 1/7-th the size of that used for the Whisper model, our model exhibits comparable or better performance on both in-domain and out-of-domain speech recognition tasks across many languages.
summary: We introduce the Universal Speech Model (USM), a single large model that performs automatic speech recognition (ASR) across 100+ languages. This is achieved by pre-training the encoder of the model on a large unlabeled multilingual dataset of 12 million (M) hours spanning over 300 languages, and fine-tuning on a smaller labeled dataset. We use multilingual pre-training with random-projection quantization and speech-text modality matching to achieve state-of-the-art performance on downstream multilingual ASR and speech-to-text translation tasks. We also demonstrate that despite using a labeled training set 1/7-th the size of that used for the Whisper model, our model exhibits comparable or better performance on both in-domain and out-of-domain speech recognition tasks across many languages.
abstract_zh: 我们推出通用语音模型 (USM)，这是一个可跨 100 多种语言执行自动语音识别 (ASR) 的大型模型。这是通过在涵盖 300 多种语言的 1200 万 (M) 小时的大型未标记多语言数据集上对模型的编码器进行预训练，并在较小的标记数据集上进行微调来实现的。我们使用随机投影量化和语音文本模态匹配的多语言预训练，在下游多语言 ASR 和语音到文本翻译任务上实现最先进的性能。我们还证明，尽管使用的标记训练集大小是 Whisper 模型所用训练集的 1/7，但我们的模型在跨多种语言的域内和域外语音识别任务上都表现出相当或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 介绍一种支持100多种语言的通用语音模型（USM），通过预训练和微调实现跨语言语音识别。
AI.motivation: 现有模型语言覆盖有限且数据需求大，需开发高效多语言ASR模型。
AI.method: 使用多语言预训练（1200万小时数据）结合随机投影量化和语音-文本匹配，再在小规模标记数据上微调。
AI.result: 在多个语言的语音识别和翻译任务中达到SOTA，且训练数据量仅为Whisper的1/7时表现相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 证明多语言预训练与高效微调结合可有效扩展ASR到100+语言，减少数据需求。

authors_text: Josh Williams,Haavard Ahlqvist,Alexander Cunningham,Andrew Kirby,Ira Katz,John Fleming,Joy Conway,Steve Cunningham,Ali Ozel,Uwe Wolfram
title: Validated respiratory drug deposition predictions from 2D and 3D medical images with statistical shape models and convolutional neural networks
title_zh: 使用统计形状模型和卷积神经网络验证 2D 和 3D 医学图像的呼吸道药物沉积预测
comment: 37 pages main text (including frontmatter). 9 figures. Additional supplementary material
comments: 37 pages main text (including frontmatter). 9 figures. Additional supplementary material
abstract: For the one billion sufferers of respiratory disease, managing their disease with inhalers crucially influences their quality of life. Generic treatment plans could be improved with the aid of computational models that account for patient-specific features such as breathing pattern, lung pathology and morphology. Therefore, we aim to develop and validate an automated computational framework for patient-specific deposition modelling. To that end, an image processing approach is proposed that could produce 3D patient respiratory geometries from 2D chest X-rays and 3D CT images. We evaluated the airway and lung morphology produced by our image processing framework, and assessed deposition compared to in vivo data. The 2D-to-3D image processing reproduces airway diameter to 9% median error compared to ground truth segmentations, but is sensitive to outliers of up to 33% due to lung outline noise. Predicted regional deposition gave 5% median error compared to in vivo measurements. The proposed framework is capable of providing patient-specific deposition measurements for varying treatments, to determine which treatment would best satisfy the needs imposed by each patient (such as disease and lung/airway morphology). Integration of patient-specific modelling into clinical practice as an additional decision-making tool could optimise treatment plans and lower the burden of respiratory diseases.
summary: For the one billion sufferers of respiratory disease, managing their disease with inhalers crucially influences their quality of life. Generic treatment plans could be improved with the aid of computational models that account for patient-specific features such as breathing pattern, lung pathology and morphology. Therefore, we aim to develop and validate an automated computational framework for patient-specific deposition modelling. To that end, an image processing approach is proposed that could produce 3D patient respiratory geometries from 2D chest X-rays and 3D CT images. We evaluated the airway and lung morphology produced by our image processing framework, and assessed deposition compared to in vivo data. The 2D-to-3D image processing reproduces airway diameter to 9% median error compared to ground truth segmentations, but is sensitive to outliers of up to 33% due to lung outline noise. Predicted regional deposition gave 5% median error compared to in vivo measurements. The proposed framework is capable of providing patient-specific deposition measurements for varying treatments, to determine which treatment would best satisfy the needs imposed by each patient (such as disease and lung/airway morphology). Integration of patient-specific modelling into clinical practice as an additional decision-making tool could optimise treatment plans and lower the burden of respiratory diseases.
abstract_zh: 对于 10 亿呼吸系统疾病患者来说，使用吸入器控制疾病对他们的生活质量至关重要。可以借助考虑患者特定特征（例如呼吸模式、肺部病理学和形态学）的计算模型来改进通用治疗计划。因此，我们的目标是开发和验证用于患者特定沉积建模的自动化计算框架。为此，提出了一种图像处理方法，可以根据 2D 胸部 X 射线和 3D CT 图像生成 3D 患者呼吸几何形状。我们评估了图像处理框架产生的气道和肺部形态，并与体内数据相比评估了沉积。与地面真实分割相比，2D 到 3D 图像处理将气道直径再现为 9% 的中值误差，但由于肺部轮廓噪声而对高达 33% 的异常值敏感。与体内测量相比，预测的区域沉积的中值误差为 5%。所提出的框架能够为不同的治疗提供特定于患者的沉积测量，以确定哪种治疗最能满足每个患者的需求（例如疾病和肺/气道形态）。将患者特异性模型作为额外的决策工具整合到临床实践中可以优化治疗计划并减轻呼吸系统疾病的负担。

AI.tldr: 开发并验证一种基于统计形状模型和卷积神经网络的自动化计算框架，用于从2D和3D医学图像预测患者特异性呼吸道药物沉积。
AI.motivation: 呼吸系统疾病患者数量庞大，通用治疗方案难以满足个体差异需求，需通过考虑患者呼吸模式、肺部病理和形态的计算模型优化治疗方案。
AI.method: 提出图像处理方法，从2D胸部X光和3D CT图像生成患者呼吸道3D几何结构，并通过统计形状模型与卷积神经网络进行药物沉积预测，结合体内数据验证模型准确性。
AI.result: 2D到3D图像处理的气道直径中位数误差为9%，沉积预测中位数误差为5%，但受肺部轮廓噪声影响存在高达33%的异常值敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可提供个性化药物沉积测量，辅助临床制定优化治疗方案，降低呼吸系统疾病负担。

authors_text: Heejeong Choi,Pilsung Kang
title: Multi-Task Self-Supervised Time-Series Representation Learning
title_zh: 多任务自监督时间序列表示学习
abstract: Time-series representation learning can extract representations from data with temporal dynamics and sparse labels. When labeled data are sparse but unlabeled data are abundant, contrastive learning, i.e., a framework to learn a latent space where similar samples are close to each other while dissimilar ones are far from each other, has shown outstanding performance. This strategy can encourage varied consistency of time-series representations depending on the positive pair selection and contrastive loss. We propose a new time-series representation learning method by combining the advantages of self-supervised tasks related to contextual, temporal, and transformation consistency. It allows the network to learn general representations for various downstream tasks and domains. Specifically, we first adopt data preprocessing to generate positive and negative pairs for each self-supervised task. The model then performs contextual, temporal, and transformation contrastive learning and is optimized jointly using their contrastive losses. We further investigate an uncertainty weighting approach to enable effective multi-task learning by considering the contribution of each consistency. We evaluate the proposed framework on three downstream tasks: time-series classification, forecasting, and anomaly detection. Experimental results show that our method not only outperforms the benchmark models on these downstream tasks, but also shows efficiency in cross-domain transfer learning.
summary: Time-series representation learning can extract representations from data with temporal dynamics and sparse labels. When labeled data are sparse but unlabeled data are abundant, contrastive learning, i.e., a framework to learn a latent space where similar samples are close to each other while dissimilar ones are far from each other, has shown outstanding performance. This strategy can encourage varied consistency of time-series representations depending on the positive pair selection and contrastive loss. We propose a new time-series representation learning method by combining the advantages of self-supervised tasks related to contextual, temporal, and transformation consistency. It allows the network to learn general representations for various downstream tasks and domains. Specifically, we first adopt data preprocessing to generate positive and negative pairs for each self-supervised task. The model then performs contextual, temporal, and transformation contrastive learning and is optimized jointly using their contrastive losses. We further investigate an uncertainty weighting approach to enable effective multi-task learning by considering the contribution of each consistency. We evaluate the proposed framework on three downstream tasks: time-series classification, forecasting, and anomaly detection. Experimental results show that our method not only outperforms the benchmark models on these downstream tasks, but also shows efficiency in cross-domain transfer learning.
abstract_zh: 时间序列表示学习可以从具有时间动态和稀疏标签的数据中提取表示。当标记数据稀疏但未标记数据丰富时，对比学习（即学习相似样本彼此接近而不同样本彼此远离的潜在空间的框架）表现出了出色的性能。该策略可以根据正对选择和对比损失来鼓励时间序列表示的不同一致性。我们结合了与上下文、时间和转换一致性相关的自监督任务的优点，提出了一种新的时间序列表示学习方法。它允许网络学习各种下游任务和领域的一般表示。具体来说，我们首先采用数据预处理来为每个自监督任务生成正负对。然后，该模型执行上下文、时间和转换对比学习，并使用它们的对比损失联合优化。我们进一步研究了一种不确定性加权方法，通过考虑每个一致性的贡献来实现有效的多任务学习。我们在三个下游任务上评估所提出的框架：时间序列分类、预测和异常检测。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅在这些下游任务上优于基准模型，而且在跨域迁移学习中也显示出效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合上下文、时序和转换一致性的多任务自监督时间序列表示学习方法，以提升跨任务和跨域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 时间序列数据标签稀疏但未标签数据丰富，传统对比学习依赖单一一致性目标可能限制表示能力，需融合多种一致性约束提升表征鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过数据预处理生成正负样本对，联合优化上下文、时序和转换一致性三个对比学习任务，并引入不确定性加权机制平衡多任务贡献。
AI.result: 在时间序列分类、预测和异常检测任务中均优于基准模型，且在跨域迁移场景下展现更优效率。
AI.conclusion: 多任务自监督框架通过融合多维度一致性约束与动态权重机制，可有效提升时间序列表征的通用性与迁移能力。

search_text: Multi-Task Self-Supervised Time-Series Representation Learning 多任务自监督时间序列表示学习 Time-series representation learning can extract representations from data with temporal dynamics and sparse labels. When labeled data are sparse but unlabeled data are abundant, contrastive learning, i.e., a framework to learn a latent space where similar samples are close to each other while dissimilar ones are far from each other, has shown outstanding performance. This strategy can encourage varied consistency of time-series representations depending on the positive pair selection and contrastive loss. We propose a new time-series representation learning method by combining the advantages of self-supervised tasks related to contextual, temporal, and transformation consistency. It allows the network to learn general representations for various downstream tasks and domains. Specifically, we first adopt data preprocessing to generate positive and negative pairs for each self-supervised task. The model then performs contextual, temporal, and transformation contrastive learning and is optimized jointly using their contrastive losses. We further investigate an uncertainty weighting approach to enable effective multi-task learning by considering the contribution of each consistency. We evaluate the proposed framework on three downstream tasks: time-series classification, forecasting, and anomaly detection. Experimental results show that our method not only outperforms the benchmark models on these downstream tasks, but also shows efficiency in cross-domain transfer learning. 时间序列表示学习可以从具有时间动态和稀疏标签的数据中提取表示。当标记数据稀疏但未标记数据丰富时，对比学习（即学习相似样本彼此接近而不同样本彼此远离的潜在空间的框架）表现出了出色的性能。该策略可以根据正对选择和对比损失来鼓励时间序列表示的不同一致性。我们结合了与上下文、时间和转换一致性相关的自监督任务的优点，提出了一种新的时间序列表示学习方法。它允许网络学习各种下游任务和领域的一般表示。具体来说，我们首先采用数据预处理来为每个自监督任务生成正负对。然后，该模型执行上下文、时间和转换对比学习，并使用它们的对比损失联合优化。我们进一步研究了一种不确定性加权方法，通过考虑每个一致性的贡献来实现有效的多任务学习。我们在三个下游任务上评估所提出的框架：时间序列分类、预测和异常检测。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅在这些下游任务上优于基准模型，而且在跨域迁移学习中也显示出效率。 本文提出一种结合上下文、时序和转换一致性的多任务自监督时间序列表示学习方法，以提升跨任务和跨域的泛化能力。 Heejeong Choi,Pilsung Kang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Qi Zheng,Daqing Liu,Chaoyue Wang,Jing Zhang,Dadong Wang,Dacheng Tao
title: ESceme: Vision-and-Language Navigation with Episodic Scene Memory
title_zh: ESceme：具有情景场景记忆的视觉和语言导航
abstract: Vision-and-language navigation (VLN) simulates a visual agent that follows natural-language navigation instructions in real-world scenes. Existing approaches have made enormous progress in navigation in new environments, such as beam search, pre-exploration, and dynamic or hierarchical history encoding. To balance generalization and efficiency, we resort to memorizing visited scenarios apart from the ongoing route while navigating. In this work, we introduce a mechanism of Episodic Scene memory (ESceme) for VLN that wakes an agent's memories of past visits when it enters the current scene. The episodic scene memory allows the agent to envision a bigger picture of the next prediction. This way, the agent learns to utilize dynamically updated information instead of merely adapting to the current observations. We provide a simple yet effective implementation of ESceme by enhancing the accessible views at each location and progressively completing the memory while navigating. We verify the superiority of ESceme on short-horizon (R2R), long-horizon (R4R), and vision-and-dialog (CVDN) VLN tasks. Our ESceme also wins first place on the CVDN leaderboard. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/qizhust/esceme}.
summary: Vision-and-language navigation (VLN) simulates a visual agent that follows natural-language navigation instructions in real-world scenes. Existing approaches have made enormous progress in navigation in new environments, such as beam search, pre-exploration, and dynamic or hierarchical history encoding. To balance generalization and efficiency, we resort to memorizing visited scenarios apart from the ongoing route while navigating. In this work, we introduce a mechanism of Episodic Scene memory (ESceme) for VLN that wakes an agent's memories of past visits when it enters the current scene. The episodic scene memory allows the agent to envision a bigger picture of the next prediction. This way, the agent learns to utilize dynamically updated information instead of merely adapting to the current observations. We provide a simple yet effective implementation of ESceme by enhancing the accessible views at each location and progressively completing the memory while navigating. We verify the superiority of ESceme on short-horizon (R2R), long-horizon (R4R), and vision-and-dialog (CVDN) VLN tasks. Our ESceme also wins first place on the CVDN leaderboard. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/qizhust/esceme}.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言导航 (VLN) 模拟在现实场景中遵循自然语言导航指令的视觉代理。现有方法在新环境中的导航方面取得了巨大进步，例如波束搜索、预探索以及动态或分层历史编码。为了平衡泛化性和效率，除了导航时正在进行的路线之外，我们还需要记住访问过的场景。在这项工作中，我们为 VLN 引入了一种情景场景记忆（ESceme）机制，当智能体进入当前场景时，它会唤醒智能体对过去访问的记忆。情景场景记忆使智能体能够对下一个预测有更大的想象。通过这种方式，代理学习利用动态更新的信息，而不仅仅是适应当前的观察结果。我们通过增强每个位置的可访问视图并在导航时逐步完成记忆来提供简单而有效的 ESceme 实现。我们验证了 ESceme 在短视野（R2R）、长视野（R4R）和视觉与对话（CVDN）VLN 任务上的优越性。我们的 ESceme 还在 CVDN 排行榜上获得了第一名。代码可用：\url{https://github.com/qizhust/esceme}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ESceme的视觉与语言导航方法，通过引入情景记忆机制提升导航效率与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉与语言导航方法在新环境中导航效果显著，但难以平衡泛化能力与计算效率，因此需要利用历史场景记忆辅助决策。
AI.method: 设计了一种情景记忆机制（ESceme），当代理进入新场景时激活历史记忆，结合当前观察动态更新记忆，增强对全局路径的预测能力。
AI.result: 在R2R、R4R和CVDN等任务中表现优异，尤其在CVDN榜单中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: ESceme通过有效利用历史场景记忆，显著提升了视觉与语言导航的性能与效率。

ai_content.conclusion: ESceme通过有效利用历史场景记忆，显著提升了视觉与语言导航的性能与效率。

authors_text: Deyu Bo,Chuan Shi,Lele Wang,Renjie Liao
title: Specformer: Spectral Graph Neural Networks Meet Transformers
title_zh: Specformer：谱图神经网络与 Transformer 的结合
abstract: Spectral graph neural networks (GNNs) learn graph representations via spectral-domain graph convolutions. However, most existing spectral graph filters are scalar-to-scalar functions, i.e., mapping a single eigenvalue to a single filtered value, thus ignoring the global pattern of the spectrum. Furthermore, these filters are often constructed based on some fixed-order polynomials, which have limited expressiveness and flexibility. To tackle these issues, we introduce Specformer, which effectively encodes the set of all eigenvalues and performs self-attention in the spectral domain, leading to a learnable set-to-set spectral filter. We also design a decoder with learnable bases to enable non-local graph convolution. Importantly, Specformer is equivariant to permutation. By stacking multiple Specformer layers, one can build a powerful spectral GNN. On synthetic datasets, we show that our Specformer can better recover ground-truth spectral filters than other spectral GNNs. Extensive experiments of both node-level and graph-level tasks on real-world graph datasets show that our Specformer outperforms state-of-the-art GNNs and learns meaningful spectrum patterns. Code and data are available at https://github.com/bdy9527/Specformer.
summary: Spectral graph neural networks (GNNs) learn graph representations via spectral-domain graph convolutions. However, most existing spectral graph filters are scalar-to-scalar functions, i.e., mapping a single eigenvalue to a single filtered value, thus ignoring the global pattern of the spectrum. Furthermore, these filters are often constructed based on some fixed-order polynomials, which have limited expressiveness and flexibility. To tackle these issues, we introduce Specformer, which effectively encodes the set of all eigenvalues and performs self-attention in the spectral domain, leading to a learnable set-to-set spectral filter. We also design a decoder with learnable bases to enable non-local graph convolution. Importantly, Specformer is equivariant to permutation. By stacking multiple Specformer layers, one can build a powerful spectral GNN. On synthetic datasets, we show that our Specformer can better recover ground-truth spectral filters than other spectral GNNs. Extensive experiments of both node-level and graph-level tasks on real-world graph datasets show that our Specformer outperforms state-of-the-art GNNs and learns meaningful spectrum patterns. Code and data are available at https://github.com/bdy9527/Specformer.
abstract_zh: 谱图神经网络（GNN）通过谱域图卷积学习图表示。然而，大多数现有的频谱图滤波器都是标量到标量函数，即将单个特征值映射到单个滤波值，从而忽略频谱的全局模式。此外，这些滤波器通常是基于一些固定阶多项式构建的，其表达能力和灵活性有限。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 Specformer，它有效地对所有特征值的集合进行编码，并在谱域中执行自注意力，从而形成可学习的组对组谱滤波器。我们还设计了一个具有可学习基础的解码器，以实现非局部图卷积。重要的是，Specformer 与排列是等变的。通过堆叠多个 Specformer 层，我们可以构建一个强大的光谱 GNN。在合成数据集上，我们表明我们的 Specformer 比其他光谱 GNN 可以更好地恢复地面实况光谱滤波器。在现实世界图数据集上进行的节点级和图级任务的大量实验表明，我们的 Specformer 的性能优于最先进的 GNN，并且可以学习有意义的频谱模式。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/bdy9527/Specformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Specformer，一种结合谱图神经网络与Transformer的新型模型，通过谱域自注意力机制提升图表示学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有谱图神经网络的滤波器表达能力有限，仅能处理单个特征值映射，且依赖固定阶数多项式，难以捕捉谱域全局模式。
AI.method: 设计谱域自注意力机制编码所有特征值，构建可学习的集合到集合滤波器，并引入可学习基底解码器实现非局部图卷积，保证置换等变性。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上更准确恢复真实谱滤波器，在现实图数据的节点级和图级任务中优于现有最先进GNN方法。
AI.conclusion: Specformer通过谱域注意力机制有效建模全局谱模式，为谱图神经网络提供更灵活的表达能力，推动图表示学习进展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Specformer，一种结合谱图神经网络与Transformer的新型模型，通过谱域自注意力机制提升图表示学习能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有谱图神经网络的滤波器表达能力有限，仅能处理单个特征值映射，且依赖固定阶数多项式，难以捕捉谱域全局模式。
ai_content.method: 设计谱域自注意力机制编码所有特征值，构建可学习的集合到集合滤波器，并引入可学习基底解码器实现非局部图卷积，保证置换等变性。

search_text: Specformer: Spectral Graph Neural Networks Meet Transformers Specformer：谱图神经网络与 Transformer 的结合 Spectral graph neural networks (GNNs) learn graph representations via spectral-domain graph convolutions. However, most existing spectral graph filters are scalar-to-scalar functions, i.e., mapping a single eigenvalue to a single filtered value, thus ignoring the global pattern of the spectrum. Furthermore, these filters are often constructed based on some fixed-order polynomials, which have limited expressiveness and flexibility. To tackle these issues, we introduce Specformer, which effectively encodes the set of all eigenvalues and performs self-attention in the spectral domain, leading to a learnable set-to-set spectral filter. We also design a decoder with learnable bases to enable non-local graph convolution. Importantly, Specformer is equivariant to permutation. By stacking multiple Specformer layers, one can build a powerful spectral GNN. On synthetic datasets, we show that our Specformer can better recover ground-truth spectral filters than other spectral GNNs. Extensive experiments of both node-level and graph-level tasks on real-world graph datasets show that our Specformer outperforms state-of-the-art GNNs and learns meaningful spectrum patterns. Code and data are available at https://github.com/bdy9527/Specformer. 谱图神经网络（GNN）通过谱域图卷积学习图表示。然而，大多数现有的频谱图滤波器都是标量到标量函数，即将单个特征值映射到单个滤波值，从而忽略频谱的全局模式。此外，这些滤波器通常是基于一些固定阶多项式构建的，其表达能力和灵活性有限。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 Specformer，它有效地对所有特征值的集合进行编码，并在谱域中执行自注意力，从而形成可学习的组对组谱滤波器。我们还设计了一个具有可学习基础的解码器，以实现非局部图卷积。重要的是，Specformer 与排列是等变的。通过堆叠多个 Specformer 层，我们可以构建一个强大的光谱 GNN。在合成数据集上，我们表明我们的 Specformer 比其他光谱 GNN 可以更好地恢复地面实况光谱滤波器。在现实世界图数据集上进行的节点级和图级任务的大量实验表明，我们的 Specformer 的性能优于最先进的 GNN，并且可以学习有意义的频谱模式。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/bdy9527/Specformer 获取。 本文提出Specformer，一种结合谱图神经网络与Transformer的新型模型，通过谱域自注意力机制提升图表示学习能力。 Deyu Bo,Chuan Shi,Lele Wang,Renjie Liao cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Kaushik Dey,Satheesh K. Perepu,Pallab Dasgupta,Abir Das
title: Domain Adaptation of Reinforcement Learning Agents based on Network Service Proximity
title_zh: 基于网络服务邻近度的强化学习Agent领域适应
abstract: The dynamic and evolutionary nature of service requirements in wireless networks has motivated the telecom industry to consider intelligent self-adapting Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents for controlling the growing portfolio of network services. Infusion of many new types of services is anticipated with future adoption of 6G networks, and sometimes these services will be defined by applications that are external to the network. An RL agent trained for managing the needs of a specific service type may not be ideal for managing a different service type without domain adaptation. We provide a simple heuristic for evaluating a measure of proximity between a new service and existing services, and show that the RL agent of the most proximal service rapidly adapts to the new service type through a well defined process of domain adaptation. Our approach enables a trained source policy to adapt to new situations with changed dynamics without retraining a new policy, thereby achieving significant computing and cost-effectiveness. Such domain adaptation techniques may soon provide a foundation for more generalized RL-based service management under the face of rapidly evolving service types.
summary: The dynamic and evolutionary nature of service requirements in wireless networks has motivated the telecom industry to consider intelligent self-adapting Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents for controlling the growing portfolio of network services. Infusion of many new types of services is anticipated with future adoption of 6G networks, and sometimes these services will be defined by applications that are external to the network. An RL agent trained for managing the needs of a specific service type may not be ideal for managing a different service type without domain adaptation. We provide a simple heuristic for evaluating a measure of proximity between a new service and existing services, and show that the RL agent of the most proximal service rapidly adapts to the new service type through a well defined process of domain adaptation. Our approach enables a trained source policy to adapt to new situations with changed dynamics without retraining a new policy, thereby achieving significant computing and cost-effectiveness. Such domain adaptation techniques may soon provide a foundation for more generalized RL-based service management under the face of rapidly evolving service types.
abstract_zh: 无线网络服务需求的动态和演进本质促使电信行业考虑使用智能自适应强化学习 (RL) 代理来控制不断增长的网络服务组合。随着未来 6G 网络的采用，预计会引入许多新型服务，有时这些服务将由网络外部的应用程序定义。为管理特定服务类型的需求而训练的 RL 代理可能不适合在没有域适应的情况下管理不同的服务类型。我们提供了一个简单的启发式方法来评估新服务和现有服务之间的接近程度，并表明最近服务的 RL 代理通过明确定义的域适应过程快速适应新的服务类型。我们的方法使经过训练的源策略能够适应动态变化的新情况，而无需重新训练新策略，从而实现显着的计算和成本效益。面对快速发展的服务类型，此类域适应技术可能很快就会为更通用的基于强化学习的服务管理提供基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于网络服务邻近性的强化学习领域适应方法，使训练好的RL代理能快速适应新服务类型而无需重新训练。
AI.motivation: 无线网络服务需求动态变化且6G时代将涌现大量外部定义的新服务，传统RL代理难以跨服务类型泛化，需低成本适应新场景。
AI.method: 设计启发式邻近性度量方法评估新旧服务相似性，通过最邻近服务的预训练RL代理进行领域适应，利用动态调整策略参数实现快速迁移。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法能使源策略在无需重训练情况下有效适应新服务，显著降低计算成本并提升部署效率。
AI.conclusion: 领域适应技术为未来6G网络中多样化服务的智能管理提供了通用RL框架，可支撑服务需求的快速演进。

authors_text: Jiacheng Yuan,Changhyun Choi,Ellad B. Tadmor,Volkan Isler
title: Active Mass Distribution Estimation from Tactile Feedback
title_zh: 根据触觉反馈估计主动质量分布
abstract: In this work, we present a method to estimate the mass distribution of a rigid object through robotic interactions and tactile feedback. This is a challenging problem because of the complexity of physical dynamics modeling and the action dependencies across the model parameters. We propose a sequential estimation strategy combined with a set of robot action selection rules based on the analytical formulation of a discrete-time dynamics model. To evaluate the performance of our approach, we also manufactured re-configurable block objects that allow us to modify the object mass distribution while having access to the ground truth values. We compare our approach against multiple baselines and show that our approach can estimate the mass distribution with around 10% error, while the baselines have errors ranging from 18% to 68%.
summary: In this work, we present a method to estimate the mass distribution of a rigid object through robotic interactions and tactile feedback. This is a challenging problem because of the complexity of physical dynamics modeling and the action dependencies across the model parameters. We propose a sequential estimation strategy combined with a set of robot action selection rules based on the analytical formulation of a discrete-time dynamics model. To evaluate the performance of our approach, we also manufactured re-configurable block objects that allow us to modify the object mass distribution while having access to the ground truth values. We compare our approach against multiple baselines and show that our approach can estimate the mass distribution with around 10% error, while the baselines have errors ranging from 18% to 68%.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过机器人交互和触觉反馈来估计刚性物体的质量分布的方法。由于物理动力学建模的复杂性以及模型参数之间的动作依赖性，这是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们提出了一种基于离散时间动力学模型的分析公式与一组机器人动作选择规则相结合的顺序估计策略。为了评估我们方法的性能，我们还制造了可重新配置的块对象，使我们能够在访问地面实况值的同时修改对象质量分布。我们将我们的方法与多个基线进行比较，结果表明我们的方法可以估计质量分布，误差约为 10%，而基线的误差范围为 18% 到 68%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过机器人交互与触觉反馈估计刚性物体质量分布的方法。
AI.motivation: 质量分布估计因物理动态模型复杂性和参数间动作依赖性而具有挑战性，现有方法存在较大误差。
AI.method: 采用顺序估计策略结合离散时间动力学模型的分析公式，设计机器人动作选择规则。
AI.result: 方法在可重构物体测试中实现约10%误差，显著优于基线方法（18%-68%误差）。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了质量分布估计问题，验证了触觉反馈与主动交互的可行性。

ai_content.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了质量分布估计问题，验证了触觉反馈与主动交互的可行性。

authors_text: Eryk Banatt,Vickram Rajendran,Liam Packer
title: Target Domain Data induces Negative Transfer in Mixed Domain Training with Disjoint Classes
title_zh: 目标域数据在不相交类的混合域训练中引起负迁移
abstract: In practical scenarios, it is often the case that the available training data within the target domain only exist for a limited number of classes, with the remaining classes only available within surrogate domains. We show that including the target domain in training when there exist disjoint classes between the target and surrogate domains creates significant negative transfer, and causes performance to significantly decrease compared to training without the target domain at all. We hypothesize that this negative transfer is due to an intermediate shortcut that only occurs when multiple source domains are present, and provide experimental evidence that this may be the case. We show that this phenomena occurs on over 25 distinct domain shifts, both synthetic and real, and in many cases deteriorates the performance to well worse than random, even when using state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods.
summary: In practical scenarios, it is often the case that the available training data within the target domain only exist for a limited number of classes, with the remaining classes only available within surrogate domains. We show that including the target domain in training when there exist disjoint classes between the target and surrogate domains creates significant negative transfer, and causes performance to significantly decrease compared to training without the target domain at all. We hypothesize that this negative transfer is due to an intermediate shortcut that only occurs when multiple source domains are present, and provide experimental evidence that this may be the case. We show that this phenomena occurs on over 25 distinct domain shifts, both synthetic and real, and in many cases deteriorates the performance to well worse than random, even when using state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods.
abstract_zh: 在实际场景中，通常的情况是目标域内的可用训练数据仅存在于有限数量的类中，而其余类仅在代理域中可用。我们表明，当目标域和代理域之间存在不相交的类时，在训练中包含目标域会产生显着的负迁移，并且与根本没有目标域的训练相比，导致性能显着下降。我们假设这种负迁移是由于仅在存在多个源域时才发生的中间捷径造成的，并提供了实验证据证明情况可能如此。我们表明，这种现象发生在超过 25 个不同的域转移（合成的和真实的）中，并且在许多情况下，即使使用最先进的域适应方法，性能也会恶化到比随机性能更差。

AI.tldr: 论文探讨了在目标领域数据与替代领域存在不相交类别时，混合领域训练中的负迁移现象及其影响。
AI.motivation: 实际场景中目标领域数据可能仅覆盖部分类别，而其他类别存在于替代领域。传统方法假设领域间类别重叠，但现实中类别不重叠时可能引发性能下降，需解释此现象。
AI.method: 通过实验验证负迁移的存在，假设其源于多源领域下的中间快捷方式，并在多种合成与真实领域转移任务中测试。
AI.result: 在25+领域转移案例中，混合训练导致性能显著下降，甚至低于随机水平，即使采用先进领域自适应方法亦无法缓解。
AI.conclusion: 当目标领域与替代领域类别不重叠时，混合训练会引发负迁移，需调整训练策略以避免性能恶化。

search_text: Target Domain Data induces Negative Transfer in Mixed Domain Training with Disjoint Classes 目标域数据在不相交类的混合域训练中引起负迁移 In practical scenarios, it is often the case that the available training data within the target domain only exist for a limited number of classes, with the remaining classes only available within surrogate domains. We show that including the target domain in training when there exist disjoint classes between the target and surrogate domains creates significant negative transfer, and causes performance to significantly decrease compared to training without the target domain at all. We hypothesize that this negative transfer is due to an intermediate shortcut that only occurs when multiple source domains are present, and provide experimental evidence that this may be the case. We show that this phenomena occurs on over 25 distinct domain shifts, both synthetic and real, and in many cases deteriorates the performance to well worse than random, even when using state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods. 在实际场景中，通常的情况是目标域内的可用训练数据仅存在于有限数量的类中，而其余类仅在代理域中可用。我们表明，当目标域和代理域之间存在不相交的类时，在训练中包含目标域会产生显着的负迁移，并且与根本没有目标域的训练相比，导致性能显着下降。我们假设这种负迁移是由于仅在存在多个源域时才发生的中间捷径造成的，并提供了实验证据证明情况可能如此。我们表明，这种现象发生在超过 25 个不同的域转移（合成的和真实的）中，并且在许多情况下，即使使用最先进的域适应方法，性能也会恶化到比随机性能更差。 论文探讨了在目标领域数据与替代领域存在不相交类别时，混合领域训练中的负迁移现象及其影响。 Eryk Banatt,Vickram Rajendran,Liam Packer cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuval Kirstain,Omer Levy,Adam Polyak
title: X&Fuse: Fusing Visual Information in Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: X&Fuse：在文本到图像生成中融合视觉信息
abstract: We introduce X&Fuse, a general approach for conditioning on visual information when generating images from text. We demonstrate the potential of X&Fuse in three different text-to-image generation scenarios. (i) When a bank of images is available, we retrieve and condition on a related image (Retrieve&Fuse), resulting in significant improvements on the MS-COCO benchmark, gaining a state-of-the-art FID score of 6.65 in zero-shot settings. (ii) When cropped-object images are at hand, we utilize them and perform subject-driven generation (Crop&Fuse), outperforming the textual inversion method while being more than x100 faster. (iii) Having oracle access to the image scene (Scene&Fuse), allows us to achieve an FID score of 5.03 on MS-COCO in zero-shot settings. Our experiments indicate that X&Fuse is an effective, easy-to-adapt, simple, and general approach for scenarios in which the model may benefit from additional visual information.
summary: We introduce X&Fuse, a general approach for conditioning on visual information when generating images from text. We demonstrate the potential of X&Fuse in three different text-to-image generation scenarios. (i) When a bank of images is available, we retrieve and condition on a related image (Retrieve&Fuse), resulting in significant improvements on the MS-COCO benchmark, gaining a state-of-the-art FID score of 6.65 in zero-shot settings. (ii) When cropped-object images are at hand, we utilize them and perform subject-driven generation (Crop&Fuse), outperforming the textual inversion method while being more than x100 faster. (iii) Having oracle access to the image scene (Scene&Fuse), allows us to achieve an FID score of 5.03 on MS-COCO in zero-shot settings. Our experiments indicate that X&Fuse is an effective, easy-to-adapt, simple, and general approach for scenarios in which the model may benefit from additional visual information.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 X&Fuse，这是一种在从文本生成图像时调节视觉信息的通用方法。我们展示了 X&Fuse 在三种不同的文本到图像生成场景中的潜力。 (i) 当有一组图像可用时，我们检索相关图像并对其进行调节 (Retrieve&Fuse)，从而在 MS-COCO 基准上取得显着改进，在零样本设置中获得最先进的 FID 分数 6.65。 (ii) 当裁剪后的对象图像出现时，我们利用它们并执行主题驱动生成 (Crop&Fuse)，优于文本反转方法，同时速度快 100 倍以上。 (iii) 通过 Oracle 访问图像场景 (Scene&Fuse)，我们可以在零样本设置下在 MS-COCO 上获得 5.03 的 FID 分数。我们的实验表明，对于模型可能受益于附加视觉信息的场景，X&Fuse 是一种有效、易于适应、简单且通用的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出X&Fuse方法，通过融合视觉信息提升文本到图像生成的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统文本到图像生成模型仅依赖文本描述，无法有效利用额外视觉信息。本文旨在探索如何在生成过程中结合视觉信息以提升生成质量。
AI.method: 提出三种视觉融合场景：1) 从图像库检索相关图像进行融合（Retrieve&Fuse）；2) 利用裁剪对象图像进行主体驱动生成（Crop&Fuse）；3) 基于场景信息的融合（Scene&Fuse），通过不同视觉输入条件优化生成过程。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO基准测试中，零样本设置下FID得分达6.65（Retrieve&Fuse）和5.03（Scene&Fuse），Crop&Fuse方法比文本反演法快100倍以上且性能更优。
AI.conclusion: X&Fuse是一种有效、易适应且通用的视觉信息融合方法，适用于需要补充视觉条件的文本到图像生成场景。

authors_text: Aniket Datar,Chenhui Pan,Mohammad Nazeri,Xuesu Xiao
title: Toward Wheeled Mobility on Vertically Challenging Terrain: Platforms, Datasets, and Algorithms
title_zh: 在垂直挑战性地形上实现轮式移动：平台、数据集和算法
abstract: Most conventional wheeled robots can only move in flat environments and simply divide their planar workspaces into free spaces and obstacles. Deeming obstacles as non-traversable significantly limits wheeled robots' mobility in real-world, extremely rugged, off-road environments, where part of the terrain (e.g., irregular boulders and fallen trees) will be treated as non-traversable obstacles. To improve wheeled mobility in those environments with vertically challenging terrain, we present two wheeled platforms with little hardware modification compared to conventional wheeled robots; we collect datasets of our wheeled robots crawling over previously non-traversable, vertically challenging terrain to facilitate data-driven mobility; we also present algorithms and their experimental results to show that conventional wheeled robots have previously unrealized potential of moving through vertically challenging terrain. We make our platforms, datasets, and algorithms publicly available to facilitate future research on wheeled mobility.
summary: Most conventional wheeled robots can only move in flat environments and simply divide their planar workspaces into free spaces and obstacles. Deeming obstacles as non-traversable significantly limits wheeled robots' mobility in real-world, extremely rugged, off-road environments, where part of the terrain (e.g., irregular boulders and fallen trees) will be treated as non-traversable obstacles. To improve wheeled mobility in those environments with vertically challenging terrain, we present two wheeled platforms with little hardware modification compared to conventional wheeled robots; we collect datasets of our wheeled robots crawling over previously non-traversable, vertically challenging terrain to facilitate data-driven mobility; we also present algorithms and their experimental results to show that conventional wheeled robots have previously unrealized potential of moving through vertically challenging terrain. We make our platforms, datasets, and algorithms publicly available to facilitate future research on wheeled mobility.
abstract_zh: 大多数传统轮式机器人只能在平坦的环境中移动，并且简单地将其平面工作空间划分为自由空间和障碍物。将障碍物视为不可穿越的障碍极大地限制了轮式机器人在现实世界中极其崎岖的越野环境中的移动性，其中部分地形（例如不规则的巨石和倒下的树木）将被视为不可穿越的障碍物。为了提高在具有垂直挑战性地形的环境中的轮式机动性，我们推出了两轮平台，与传统轮式机器人相比，几乎没有硬件修改；我们收集轮式机器人在以前不可穿越、具有垂直挑战性的地形上爬行的数据集，以促进数据驱动的移动性；我们还提出了算法及其实验结果，以表明传统轮式机器人具有以前未实现的在垂直挑战性地形中移动的潜力。我们公开我们的平台、数据集和算法，以促进未来对轮式移动的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过改进轮式机器人平台、收集数据集和开发算法，提升其在垂直挑战地形中的移动能力。
AI.motivation: 传统轮式机器人受限于平坦环境，无法应对真实世界中复杂的垂直地形，如不规则岩石和倒木，限制了其移动能力，需寻求解决方案。
AI.method: 提出两种硬件改动较小的轮式平台，收集机器人在垂直挑战地形上的数据集，并开发算法以提升其通过能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，传统轮式机器人通过改进的算法和平台，能够有效穿越之前视为不可行的垂直复杂地形。
AI.conclusion: 通过公开平台、数据集和算法，本文为轮式机器人在复杂地形中的移动研究提供了新方向和资源。

conclusion: 通过公开平台、数据集和算法，本文为轮式机器人在复杂地形中的移动研究提供了新方向和资源。
search_text: Toward Wheeled Mobility on Vertically Challenging Terrain: Platforms, Datasets, and Algorithms 在垂直挑战性地形上实现轮式移动：平台、数据集和算法 Most conventional wheeled robots can only move in flat environments and simply divide their planar workspaces into free spaces and obstacles. Deeming obstacles as non-traversable significantly limits wheeled robots' mobility in real-world, extremely rugged, off-road environments, where part of the terrain (e.g., irregular boulders and fallen trees) will be treated as non-traversable obstacles. To improve wheeled mobility in those environments with vertically challenging terrain, we present two wheeled platforms with little hardware modification compared to conventional wheeled robots; we collect datasets of our wheeled robots crawling over previously non-traversable, vertically challenging terrain to facilitate data-driven mobility; we also present algorithms and their experimental results to show that conventional wheeled robots have previously unrealized potential of moving through vertically challenging terrain. We make our platforms, datasets, and algorithms publicly available to facilitate future research on wheeled mobility. 大多数传统轮式机器人只能在平坦的环境中移动，并且简单地将其平面工作空间划分为自由空间和障碍物。将障碍物视为不可穿越的障碍极大地限制了轮式机器人在现实世界中极其崎岖的越野环境中的移动性，其中部分地形（例如不规则的巨石和倒下的树木）将被视为不可穿越的障碍物。为了提高在具有垂直挑战性地形的环境中的轮式机动性，我们推出了两轮平台，与传统轮式机器人相比，几乎没有硬件修改；我们收集轮式机器人在以前不可穿越、具有垂直挑战性的地形上爬行的数据集，以促进数据驱动的移动性；我们还提出了算法及其实验结果，以表明传统轮式机器人具有以前未实现的在垂直挑战性地形中移动的潜力。我们公开我们的平台、数据集和算法，以促进未来对轮式移动的研究。 本文旨在通过改进轮式机器人平台、收集数据集和开发算法，提升其在垂直挑战地形中的移动能力。 Aniket Datar,Chenhui Pan,Mohammad Nazeri,Xuesu Xiao cs.RO

authors_text: Huiwon Jang,Hankook Lee,Jinwoo Shin
title: Unsupervised Meta-Learning via Few-shot Pseudo-supervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过小样本伪监督对比学习进行无监督元学习
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2023 (Spotlight). The first two authors contributed equally. The code is available at https://github.com/alinlab/PsCo
comments: Accepted to ICLR 2023 (Spotlight). The first two authors contributed equally. The code is available at https://github.com/alinlab/PsCo
abstract: Unsupervised meta-learning aims to learn generalizable knowledge across a distribution of tasks constructed from unlabeled data. Here, the main challenge is how to construct diverse tasks for meta-learning without label information; recent works have proposed to create, e.g., pseudo-labeling via pretrained representations or creating synthetic samples via generative models. However, such a task construction strategy is fundamentally limited due to heavy reliance on the immutable pseudo-labels during meta-learning and the quality of the representations or the generated samples. To overcome the limitations, we propose a simple yet effective unsupervised meta-learning framework, coined Pseudo-supervised Contrast (PsCo), for few-shot classification. We are inspired by the recent self-supervised learning literature; PsCo utilizes a momentum network and a queue of previous batches to improve pseudo-labeling and construct diverse tasks in a progressive manner. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that PsCo outperforms existing unsupervised meta-learning methods under various in-domain and cross-domain few-shot classification benchmarks. We also validate that PsCo is easily scalable to a large-scale benchmark, while recent prior-art meta-schemes are not.
summary: Unsupervised meta-learning aims to learn generalizable knowledge across a distribution of tasks constructed from unlabeled data. Here, the main challenge is how to construct diverse tasks for meta-learning without label information; recent works have proposed to create, e.g., pseudo-labeling via pretrained representations or creating synthetic samples via generative models. However, such a task construction strategy is fundamentally limited due to heavy reliance on the immutable pseudo-labels during meta-learning and the quality of the representations or the generated samples. To overcome the limitations, we propose a simple yet effective unsupervised meta-learning framework, coined Pseudo-supervised Contrast (PsCo), for few-shot classification. We are inspired by the recent self-supervised learning literature; PsCo utilizes a momentum network and a queue of previous batches to improve pseudo-labeling and construct diverse tasks in a progressive manner. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that PsCo outperforms existing unsupervised meta-learning methods under various in-domain and cross-domain few-shot classification benchmarks. We also validate that PsCo is easily scalable to a large-scale benchmark, while recent prior-art meta-schemes are not.
abstract_zh: 无监督元学习旨在跨由未标记数据构建的任务分布学习通用知识。这里，主要的挑战是如何在没有标签信息的情况下构建多样化的元学习任务；最近的工作提出通过预训练表示创建伪标签或通过生成模型创建合成样本。然而，由于元学习期间严重依赖不可变的伪标签以及表示或生成样本的质量，这种任务构建策略从根本上受到限制。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种简单而有效的无监督元学习框架，称为伪监督对比度（PsCo），用于少样本分类。我们受到最近的自我监督学习文献的启发； PsCo 利用动量网络和先前批次的队列来改进伪标记并以渐进的方式构建不同的任务。我们广泛的实验表明，PsCo 在各种域内和跨域少样本分类基准下优于现有的无监督元学习方法。我们还验证了 PsCo 可以轻松扩展到大规模基准，而最近的现有技术元方案则不然。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督元学习框架PsCo，通过少样本伪监督对比学习解决无标签数据下的任务构建问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督元学习方法依赖固定伪标签或生成样本，受限于表示质量与生成效果，难以构建多样化任务。
AI.method: 设计PsCo框架，结合动量网络与历史批次队列，动态优化伪标签并渐进式生成多样化任务。
AI.result: 在多个领域内及跨领域少样本分类基准中优于现有方法，且能有效扩展至大规模数据集。
AI.conclusion: PsCo通过动态伪标签优化与任务构建机制，显著提升无监督元学习性能与可扩展性。

authors_text: Binggui Zhou,Xi Yang,Shaodan Ma,Feifei Gao,Guanghua Yang
title: Pay Less But Get More: A Dual-Attention-based Channel Estimation Network for Massive MIMO Systems with Low-Density Pilots
title_zh: 付出更少，收获更多：基于双注意力的信道估计网络，用于具有低密度导频的大规模 MIMO 系统
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications
comments: 16 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables. Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Wireless Communications
abstract: To reap the promising benefits of massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems, accurate channel state information (CSI) is required through channel estimation. However, due to the complicated wireless propagation environment and large-scale antenna arrays, precise channel estimation for massive MIMO systems is significantly challenging and costs an enormous training overhead. Considerable time-frequency resources are consumed to acquire sufficient accuracy of CSI, which thus severely degrades systems' spectral and energy efficiencies. In this paper, we propose a dual-attention-based channel estimation network (DACEN) to realize accurate channel estimation via low-density pilots, by jointly learning the spatial-temporal domain features of massive MIMO channels with the temporal attention module and the spatial attention module. To further improve the estimation accuracy, we propose a parameter-instance transfer learning approach to transfer the channel knowledge learned from the high-density pilots pre-acquired during the training dataset collection period. Experimental results reveal that the proposed DACEN-based method achieves better channel estimation performance than the existing methods under various pilot-density settings and signal-to-noise ratios. Additionally, with the proposed parameter-instance transfer learning approach, the DACEN-based method achieves additional performance gain, thereby further demonstrating the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method.
summary: To reap the promising benefits of massive multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems, accurate channel state information (CSI) is required through channel estimation. However, due to the complicated wireless propagation environment and large-scale antenna arrays, precise channel estimation for massive MIMO systems is significantly challenging and costs an enormous training overhead. Considerable time-frequency resources are consumed to acquire sufficient accuracy of CSI, which thus severely degrades systems' spectral and energy efficiencies. In this paper, we propose a dual-attention-based channel estimation network (DACEN) to realize accurate channel estimation via low-density pilots, by jointly learning the spatial-temporal domain features of massive MIMO channels with the temporal attention module and the spatial attention module. To further improve the estimation accuracy, we propose a parameter-instance transfer learning approach to transfer the channel knowledge learned from the high-density pilots pre-acquired during the training dataset collection period. Experimental results reveal that the proposed DACEN-based method achieves better channel estimation performance than the existing methods under various pilot-density settings and signal-to-noise ratios. Additionally, with the proposed parameter-instance transfer learning approach, the DACEN-based method achieves additional performance gain, thereby further demonstrating the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 为了获得大规模多输入多输出 (MIMO) 系统的巨大优势，需要通过信道估计获得准确的信道状态信息 (CSI)。然而，由于复杂的无线传播环境和大规模的天线阵列，大规模MIMO系统的精确信道估计面临着巨大的挑战，并且需要巨大的训练开销。为了获得足够的CSI精度，需要消耗大量的时频资源，从而严重降低系统的频谱和能量效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于双注意力的信道估计网络（DACEN），通过时间注意力模块和空间注意力模块联合学习大规模 MIMO 信道的时空域特征，通过低密度导频实现准确的信道估计。为了进一步提高估计精度，我们提出了一种参数实例迁移学习方法来迁移从训练数据集收集期间预先获得的高密度导频中学到的信道知识。实验结果表明，在各种导频密度设置和信噪比下，所提出的基于 DACEN 的方法比现有方法实现了更好的信道估计性能。此外，通过所提出的参数实例迁移学习方法，基于DACEN的方法实现了额外的性能增益，从而进一步证明了所提出方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双注意力机制的信道估计网络（DACEN），用于在低密度导频条件下实现大规模MIMO系统的高精度信道状态信息（CSI）估计。
AI.motivation: 大规模MIMO系统需要精确的CSI以提升性能，但传统方法因导频密度高导致频谱和能量效率低下，亟需降低导频开销的同时保持估计精度。
AI.method: 设计包含时序注意力模块和空间注意力模块的DACEN网络，联合学习时频域特征；并引入参数-实例迁移学习方法，利用高密度导频预训练知识提升低密度场景下的估计性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，DACEN在不同导频密度和信噪比下均优于现有方法，结合迁移学习后性能进一步提升，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DACEN通过双注意力机制和迁移学习有效解决了大规模MIMO低密度导频下的信道估计难题，具有显著的性能优势。

authors_text: Zhenyi Liu,Devesh Shah,Alireza Rahimpour,Devesh Upadhyay,Joyce Farrell,Brian A Wandell
title: Using simulation to quantify the performance of automotive perception systems
title_zh: 使用仿真来量化汽车感知系统的性能
abstract: The design and evaluation of complex systems can benefit from a software simulation - sometimes called a digital twin. The simulation can be used to characterize system performance or to test its performance under conditions that are difficult to measure (e.g., nighttime for automotive perception systems). We describe the image system simulation software tools that we use to evaluate the performance of image systems for object (automobile) detection. We describe experiments with 13 different cameras with a variety of optics and pixel sizes. To measure the impact of camera spatial resolution, we designed a collection of driving scenes that had cars at many different distances. We quantified system performance by measuring average precision and we report a trend relating system resolution and object detection performance. We also quantified the large performance degradation under nighttime conditions, compared to daytime, for all cameras and a COCO pre-trained network.
summary: The design and evaluation of complex systems can benefit from a software simulation - sometimes called a digital twin. The simulation can be used to characterize system performance or to test its performance under conditions that are difficult to measure (e.g., nighttime for automotive perception systems). We describe the image system simulation software tools that we use to evaluate the performance of image systems for object (automobile) detection. We describe experiments with 13 different cameras with a variety of optics and pixel sizes. To measure the impact of camera spatial resolution, we designed a collection of driving scenes that had cars at many different distances. We quantified system performance by measuring average precision and we report a trend relating system resolution and object detection performance. We also quantified the large performance degradation under nighttime conditions, compared to daytime, for all cameras and a COCO pre-trained network.
abstract_zh: 复杂系统的设计和评估可以受益于软件模拟——有时称为数字孪生。该仿真可用于表征系统性能或在难以测量的条件下（例如汽车感知系统的夜间）测试其性能。我们描述了用于评估物体（汽车）检测图像系统性能的图像系统仿真软件工具。我们描述了使用 13 种具有不同光学器件和像素尺寸的不同相机进行的实验。为了测量相机空间分辨率的影响，我们设计了一系列驾驶场景，其中汽车处于许多不同的距离。我们通过测量平均精度来量化系统性能，并报告与系统分辨率和物体检测性能相关的趋势。我们还量化了所有摄像头和 COCO 预训练网络在夜间条件下与白天相比大幅性能下降的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文利用仿真技术量化汽车感知系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 复杂系统的评估可以通过软件仿真进行，尤其是在难以实际测量的条件下，如夜间环境。
AI.method: 使用图像系统仿真工具评估13种不同摄像头的性能，并通过设计多种驾驶场景来测量摄像头空间分辨率对目标检测性能的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，系统分辨率与目标检测性能之间存在趋势关系，并且夜间条件下的性能明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 仿真技术能够有效量化汽车感知系统性能，尤其是在复杂或极端条件下。

authors_text: Hongrui Zheng,Rahul Mangharam
title: Differentiable Trajectory Generation for Car-like Robots with Interpolating Radial Basis Function Networks
title_zh: 具有插值径向基函数网络的类车机器人的可微轨迹生成
abstract: The design of Autonomous Vehicle software has largely followed the Sense-Plan-Act model. Traditional modular AV stacks develop perception, planning, and control software separately with little integration when optimizing for different objectives. On the other hand, end-to-end methods usually lack the principle provided by model-based white-box planning and control strategies. We propose a computationally efficient method for approximating closed-form trajectory generation with interpolating Radial Basis Function Networks to create a middle ground between the two approaches. The approach creates smooth approximations of local Lipschitz continuous maps of feasible solutions to parametric optimization problems. We show that this differentiable approximation is efficient to compute and allows for tighter integration with perception and control algorithms when used as the planning strategy.
summary: The design of Autonomous Vehicle software has largely followed the Sense-Plan-Act model. Traditional modular AV stacks develop perception, planning, and control software separately with little integration when optimizing for different objectives. On the other hand, end-to-end methods usually lack the principle provided by model-based white-box planning and control strategies. We propose a computationally efficient method for approximating closed-form trajectory generation with interpolating Radial Basis Function Networks to create a middle ground between the two approaches. The approach creates smooth approximations of local Lipschitz continuous maps of feasible solutions to parametric optimization problems. We show that this differentiable approximation is efficient to compute and allows for tighter integration with perception and control algorithms when used as the planning strategy.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车软件的设计很大程度上遵循感知-计划-行动模型。传统的模块化自动驾驶堆栈分别开发感知、规划和控制软件，在针对不同目标进行优化时几乎没有集成。另一方面，端到端方法通常缺乏基于模型的白盒规划和控制策略所提供的原理。我们提出了一种计算有效的方法，通过插值径向基函数网络来近似闭合形式轨迹生成，以在两种方法之间创建中间立场。该方法创建参数优化问题可行解的局部 Lipschitz 连续图的平滑近似。我们证明，这种可微近似计算效率很高，并且在用作规划策略时可以与感知和控制算法更紧密地集成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于插值径向基函数网络的可微轨迹生成方法，用于类汽车机器人的路径规划，旨在结合传统模块化与端到端方法的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶系统模块分离导致优化目标难以整合，而端到端方法缺乏模型驱动的可解释性，需寻求兼顾效率与可解释性的中间方案。
AI.method: 采用插值径向基函数网络逼近参数优化问题的局部利普希茨连续映射，生成平滑轨迹并保持可微性，以实现感知与控制算法的紧密集成。
AI.result: 该方法计算高效，作为规划策略时能与感知和控制算法实现更紧密的协同优化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可微轨迹生成方法有效弥合了传统模块化与端到端方法的差距，在效率与可解释性间取得平衡。

authors_text: Shigemichi Matsuzaki,Hiroaki Masuzawa,Jun Miura
title: Multi-Source Soft Pseudo-Label Learning with Domain Similarity-based Weighting for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 具有基于领域相似性的语义分割加权的多源软伪标签学习
comment: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS2023)
comments: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS2023)
abstract: This paper describes a method of domain adaptive training for semantic segmentation using multiple source datasets that are not necessarily relevant to the target dataset. We propose a soft pseudo-label generation method by integrating predicted object probabilities from multiple source models. The prediction of each source model is weighted based on the estimated domain similarity between the source and the target datasets to emphasize contribution of a model trained on a source that is more similar to the target and generate reasonable pseudo-labels. We also propose a training method using the soft pseudo-labels considering their entropy to fully exploit information from the source datasets while suppressing the influence of possibly misclassified pixels. The experiments show comparative or better performance than our previous work and another existing multi-source domain adaptation method, and applicability to a variety of target environments.
summary: This paper describes a method of domain adaptive training for semantic segmentation using multiple source datasets that are not necessarily relevant to the target dataset. We propose a soft pseudo-label generation method by integrating predicted object probabilities from multiple source models. The prediction of each source model is weighted based on the estimated domain similarity between the source and the target datasets to emphasize contribution of a model trained on a source that is more similar to the target and generate reasonable pseudo-labels. We also propose a training method using the soft pseudo-labels considering their entropy to fully exploit information from the source datasets while suppressing the influence of possibly misclassified pixels. The experiments show comparative or better performance than our previous work and another existing multi-source domain adaptation method, and applicability to a variety of target environments.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种使用与目标数据集不一定相关的多个源数据集进行语义分割的域自适应训练的方法。我们通过集成来自多个源模型的预测对象概率，提出了一种软伪标签生成方法。每个源模型的预测基于源数据集和目标数据集之间的估计域相似性进行加权，以强调在与目标更相似的源上训练的模型的贡献并生成合理的伪标签。我们还提出了一种使用软伪标签的训练方法，考虑其熵，以充分利用源数据集中的信息，同时抑制可能错误分类的像素的影响。实验表明，与我们之前的工作和另一种现有的多源域适应方法相比，性能相当或更好，并且适用于各种目标环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多源数据集和域相似性加权的软伪标签学习方法，用于语义分割的领域自适应训练。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理多源数据时难以有效利用不同源数据与目标域的相似性差异，导致伪标签生成不够准确，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 通过整合多源模型预测概率生成软伪标签，基于域相似性对源模型预测进行加权，并结合熵值优化训练以抑制误分类像素影响。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在性能上优于之前的工作和其他多源领域自适应方法，且适用于多种目标环境。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过域相似性加权和熵优化有效提升了多源数据在语义分割领域自适应中的应用效果。
