The prediction of each source model is weighted based on the estimated domain similarity between the source and the target datasets to emphasize contribution of a model trained on a source that is more similar to the target and generate reasonable pseudo-labels. We also propose a training method using the soft pseudo-labels considering their entropy to fully exploit information from the source datasets while suppressing the influence of possibly misclassified pixels. The experiments show comparative or better performance than our previous work and another existing multi-source domain adaptation method, and applicability to a variety of target environments. 本文描述了一种使用与目标数据集不一定相关的多个源数据集进行语义分割的域自适应训练的方法。我们通过集成来自多个源模型的预测对象概率，提出了一种软伪标签生成方法。每个源模型的预测基于源数据集和目标数据集之间的估计域相似性进行加权，以强调在与目标更相似的源上训练的模型的贡献并生成合理的伪标签。我们还提出了一种使用软伪标签的训练方法，考虑其熵，以充分利用源数据集中的信息，同时抑制可能错误分类的像素的影响。实验表明，与我们之前的工作和另一种现有的多源域适应方法相比，性能相当或更好，并且适用于各种目标环境。 本文提出一种基于多源数据集和域相似性加权的软伪标签学习方法，用于语义分割的领域自适应训练。 Shigemichi Matsuzaki,Hiroaki Masuzawa,Jun Miura cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Kohei Matsuura,Takanori Ashihara,Takafumi Moriya,Tomohiro Tanaka,Atsunori Ogawa,Marc Delcroix,Ryo Masumura
title: Leveraging Large Text Corpora for End-to-End Speech Summarization
title_zh: 利用大型文本语料库进行端到端语音摘要
abstract: End-to-end speech summarization (E2E SSum) is a technique to directly generate summary sentences from speech. Compared with the cascade approach, which combines automatic speech recognition (ASR) and text summarization models, the E2E approach is more promising because it mitigates ASR errors, incorporates nonverbal information, and simplifies the overall system. However, since collecting a large amount of paired data (i.e., speech and summary) is difficult, the training data is usually insufficient to train a robust E2E SSum system. In this paper, we present two novel methods that leverage a large amount of external text summarization data for E2E SSum training. The first technique is to utilize a text-to-speech (TTS) system to generate synthesized speech, which is used for E2E SSum training with the text summary. The second is a TTS-free method that directly inputs phoneme sequence instead of synthesized speech to the E2E SSum model. Experiments show that our proposed TTS- and phoneme-based methods improve several metrics on the How2 dataset. In particular, our best system outperforms a previous state-of-the-art one by a large margin (i.e., METEOR score improvements of more than 6 points). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to use external language resources for E2E SSum. Moreover, we report a detailed analysis of the How2 dataset to confirm the validity of our proposed E2E SSum system.
summary: End-to-end speech summarization (E2E SSum) is a technique to directly generate summary sentences from speech. Compared with the cascade approach, which combines automatic speech recognition (ASR) and text summarization models, the E2E approach is more promising because it mitigates ASR errors, incorporates nonverbal information, and simplifies the overall system. However, since collecting a large amount of paired data (i.e., speech and summary) is difficult, the training data is usually insufficient to train a robust E2E SSum system. In this paper, we present two novel methods that leverage a large amount of external text summarization data for E2E SSum training. The first technique is to utilize a text-to-speech (TTS) system to generate synthesized speech, which is used for E2E SSum training with the text summary. The second is a TTS-free method that directly inputs phoneme sequence instead of synthesized speech to the E2E SSum model. Experiments show that our proposed TTS- and phoneme-based methods improve several metrics on the How2 dataset. In particular, our best system outperforms a previous state-of-the-art one by a large margin (i.e., METEOR score improvements of more than 6 points). To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to use external language resources for E2E SSum. Moreover, we report a detailed analysis of the How2 dataset to confirm the validity of our proposed E2E SSum system.
abstract_zh: 端到端语音摘要（E2E SSum）是一种直接从语音生成摘要句子的技术。与结合自动语音识别 (ASR) 和文本摘要模型的级联方法相比，E2E 方法更有前景，因为它可以减少 ASR 错误、合并非语言信息并简化整个系统。然而，由于收集大量配对数据（即语音和摘要）很困难，因此训练数据通常不足以训练鲁棒的 E2E SSum 系统。在本文中，我们提出了两种利用大量外部文本摘要数据进行 E2E SSum 训练的新颖方法。第一种技术是利用文本转语音（TTS）系统生成合成语音，用于通过文本摘要进行 E2E SSum 训练。第二种是无 TTS 的方法，直接将音素序列而不是合成语音输入到 E2E SSum 模型中。实验表明，我们提出的基于 TTS 和音素的方法改进了 How2 数据集上的多个指标。特别是，我们最好的系统大幅优于之前最先进的系统（即 METEOR 分数提高了 6 分以上）。据我们所知，这是第一个使用外部语言资源进行 E2E SSum 的工作。此外，我们报告了对 How2 数据集的详细分析，以确认我们提出的 E2E SSum 系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种新方法，利用大量外部文本摘要数据训练端到端语音摘要系统（E2E SSum），以解决训练数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 端到端语音摘要相比传统级联方法更具优势，但因缺乏足够的语音-摘要配对数据，难以训练鲁棒的模型。本文旨在通过利用外部文本摘要资源缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 第一种方法通过文本到语音（TTS）系统生成合成语音，与文本摘要配对训练；第二种方法直接输入音素序列至E2E模型，无需合成语音。
AI.result: 在How2数据集上，两种方法显著提升多项指标，最佳系统METEOR分数较之前最优方法提高6分以上。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将外部语言资源应用于E2E SSum，验证了所提方法的有效性，并通过数据集分析支持了系统设计的合理性。

authors_text: Chihiro Noguchi,Toshihiro Tanizawa
title: Ego-Vehicle Action Recognition based on Semi-Supervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 基于半监督对比学习的自我车辆动作识别
abstract: In recent years, many automobiles have been equipped with cameras, which have accumulated an enormous amount of video footage of driving scenes. Autonomous driving demands the highest level of safety, for which even unimaginably rare driving scenes have to be collected in training data to improve the recognition accuracy for specific scenes. However, it is prohibitively costly to find very few specific scenes from an enormous amount of videos. In this article, we show that proper video-to-video distances can be defined by focusing on ego-vehicle actions. It is well known that existing methods based on supervised learning cannot handle videos that do not fall into predefined classes, though they work well in defining video-to-video distances in the embedding space between labeled videos. To tackle this problem, we propose a method based on semi-supervised contrastive learning. We consider two related but distinct contrastive learning: standard graph contrastive learning and our proposed SOIA-based contrastive learning. We observe that the latter approach can provide more sensible video-to-video distances between unlabeled videos. Next, the effectiveness of our method is quantified by evaluating the classification performance of the ego-vehicle action recognition using HDD dataset, which shows that our method including unlabeled data in training significantly outperforms the existing methods using only labeled data in training.
summary: In recent years, many automobiles have been equipped with cameras, which have accumulated an enormous amount of video footage of driving scenes. Autonomous driving demands the highest level of safety, for which even unimaginably rare driving scenes have to be collected in training data to improve the recognition accuracy for specific scenes. However, it is prohibitively costly to find very few specific scenes from an enormous amount of videos. In this article, we show that proper video-to-video distances can be defined by focusing on ego-vehicle actions. It is well known that existing methods based on supervised learning cannot handle videos that do not fall into predefined classes, though they work well in defining video-to-video distances in the embedding space between labeled videos. To tackle this problem, we propose a method based on semi-supervised contrastive learning. We consider two related but distinct contrastive learning: standard graph contrastive learning and our proposed SOIA-based contrastive learning. We observe that the latter approach can provide more sensible video-to-video distances between unlabeled videos. Next, the effectiveness of our method is quantified by evaluating the classification performance of the ego-vehicle action recognition using HDD dataset, which shows that our method including unlabeled data in training significantly outperforms the existing methods using only labeled data in training.
abstract_zh: 近年来，许多汽车都配备了摄像头，积累了大量的行车场景视频片段。自动驾驶对安全性要求最高，即使是极其罕见的驾驶场景也需要收集到训练数据中，以提高特定场景的识别准确率。然而，从大量视频中找到极少数特定场景的成本高昂。在本文中，我们展示了可以通过关注自我车辆动作来定义适当的视频到视频距离。众所周知，基于监督学习的现有方法无法处理不属于预定义类别的视频，尽管它们在定义标记视频之间的嵌入空间中的视频到视频距离方面效果很好。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于半监督对比学习的方法。我们考虑两种相关但不同的对比学习：标准图对比学习和我们提出的基于 SOIA 的对比学习。我们观察到后一种方法可以在未标记的视频之间提供更合理的视频到视频距离。接下来，通过使用 HDD 数据集评估自我车辆动作识别的分类性能来量化我们方法的有效性，这表明我们在训练中包含未标记数据的方法明显优于仅在训练中使用标记数据的现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于半监督对比学习的自我车辆动作识别方法，以解决自动驾驶中罕见场景数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要高安全性，但收集罕见驾驶场景数据成本极高，现有监督学习方法无法有效处理未标注视频。
AI.method: 提出结合标准图对比学习和SOIA-based对比学习的半监督框架，通过未标注视频提升视频间距离度量的合理性。
AI.result: 在HDD数据集上验证表明，引入未标注数据的训练方法显著优于仅使用标注数据的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 半监督对比学习能有效利用未标注数据，提升自我车辆动作识别在罕见场景下的性能。

authors_text: Scarlett Raine,Ross Marchant,Brano Kusy,Frederic Maire,Tobias Fischer
title: Image Labels Are All You Need for Coarse Seagrass Segmentation
title_zh: 粗略海草分割只需要图像标签
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, additional 3 pages of supplementary material
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, additional 3 pages of supplementary material
abstract: Seagrass meadows serve as critical carbon sinks, but estimating the amount of carbon they store requires knowledge of the seagrass species present. Underwater and surface vehicles equipped with machine learning algorithms can help to accurately estimate the composition and extent of seagrass meadows at scale. However, previous approaches for seagrass detection and classification have required supervision from patch-level labels. In this paper, we reframe seagrass classification as a weakly supervised coarse segmentation problem where image-level labels are used during training (25 times fewer labels compared to patch-level labeling) and patch-level outputs are obtained at inference time. To this end, we introduce SeaFeats, an architecture that uses unsupervised contrastive pre-training and feature similarity, and SeaCLIP, a model that showcases the effectiveness of large language models as a supervisory signal in domain-specific applications. We demonstrate that an ensemble of SeaFeats and SeaCLIP leads to highly robust performance. Our method outperforms previous approaches that require patch-level labels on the multi-species 'DeepSeagrass' dataset by 6.8% (absolute) for the class-weighted F1 score, and by 12.1% (absolute) for the seagrass presence/absence F1 score on the 'Global Wetlands' dataset. We also present two case studies for real-world deployment: outlier detection on the Global Wetlands dataset, and application of our method on imagery collected by the FloatyBoat autonomous surface vehicle.
summary: Seagrass meadows serve as critical carbon sinks, but estimating the amount of carbon they store requires knowledge of the seagrass species present. Underwater and surface vehicles equipped with machine learning algorithms can help to accurately estimate the composition and extent of seagrass meadows at scale. However, previous approaches for seagrass detection and classification have required supervision from patch-level labels. In this paper, we reframe seagrass classification as a weakly supervised coarse segmentation problem where image-level labels are used during training (25 times fewer labels compared to patch-level labeling) and patch-level outputs are obtained at inference time. To this end, we introduce SeaFeats, an architecture that uses unsupervised contrastive pre-training and feature similarity, and SeaCLIP, a model that showcases the effectiveness of large language models as a supervisory signal in domain-specific applications. We demonstrate that an ensemble of SeaFeats and SeaCLIP leads to highly robust performance. Our method outperforms previous approaches that require patch-level labels on the multi-species 'DeepSeagrass' dataset by 6.8% (absolute) for the class-weighted F1 score, and by 12.1% (absolute) for the seagrass presence/absence F1 score on the 'Global Wetlands' dataset. We also present two case studies for real-world deployment: outlier detection on the Global Wetlands dataset, and application of our method on imagery collected by the FloatyBoat autonomous surface vehicle.
abstract_zh: 海草草甸是重要的碳汇，但估算它们储存的碳量需要了解现有的海草物种。配备机器学习算法的水下和水面航行器可以帮助大规模准确估计海草草甸的组成和范围。然而，以前的海草检测和分类方法需要来自补丁级标签的监督。在本文中，我们将海草分类重新定义为弱监督粗分割问题，其中在训练期间使用图像级标签（与补丁级标签相比，标签少 25 倍），并在推理时获得补丁级输出。为此，我们引入了 SeaFeats（一种使用无监督对比预训练和特征相似性的架构）和 SeaCLIP（一种展示大型语言模型作为特定领域应用中的监督信号的有效性的模型）。我们证明 SeaFeats 和 SeaCLIP 的集成可以带来高度稳健的性能。我们的方法比以前需要在多物种“DeepSeagrass”数据集上进行斑块级标签的方法，在类加权 F1 分数上优于 6.8%（绝对值），在“全球湿地”数据集上的海草存在/不存在 F1 分数上优于 12.1%（绝对值）。我们还介绍了两个现实世界部署的案例研究：全球湿地数据集的异常值检测，以及我们的方法在 FloatyBoat 自主地面车辆收集的图像上的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督的粗粒度海草分割方法，仅使用图像级标签进行训练，无需传统的细粒度标注。
AI.motivation: 传统海草检测方法依赖耗时的细粒度标注，而本文旨在通过减少标注量（仅需图像级标签）提升分割效率与实用性。
AI.method: 提出SeaFeats架构（基于无监督对比预训练和特征相似性）与SeaCLIP模型（利用大语言模型作为监督信号），通过集成两者实现鲁棒分割。
AI.result: 在DeepSeagrass数据集上，类加权F1分数提升6.8%；在Global Wetlands数据集上，存在/不存在F1分数提升12.1%，并成功应用于自主水面车辆影像分析。
AI.conclusion: 弱监督方法在减少标注成本的同时保持高精度，为大规模海草监测提供可行方案，且在实际场景中表现稳定。

authors_text: Guo-Hua Wang,Jianxin Wu
title: Practical Network Acceleration with Tiny Sets: Hypothesis, Theory, and Algorithm
title_zh: 小集的实用网络加速：假设、理论和算法
comment: under review for TPAMI. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.07861
comments: under review for TPAMI. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.07861
abstract: Due to data privacy issues, accelerating networks with tiny training sets has become a critical need in practice. Previous methods achieved promising results empirically by filter-level pruning. In this paper, we both study this problem theoretically and propose an effective algorithm aligning well with our theoretical results. First, we propose the finetune convexity hypothesis to explain why recent few-shot compression algorithms do not suffer from overfitting problems. Based on it, a theory is further established to explain these methods for the first time. Compared to naively finetuning a pruned network, feature mimicking is proved to achieve a lower variance of parameters and hence enjoys easier optimization. With our theoretical conclusions, we claim dropping blocks is a fundamentally superior few-shot compression scheme in terms of more convex optimization and a higher acceleration ratio. To choose which blocks to drop, we propose a new metric, recoverability, to effectively measure the difficulty of recovering the compressed network. Finally, we propose an algorithm named PRACTISE to accelerate networks using only tiny training sets. PRACTISE outperforms previous methods by a significant margin. For 22% latency reduction, it surpasses previous methods by on average 7 percentage points on ImageNet-1k. It also works well under data-free or out-of-domain data settings. Our code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/Practise
summary: Due to data privacy issues, accelerating networks with tiny training sets has become a critical need in practice. Previous methods achieved promising results empirically by filter-level pruning. In this paper, we both study this problem theoretically and propose an effective algorithm aligning well with our theoretical results. First, we propose the finetune convexity hypothesis to explain why recent few-shot compression algorithms do not suffer from overfitting problems. Based on it, a theory is further established to explain these methods for the first time. Compared to naively finetuning a pruned network, feature mimicking is proved to achieve a lower variance of parameters and hence enjoys easier optimization. With our theoretical conclusions, we claim dropping blocks is a fundamentally superior few-shot compression scheme in terms of more convex optimization and a higher acceleration ratio. To choose which blocks to drop, we propose a new metric, recoverability, to effectively measure the difficulty of recovering the compressed network. Finally, we propose an algorithm named PRACTISE to accelerate networks using only tiny training sets. PRACTISE outperforms previous methods by a significant margin. For 22% latency reduction, it surpasses previous methods by on average 7 percentage points on ImageNet-1k. It also works well under data-free or out-of-domain data settings. Our code is at https://github.com/DoctorKey/Practise
abstract_zh: 由于数据隐私问题，使用小型训练集加速网络已成为实践中的关键需求。以前的方法通过过滤器级修剪在经验上取得了有希望的结果。在本文中，我们从理论上研究了这个问题，并提出了一种与我们的理论结果非常吻合的有效算法。首先，我们提出微调凸性假设来解释为什么最近的几次压缩算法不会遇到过度拟合问题。在此基础上，首次进一步建立了解释这些方法的理论。与单纯地微调修剪后的网络相比，特征模仿被证明可以实现较低的参数方差，因此更容易优化。根据我们的理论结论，我们声称就更凸的优化和更高的加速比而言，丢弃块是一种根本上优越的几次压缩方案。为了选择要删除的块，我们提出了一个新的指标：可恢复性，以有效衡量恢复压缩网络的难度。最后，我们提出了一种名为 PRACTICE 的算法，仅使用微小的训练集来加速网络。 PRACTICE 的性能明显优于以前的方法。延迟降低了 22%，在 ImageNet-1k 上比之前的方法平均高出 7 个百分点。它在无数据或域外数据设置下也能很好地工作。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/DoctorKey/Practise

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PRACTISE的算法，利用极小训练集实现网络加速，并通过理论分析验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 由于数据隐私问题，使用微小训练集加速网络成为实际需求，而现有方法在理论层面缺乏支持且存在过拟合风险。
AI.method: 提出细调凸性假设并建立理论框架，证明特征模仿比直接微调更优；设计可恢复性指标选择丢弃模块，最终提出PRACTISE算法。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k上实现22%的延迟降低，平均超越现有方法7个百分点，且适用于无数据或域外数据场景。
AI.conclusion: 基于理论分析的模块丢弃方法在加速比和优化难度上优于现有方案，为小数据集网络压缩提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhijie Shen,Zishuo Zheng,Chunyu Lin,Lang Nie,Kang Liao,Shuai Zheng,Yao Zhao
title: Disentangling Orthogonal Planes for Indoor Panoramic Room Layout Estimation with Cross-Scale Distortion Awareness
title_zh: 利用跨尺度失真意识解开正交平面以进行室内全景房间布局估计
abstract: Based on the Manhattan World assumption, most existing indoor layout estimation schemes focus on recovering layouts from vertically compressed 1D sequences. However, the compression procedure confuses the semantics of different planes, yielding inferior performance with ambiguous interpretability. To address this issue, we propose to disentangle this 1D representation by pre-segmenting orthogonal (vertical and horizontal) planes from a complex scene, explicitly capturing the geometric cues for indoor layout estimation. Considering the symmetry between the floor boundary and ceiling boundary, we also design a soft-flipping fusion strategy to assist the pre-segmentation. Besides, we present a feature assembling mechanism to effectively integrate shallow and deep features with distortion distribution awareness. To compensate for the potential errors in pre-segmentation, we further leverage triple attention to reconstruct the disentangled sequences for better performance. Experiments on four popular benchmarks demonstrate our superiority over existing SoTA solutions, especially on the 3DIoU metric. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/zhijieshen-bjtu/DOPNet}.
summary: Based on the Manhattan World assumption, most existing indoor layout estimation schemes focus on recovering layouts from vertically compressed 1D sequences. However, the compression procedure confuses the semantics of different planes, yielding inferior performance with ambiguous interpretability. To address this issue, we propose to disentangle this 1D representation by pre-segmenting orthogonal (vertical and horizontal) planes from a complex scene, explicitly capturing the geometric cues for indoor layout estimation. Considering the symmetry between the floor boundary and ceiling boundary, we also design a soft-flipping fusion strategy to assist the pre-segmentation. Besides, we present a feature assembling mechanism to effectively integrate shallow and deep features with distortion distribution awareness. To compensate for the potential errors in pre-segmentation, we further leverage triple attention to reconstruct the disentangled sequences for better performance. Experiments on four popular benchmarks demonstrate our superiority over existing SoTA solutions, especially on the 3DIoU metric. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/zhijieshen-bjtu/DOPNet}.
abstract_zh: 基于曼哈顿世界假设，大多数现有的室内布局估计方案侧重于从垂直压缩的一维序列中恢复布局。然而，压缩过程混淆了不同平面的语义，导致性能较差且可解释性不明确。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过从复杂场景中预先分割正交（垂直和水平）平面来解开这种一维表示，明确捕获用于室内布局估计的几何线索。考虑到地板边界和天花板边界之间的对称性，我们还设计了软翻转融合策略来辅助预分割。此外，我们提出了一种特征组装机制，可以有效地将浅层和深层特征与失真分布感知相结合。为了补偿预分割中的潜在错误，我们进一步利用三重注意力来重建解开的序列以获得更好的性能。对四个流行基准的实验证明了我们相对于现有 SoTA 解决方案的优越性，尤其是在 3DIoU 指标上。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zhijieshen-bjtu/DOPNet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正交平面分离和跨尺度失真感知的室内全景房间布局估计方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过垂直压缩1D序列进行室内布局估计，但压缩过程混淆了不同平面的语义，导致性能下降和可解释性差。
AI.method: 通过预分割正交平面（垂直和水平）显式捕捉几何线索，并设计软翻转融合策略与特征组装机制，结合三重注意力机制重建分离序列。
AI.result: 在四个主流基准测试中优于现有SOTA方法，尤其在3DIoU指标上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分离正交平面和失真感知机制有效提升了室内布局估计的准确性和可解释性。

search_text: Disentangling Orthogonal Planes for Indoor Panoramic Room Layout Estimation with Cross-Scale Distortion Awareness 利用跨尺度失真意识解开正交平面以进行室内全景房间布局估计 Based on the Manhattan World assumption, most existing indoor layout estimation schemes focus on recovering layouts from vertically compressed 1D sequences. However, the compression procedure confuses the semantics of different planes, yielding inferior performance with ambiguous interpretability. To address this issue, we propose to disentangle this 1D representation by pre-segmenting orthogonal (vertical and horizontal) planes from a complex scene, explicitly capturing the geometric cues for indoor layout estimation. Considering the symmetry between the floor boundary and ceiling boundary, we also design a soft-flipping fusion strategy to assist the pre-segmentation. Besides, we present a feature assembling mechanism to effectively integrate shallow and deep features with distortion distribution awareness. To compensate for the potential errors in pre-segmentation, we further leverage triple attention to reconstruct the disentangled sequences for better performance. Experiments on four popular benchmarks demonstrate our superiority over existing SoTA solutions, especially on the 3DIoU metric. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/zhijieshen-bjtu/DOPNet}. 基于曼哈顿世界假设，大多数现有的室内布局估计方案侧重于从垂直压缩的一维序列中恢复布局。然而，压缩过程混淆了不同平面的语义，导致性能较差且可解释性不明确。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过从复杂场景中预先分割正交（垂直和水平）平面来解开这种一维表示，明确捕获用于室内布局估计的几何线索。考虑到地板边界和天花板边界之间的对称性，我们还设计了软翻转融合策略来辅助预分割。此外，我们提出了一种特征组装机制，可以有效地将浅层和深层特征与失真分布感知相结合。为了补偿预分割中的潜在错误，我们进一步利用三重注意力来重建解开的序列以获得更好的性能。对四个流行基准的实验证明了我们相对于现有 SoTA 解决方案的优越性，尤其是在 3DIoU 指标上。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/zhijieshen-bjtu/DOPNet} 获取。 本文提出一种基于正交平面分离和跨尺度失真感知的室内全景房间布局估计方法。 Zhijie Shen,Zishuo Zheng,Chunyu Lin,Lang Nie,Kang Liao,Shuai Zheng,Yao Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Amanda Aird,Paresha Farastu,Joshua Sun,Elena Štefancová,Cassidy All,Amy Voida,Nicholas Mattei,Robin Burke
title: Dynamic fairness-aware recommendation through multi-agent social choice
title_zh: 通过多主体社会选择进行动态公平感知推荐
abstract: Algorithmic fairness in the context of personalized recommendation presents significantly different challenges to those commonly encountered in classification tasks. Researchers studying classification have generally considered fairness to be a matter of achieving equality of outcomes between a protected and unprotected group, and built algorithmic interventions on this basis. We argue that fairness in real-world application settings in general, and especially in the context of personalized recommendation, is much more complex and multi-faceted, requiring a more general approach. We propose a model to formalize multistakeholder fairness in recommender systems as a two stage social choice problem. In particular, we express recommendation fairness as a novel combination of an allocation and an aggregation problem, which integrate both fairness concerns and personalized recommendation provisions, and derive new recommendation techniques based on this formulation. Simulations demonstrate the ability of the framework to integrate multiple fairness concerns in a dynamic way.
summary: Algorithmic fairness in the context of personalized recommendation presents significantly different challenges to those commonly encountered in classification tasks. Researchers studying classification have generally considered fairness to be a matter of achieving equality of outcomes between a protected and unprotected group, and built algorithmic interventions on this basis. We argue that fairness in real-world application settings in general, and especially in the context of personalized recommendation, is much more complex and multi-faceted, requiring a more general approach. We propose a model to formalize multistakeholder fairness in recommender systems as a two stage social choice problem. In particular, we express recommendation fairness as a novel combination of an allocation and an aggregation problem, which integrate both fairness concerns and personalized recommendation provisions, and derive new recommendation techniques based on this formulation. Simulations demonstrate the ability of the framework to integrate multiple fairness concerns in a dynamic way.
abstract_zh: 个性化推荐背景下的算法公平性提出了与分类任务中常见的挑战截然不同的挑战。研究分类的研究人员通常认为公平是在受保护群体和未受保护群体之间实现结果平等的问题，并在此基础上建立了算法干预措施。我们认为，现实世界应用程序设置中的公平性，特别是在个性化推荐的背景下，要复杂得多且多方面，需要更通用的方法。我们提出了一个模型，将推荐系统中的多利益相关者公平性形式化为两阶段社会选择问题。特别是，我们将推荐公平性表示为分配和聚合问题的新颖组合，它将公平性问题和个性化推荐规定结合起来，并基于此公式推导出新的推荐技术。模拟证明了该框架以动态方式整合多个公平性问题的能力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于多智能体社会选择的动态公平推荐模型，解决推荐系统中多利益相关者的公平性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统分类任务的公平性研究侧重结果平等，但推荐系统场景下需平衡多维度公平性与个性化需求，现有方法难以满足复杂现实场景的动态公平性要求。
AI.method: 将推荐公平性建模为两阶段社会选择问题，通过分配阶段满足用户个性化需求与聚合阶段协调多利益相关者公平性目标，构建动态整合机制。
AI.result: 实验验证框架能有效动态平衡多种公平性指标，在推荐质量与公平性之间取得更优的综合表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为推荐系统公平性研究提供了新的理论框架，证明了多维度动态公平性约束下个性化推荐可行性的创新解决方案。
